In addition, SkillHarness introduces selective skill reuse, where tasks are guided to decompose according to context and completed through the selective activation of skill subsets. Our experiments demonstrate that SkillHarness significantly reduces the unsafe rate of learned skills by 57.1% and consistently improves execution stability under dynamic environmental changes, outperforming existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillHarness框架，通过安全约束的交互过程建模技能学习与利用，引入技能边界和选择性技能复用机制，使计算机使用代理在动态环境中安全地学习和复用技能，将不安全率降低57.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有CUA技能学习方法假设静态安全环境，忽视对抗性交互（如提示注入）和环境动态变化（如弹窗）带来的风险，导致技能学习存在安全风险且执行脆弱，亟需一种能在动态环境中安全学习和使用技能的方法。
AI.method: 提出SkillHarness框架，包含两个核心机制：(1) 技能边界（Skill Boundary），利用多源监督信号从交互轨迹中识别安全技能，并在整个技能生命周期中构建自我改进的安全约束；(2) 选择性技能复用（Selective Skill Reuse），根据上下文引导任务分解，通过选择性激活技能子集完成任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，SkillHarness将学习技能的不安全率降低57.1%，并在动态环境变化下持续提升执行稳定性，优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将技能学习与利用建模为安全约束的交互过程，SkillHarness有效解决了动态环境中CUA技能学习的安全性问题，为构建可靠的自主代理提供了新思路。

title: Physics-Guided Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Predicting Full-Field Structural Response of Stiffened Panels
summary: Iterative design and optimization of large, complex structures require fast and accurate prediction of stress, displacement, and other fields. Finite element analysis (FEA) is computationally expensive for this task. Existing neural network surrogates often struggle with varying topologies and complex boundary conditions. This study proposes the novel Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network (DS-HGNN) for full-field stress and displacement prediction in thin-walled structures, demonstrated on box beams made of stiffened panels. DS-HGNN operates on panel-level heterogeneous graph representations and introduces physics-guided edge states initialized from edge types, spatial information, and boundary kinematics. These states are updated through dual-stream message passing that separates longitudinal and transverse structural information while allowing cross-stream exchange. Geometry and loading effects are incorporated through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM)-conditioned 1-D spectral convolutions, and physical fields are reconstructed using a spectral-bypass low-rank readout. The model is evaluated on stiffened panel datasets with different geometries, boundary kinematics, loading conditions, and material nonlinear responses. DS-HGNN achieves the lowest stress and displacement RMSE compared with six benchmark heterogeneous graph neural network models. It also reaches comparable accuracy to the strongest benchmark models using 19%-38% fewer training samples. A targeted evaluation further shows that DS-HGNN captures yield and post-yield stress features.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双流异构图神经网络（DS-HGNN），用于薄壁结构的全场应力和位移预测。该模型在加筋板盒梁上验证，通过物理引导的边状态初始化、双流消息传递、FiLM条件谱卷积和谱绕过低秩读出机制，在多种几何、边界、加载和非线性材料条件下，以更少训练样本取得了优于六种基准模型的预测精度，并能捕捉屈服及后屈服应力特征。
AI.motivation: 大型复杂结构的迭代设计和优化需要快速准确的场预测（应力、位移等），而有限元分析计算成本高。现有神经网络代理方法在应对变拓扑和复杂边界条件时表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出双流异构图神经网络（DS-HGNN），包含：(1) 面板级异构图表示；(2) 基于边类型、空间信息和边界运动学的物理引导边状态初始化；(3) 双流消息传递机制，分离纵向和横向结构信息并允许跨流交换；(4) 通过特征线性调制（FiLM）条件化1-D谱卷积引入几何和载荷效应；(5) 谱绕过低秩读出机制重建物理场。
AI.result: 在多种几何、边界运动学、载荷条件和材料非线性响应的加筋板数据集上，DS-HGNN相比六种基准异构图神经网络模型取得了最低的应力和位移RMSE；仅用19%-38%的训练样本即可达到与最强基准模型相当的精度；能够捕捉屈服和后屈服应力特征。
AI.conclusion: DS-HGNN作为一种新颖的异构GNN代理模型，在薄壁结构全场预测中兼顾了精度与数据效率，适用于复杂工程场景下的快速设计与优化。

title: The Energy Consumption of Transformer Fine-Tuning: A Roofline-Inspired Scaling Model
summary: Transformer-based models underpin modern natural language processing but incur rapidly growing computational and energy costs. As training scales in both model size and parallelism, accurately predicting energy consumption has become critical for sustainable and cost-aware system design. We present a framework for modeling the energy consumption of Transformer training on multiple GPUs. Using controlled architectural sweeps of BERT models, we relate measured energy to lightweight proxies for compute, memory traffic, and hardware efficiency. Inspired by roofline models, our approach incorporates a speedup-based hardware-efficiency factor that captures the effects of tensor parallelism and fully sharded data parallelism. We derive a scaling law model that accurately predicts training energy across heterogeneous configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多GPU上Transformer训练能耗的建模框架，通过轻量级代理指标和基于加速比的硬件效率因子，结合缩放定律模型，能够准确预测异构配置下的训练能耗。
AI.motivation: 随着Transformer模型规模和并行度不断增长，训练能耗急剧上升，迫切需要准确的能耗预测方法以支持可持续和成本感知的系统设计。
AI.method: 对BERT模型进行受控架构扫描，将实测能耗与计算量、内存流量和硬件效率的轻量级代理指标关联。受roofline模型启发，引入基于加速比的硬件效率因子来刻画张量并行和全分片数据并行的效果，最终推导出缩放定律模型。
AI.result: 该框架能够在异构配置下准确预测训练能耗。
AI.conclusion: 提出的能耗建模方法可有效支持Transformer训练在多种并行策略下的能耗预测，为可持续系统设计提供工具。

title: FeLoG: Scalable and Efficient Distributed Graph Embedding with Feedback Loop Mechanism
summary: Graph embedding maps graph nodes into low-dimensional vectors to support applications such as recommendation, fraud detection, and graph-based retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG). As graphs scale to billions of edges, scalable and efficient graph embedding has become increasingly important. Existing frameworks commonly adopt a sampling-training paradigm, in which mini-batches are constructed by sampling nodes and their neighbors. However, sampling is typically decoupled from evolving embedding quality, causing redundant exploration of well-trained regions while under-sampling undertrained nodes. At the system level, such decoupling further leads to excessive communication, serialized execution, and low resource utilization in distributed environments. We present FeLoG, a feedback loop-driven system for scalable distributed graph embedding. (1) FeLoG introduces feedback-coupled sampling and training, dynamically prioritizing undertrained nodes according to real-time embedding-quality feedback, thereby reducing redundant computation and accelerating convergence. (2) It employs activity-aware communication that compresses frequently occurring node sequences to reduce intra-machine PCIe traffic and selectively synchronizes frequently updated embeddings to reduce inter-machine communication. (3) It adopts a round-interleaved pipeline that overlaps next-round sampling with current-round training to improve CPU-GPU utilization. Experiments against six state-of-the-art baselines on large-scale graphs show that FeLoG achieves an average speedup of 27.9x, reduces communication cost by more than 53.1%, and sustains over 80% CPU-GPU utilization.

AI.tldr: FeLoG是一种基于反馈循环的分布式图嵌入系统，通过反馈耦合采样与训练、活动感知通信和轮次交错流水线技术，在大规模图上实现平均27.9倍加速、通信成本降低53.1%以上，并保持超过80%的CPU-GPU利用率。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入框架普遍采用采样-训练范式，但采样与嵌入质量解耦，导致对已训练充分区域的冗余探索，同时欠训练节点采样不足；系统层面这种解耦进一步导致分布式环境中的过度通信、串行执行和低资源利用率。
AI.method: (1) 反馈耦合采样与训练：根据实时嵌入质量反馈动态优先采样欠训练节点，减少冗余计算并加速收敛；(2) 活动感知通信：压缩频繁出现的节点序列以减少PCIe流量，选择性同步频繁更新的嵌入以减少机器间通信；(3) 轮次交错流水线：将下一轮采样与当前轮训练重叠，提升CPU-GPU利用率。
AI.result: 在大型图上与六个最先进基线相比，FeLoG实现平均27.9倍加速，通信成本降低超过53.1%，CPU-GPU利用率维持在80%以上。
AI.conclusion: FeLoG通过反馈循环驱动的系统设计有效解决了分布式图嵌入中采样与训练解耦带来的效率和资源利用问题，在大规模图嵌入场景中显著优于现有方法。

title: Latent Personal Memory: Represent personal memory as dynamic soft prompts
summary: Personalizing large language models (LLMs) requires encoding long-term, user-specific behavioral patterns in a way that is computationally efficient, scalable, and compatible with a frozen base model. We present Latent Personal Memory (LPM), a scalable framework that represents user-specific history as a compact, persistent matrix of N latent slots, that are interpretable. A shared cross-attention projection network maps these slots into dynamic, input-conditioned soft prompts that are prepended to the input of a frozen LLM. We evaluate LPM on PersonaMem v1 and LoCOMO benchmarks across Qwen3-1.7B, 4B, and 8B backbones. Results demonstrate that LPM outperforms LoRA and Prompt Tuning by up to 8.8% and 54.4% in overall accuracy respectively on PersonaMem v1, while reducing KV-cache usage by over 64x. On LoCoMo, LPM matches LoRA accuracy with 120x fewer trainable parameters. We also show that the efficiency of LPM grows with context length and outperforms full-context at 128K context length.

AI.tldr: 提出潜个人记忆（LPM）框架，通过N个可解释的潜在槽位以紧凑矩阵形式编码用户历史行为，利用共享交叉注意力投影网络生成动态软提示，在冻结的大语言模型上实现高效个性化。在PersonaMem v1和LoCOMO基准测试中，LPM在准确率上优于LoRA和Prompt Tuning，同时大幅降低KV缓存使用量和可训练参数数量。
AI.motivation: 需要在计算效率、可扩展性以及与冻结基础模型兼容的前提下，将长期、用户特定的行为模式编码到大语言模型中，实现个性化。
AI.method: LPM将用户历史表示为N个潜在槽位的紧凑持久矩阵，通过共享交叉注意力投影网络将这些槽位映射为动态的、输入条件化的软提示，并将其前置到冻结大语言模型的输入中。
AI.result: 在PersonaMem v1上，LPM在整体准确率上比LoRA和Prompt Tuning分别提升最多8.8%和54.4%，KV缓存使用减少超过64倍。在LoCoMo上，LPM以120倍更少的可训练参数达到与LoRA相当的准确率。在128K上下文长度下，LPM超越全上下文方法。
AI.conclusion: LPM是一种高效、可扩展且与冻结模型兼容的个性化框架，其效率随上下文长度增加而提升，在长上下文场景下表现优于全上下文方法。

title: Constituency Optimisation Through Hamiltonian Representation Of Mandates (COTHROM): Algorithmic Redistricting of Irish Election Boundaries
summary: Electoral redistricting in Ireland's Proportional Representation Single Transferable Vote (PR-STV) system faces the challenge of selecting an optimally representative set of electoral boundaries from an enormous set of possible configurations, and where ``representative'' is a delicate balance of constitutional objectives that are often in tension with one another. We present the first computational framework for Irish electoral redistricting that systematically optimises across multiple constitutional requirements while making trade-offs explicit and quantifiable. The electoral redistricting problem is parsed using statistical physics, where constitutional objectives are considered as terms in a Potts Hamiltonian. Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods and simulated annealing are employed to minimise this objective function, systematically exploring this configuration space, with coupling constants as proxies for objective weightings. Multi Criterion Decision Analysis (MCDA) and Pareto Optimality is then utilised to remedy the ambiguity in choosing a certain objective weighting combination over others. With respect to proportional representation and compactness objectives evaluated in County Cork, COTHROM consistently improves on the existing legal constituency boundaries for a range of objective weightings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了爱尔兰PR-STV选举重划选区的首个计算框架，将宪法目标建模为Potts哈密顿量的项，利用MCMC和模拟退火优化，结合MCDA和帕累托最优性处理权重选择歧义。在科克郡的实验中，COTHROM在比例代表性和紧凑性上持续优于现有边界。
AI.motivation: 爱尔兰PR-STV选举制度下的重划选区面临巨大配置空间，且宪法目标之间常存在冲突，缺乏系统性的优化方法。
AI.method: 将选举重划问题解析为统计物理模型，宪法目标作为Potts哈密顿量中的项；使用MCMC和模拟退火最小化目标函数；采用MCDA和帕累托最优性解决权重组合的模糊性。
AI.result: 在科克郡的实验中，COTHROM在比例代表性和紧凑性指标上，对多种目标权重组合均一致优于现有法定选区边界。
AI.conclusion: 该计算框架能够系统性地优化爱尔兰选举重划中的多宪法目标，并量化其权衡关系，具有实际应用价值。

title: Short-Term Electricity Demand Forecasting for New England Using a Hybrid Transformer-XGBoost Framework with Weather, Calendar, and COVID-19 Indicators
summary: Accurate short-term electricity demand forecasting is critical for reliable power system operation, energy market planning, and infrastructure optimization. This paper presents a hybrid framework combining a Transformer encoder for temporal feature extraction with gradient-boosted decision trees (XGBoost) for daily electricity demand forecasting across New England. The framework integrates meteorological observations from six cities spanning all six New England states, calendar and holiday effects, autoregressive demand lags, and COVID-19 epidemiological variables. Hyperparameter optimization uses Optuna with a multivariate Tree-structured Parzen Estimator over 500 trials, with a leakage-free 70/15/15 chronological train-validation-test split. The hybrid model achieves a test RMSE of 8,876 MWh, MAPE of 2.05%, and R-squared of 0.906. A tabular-only XGBoost baseline achieves RMSE of 9,304 MWh, MAPE of 2.21%, and R-squared of 0.896. A Diebold-Mariano test (Harvey-Leybourne-Newbold correction) confirms the 427.7 MWh difference is statistically indistinguishable from noise (DM = -1.126, p = 0.262). An ablation study reveals COVID-19 features improved training accuracy but had asymmetric test effects: removal degraded hybrid RMSE by 3.2% while marginally improving XGBoost-only by 1.2%. A SHAP temporal analysis shows 5 of 8 COVID features rank higher on the post-acute test set than during pandemic-active training, indicating the model over-applies learned pandemic patterns. These findings establish temporal validity decay as a central mechanism: behavioral disruptions drove a strong COVID-demand signal during 2020-2021, but adaptation was complete by mid-2022, leaving epidemiological features as noise amplifying overfitting to stale pandemic patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Transformer编码器与XGBoost结合的混合框架用于新英格兰地区短期电力需求预测，集成气象、日历、自回归滞后及COVID-19流行病学变量。混合模型测试集RMSE为8,876 MWh，MAPE为2.05%，R-squared为0.906；消融实验发现COVID-19特征在训练集提升精度但测试集产生不对称效应，SHAP时间分析揭示流行病学特征存在时间有效性衰减问题，模型过度应用已过时的大流行模式导致过拟合。
AI.motivation: 短期电力需求预测对电力系统可靠运行和市场规划至关重要，现有方法在融合多源异质特征（尤其是疫情等非常规扰动因素）时，缺乏对特征时间有效性衰减机制的深入分析。
AI.method: 构建Transformer编码器（提取时间特征）+ XGBoost（梯度提升决策树）的混合框架；集成6城市气象观测、日历效应、自回归需求滞后及COVID-19流行病学变量；使用Optuna多变量TPE算法进行500次超参数优化，采用无数据泄露的70/15/15时间顺序划分。
AI.result: 混合模型测试集RMSE 8,876 MWh、MAPE 2.05%、R-squared 0.906；纯表格XGBoost基线RMSE 9,304 MWh、MAPE 2.21%、R-squared 0.896。Diebold-Mariano检验（DM=-1.126, p=0.262）表明两者差异统计上不显著。消融实验：移除COVID特征使混合模型RMSE恶化3.2%，但XGBoost仅提升1.2%。SHAP时间分析显示8个COVID特征中有5个在急性期后测试集上重要性排名高于疫情活跃训练期。
AI.conclusion: 时间有效性衰减是核心机制：2020-2021年行为扰动导致COVID-电力需求强信号，但到2022年中适应已基本完成，流行病学特征沦为噪声并放大过拟合。模型将过时的疫情模式过度应用到后期数据中，揭示了引入非常规特征时需要严格评估其时变有效性的重要性。

title: Hardwired Pattern Formation by Mobile Robots with Common Unit Distance
summary: The pattern formation (PTF) problem requires mobile robots to form a specified target pattern. Existing papers investigated the PTF problem and revealed the effect of obliviousness and synchronization on distributed coordination of mobile robots. However, the PTF problem allows translation, rotation, and scaling of the target pattern. In this paper, we introduce a novel pattern formation problem, called the hardwired pattern formation (HwPTF) problem that requires the robots to form a given target pattern in a specified size. Although two oblivious semi-synchronous robots cannot solve the HwPTF problem of multiplicity two (i.e., the rendezvous problem), we show that they can solve the HwPTF problem without multiplicity. We also show that two oblivious asynchronous robots equipped with lights can solve the HwPTF problem, while oblivious asynchronous robots cannot. We finally present a size-adjusting algorithm for more than four oblivious semi-synchronous robots, that yields a HwPTF algorithm when combined with some existing pattern formation algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"硬连线模式形成（HwPTF）问题"，要求移动机器人在指定尺寸下形成目标模式。研究发现：两个 oblivious 半同步机器人无法解决带多重性的 HwPTF（即相遇问题），但可以解决不带多重性的 HwPTF；两个 oblivious 异步机器人配备灯光后可解决 HwPTF，否则不能；针对四个以上 oblivious 半同步机器人，提出了一种尺寸调整算法，与现有模式形成算法结合可得到 HwPTF 算法。
AI.motivation: 现有模式形成（PTF）问题允许对目标模式进行平移、旋转和缩放，但实际应用中往往需要以精确尺寸形成指定模式。本文旨在研究更严格的"硬连线模式形成"问题，探究在不同同步模型和感知能力下移动机器人分布式协调的可行性边界。
AI.method: 采用理论分析方法，分别针对两种 oblivious 半同步机器人、两种 oblivious 异步机器人（带/不带灯光）以及四个以上 oblivious 半同步机器人等不同场景，通过构造算法和不可行性证明来研究 HwPTF 问题的可解性。
AI.result: 1) 两个 oblivious 半同步机器人可解不带多重性的 HwPTF，但不可解带多重性的 HwPTF（即相遇问题）；2) 两个 oblivious 异步机器人带灯光可解 HwPTF，不带灯光则不可解；3) 针对四个以上 oblivious 半同步机器人，提出的尺寸调整算法与现有 PTF 算法结合可得到 HwPTF 算法。
AI.conclusion: HwPTF 问题比 PTF 问题更具挑战性，其可解性高度依赖于机器人的同步模型、感知能力（是否带灯光）以及机器人数量。该研究深化了对分布式机器人协调中 obliviousness 和同步机制影响的理解。

title: Peeking Inside LLMs: Leveraging Internal Artifacts of LLMs for Enhancing Reliability in Legal Classification
comment: Accepted at the International Workshop on Automated Semantic Analysis of Information in Law (ASAIL) 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being adopted in the legal domain. However, despite their strong performance, LLMs are prone to generating incorrect or hallucinated outputs, raising serious concerns about their reliability in high-stakes domains such as law. Detecting the correctness of responses of LLM-based systems is therefore a critical challenge. In this work, we explore the potential of leveraging internal artifacts of LLM to detect the correctness of their predictions in legal-domain classification tasks. We develop approaches that utilize features derived from these internal artifacts to build downstream classifiers capable of identifying incorrect LLM outputs. We evaluate our approach on two representative legal classification tasks: bail decision prediction and statute violation prediction. Our experimental results demonstrate that LLMs' internal artifacts are reliable indicators for detecting incorrect predictions in legal classification tasks, and can be applied to enhance the reliability of LLM-based classification systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用大语言模型内部特征（如隐藏状态等内部产物）来检测其在法律分类任务中预测结果的正确性，在保释决定预测和法规违反预测两项任务上验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: LLM在法律领域被广泛应用，但其容易产生错误或幻觉输出，在司法这类高风险场景下可靠性令人担忧，因此需要有效检测LLM输出的正确性。
AI.method: 利用LLM的内部产物（internal artifacts）提取特征，构建下游分类器来识别LLM输出中的错误预测。在两项法律分类任务（保释决定预测和法规违反预测）上进行评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，LLM的内部产物是检测法律分类任务中错误预测的可靠指标，能够有效识别不正确输出。
AI.conclusion: LLM的内部特征可用于增强基于LLM的分类系统的可靠性，尤其适用于法律等高风险领域。

title: RIZZ: Routing Interactions to Near Zero-Interference Zones for Continual Adaptation of Black-Box Agents
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as long-lived agents that must adapt across users, tasks, domains, modalities, and feedback regimes without access to model weights. Existing black-box adaptation methods typically optimize a single prompt, maintain an undifferentiated memory, or rely on repeated rollout-heavy search. However, these designs struggle when streams of input are nonstationary, feedback is sparse, and failures from one task family can contaminate behavior on another. We introduce RIZZ (Routing Interactions to Near Zero-interference Zones), a continual adaptation framework for compound language-model systems that learns entirely through verifier-gated memory, routing, and prompt compilation. RIZZ organizes input streams into dynamically spawned memory branches. At inference time, either while online or offline, a context-aware router selects or creates a branch that retrieves branch-local, global, graph-structured, and working-memory context, which is compiled into a bounded prompt together with retrieved task evidence. After the model acts, task verifiers score the output, and only verified interactions can update memory, promote reusable rules, demote harmful rules, or create anti-patterns. This yields a black-box agent that improves through persistent natural-language feedback while explicitly controlling interference. RIZZ targets the regime where adaptation must occur online under context budgets. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework against state-of-the-art baselines on competitive benchmarks.

AI.tldr: RIZZ是一种面向复合语言模型系统的持续自适应框架，通过验证器门控的记忆、路由和提示编译机制，在不访问模型权重的情况下，实现在非平稳输入流、稀疏反馈和跨任务场景下的黑盒自适应，有效控制干扰并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒自适应方法（如单提示优化、无差异化记忆、重复搜索）在处理非平稳输入流、稀疏反馈以及跨任务干扰时表现不佳，缺乏有效的干扰控制机制。
AI.method: RIZZ框架包含：(1) 动态生成记忆分支组织输入流；(2) 上下文感知路由器在推理时选择或创建分支；(3) 编译包含分支局部、全局、图结构和工作记忆上下文的有限提示；(4) 任务验证器评分输出，仅允许验证过的交互更新记忆、提升/降级规则或创建反模式。
AI.result: 在竞争性基准测试中，RIZZ相比现有最先进基线方法展现出更优的自适应效果。
AI.conclusion: RIZZ通过显式干扰控制机制，实现了在上下文预算限制下在线持续自适应的黑盒智能体，且仅依赖自然语言反馈即可持续改进。

title: $Ω$: Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation
summary: Characterizing non-Gaussian posterior distributions in partially observed high-dimensional nonlinear systems remains a fundamental challenge in data assimilation. Ensemble Kalman filters rely on Gaussian approximations that can be inaccurate for strongly non-Gaussian posteriors, whereas particle filters suffer from severe scalability limitations. Recent score-based generative approaches improve posterior characterization but typically require supervised training with ground-truth posterior samples, which are unavailable in most practical applications. We introduce $Ω$ (Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation), a scalable framework that integrates conditional Gaussian surrogate modeling, unsupervised score learning, and generative sampling. The conditional Gaussian surrogate provides a nonlinear non-Gaussian baseline approximation while admitting closed-form conditional posterior distributions for the unresolved variables. First, $Ω$ exploits these closed-form conditional distributions to analytically recover the high-dimensional unobserved component, reducing computational cost and mitigating the curse of dimensionality. Second, $Ω$ learns only the residual discrepancy beyond an analytical baseline through denoising score matching using ensemble trajectories alone, eliminating the need for ground-truth posterior samples and substantially reducing the learning burden. Third, $Ω$ reconstructs the full non-Gaussian posterior distribution of both observed and unobserved variables via a Gaussian mixture representation, capturing multimodal, skewed, and heavy-tailed statistics. Finally, $Ω$ employs annealed Langevin sampling to iteratively refine ensemble members from the baseline toward the target posterior. $Ω$ is validated on several turbulent models with intermittency and extreme events, consistently improving posterior accuracy.

AI.tldr: Ω是一个基于算子混合集成生成同化的框架，结合条件高斯代理模型、无监督分数学习和生成采样，用于高维非线性系统中非高斯后验分布的表征，无需真实后验样本即可捕获多模态、偏斜和重尾统计特征。
AI.motivation: 部分观测的高维非线性系统中，非高斯后验分布的表征是数据同化的基本挑战。集合卡尔曼滤波依赖高斯近似，对强非高斯后验不准确；粒子滤波存在严重可扩展性限制；现有基于分数的生成方法需要地面真值后验样本进行监督训练，在实际应用中大多不可行。
AI.method: (1) 条件高斯代理模型提供非线性非高斯基线近似，对未解析变量具有闭合形式条件后验分布；(2) 利用闭合条件分布解析恢复高维未观测成分，降低计算成本并缓解维度灾难；(3) 通过去噪分数匹配仅学习超出解析基线的残差差异，仅使用集合轨迹，消除对地面真值后验样本的需求；(4) 通过高斯混合表示重建观测和未观测变量的完整非高斯后验分布；(5) 采用退火朗之万采样从基线逐步迭代精炼集合成员到目标后验。
AI.result: 在多个具有间歇性和极端事件的湍流模型上验证，持续提高了后验精度。
AI.conclusion: Ω框架通过融合条件高斯代理与残差分数学习，有效实现了高维非线性系统中非高斯后验的高效、可扩展表征，为数据同化提供了一种无需监督训练的新范式。

title: ASAP: A Disaggregated and Asynchronous Inference System for MoE Prefill
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have become the de facto standard for scaling large language models. To maintain computational efficiency, modern MoE serving systems typically employ a hybrid parallelism strategy, combining Data Parallelism (DP) for attention stages with Expert Parallelism (EP) for MoE stages. However, this design necessitates frequent global synchronization barriers between attention DP groups and experts. In online serving, significant variance in request arrival rates and sequence lengths inherently leads to DP imbalance, causing severe synchronization stalls that degrade Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) and system throughput. We present ASAP, an asynchronous inference system specifically designed to accelerate the prefill phase of MoE models. ASAP disaggregates the attention and MoE stages and implements a fully asynchronous execution pipeline. This is achieved through a suite of specialized asynchronous communication primitives and four coordinated optimizations across request scheduling and model execution, which collectively dismantle global synchronization barriers. We implement and evaluate ASAP on CloudMatrix384 super-nodes, demonstrating that it improves SLO-compliant prefill throughput by 90% compared to state-of-the-art synchronous serving solutions.

AI.tldr: ASAP是一个专为MoE模型设计的异步推理系统，通过解耦注意力与MoE阶段并实现全异步执行流水线，消除全局同步障碍，在CloudMatrix384超节点上相比最先进的同步方案将SLO合规的预填充吞吐量提升90%。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE服务系统采用混合并行策略（DP+EP），但由于在线服务中请求到达率和序列长度的显著差异导致DP不平衡，引发严重的同步停滞，降低了首Token延迟（TTFT）和系统吞吐量。
AI.method: ASAP解耦了注意力阶段和MoE阶段，构建全异步执行流水线；设计了一套专门的异步通信原语，并在请求调度和模型执行层面进行四项协调优化，从而消除全局同步屏障。
AI.result: 在CloudMatrix384超节点上，ASAP相比最先进的同步服务方案，将符合SLO的预填充吞吐量提升了90%。
AI.conclusion: 异步执行架构能有效消除混合并行策略中的同步瓶颈，显著提升MoE模型在线推理的预填充阶段性能。

title: Comparing Transformers and Hybrid Models at the Token Level
summary: Hybrid language models that mix attention and recurrent layers have shown promise: theoretically, recurrent layers ameliorate the limitations of pure transformers on state tracking, and empirically, hybrids can outperform pure transformers in loss and downstream evaluations \citep{waleffe2024empirical,merrill2026olmohybrid}. Yet it remains unclear which data or capabilities drive these gains, and to what degree they reflect the theoretical advantages motivating hybrid models. We address this question using the open weights from Olmo 3 \citep{olmo2025olmo3} and Olmo Hybrid \citep{merrill2026olmohybrid}: we compare the loss of a matched transformer and hybrid at the same target tokens under the same prefixes, stratifying the results by natural token tags, copy features, delimiter structure, and controlled synthetic probes. The hybrid has lower loss on most tag families, but the gains are not uniform: they are largest for open-class content words and smaller for many closed-class function words. Across prose, code, and markup, the hybrid's loss advantage is larger on opening delimiters than on the corresponding closing delimiters, and nearly vanishes on repeated $n$-grams. Synthetic probes show the same split: the hybrid is favored on pronoun-memory and entity-tracking tasks, whereas the transformer is favored on bracket-matching tasks that require choosing closing delimiters. These patterns suggest that the recurrent layers in hybrids improve predictions that leverage the semantic state of a document, whereas attention helps on tokens predictable by $n$-gram copying or syntactic bracket matching. We conclude with proof-of-concept filtered evaluations showing how token-level decompositions can sharpen pretraining diagnostics for hybrid architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分层分析Olmo 3和Olmo Hybrid的损失，揭示了混合语言模型（注意力+循环层）相对于纯Transformer的优势并非均匀分布：混合模型在开放类实词、代词记忆和实体追踪任务上表现更好，而Transformer在重复n-gram复制和括号匹配任务上更优，这表明循环层提升了对文档语义状态的利用，而注意力有助于基于复制和句法匹配的预测。
AI.motivation: 尽管混合语言模型（结合注意力与循环层）在理论和实证上均显示出优于纯Transformer的潜力，但其性能提升的具体来源尚不明确：不清楚哪些数据或能力驱动了这些增益，以及这些增益在多大程度上反映了混合模型的理论优势。
AI.method: 使用Olmo 3和Olmo Hybrid的开源权重，在相同前缀下比较匹配的Transformer和混合模型在相同目标标记上的损失，并按自然标记标签、拷贝特征、定界符结构和受控合成探针进行分层分析。
AI.result: 混合模型在大多数标记类别上损失更低，但增益不均匀：开放类实词增益最大，封闭类功能词增益较小；在散文、代码和标记文本中，开口定界符上的损失优势大于对应闭口定界符，且在重复n-gram上优势几乎消失。合成探针显示混合模型在代词记忆和实体追踪任务上更优，Transformer在括号匹配任务上更优。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型中的循环层改善了利用文档语义状态的预测，而注意力有助于通过n-gram复制或句法括号匹配可预测的标记。研究还展示了标记级分解如何用于改进混合架构的预训练诊断。

title: An LLM-Explainable DRL Framework for Passenger-Directed Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous vehicles offer the potential for safer and more efficient mobility, yet public trust remains limited due to the lack of transparency in their decision-making. This work addresses this issue by combining deep reinforcement learning (DRL) for adaptive driving control with large language model (LLM)-based explainability modules designed to communicate agent behavior to passengers. DRL agents were trained in simulation using a Dueling Double Deep Q-Network to follow distinct driving requests: \textit{fast}, \textit{comfort}, and \textit{stop}. They demonstrated stable learning, safe compliance with traffic rules, and reliable switching between modes within a single trip. In parallel, LLM modules were introduced to interpret passenger requests, determine when explanations were needed, and generate concise, safety-oriented justifications. Results show that this framework, serving as a proof of concept for integrating RL decision-making and LLMs, balances safety, adaptability, and explainability, and is most effective when requests are delayed or overridden due to safety constraints.

AI.tldr: 将深度强化学习（DRL）与大型语言模型（LLM）可解释性模块相结合，构建了自动驾驶框架，使车辆能根据不同驾驶请求（快速、舒适、停止）自适应控制，并在行驶中安全切换模式。LLM模块负责解释乘客请求、判断何时需要解释、生成安全导向的说明。实验表明该框架在安全性、适应性和可解释性之间取得了平衡，尤其在请求被延迟或因安全约束被覆盖时效果最佳。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶汽车缺乏决策透明度导致公众信任度有限，现有技术难以让乘客理解车辆的驾驶行为。
AI.method: 采用Dueling Double Deep Q-Network（对决双深度Q网络）训练DRL智能体，实现三种驾驶模式（快速、舒适、停止）的仿真训练与实时切换；并行构建LLM模块，用于解释乘客请求、判断解释时机、生成安全导向的简洁说明。
AI.result: DRL智能体展示了稳定的学习能力、安全遵守交通规则的能力以及单次行程中可靠的模式切换能力；LLM模块能有效解释请求与决策；整体框架在安全性、适应性与可解释性之间取得了平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架作为将RL决策与LLM解释相结合的概念验证，有效提升了自动驾驶的可解释性和乘客信任度，尤其在请求被延迟或因安全约束被覆盖的场景下表现最为显著。

title: Hierarchical Pooling for Sheaf Neural Networks
summary: Sheaf Neural Networks (SNNs) generalize Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) by replacing scalar node signals with stalk-valued signals and by using restriction maps to measure compatibility across edges. Unlike standard graph diffusion, which encourages neighboring node features to become similar, sheaf diffusion promotes consistency through the restriction maps and can therefore model more general relationships between neighboring nodes. However, existing sheaf neural architectures mainly operate at a fixed graph resolution and do not provide a principled pooling mechanism for building hierarchical representations. In this paper, we introduce Hierarchical Sheaf Pool (HiSP), a sheaf-aware pooling framework based on local spectral coarsening. Given a partition of the graph, HiSP constructs each coarse stalk by projecting fine stalk-valued features onto the low-frequency eigenmodes of the cluster-internal sheaf Laplacian. These local modes define a cochain-level prolongation map, which allows the fine sheaf energy to be represented on the coarse space through a Galerkin operator. We further analyze the approximation induced by coarsening by separating truncation loss, due to discarded local modes, from realization loss, due to representing the projected operator as a coarse sheaf. Finally, we implement HiSP as a GNN pooling layer compatible with SNNs and provide a PyG implementation supporting batching, lifted sheaf Laplacians, and hierarchical architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiSP，一种基于局部谱粗化的层状池化框架，用于将Sheaf神经网络扩展至层次化表示，通过聚类内部Sheaf拉普拉斯的低频本征模构建粗茎，并利用Galerkin算子实现细层能量到粗空间的表示，同时区分了截断损失和实现损失。
AI.motivation: 现有的Sheaf神经网络主要在固定图分辨率下运行，缺乏一种原则性的池化机制来构建层次化表示，限制了其在需要多尺度分析的图任务中的应用。
AI.method: HiSP框架：给定图分区后，通过投影细层茎值特征到聚类内部Sheaf拉普拉斯算子的低频本征模上构建每个粗茎；利用这些局部模式定义上链级别的延拓映射；通过Galerkin算子将细层Sheaf能量表示在粗空间上；并分别分析由丢弃局部模式引起的截断损失和由投影算子表示为粗Sheaf引起的实现损失。
AI.result: 实现了HiSP作为兼容SNN的GNN池化层，提供了支持批处理、提升Sheaf拉普拉斯和层次化架构的PyG实现。
AI.conclusion: HiSP为Sheaf神经网络提供了首个原则性的层次化池化机制，通过局部谱粗化保留了Sheaf结构的几何特性，并给出了粗化近似的理论分析框架。

title: EchoFlow: A Workload-Aware Parameter Tuning Method for Blockchain Systems
comment: Preprint, 14-page full paper; accepted for presentation at BlockSys'2026 (The 8th International Conference on Blockchain, Artificial Intelligence, and Trustworthy Systems). Conference website: https://www.aischolar.com/conference/blocksys2026
summary: Blockchain systems expose a large number of tunable parameters that significantly influence system performance. However, in practice, a single parameter configuration is often applied across different workloads, leaving substantial unexploited performance potential. To address this, we propose EchoFlow, a blockchain parameter tuning framework that adaptively adjusts parameter configurations based on workload characteristics, enabling continuous performance optimization. EchoFlow employs a distributed reinforcement learning approach in which multiple actors perform parallel sampling to mitigate the substantial time required for sample generation in blockchain environments. To further accelerate convergence, we introduce a genetic algorithm during the initial phase of training to generate high-quality samples. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that EchoFlow consistently outperforms existing methods across diverse workload scenarios while also reducing training time, highlighting its effectiveness and practical value.

AI.tldr: 提出EchoFlow框架，利用分布式强化学习和遗传算法，根据工作负载特征自适应调整区块链参数配置，持续优化系统性能。
AI.motivation: 区块链系统存在大量可调参数且显著影响性能，但实践中常采用单一参数配置应对不同工作负载，导致大量性能潜力未被挖掘。
AI.method: 采用分布式强化学习方法，多个actor并行采样以缓解区块链环境中样本生成耗时问题；并在训练初始阶段引入遗传算法生成高质量样本以加速收敛。
AI.result: 实验表明EchoFlow在不同工作负载场景下持续优于现有方法，同时减少了训练时间。
AI.conclusion: EchoFlow是一种有效且具有实践价值的区块链参数调优框架，能够实现持续的性能优化。

title: Scaling Diverse Language Generation for 3D Visual Grounding
comment: 39 pages, 14 figures, 16 tables. Project Page: https://3dlg-hcvc.github.io/vigil3dpp
summary: Developing robust models for 3D visual grounding (3DVG), the localization of entities in a 3D scene described in natural language, is important for enabling agents to correspond spatial language with objects in the physical world. However, the lack of diverse descriptions at scale prevents models from generalizing beyond simple linguistic patterns. Recent such attempts lack diversity in the constraint types and language used to ground objects. Captioning methods cannot precisely contrast objects, which is important for visual grounding. We therefore propose ViGiL3D++, a scalable, scene-agnostic method that generates diverse visual grounding queries by combining constraint sampling in scene graphs with the language generation of LLMs. We show that it has greater diversity over existing scaled datasets and improves model performance over several 3DVG benchmarks but also illuminates outstanding limitations of VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出ViGiL3D++方法，通过场景图约束采样与LLM语言生成结合，生成多样化3D视觉定位查询，提升模型性能并揭示VLM局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D视觉定位模型缺乏多样化描述，难以泛化到简单语言模式之外；现有方法在约束类型和语言多样性上不足，且标注方法无法精确对比物体。
AI.method: 提出ViGiL3D++，一种可扩展、场景无关的方法，通过结合场景图中的约束采样与大语言模型的语言生成，生成多样化的视觉定位查询。
AI.result: 生成的数据集相比现有规模化数据集具有更高多样性，在多个3DVG基准上提升了模型性能，同时揭示了VLM的现有局限性。
AI.conclusion: ViGiL3D++有效提升了3D视觉定位的泛化能力和性能，但当前VLM在处理复杂视觉定位任务时仍存在不足。

title: Hypothesis-Disciplined Multi-Agent Automated Formalization of Asymptotic Statistical Theory
summary: Asymptotic statistical theory is a challenging domain for AI-assisted formalization: its central results mix convergence statements, asymptotic expansions, functional analysis, and regularity conditions that have a large gap from existing infrastructure in Lean 4 formalization. To address these challenges, we propose a hypothesis-disciplined Lean 4 formalization pipeline built from multiple agents: a manager that coordinates seven specialist roles for proof planning, skeleton scaffolding, Mathlib reconnaissance, proof construction, integration, independent review, and audit. The main methodological discipline is the hypothesis-disciplined audit, implemented by the Auditor agent: every main-theorem hypothesis and concept-layer field must be anchored in the source mathematical prose, justified as a Lean encoding adapter, marked as source-implied, or rejected as an unsupported strengthening. Using this workflow, we build a systematic formalization of asymptotic statistical theory, especially the parametric and semi-parametric models' asymptotic distribution and efficiency results. The resulting Lean development is axiom-clean and source-faithful, with Lean-checked and human-audited proofs of core parametric and semi-parametric theorems organized so that theorem-agnostic infrastructure and statistical concept definitions are separated from theorem-specific assembly. The formalization results are available at https://github.com/junwei-lu/Lean-Asymptotic-Statistical-Theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体协作、假设纪律审计的形式化流程，成功在Lean 4中对渐近统计理论（含参数与半参数模型）进行了公理整洁、忠实于原文的系统性形式化验证。
AI.motivation: 渐近统计理论包含收敛性陈述、渐近展开、泛函分析以及正则性条件等内容，与Lean 4现有形式化基础设施之间存在巨大鸿沟，是AI辅助形式化的难点领域。因此需要构建专门的形式化管道以应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种假设纪律的形式化管道，包含多个智能体：一个管理者协调七个专业角色（证明规划、骨架搭建、Mathlib侦察、证明构建、集成、独立审查和审计）。核心方法是审计智能体执行的假设纪律审计：每个主要定理的假设和概念层字段必须锚定在源数学散文中，被证明为Lean编码适配器，标记为源隐含，或被拒绝为不支持的强化。
AI.result: 构建了渐近统计理论（特别是参数和半参数模型的渐近分布和效率结果）的系统性形式化。Lean开发成果公理整洁且忠实于源文献，经过Lean检查和人工审计，核心定理的组织将定理无关的基础设施和统计概念定义与定理特定组装分离开来。形式化结果已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了通过多智能体协作和假设纪律审计，可以有效弥合渐近统计理论与Lean形式化基础设施之间的差距，为复杂数学理论的形式化提供了可复用的方法论框架。

title: Towards Robust Training in NNGPT AutoML Pipeline: A Loss-Optimizer Pairing Selection Study
summary: The choice of loss function and optimizer is an important decision, that shapes further model training. Yet automated architecture search pipelines (AutoML) benefits significantly more from the optimal pairing selection and vice versa. This paper investigates whether a single recipe is sufficient for heterogeneous architecture pools, or whether the optimal pairing varies across structurally diverse models. We conduct a systematic empirical study of all $3 \times 6 = 18$ combinations of six optimizers (SGD+Momentum, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, Adagrad, Adadelta), paired with three loss functions: Cross-Entropy (CEL), Negative Log-Likelihood (NLL), and the recently introduced genetically evolved NGL loss across the base models presented in LEMUR heterogeneous architecture pool on six image classification datasets (CelebA-Gender, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNette, MNIST, SVHN). The 18 loss-optimizer configurations are applied to each of the 33 compatible base architectures taken from the LEMUR pool, resulting in 594 variants that were generated fully automatically by a source-level injection pipeline and evaluated under fixed hyperparameters, ensuring that observed accuracy differences are attributable solely to the loss-optimizer pairing. Our results confirm that no single pairing is universally optimal. Cross-Entropy with Adam or AdamW is the most robust choice across architecture families and datasets. NGL is a competitive alternative to CEL on standard convolutional classifiers, but only when paired with adaptive optimizers; it degrades substantially with SGD or accumulation-based methods. Adagrad and Adadelta consistently underperform under fixed hyperparameters regardless of loss function, highlighting their sensitivity to learning rate tuning. These findings provide actionable guidance for loss-optimizer selection within NNGPT Framework.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了6种优化器与3种损失函数的18种组合在33种异构架构上的效果（共594个变体），发现没有通用最优配对；Cross-Entropy+Adam/AdamW最鲁棒；NGL损失在自适应优化器下是CEL的有力替代；Adagrad和Adadelta在固定超参数下普遍表现不佳。
AI.motivation: AutoML管道中损失函数与优化器的配对选择对模型训练影响重大，但现有研究缺乏对异构架构池中配对最优性的系统性理解，本文旨在探究是否存在通用最优配对方案。
AI.method: 在LEMUR异构架构池中选取33种兼容基础架构，组合6种优化器（SGD+Momentum, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, Adagrad, Adadelta）与3种损失函数（Cross-Entropy, Negative Log-Likelihood, 遗传进化NGL损失），形成18种配置，在6个图像分类数据集上以固定超参数自动生成594个变体并进行评估。
AI.result: 无单一配对通用最优；Cross-Entropy+Adam/AdamW最鲁棒；NGL在自适应优化器下是CEL的竞争性替代，但与SGD或累积方法搭配时性能显著下降；Adagrad和Adadelta在固定超参数下始终表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 损失-优化器配对选择需针对具体架构和数据集；Cross-Entropy+Adam/AdamW可作为稳健默认方案；NGL适用于卷积分类器但需配合自适应优化器；为NNGPT框架中损失-优化器选择提供了可操作指导。

title: Decentralized Operations of Decarbonized Chemical Plants with Renewable-driven Transmission Systems
summary: Electrification of ethane cracking offers a promising pathway to industrial decarbonization, provided that the electricity is sourced from renewable energy. However, integrating electrified chemical plant microgrids with a decarbonized power grid requires joint operations planning between Independent System Operators and chemical plants, which is hindered by the highly confidential nature of plant operational data. In this paper, we propose a privacy-friendly decentralized framework based on data isolation that jointly optimizes the Unit Commitment problem in the power system and microgrid scheduling in electrified ethane cracker plants. The framework employs the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers, augmented with an auxiliary system-level penalty that accelerates convergence, allowing each subsystem to solve its local subproblem and share only minimal coordination signals. To reflect real-world conditions, numerical experiments are conducted on the ACTIVSg2000 test case, a synthetic model of the Texas transmission network, with 26 chemical plants identified from Texas mapped to their nearest grid connection points. In doing so, we characterize the cost of privacy-friendly decomposition on joint power and chemical system decisions, showing that data isolation results in consistently small optimality gaps, and that its emissions consequences are load-dependent and non-monotone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据隔离的隐私友好型去中心化框架，联合优化电力系统机组组合问题与电化学裂解装置微电网调度，采用改进ADMM算法实现协同，并在德州电网模型上验证了隐私保护带来的最优性差距小且排放影响呈负载依赖非单调特性。
AI.motivation: 乙烷裂解电气化为工业脱碳提供可行路径，但电气化化工厂微电网与脱碳电网的联合运行规划受限于工厂运营数据的高度机密性，亟需隐私保护下的协同优化方法。
AI.method: 提出基于数据隔离的去中心化框架，采用交替方向乘子法（ADMM），并辅以辅助系统级惩罚项加速收敛，各子系统仅共享最小协调信号，在ACTIVSg2000德州合成电网模型上对26家化工厂进行数值实验。
AI.result: 数据隔离导致的隐私保护分解带来持续较小的最优性差距；排放影响呈现负载依赖且非单调的特性。
AI.conclusion: 所提隐私友好型去中心化框架能够有效实现电力系统与化工过程微电网的联合优化，在保护数据隐私的同时保持较小的最优性损失，且排放影响需根据负载条件具体评估。

title: Learning What Not to Forget: Long-Horizon Agent Memory from a Few Kilobytes of Learning
summary: Long-running language-model systems accumulate interaction history that outgrows the context window, so they must continually evict. When an eviction policy drops a load-bearing detail, for example an access token issued at login or a path the next call needs, the action fails. We present LRE (Learned Relevance Eviction), a few kilobytes, CPU-only, language-model-free scorer that learns which units of history are load-bearing and keeps them by verbatim extraction. Under a matched-budget comparison, in our experiment, no baseline dominates LRE on the accuracy-cost plane. On agents, LRE matches the accuracy of keeping the entire history overall. On the simplest tasks, it exceeds that no-eviction baseline by 27%, while requiring zero compressor calls and reducing peak context size by up to 52%. A controlled study trace shows LRE completes tasks where the others loop, finishing one such task in 37% fewer calls than keeping everything and solving 14 tasks where no other run policy does. On conversational memory, LRE outranks dense and token-pruning encoders at zero neural cost. In downstream evaluation, LRE gives the best budgeted answer quality on LoCoMo reading 68% fewer tokens. Its supervision can also be annotation-free: training only on the system's own behavior recovers 95% of the supervised scorer's effectiveness. We argue that, because memory eviction in LLM agents is a fidelity problem, it requires a deployable proactive policy where the future query is unavailable and exact state is decisive, and that cheap learned relevance can be sufficient.

AI.tldr: 提出LRE（Learned Relevance Eviction）方法，用轻量级CPU评分器预测历史信息的关键性，通过逐字提取保留关键细节，在LLM系统长期交互中超越全历史保留和其他基线方法。
AI.motivation: 长运行语言模型系统积累的交互历史超出上下文窗口，现有驱逐策略会丢弃关键细节（如访问令牌、路径等），导致任务失败。需要一种部署可行、面向未来的主动策略，在查询不可知、精确状态决定性高的场景下实现保真度。
AI.method: LRE：一个仅几KB、CPU运行、无需语言模型的评分器。学习判断哪些历史单元负载关键信息，通过逐字提取（verbatim extraction）保留这些单元，进行有预算的上下文驱逐。
AI.result: 在准确率-成本平面上无基线方法全面优于LRE。Agent任务上LRE匹配全历史保留的准确率；简单任务上超出全历史保留27%，零压缩器调用，峰值上下文大小降低52%。控制研究中LRE完成其他方法循环失败的任务，减少37%调用，解决14个其他策略无法完成的任务。对话记忆中LRE以零神经成本超越密集和token剪枝编码器。下游评估中LoCoMo上以68%更少token获得最佳预算答案质量。无监督训练可恢复95%监督评分器效果。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体的记忆驱逐本质是保真度问题，需要可部署的主动策略。廉价学习的相关性评分足以实现有效的记忆管理，未来查询不可知时仍能保留关键状态。

title: SPARC: A Multi-Agent System for Electrical Circuit Question Answering
summary: Electrical circuit diagram QA tasks require complex mathematical reasoning, which remains challenging for multimodal LLMs. We present SPARC, a multi-agent system that answers questions over circuit diagrams by grounding reasoning in executable physics-based simulations. SPARC uses LLM agents to synthesize, execute, and analyze simulation programs, improving accuracy and reliability by design. It achieves 83% accuracy, with up to a 58% absolute improvement over baselines, while enabling systematic error diagnosis.

AI.tldr: SPARC是一个多智能体系统，通过可执行的基于物理的模拟来回答电路图问题，相比基线方法绝对提升了58%的准确率，达到83%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 电路图QA任务需要复杂的数学推理，这对多模态大语言模型仍然具有挑战性，现有方法难以准确可靠地完成该任务。
AI.method: 提出SPARC多智能体系统，利用LLM智能体合成、执行和分析模拟程序，将推理过程锚定在可执行的基于物理的模拟中。
AI.result: SPARC达到83%的准确率，相比基线方法实现了高达58%的绝对提升，并支持系统化的错误诊断。
AI.conclusion: 通过将推理基于可执行的物理模拟，SPARC显著提高了电路图QA任务的准确性和可靠性，并为系统化错误诊断提供了可能。

title: Learning through Internalization
summary: We study internalization processes, by which neural-network-based systems absorb an explicit computational procedure into their own weights, and how they facilitate learning. We investigate how transformers internalize the simulation of semiautomata by internalizing chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens, which classes of semiautomata are harder to internalize, and expose the flip side of internalization, that is, a progressive degradation of out-of-distribution performance. We then provide the first provable analysis of successful internalization: for the task of learning parities, we show that a simplified one-layer transformer provably first learns the target with explicit CoT supervision and then internalizes the autoregressive generation as CoT tokens are progressively removed, learning to directly compute the parity. This task is computationally hard to learn from data without CoT supervision. Finally, we discuss how learning through internalization relates to the \textit{Positive Distribution Shift} phenomenon recently introduced by~\citet{Med+26}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络系统如何将显式计算过程内化到自身权重中（内部化过程），以及这一过程如何促进学习。重点分析了Transformer如何通过内化思维链（CoT）令牌来模拟半自动机，不同类别半自动机的内化难度差异，以及内化的负面影响——分布外性能的逐步退化。首次提供了成功内化的可证明分析：在奇偶性学习任务中，简化单层Transformer先在显式CoT监督下学习目标，随后在CoT令牌逐步移除过程中内化自回归生成，最终学会直接计算奇偶性。该任务若无CoT监督则难以从数据中学习。最后讨论了内化学习与Positive Distribution Shift现象的关系。
AI.motivation: 探究基于神经网络的系统如何将外部显式计算过程吸收到自身权重中（即内部化），理解这一机制如何促进学习，并分析其内在局限性和分布外性能退化问题。
AI.method: 通过理论分析（可证明分析）和实验验证相结合的方式：首先研究Transformer内化半自动机模拟的过程及不同类别半自动机的内化难度；然后在奇偶性学习任务上，对简化单层Transformer进行可证明分析，展示从CoT监督学习到内化自回归生成的完整过程。
AI.result: 证明了在奇偶性学习任务中，简化单层Transformer能先在CoT监督下学习目标，随后在CoT逐步移除过程中内化直接计算能力；揭示了内化过程伴随分布外性能逐步退化；发现不同类别半自动机的内化难度存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 内部化是神经网络系统吸收显式计算过程的关键机制，有助于学习本身难以直接从数据中学习的计算任务（如奇偶性）；内化学习与Positive Distribution Shift现象存在关联，为理解神经网络的内化能力提供了理论基础。

title: LiveServe: Interaction-Aware Serving for Real-Time Omni-Modal LLMs
summary: Realtime omni-modal LMs support speech-centric conversations where users stream inputs, hear generated audio, and interrupt freely. Existing Omni-LM serving systems still rely on throughput-oriented LLM scheduling and LRU KV offloading. These policies ignore audio playback and multi-turn reuse: they may generate tokens far beyond what users hear, wasting work after barge-in, and evict KV state needed in the next turn. LiveServe is an interaction-aware serving system for realtime Omni-LM interaction. It exposes playback progress, speech activity, and barge-in events to the serving pipeline. The scheduler prioritizes first-audio and near-underrun sessions while limiting generation beyond the playback frontier. The KV manager uses next-use-aware eviction and preloads likely-needed KV during user speech to hide reload latency. On vLLM-Omni, LiveServe improves realtime serving across two Omni-LMs and mixed workloads. It lowers P90 audio TTFP by $1.55\times$ on average and up to $2.21\times$, while improving completed-request throughput by $1.15\times$ on average and up to $1.56\times$, and moves most KV reload work off the next-turn critical path.

AI.tldr: LiveServe是一个面向实时全模态LM交互的服务系统，通过暴露播放进度、语音活动和barge-in事件，优化调度和KV管理，在vLLM-Omni上实现P90音频TTFP降低1.55倍（最高2.21倍），吞吐量提升1.15倍（最高1.56倍），并将KV重载移出下一轮关键路径。
AI.motivation: 现有全模态LM服务系统沿用面向吞吐量的LLM调度和LRU KV卸载策略，忽略音频播放和跨轮复用特性，导致在用户打断后生成无用token，以及过早驱逐下一轮所需的KV状态。
AI.method: LiveServe将播放进度、语音活动和barge-in事件暴露给服务流水线。调度器优先处理首个音频和接近欠载的会话，同时限制生成超过播放前沿。KV管理器采用基于下一轮使用预测的驱逐策略，并在用户语音期间预加载可能需要的KV以隐藏重载延迟。
AI.result: 在vLLM-Omni上，LiveServe在两种全模态LM和混合负载下，将P90音频TTFP平均降低1.55倍（最高2.21倍），完成请求吞吐量平均提升1.15倍（最高1.56倍），并将大部分KV重载工作移出下一轮关键路径。
AI.conclusion: 交互感知的服务策略能够显著提升实时全模态LM对话系统的服务质量，通过调度和KV管理的协同优化，解决现有系统在打断和多轮复用场景下的效率问题。

title: Phonemes to the Rescue: Multilingual Tokenization Based on International Phonetic Alphabet
summary: Multilingual language models often exhibit performance disparities across languages that can arise as early as the tokenization stage. Widely-used subword tokenization approaches favor high-resource languages, and tokenizer-free methods still yield longer sequences for scripts with a higher bytes-per-character ratio. To address these shortcomings, we propose to use the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) as a language-agnostic input representation for multilingual tokenizers. IPA provides a compact symbol inventory, greater cross-lingual character overlap, and a more balanced byte-per-character distribution across languages. We train matched pairs of text vs. IPA subword tokenizers across 24 languages and 14 scripts and demonstrate that IPA tokenizers consistently improve tokenization quality, especially for non-Latin scripts, and generalize more effectively to unseen languages and scripts.

AI.tldr: 提出使用国际音标（IPA）作为多语言分词器的语言无关输入表示，通过更紧凑的符号库、更高的跨语言字符重叠度和更均衡的字节/字符分布，显著提升分词质量，尤其对非拉丁脚本语言效果明显。
AI.motivation: 多语言模型在不同语言间存在性能差异，这种差异最早可追溯到分词阶段。广泛使用的子词分词方法偏向高资源语言，而无分词器方法在字节/字符比更高的脚本上仍产生更长的序列，导致跨语言不公平。
AI.method: 使用国际音标（IPA）作为语言无关的输入表示，在24种语言和14种脚本上训练文本与IPA子词分词器的匹配对，进行比较实验。
AI.result: IPA分词器在分词质量上持续优于传统文本分词器，尤其对非拉丁脚本语言提升显著，并且对未见过的语言和脚本具有更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: IPA作为一种语言无关的输入表示，能够有效缓解多语言分词中的语言偏差问题，提升多语言模型的公平性和泛化能力。

title: Bridging Multi-Valued Heuristics and Dimensionality Reduction in Multi-Objective Search
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. To appear in Proceedings of SoCS 2026
summary: Multi-objective shortest-path (MOSP) algorithms traditionally rely on single-valued heuristics (SVHs), which associate each state with a single admissible cost vector. While SVHs provide safe lower bounds, they fail to capture the trade-off structure of the Pareto frontier and often yield weak search guidance. Multi-valued heuristics (MVHs) address this limitation by mapping states to sets of cost estimates, enabling a richer approximation of possible trade-offs. Modern MOSP algorithms are highly dependent on dimensionality reduction (DR) techniques to efficiently perform dominance checks. However, integrating MVHs with DR introduces subtle correctness challenges. We show that naively combining DR with MVHs destroys the ordering invariants required for DR, leading to unsound and incomplete search. To address this issue, we develop the first theoretical frameworks for safely integrating MVHs with DR. First, we introduce $\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$, a theoretical baseline that restores search correctness by enforcing heuristic consistency. Recognizing the practical limitations of this approach, we then introduce our primary contribution, $\text{L}\text{-}\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$. This algorithm employs a "lazy," optimistic approach to DR, preserving exact correctness with only an admissible MVH by dynamically detecting and repairing local ordering violations. Across a range of benchmarks, $\text{L}\text{-}\text{NAMOA}^*{\text{dr}\text{-}\text{mvh}}$ matches or improves over state-of-the-art MOSP algorithms, and achieves speedups of over 10x in instances where the additional guidance provided by the MVH translates into stronger pruning.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多目标最短路径（MOSP）算法中，将多维启发式（MVH）与维度缩减（DR）结合时出现的正确性问题，提出了首个安全集成框架。首先提出理论基线NAMOA*_dr-mvh，通过强制启发式一致性恢复搜索正确性；进而提出主要贡献L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh，采用“懒惰”乐观的DR方法，仅需可容许MVH即可通过动态检测和修复局部排序违规来保持精确正确性。实验表明，该算法匹配或超越了现有最先进MOSP算法，在MVH提供更强剪枝的实例上实现了超过10倍的加速。
AI.motivation: 传统MOSP算法使用单值启发式（SVH）仅提供安全下界，无法捕捉帕累托前沿的权衡结构，导致搜索引导效果较弱。多维启发式（MVH）虽能提供更丰富的代价估计，但与现代MOSP算法广泛使用的维度缩减（DR）技术结合时，会破坏DR所需的排序不变性，导致搜索不正确和不完备。
AI.method: 首先提出NAMOA*_dr-mvh作为理论基线，通过强制启发式一致性来保证搜索正确性；然后提出L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh，采用“懒惰”乐观策略处理DR，仅需可容许MVH即可动态检测并修复局部排序违规，从而在保持精确正确性的同时避免理论基线的实际限制。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh匹配或超越了最先进的MOSP算法，在MVH提供额外引导从而增强剪枝的实例上，实现了超过10倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为MVH与DR的安全集成提供了理论框架，证明了朴素组合会破坏正确性，并提出了两种解决方案。其中L-NAMOA*_dr-mvh通过懒惰乐观的DR策略，在保持精确正确性的同时实现了显著的性能提升。

title: Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention
summary: Self-attention is central to Transformer performance and is often the most expensive part of the Transformer at long context lengths because its pairwise token interactions scale quadratically with sequence length. Standard dense attention also applies the same set of attention heads to every token regardless of token difficulty or information content. This uniform activation can waste compute, especially as sequences grow longer and attention cost increases rapidly. We propose Grouped Query Experts (GQE), a mixture-of-experts layer on top of grouped-query attention (GQA). Within each GQA group, a router selects k query-head experts per token while all key-value (KV) heads remain dense and unchanged. Thus, GQE keeps the KV cache benefits of GQA and reduces only the active query-head computation. On a fixed 30B token budget at the 250M parameter scale, GQE matches the all-active GQA baseline in downstream accuracy while activating half the query heads per token.

AI.tldr: 提出Grouped Query Experts (GQE)，在分组查询注意力（GQA）基础上引入混合专家层，每token仅激活一半查询头，在250M参数规模、30B token预算下达到与全激活GQA基线相当的下游准确率。
AI.motivation: 标准密集注意力对所有token施加相同的注意力头集合，忽略了token难度或信息内容的差异，导致计算浪费，尤其在序列长度增加时注意力成本急剧上升。
AI.method: 在GQA的每个分组内，使用路由器为每个token选择k个查询头专家，同时保持所有键值头密集且不变，从而保留GQA的KV缓存优势并减少活跃查询头的计算量。
AI.result: 在250M参数规模、30B token训练预算下，GQE每token仅激活一半查询头，下游准确率与全激活GQA基线持平。
AI.conclusion: GQE通过按token动态选择查询头专家，在保持模型性能的同时有效降低了自注意力中查询头的计算开销，为长序列场景下的高效Transformer提供了可行方案。

title: Nautilus: A Verifiable Hierarchical Federated Learning Framework for Vehicular-Edge-Cloud Systems
comment: Preprint. 14 pages main paper; Accepted by BlockSys'2026 conference (URL: https://www.aischolar.com/conference/blocksys2026)
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative learning for Internet of Vehicles (IoV) scenarios, but the extreme heterogeneity of vehicular-edge-cloud resources severely limits system efficiency. While dynamic scheduling strategies can mitigate this issue, they introduce new trust concerns: how to verify that scheduling decisions are fair, and whether clients faithfully execute optimization instructions without disclosing private data? This paper proposes Nautilus, a verifiable and efficient federated learning framework. First, we design a multi-dimensional resource-aware scheduling algorithm that dynamically allocates compression ratios and training tasks based on vehicles bandwidth, latency, and computing power, significantly improving system training efficiency. Second, to address the trust deficit in the scheduling process, we introduce a Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) mechanism that ensures the fairness of scheduling strategy generation and the compliance of client execution while preserving privacy. Experimental results demonstrate that the framework effectively reduces communication overhead and accelerates model convergence while maintaining system integrity.

AI.tldr: 提出了Nautilus框架，通过多维度资源感知调度算法和零知识证明机制，在保障隐私的同时实现车联网联邦学习中可验证且高效的调度与执行。
AI.motivation: 车联网联邦学习中极端异构的车-边-云资源严重限制系统效率，动态调度策略引入新的信任问题：无法验证调度决策的公平性，也无法在保护隐私的前提下验证客户端是否忠实地执行优化指令。
AI.method: 1) 多维度资源感知调度算法：根据车辆带宽、延迟和算力动态分配压缩比和训练任务；2) 零知识证明机制：确保调度策略生成的公平性和客户端执行的合规性，同时保护隐私。
AI.result: 有效降低通信开销，加速模型收敛，同时维护系统完整性。
AI.conclusion: Nautilus框架在保证隐私和可验证性的前提下，成功提升了异构车联网联邦学习的训练效率。

title: The Metanym Game: A Self-Contained, Self-Consistent LLM Peer-Community Benchmark for Structural Intelligence
comment: 78 pages (main text + four appendices: full generation/evaluation prompts, the anchor submission, and a complete worked council-evaluation example), 1 figure, 13 tables
summary: The metanym game is a competitive word game for LLMs that measures structural intelligence against established cognitive-science constructs. No content is given in advance; the contestants create all of it -- a new kind of analogy test, analogical production falsifiable sentence by sentence, with no fixed test set to leak into training (contamination-resistant by construction). In the council-of-peers benchmark, the contestants also rate each other's creations. We introduce the first spectral solution, to our knowledge, to the wicked problem of benchmarking LLMs' factual accuracy without golden keys or oracle models: one singular value decomposition of the evaluators' ratings matrix yields their competence as both generators and judges of true statements at once. Competence on the subjective criteria comes from each judge's rating consistency as the yardstick shifts. The factual rating correlates with GPQA Diamond at Pearson r = 0.92. Scored separately, making and judging dissociate -- judging is the scarcer skill: the strongest generators are middling judges, the sharpest judge a mid-pack generator. To scale, the strongest players form a council that does the official benchmarking; its seats are contestable -- a stronger model earns one on the benchmark's own rating. The benchmark is entirely self-contained and self-consistent, a stable gauge over time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Metanym Game的新型LLM基准测试方法，通过对抗性词语游戏测量模型的结构智能和事实准确性。该方法采用谱分解（SVD）从评价者评分矩阵中同时提取生成能力和判断能力，无需黄金标准或预言机模型。实验表明，事实评分与GPQA Diamond高度相关（r=0.92），且生成与判断能力存在分离——判断能力更为稀缺。该基准完全自包含、自一致，且通过可竞争席位机制实现随时间稳定的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM基准测试面临两大核心问题：一是测试集泄露导致评估污染（contamination），二是缺乏无黄金标准（golden keys）或预言机模型（oracle models）情况下评估事实准确性的可靠方法。作者旨在构建一个抗污染、自洽且能同时衡量模型生成与判断能力的基准。
AI.method: 提出Metanym Game——一种对抗性词语游戏，LLM需自行生成所有测试内容（类比生成），并可证伪（falsifiable）。采用Council-of-Peers机制，参赛者互相评分；通过对评分矩阵进行奇异值分解（SVD），一次性获得所有模型作为生成者和评判者的能力分数。主观标准通过判断者评分一致性（yardstick shifting）来衡量。
AI.result: 事实评分与GPQA Diamond的Pearson相关系数为0.92。生成与判断能力出现分离：最强生成者是中等判断者，最敏锐判断者则是中等生成者。判断能力更为稀缺。
AI.conclusion: 该基准完全自包含、自一致，可作为随时间稳定的评估工具。可通过可竞争席位（contestable seats）机制扩展，最强模型自动获得官方基准评估席位。

title: Learning Splitting Heuristics for Parallel String Solvers
summary: String constraint solvers are crucial for reasoning about string-manipulating programs. However, many practical string constraints are undecidable, and real-world applications often present complex constraints that challenge current solvers. The rise of multi-core architectures offers an opportunity for parallel solving. A key parallel solving method is \emph{cube-and-conquer}, in which the quality of splitting heuristics is critical to effectively dividing the search space. Unfortunately, manually designing the heuristics is labor-intensive, and handcrafted heuristics are often sub-optimal. This paper introduces a data-driven approach to automatically generating splitting heuristics. We frame the problem of selecting a splitting atom as a learning task, using features from input formulas and dynamic data from solver execution. We implement this approach in two popular string solvers, Z3seq and Z3str4, demonstrating that the learned heuristics outperform manually designed ones in the number of solved formulas and the average solving time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的自动生成分裂启发式方法，用于字符串约束求解器的并行求解（cube-and-conquer）。通过将分裂原子的选择视为学习任务，利用输入公式特征和求解器执行动态数据，在Z3seq和Z3str4求解器上实现了优于手工启发式的效果（更多求解公式数和更短平均求解时间）。
AI.motivation: 字符串约束求解器在推理字符串操作程序时至关重要，但许多实际字符串约束不可判定，且现有求解器难以应对复杂约束。多核架构的兴起为并行求解提供了机会。关键并行方法cube-and-conquer中，分裂启发式的质量对有效划分搜索空间至关重要，但手工设计启发式耗时且往往次优。
AI.method: 将分裂原子的选择形式化为学习任务：从输入公式中提取特征，并结合求解器执行过程中的动态数据，训练模型自动生成分裂启发式。该方法在Z3seq和Z3str4两个主流字符串求解器中实现。
AI.result: 实验表明，学习得到的启发式优于手工设计的启发式，体现在求解的公式数量更多、平均求解时间更短。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法可自动生成高质量的分裂启发式，提升字符串约束求解器在并行环境下的性能，减少手工设计成本。

title: A Gated Graph Neural Network Approach to Fast-Convergent Dynamic Average Estimation
summary: Dynamic average estimation is a critical problem in multi-agent systems, enabling agents to collaboratively estimate time-varying signals using only local information exchange. Traditional model-based approaches often face challenges related to convergence speed and sensitivity to network topology changes. This paper introduces a novel learning-based solution leveraging Gated Graph Neural Networks (GGNNs) for fast-convergent dynamic average estimation in a fully distributed manner. Taking advantage of the inherent structure of GGNNs, the proposed method models the estimation process as a distributed autoregressor, ensuring rapid convergence while maintaining stability. We incorporate a regularization term during training to enforce convergence guarantees and introduce an encoding-decoding mechanism to reduce communication overhead without sacrificing accuracy compared to standard GGNNs. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms conventional model-based estimators in terms of both convergence speed and precision, making it a promising alternative for multi-agent applications that require dynamic average estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于门控图神经网络（GGNN）的分布式动态平均估计方法，将估计过程建模为分布式自回归模型，通过训练中的正则化项保证收敛性，并引入编码-解码机制降低通信开销。实验表明该方法在收敛速度和精度上显著优于传统基于模型的估计器。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型的动态平均估计方法面临收敛速度慢、对网络拓扑变化敏感等问题，亟需一种快速收敛且鲁棒的分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 利用GGNN将估计过程建模为分布式自回归器，引入正则化项保证收敛性，并设计编码-解码机制降低通信开销。
AI.result: 在收敛速度和精度上显著优于传统模型-based估计器，同时通信开销降低。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于GGNN的学习方法为多智能体系统中的动态平均估计提供了一种快速收敛、高精度且通信高效的分布式替代方案。

title: Solving Approximate Agreement on continuous and discrete spaces
summary:
We consider $n$ asynchronous processes prone to crashes, communicating via shared read-write registers, and study the wait-free solvability of approximate agreement: given inputs, processes must output values that are close to each other, and satisfy a validity property. At the very least, if inputs are identical, all outputs must equal that input.
  The problem has been studied for various input spaces: continuous, discrete, one-dimensional or multidimensional. For metric spaces, validity requires outputs to lie in the convex hull of the inputs. For graphs, and more generally simplicial complexes, several conditions exist. We focus on simplex validity: if inputs span a simplex $σ$, then outputs are in $σ$. Agreement requires that outputs span a simplex.
  Solvability depends on the input space, validity condition, and number of processes. For example, the problem is solvable for all $n$ in the plane, but only for $n \leq 2$ when removing a point. For a graph, solvability for $n=2$ holds iff the graph is connected, but $n\geq 3$ requires acyclicity.
  In the continuous setting, we consider CUB spaces: a broad class of metric spaces admitting a unique convexity definition, subsuming classical $ε$-agreement on $[0,1]$ and $m$-dimensional approximate agreement. Our results show that $ε$-agreement is solvable in every CUB space. In the discrete case, we prove that simplex agreement on a simplicial complex $\mathcal{C}$ is solvable for $n+1$ processes iff $\mathcal{C}$ is $(n-1)$-connected. We discuss several consequences, including a proof of a conjecture by Ledent.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了异步崩溃进程通过共享读写寄存器实现无等待近似一致性的可解性问题，分别在连续空间（CUB空间）和离散空间（单纯复形）上给出了充要条件：连续空间中ε-一致性在任意CUB空间可解；离散空间中单纯形一致性对n+1个进程可解当且仅当单纯复形是(n-1)-连通的，并证明了Ledent猜想。
AI.motivation: 探索异步崩溃进程模型下近似一致性问题的可解性边界，特别是在不同输入空间（连续/离散、一维/多维）和不同有效性条件下，确定问题可解所需的条件，并证明相关猜想。
AI.method: 论文采用拓扑方法分析分布式计算问题：在连续情形引入CUB空间（一类具有唯一凸性定义的度量空间）统一定义框架；在离散情形使用单纯复形的连通性（(n-1)-连通性）作为可解性的拓扑刻画。
AI.result: (1) 连续情形：ε-一致性在任意CUB空间中都是可解的；(2) 离散情形：单纯形一致性对n+1个进程可解当且仅当单纯复形\mathcal{C}是(n-1)-连通的；(3) 证明了Ledent猜想。
AI.conclusion: 近似一致性问题的可解性完全由输入空间的拓扑性质决定：连续空间中的凸性结构保证了可解性，而离散单纯复形的可解性等价于其拓扑连通性条件。该结果统一并推广了此前关于一维、二维以及图上的近似一致性结论。

title: Event Ontology Expansion via LLM-Based Conceptualization
summary: Event ontology expansion aims to discover emerging event types from data and extend them to appropriate positions in the existing event ontology.. Existing methods typically cluster contextualized trigger representations and attach induced clusters to the ontology based on instance-level similarity. However, ontology expansion requires concept-level semantics that characterize event types, whereas contextualized trigger representations often conflate these semantics with surface contextual variation, leading to unstable clustering and unreliable hierarchy expansion. To address this issue, we propose ConceptE, a conceptualization-enhanced framework for event ontology expansion. ConceptE first derives concept-level semantics by prompting an LLM with the sentence and event trigger, producing a concise concept name and a natural-language description. It then jointly encodes these semantics with trigger information to build concept-enhanced representations aligned with ontology-level reasoning. This representation design supports more coherent event clustering, more reliable hierarchy expansion, and ontology-consistent type naming. Experiments on ACE, ERE, and MAVEN demonstrate that ConceptE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches across all subtasks of event ontology expansion. In particular, it achieves improvements of up to 12.37\% in BCubed-F1 for event clustering and 6.48\% in Taxo\_F1 for hierarchy expansion, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed ConceptE method.

AI.tldr: ConceptE 提出概念化增强框架，通过LLM提取事件类型的概念级语义，解决事件本体扩展中上下文触发词表示混淆概念语义与表面语境变化的问题，在聚类和层次扩展任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有事件本体扩展方法使用上下文触发词表示进行聚类，但这些表示混淆了事件类型的概念级语义与表层语境变化，导致聚类不稳定、层次扩展不可靠。
AI.method: ConceptE 通过LLM从句子和事件触发词中提炼简洁概念名称和自然语言描述，获取概念级语义；然后将这些语义与触发词信息联合编码，构建面向本体推理的概念增强表示。
AI.result: 在ACE、ERE和MAVEN数据集上，事件聚类BCubed-F1提升最高12.37%，层次扩展Taxo_F1提升最高6.48%，全面超越最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ConceptE通过引入概念化语义有效解耦了事件类型的概念含义与上下文表面变化，使得事件聚类更连贯、层次扩展更可靠、类型命名更符合本体结构。

title: A-Evolve-Training: Autonomous Post-Training of a 30B Model
summary: Post-training a frontier model is normally weeks of human work: proposing data and recipe changes, launching runs, reading evals, deciding what to keep. We report an autonomous system that runs this loop with no human in the loop, post-training a 30B Nemotron across four rounds over multiple weeks. The autonomously produced model reaches a held-out score of 0.86 against the top human submission's 0.87 on the public NVIDIA Nemotron-Reasoning Challenge leaderboard, placing 8th of ~4000 at the time of writing. More striking than the number: the loop detected that its own dev metric had stopped tracking external performance on the weakest domain -- candidates drove dev to record highs without moving the external target -- and revised its own search policy, no longer maximizing dev but seeking interventions that lowered the now-misleading proxy while improving the external target. We treat this as direct, auditable evidence that a scaled autonomous loop can produce discovery, not only optimization: it detected that its measurement frame had become misleading and changed what counted as evidence. We take the operational view that any system worth the "recursive self-improvement" label must eventually perform end-to-end post-training of a frontier-class model; this is one datapoint of that bar being cleared. We do not claim a "first autonomous match" of human researchers. The claim we make is narrower and auditable: to our knowledge, this is the first publicly reported autonomous post-training run at this scale, where prior public autonomous-ML-research demonstrations sit at GPT-2-class (~124M) budgets. The same system also post-trains the 120B and 550B Nemotron; with no public human baseline there, this shows only that the loop closes at that scale, not that its output is competitive -- infrastructure evidence, with the effectiveness claim deferred until a comparable human anchor exists.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了一个无需人类干预的自主后训练系统，该系统对30B参数的Nemotron模型进行了多轮后训练，在NVIDIA Nemotron-Reasoning Challenge排行榜上以0.86分（人类最佳0.87分）位列第8名。更关键的是，系统自主发现了开发指标与外部性能的脱节，并主动修正了搜索策略，从最大化开发指标转向降低误导性代理指标的同时提升外部目标。
AI.motivation: 前沿模型的后训练通常需要数周人工工作（提出数据与配方变更、启动实验、评估、决策），这种人工循环效率低下且难以规模化。本文旨在构建一个完全自主的后训练系统，消除人工循环，实现规模化、持续的模型优化。
AI.method: 构建一个闭环自主系统：自动提出数据与训练方案变更、启动运行、读取评估结果、决定保留或放弃。系统在多个星期内对30B Nemotron模型进行了四轮迭代后训练，无需任何人工干预。系统还应用于120B和550B规模的Nemotron模型。
AI.result: 自主后训练模型在NVIDIA Nemotron-Reasoning Challenge排行榜上达到0.86分（人类最佳0.87分），在约4000个提交中排名第8。系统自主检测到开发指标与外部性能在薄弱领域脱节，并主动修正搜索策略，从最大化开发指标转向降低误导性代理指标同时提升外部目标。该结果被作者视为自主系统产生发现（而非仅优化）的直接可审计证据。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了首个公开报告的、在30B参数规模上运行的自主后训练系统，远超此前公开自主ML研究演示的GPT-2级别（~124M参数）预算。作者认为任何配得上"递归自我改进"标签的系统必须最终能端到端后训练前沿级模型，而本文提供了这一标准被达到的数据点。同时承认120B和550B规模的实验仅证明闭环能在该规模闭合，竞争力待定。

title: Right Knowledge, Wrong Answer: Test-Time Steering for Temporal Fact Conflicts in Open-Weight Language Models
summary: Large language models can store both outdated facts and newer superseding facts in their parameters, but standard prompting may still elicit the outdated answer. We formalize this problem as Parametric Temporal Conflict (PTC) and introduce Temporal Attractor Steering (TAS), a three-stage test-time intervention that detects likely conflicts, identifies a conflict-critical layer, and steers hidden states toward newer-fact representations without retraining or external retrieval. We construct an 8,746-record verified benchmark across five Wikidata relations and evaluate four open-weight language models from three families: Qwen-2.5-1.5B/7B, Mistral-7B-v0.3, and Llama-3.1-8B. Single-layer activation patching achieves answer-flip rates of 0.72-0.85 across all models. End-to-end TAS resolves 29-57% of PTC cases while preserving 85-99% accuracy on non-conflict queries, outperforming a matched ITI baseline on three of four models. These results show that outdated parametric knowledge can be selectively overridden at inference time.

AI.tldr: 提出参数化时间冲突（PTC）问题，并设计时间吸引子引导（TAS）方法，在推理阶段通过三层干预机制选择性覆盖过时参数知识，无需重训练或外部检索，在多个开源模型上有效解决新旧事实冲突。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型参数中同时存储了过时事实和更新的替代事实，但标准提示仍可能诱发过时回答。现有方法需要重训练或外部检索，缺乏轻量级的推理时干预方案。
AI.method: 三阶段测试时干预：1) 检测潜在冲突；2) 定位冲突关键层；3) 将隐藏状态引导至更新事实的表征空间。使用单层激活修补实现答案翻转。
AI.result: 在四个开源模型上，单层激活修补实现0.72-0.85的答案翻转率；端到端TAS解决29-57%的PTC案例，同时在非冲突查询上保持85-99%的准确率，在四分之三模型上优于ITI基线。
AI.conclusion: 过时的参数化知识可以在推理时被选择性覆盖，为模型知识更新的轻量级干预提供了有效路径。

title: Demographic Metadata as Construct-Irrelevant Noise in DistilBERT-Based Automated Essay Scoring
summary: Automated Essay Scoring (AES) systems are increasingly used to support teachers in managing grading workloads and to provide a supplementary rater in large-scale assessments. While human grading is frequently influenced by students' demographic characteristics, the efficacy of different strategies for integrating demographic metadata with textual input used to train AES models remains underexplored. This study investigates the impact of a specific multimodal fusion strategy - naive metadata concatenation - on the predictive accuracy, training convergence, and score parity of a DistilBERT-based AES model. A comparative analysis was conducted using the ASAP 2.0 dataset to evaluate a baseline model against an experimental model trained with input that concatenates tokenised text and demographic metadata using a naive multimodal fusion strategy. Evaluated via 10-fold cross-validation, the findings reveal that the early fusion of demographic metadata and the input significantly degrades the model's overall predictive accuracy. The baseline model achieved a Quadratic Weighted Kappa (QWK) of 0.727, which dropped to 0.656 upon integrating metadata. Furthermore, the experimental model exhibited higher validation loss (1.29) compared to the baseline model (1.25). The experimental model also displayed exacerbated scoring bias, reducing score parity instances from 15 to 12 out of 19 tests.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了在DistilBERT-based AES模型中，将人口统计学元数据与文本输入进行早期拼接（朴素多模态融合策略）的影响。实验表明，这种融合策略显著降低了模型预测准确性（QWK从0.727降至0.656），增加了验证损失（1.29 vs 1.25），并加剧了评分偏差（评分均等性从15/19降至12/19）。
AI.motivation: 虽然人工评分常受学生人口统计学特征影响，但将人口统计学元数据与文本输入相结合用于训练AES模型的不同策略的有效性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 使用ASAP 2.0数据集，以DistilBERT为基础模型，采用朴素多模态融合策略（早期拼接）将标记化文本与人口统计学元数据结合，通过10折交叉验证，比较基线模型与实验模型的表现。
AI.result: 实验模型QWK从0.727降至0.656，验证损失从1.25升至1.29，评分均等性从15/19降至12/19。
AI.conclusion: 早期融合人口统计学元数据显著降低了AES模型的预测准确性，增加了验证损失，并加剧了评分偏差，表明这种简单的多模态融合策略不利于模型性能。

title: Expected Free Energy-based Planning as Variational Inference
summary: Planning under uncertainty requires agents to balance goal achievement with information gathering. Active inference addresses this through the Expected Free Energy (EFE), a cost function that unifies instrumental and epistemic objectives. However, existing EFE-based methods typically employ specialized optimization procedures that are difficult to extend or analyze. In this paper, we show that EFE-based planning can be formulated as Variational Free Energy minimization on a generative model augmented with epistemic priors. Our main result demonstrates that minimizing a Variational Free Energy functional with appropriately chosen priors yields a decomposition into expected plan costs (the EFE) plus a complexity term. This formulation reinforces theoretical consistency with the Free Energy Principle by casting planning as the same inferential process that governs perception and learning. We validate our approach on three environments of increasing complexity: a deterministic T-maze, a stochastic Reactivity Maze, and a partially observable MiniGrid DoorKey-8x8 environment. The experiments demonstrate that the epistemic priors induce information-seeking behavior, that the variational formulation yields policy-based inference outperforming plan-based methods under stochastic transitions, and that temporal factorization enables scalability to environments where existing tabular active inference methods cannot operate.

AI.tldr: 本文证明基于期望自由能(EFE)的规划可被重新表述为在增广了认知先验的生成模型上进行变分自由能最小化，从而将规划统一为与感知和学习相同的推理过程。实验在三种复杂度递增的环境中验证了该方法能产生信息寻求行为，且基于策略的推理在随机环境下优于基于计划的方法，时间因子分解使其可扩展到现有表格型方法无法处理的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基于EFE的方法通常采用专门的优化程序，难以扩展或分析。本文旨在将EFE-based规划重新表述为变分自由能最小化，以增强与自由能原理的理论一致性，并将规划统一到与感知和学习相同的推理框架中。
AI.method: 将EFE-based规划转化为在增广了认知先验的生成模型上进行变分自由能最小化。通过选择合适的先验，最小化变分自由能泛函可分解为期望计划成本(EFE)加上复杂度项。采用基于策略的推理方法，并利用时间因子分解提升可扩展性。
AI.result: 在确定性T-maze、随机Reactivity Maze和部分可观测MiniGrid DoorKey-8x8三个环境中验证：①认知先验能诱导信息寻求行为；②变分公式化下基于策略的推理在随机转移环境中优于基于计划的方法；③时间因子分解使方法可扩展到现有表格型主动推理无法操作的场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了EFE-based规划与变分自由能最小化之间的理论联系，强化了主动推理与自由能原理的一致性，同时提供了更可扩展和易分析的规划实现框架。

title: Is Our Benchmark Enough? An Analysis of Continual Learning for MLLMs
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop "Continual Adaptation at Scale: Towards Sustainable AI"
summary: Continual adaptation is essential for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) deployed across evolving domains, but the state-of-the-art MR-LoRA method highly relies on the assumption that a MLLM-based router is necessary to process complex multimodal inputs. This paper revisits this claim on the MLLM-CL benchmark and argues for two claims. \textbf{First}, routing does not require an MLLM: a simple training-free, replay-free ptotypical routing method (\textsc{RePRo}), uses frozen pretrained features and task prototypes to match the MLLM-based router of MR-LoRA at far lower computational cost. \textbf{Second}, shared experts do not improve continual learning for MLLMs, despite their theoretical appeal. We show that these findings arise from two structural limitations of MLLM-CL: (1) its tasks are \textbf{highly separable} in representation space, and (2) its fixed task order makes conclusions \textbf{sensitive to a single curriculum} rather than robust across diverse continual-learning trajectories. As a result, the benchmark primarily rewards learning in isolation rather than genuine continual transfer. This motivates a new design for future benchmarks of continual MLLM learning, with overlapping task manifolds, multiple task orders, fine-grained domain shifts, and evaluation protocols that reward forward transfer as well as retention.

AI.tldr: 本文对MLLM持续学习基准MLLM-CL进行重新审视，发现路由不需要MLLM（简单原型方法即可匹配），且共享专家无益于持续学习。这些结论源于基准的两个结构局限：任务高度可分且固定顺序导致敏感性，进而提出新基准设计建议。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的MR-LoRA方法依赖MLLM路由器处理多模态输入，计算成本高。本文质疑这一假设，并探索是否可简化为无训练、无重放的简单方法，同时揭示现有基准的评估误导性。
AI.method: 提出RePRo方法：使用冻结的预训练特征和任务原型进行路由，无需训练和重放。同时在MLLM-CL基准上系统分析任务可分性和课程顺序对结论的影响。
AI.result: RePRo在MLLM-CL基准上匹配甚至超越MR-LoRA性能，但计算成本极低；共享专家模块并未带来持续学习增益。进一步分析表明MLLM-CL的任务在表征空间高度可分，且固定任务顺序导致结论对单一课程敏感。
AI.conclusion: 现有基准主要奖励独立学习而非真正的持续迁移，未来应设计具有重叠任务流形、多种任务顺序、细粒度域偏移和评估前向迁移与保留能力的基准。

title: When Staking Rewards Compound: Measuring the Impact of Ethereum's Pectra Upgrade
comment: 13 pages, 15 figures. Accepted in the 5th International Conference on Blockchain (NBC 2026); non-archival submission
summary: Ethereum's beacon chain hosts over 920,000 active validators, a number inflated by the legacy 32 ETH stake cap. The Pectra upgrade (May 2025) addresses this by introducing 0x02 compounding validators, raising the maximum stake per validator from 32 to 2,048 ETH and enabling automatic reward reinvestment. This paper examines how compounding affects consensus-layer rewards, whether higher balances provide execution-layer advantages, and whether the APR uplift justifies migration for different staker types. We analyse adoption patterns across solo stakers and staking providers, investigate the role of consolidation (merging multiple 32 ETH validators into one) in early migration, and identify barriers slowing the transition. Through simulation, we find that compounding provides roughly +5% relative consensus-layer APR uplift for small balances, diminishing to under 1% for large staking providers. Empirical analysis of all active beacon chain validators shows 0x02 validators achieving modestly higher median CL APR. Solo stakers show higher relative adoption but face operational barriers, whilst providers cite infrastructure costs and protocol constraints. The results suggest that without improved reward accessibility and stronger economic incentives, 0x02 migration will remain gradual despite its network efficiency benefits.

AI.tldr: 本文研究以太坊信标链Pectra升级引入的0x02复合验证者对共识层奖励的影响。通过模拟和实证分析发现，复合验证者提供约+5%的相对CL APR提升（小余额），但对大型质押提供者不足1%。0x02验证者获得略高的中位CL APR。独立质押者采用率较高但面临操作障碍，而大型提供者因基础设施成本和协议约束迁移缓慢。研究认为，若无更好的奖励可访问性和更强的经济激励，0x02迁移将保持渐进式。
AI.motivation: 以太坊信标链活跃验证者超过92万，因32 ETH质押上限膨胀。Pectra升级引入0x02复合验证者，将最大质押量从32 ETH提升至2,048 ETH并支持自动复投，但尚不清楚这一变化对不同类型质押者的实际收益影响及迁移障碍。
AI.method: 通过模拟分析计算复合验证者对不同余额规模的共识层APR提升；对信标链所有活跃验证者进行实证分析，比较0x02与传统验证者的中位CL APR；分析独立质押者和质押提供者两类群体的采用模式及迁移障碍。
AI.result: 复合验证者提供约+5%的相对共识层APR提升（小余额），大型质押提供者不足1%。0x02验证者实现略高的中位CL APR。独立质押者采用率较高，但面临操作障碍；大型提供者因基础设施成本和协议约束迁移缓慢。
AI.conclusion: 复合验证者迁移可提升网络效率，但若无更好的奖励可访问性和更强的经济激励，0x02迁移将保持渐进式。

title: Quality and Agreement in Multilabel Emotion Annotation: A Case Study and Evaluation Framework
comment: Published in the Proceedings of the 1st Workshop on Computational Affective Science, CAS 2026, co-located with LREC 2026. This version corresponds to the published workshop paper
summary: Emotion annotation is inherently subjective, yet most NLP pipelines still assume "gold" labels, typically produced by majority voting, and treat annotator variation as noise. In this paper, we present a multilabel emotion annotation case study and use it to examine how annotator behavior and aggregation choices affect both agreement estimates and downstream emotion classifiers. Rather than collapsing disagreement into a single label, we represent targets as soft vote-share labels (including an intensity-weighted variant) and evaluate models using both thresholded metrics (macro-/micro-F1) and probabilistic alignment (Bernoulli cross-entropy SoftBCE), alongside data-derived disagreement diagnostics. Across annotation regimes, we show that disagreement is structured and leaves measurable traces in model behavior: hard labels may maximize F1 metrics, while soft supervision yields predictions that better reflect empirical annotator variance and uncertainty. Our results provide practical guidance for designing, aggregating, and evaluating multilabel emotion datasets when multiple interpretations are plausible.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了情感标注中的主观性问题，通过多标签情感标注案例研究，分析了标注者行为差异和标签聚合策略对一致性估计及下游情感分类器的影响。研究发现，硬标签可最大化F1指标，而软标签（如投票比例标签及强度加权变体）能更好地反映标注者真实变异与不确定性。
AI.motivation: 情感标注本质上是主观的，但大多数NLP流程仍采用多数投票产生的"黄金"标签，将标注者之间的差异视为噪声。本文旨在揭示这种做法的局限，并探索如何更合理地处理标注者分歧。
AI.method: 通过多标签情感标注案例研究，将目标表示为软投票标签（含强度加权变体），使用阈值指标（macro-/micro-F1）和概率对齐指标（Bernoulli交叉熵SoftBCE）评估模型，并结合数据驱动的分歧诊断。
AI.result: 分歧是结构化的，并在模型行为中留下可测量的痕迹：硬标签最大化F1指标，而软监督产生的预测更能反映经验标注者方差和不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 为设计、聚合和评估多标签情感数据集提供了实用指导，特别是在多种解释均合理的情况下。

title: Skill Coverage: A Test Adequacy Metric for Agent Skills
summary: Agent skills encode reusable procedural knowledge that guides large language model agents across tasks and execution contexts. Existing evaluations primarily assess skills through task level outcomes, yet task success alone does not reveal which parts of a skill have been exercised or which remain untested. We introduce skill coverage, a test adequacy metric that treats the skill artifact as the object under test. Our approach extracts observable skill behavior constraints from skill documents and measures whether an agent trajectory provides sufficient evidence to exercise and evaluate each constraint. Skill coverage uses a binary cover or not cover judgment, which reports whether a documented behavior has been exercised with sufficient observable evidence, without assigning an additional outcome label to the behavior.
