Applying skill coverage to SkillsBench reveals that existing benchmark executions cover only 39.90 to 43.98% of skill behavior constraints, suggesting that current benchmark tasks leave large portions of documented skill guidance untested. These findings show that successful task completion does not imply adequate testing of the skill artifact, highlighting skill coverage as a measure of how thoroughly agent skills are tested.

AI.tldr: 本文提出技能覆盖率（skill coverage），一种测试充分性指标，用于衡量智能体轨迹是否充分验证技能文档中描述的行为约束。应用于SkillsBench发现现有基准测试仅覆盖39.90-43.98%的技能行为约束，表明任务成功并不等同于技能工件的充分测试。
AI.motivation: 现有评估主要通过任务级结果衡量智能体技能，但任务成功无法揭示技能中哪些部分已被执行、哪些尚未被测试，缺乏对技能工件本身的测试充分性度量。
AI.method: 从技能文档中提取可观察的技能行为约束，通过二元覆盖/未覆盖判定，衡量智能体轨迹是否为每个约束提供了充分的、可观察的证据。
AI.result: 在SkillsBench上，现有基准执行仅覆盖39.90%至43.98%的技能行为约束，表明大量技能指导未被测试。
AI.conclusion: 成功的任务完成并不意味着对技能工件进行了充分测试，技能覆盖率可作为衡量智能体技能测试彻底性的有效指标。

title: Formalizing Task-Space Complexity for Zero-Shot Generalization
summary: Policies must operate across diverse conditions, yet a single policy is often conservative while fully adaptive schemes can be complex. We study zero-shot generalization in contextual dynamical systems and introduce a performance-centric, directional task dissimilarity--the signed divergence--that upper bounds the generalization gap from a source context to a target context. The signed divergence induces $\varepsilon$-tolerance sets that certify when a source policy class generalizes, and it yields a concrete notion of task-space complexity: the minimum number of source contexts needed so that every target context incurs at most $\varepsilon$ generalization gap. Under a mild local smoothness assumption on performance, the induced tolerance sets admit certified inner/outer balls and instance-dependent volume bounds on task-space complexity. In the finite-oracle setting, source selection reduces to set cover; a greedy strategy inherits the standard $H(n)$ approximation guarantee. Using a Mass-Spring-Damper system with linear-quadratic regulator (LQR) controllers and a nonlinear CartPole system with deep reinforcement learning controllers, we show that greedy selection achieves the same $\varepsilon$-coverage with fewer policies than uniform or random baselines. Our approach delivers a performance-based task similarity measure and practical certificates for building generalizable control with simple policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于性能的有向任务不相似度量——符号散度（signed divergence），用于刻画上下文动力系统中策略的零样本泛化能力。符号散度诱导出ε-容忍集，可认证源策略类何时能泛化到目标上下文，并定义任务空间复杂度的最小源上下文数量。在局部光滑性假设下，容忍集具有经过认证的内/外球和依赖于实例的体积界。贪婪策略在有限oracle设置下继承标准近似保证。在Mass-Spring-Damper（LQR）和CartPole（深度强化学习）系统上验证，贪婪选择能以更少策略实现相同ε覆盖。
AI.motivation: 现有策略要么过于保守（单一策略难以适应多样条件），要么完全自适应方案过于复杂。亟需一种性能导向的度量来量化任务间差异，并给出泛化能力的可验证保证，从而用简单策略构建可泛化的控制。
AI.method: 提出符号散度（signed divergence）作为上下文间泛化差距的上界，通过该度量定义ε-容忍集和任务空间复杂度，在局部光滑性假设下推导容忍集的认证内/外球和体积界，将源选择问题转化为集合覆盖问题并使用贪婪逼近算法。
AI.result: 在Mass-Spring-Damper（LQR）和CartPole（深度强化学习）系统上，贪婪选择策略比均匀采样和随机基线用更少的策略达到相同的ε覆盖效果。
AI.conclusion: 符号散度提供了一种基于性能的任务相似度度量，结合容忍集和贪婪选择，可为构建具有泛化能力的简单策略控制提供实用认证。

title: Development and Design of FLKit: A Structured Onboarding Toolkit for Federated Learning in Health and Life Sciences
summary: Federated learning lets institutions train shared models without moving their data, which makes it a natural fit for health and life sciences research under strict privacy regulation. The methods are maturing fast, but the practical barrier now comes earlier: a team starting a federated project meets a scattered mix of frameworks, governance obligations, and unfamiliar roles, with no structured place to begin that fits its own background. FLKit closes that gap. It is an open, community-maintained onboarding toolkit that takes a multidisciplinary team through the full federated learning lifecycle and gives every contributor, clinical, legal, governance, or technical, a role-aware entry point instead of assuming fluency across all four. We modeled it on the ELIXIR Research Data Management Kit and built it with a multidisciplinary core team, a wider consortium supplying milestone reviews and roadmap direction, and external practitioners interviewed to keep the content grounded in real practice. FLKit sits on four lifecycle stages, Governance, Infrastructure, Wrangling, and Analysis, and connects them through 11 role-specific entry points, a cross-disciplinary glossary, a reusable FAIR-aligned FL Story template for planning and documenting projects, and a curated directory of tools, frameworks, and communities. Since the December 2024 demo it has grown to 39 pages across eight sections, with seven FL Stories documenting completed and ongoing projects in multiple sclerosis disability prediction, inflammatory bowel disease, genomics, and brain-computer interfaces. It is openly available at https://uhasselt-biomedicaldatasciences.github.io/federated-learning-toolkit/ and welcomes contributions from across the life sciences.

AI.tldr: FLKit是一个开源、社区维护的联邦学习入门工具包，通过角色感知的入口点和全生命周期指南，帮助多学科团队跨越联邦学习的实践门槛。自2024年12月演示以来已发展到39页，涵盖多发性硬化、炎症性肠病、基因组学等多个真实项目案例。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习方法快速成熟，但实践障碍前置：新团队面对分散的框架、治理义务和陌生角色，缺乏结构化的、贴合自身背景的起点。FLKit旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 以ELIXIR研究数据管理工具包为模型，由多学科核心团队构建，联合更广泛的联盟提供里程碑评审和路线图指导，并通过外部从业者访谈保持内容贴近实践。包含四个生命周期阶段（治理、基础设施、数据整理、分析）、11个角色特定入口点、跨学科术语表、FAIR对齐的FL Story模板以及工具/框架/社区精选目录。
AI.result: 自2024年12月演示以来，已增长到39页、8个章节，包含7个FL Story（多发性硬化残疾预测、炎症性肠病、基因组学、脑机接口等项目），并可在https://uhasselt-biomedicaldatasciences.github.io/federated-learning-toolkit/ 公开获取。
AI.conclusion: FLKit通过结构化、角色感知的入门方法，有效降低了联邦学习的实践门槛，并为生命科学领域提供了可行的社区贡献模式。

title: FiLM-Coordinated Dual-Branch Transformer for Global-Local Dependency Modeling in Language Modeling
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 7 tables. Small-scale language modeling study on FiLM-coordinated dual-branch Transformer architectures, including multi-seed evaluation, cross-dataset validation, ablation studies, efficiency analysis, and parameter-matched fairness baselines
summary: Standard Transformers use a single self-attention pathway to model both global dependencies and local patterns, creating tension between long-range structural reasoning and fine-grained local representation learning. We propose a FiLM-coordinated dual-branch Transformer for language modeling, where each layer explicitly contains a global branch and a local branch, and feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM) is used for dynamic cross-branch coordination instead of simple concatenation or static addition. The key idea is that the two branches represent different dependency views of the same input, making channel-wise calibration more suitable than heavy token-level interaction. We therefore design a bidirectional FiLM module in which each branch generates per-channel scaling and shifting parameters to condition the other. Experiments on multiple small-scale language modeling settings show that the proposed structure consistently outperforms same-width single-branch baselines and weakened dual-branch variants under a fixed lightweight configuration. On TinyShakespeare and a 1M-character subset of WikiText-2, the full dual-branch FiLM model achieves the best results among same-width structural baselines. Multi-seed results support the stability of the gains, while mechanistic analyses show that FiLM learns input-dependent, layer-dependent, and channel-selective modulation patterns rather than static scaling. Parameter-matched widened single-branch baselines also indicate that the current design still leaves room for improvement in parameter efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种FiLM协调的双分支Transformer架构，通过特征线性调制（FiLM）在全局分支和局部分支之间进行动态跨分支协调，在轻量级语言建模任务中优于同宽度的单分支基线模型。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer使用单一自注意力路径同时建模全局依赖和局部模式，导致长距离结构推理与细粒度局部表示学习之间存在冲突。为了解决这一矛盾，需要一种能够明确分离并协调两种依赖建模的机制。
AI.method: 每层包含全局分支和局部分支，设计双向FiLM模块，每个分支为另一个分支生成逐通道的缩放和偏移参数，实现动态的跨分支协调，而非简单的拼接或静态相加。
AI.result: 在TinyShakespeare和WikiText-2的1M字符子集上，完整双分支FiLM模型在相同宽度的结构基线中取得最佳结果；多种子实验验证了收益的稳定性；机制分析表明FiLM学习的是输入依赖、层依赖和通道选择性调制模式，而非静态缩放。
AI.conclusion: FiLM协调的双分支设计能有效缓解全局与局部建模的冲突，但在参数效率方面仍有改进空间。

title: From Knowing to Acting: Benchmarking Self-Awareness Capability of LLM Agents
summary: The integration of external tools has transitioned LLM agents from passive responders to autonomous systems. However, current benchmarks prioritize execution success, neglecting self-awareness capability, the ability to discern whether a problem requires necessary external resources or can be solved via internal parametric knowledge. To address this, we introduce KAPRO (Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe), a framework that evaluates cognitive-behavioral alignment by decoupling an agent's metacognitive judgment (Knowing) from its spontaneous execution (Acting). We further construct KAware, a dataset rigorously partitioning tasks into external, internal, and hybrid subspaces to systematically probe these epistemic boundaries. Extensive experiments across diverse agent architectures show that self-awareness capability is strongly correlated with task success but degrades sharply in internal-capability settings. Moreover, open-source and instruction-following models exhibit stronger tool overuse due to shallow pattern matching, while proprietary and reasoning-oriented models demonstrate more reliable cognitive gating. Benchmark and codes are available at https://github.com/AI-Santiago/KAware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KAPRO框架和KAware数据集，用于评估LLM智能体的自我意识能力（判断何时使用外部工具还是依赖内部知识），发现自我意识能力与任务成功强相关，但开源和指令遵循模型存在工具过度使用问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准过度关注执行成功率，忽视了智能体自我意识能力——即判断问题是否需要外部资源或可借助内部参数化知识解决的能力。
AI.method: 提出KAPRO（Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe）框架，通过解耦智能体的元认知判断（Knowing）与自发执行（Acting）来评估认知-行为对齐；构建KAware数据集，将任务严格划分为外部、内部和混合子空间以系统探测认知边界。
AI.result: 自我意识能力与任务成功强相关，但在内部能力设置下急剧下降；开源和指令遵循模型因浅层模式匹配表现出更强的工具过度使用，而专有和推理导向模型展现出更可靠的认知门控。
AI.conclusion: 现有智能体在自我意识方面存在显著不足，尤其是在内部知识可解决问题上；不同模型架构在认知门控能力上存在差异，推理导向模型表现更优。

title: Detecting Satellites in Radio-Frequency Data via Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: Radio-frequency (RF) monitoring is essential for space domain awareness, but it often generates large, variable, and sparsely populated datasets with few labels. These observations can capture satellites, space debris, and the ionospheric background, yet interpreting them typically requires specialized subject-matter expertise. Supervised deep learning methods can perform well on labeled RF data, but they require many annotated examples and may need careful retraining as RF conditions change. Semi-supervised approaches offer a practical alternative for limited-data settings by using unlabeled observations to reveal latent patterns that experts can interpret. In this paper, we present a semi-supervised RF detection and classification workflow for satellite monitoring that combines Non-negative Matrix Factorization with automatic model determination (NMFk), expert-guided cluster interpretation, and classifier-based prediction. We first represent RF observations as a non-negative feature matrix and apply NMFk to estimate the number of clusters that best captures patterns in the unlabeled data. Subject-matter experts then assign physical meaning to the resulting clusters, including satellite detections, ionospheric environmental conditions, and other RF event categories. Finally, we train a classifier on these interpreted clusters to evaluate performance on a test set and categorize future observations. This pipeline reduces reliance on large pre-labeled datasets by pairing unsupervised factorization with expert interpretation, enabling an interpretable and transferable methodology for detecting, observing, and classifying behavior in RF data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督RF检测与分类工作流，结合非负矩阵分解（NMFk）、专家引导的聚类解释和分类器预测，高效利用少量标注数据实现卫星射频监测中的信号检测与分类。
AI.motivation: RF监测数据量大、变化多、稀疏且标注少，传统监督深度学习方法需要大量标注样本且难以适应变化的环境，亟需一种能利用未标注数据且可解释性强的方法。
AI.method: 将RF观测特征化为非负矩阵，通过NMFk自动估计聚类数量；领域专家对聚类赋予物理含义（卫星信号、电离层环境等）；基于解释后的聚类训练分类器进行预测。
AI.result: 工作流在测试集上评估了分类器性能，能够对未来的RF观测进行自动化分类，验证了半监督方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过无监督分解与专家解释相结合，减少了对大规模预标注数据的依赖，提供了一种可解释、可迁移的RF数据检测与分类方案。

title: Concordia: JIT-Compiled Persistent-Kernel Checkpointing for Fault-Tolerant LLM Inference
summary:
Long-running LLM agents keep valuable state resident on GPUs: KV caches, request schedulers, communication state, and sometimes online adapters. Losing this state after a GPU or communicator failure can discard minutes to hours of work, yet existing recovery mechanisms either restart the whole serving stack or require application-specific checkpoint logic inside every attention and runtime component. This paper argues that fault tolerance for such workloads needs a GPU-resident execution context: checkpoint hooks must run at device synchronization points, observe binary kernels that frameworks and libraries actually execute, and recover without putting the host CPU on the critical path.
  We present Concordia, a runtime that uses a device-resident persistent kernel as the substrate for fault-tolerant LLM inference. Concordia interposes on GPU module loading and supports PTX- and SASS-level instrumentation, allowing checkpoint and pause hooks to be inserted below framework code and library boundaries. For each registered LLM state region, Concordia JIT-compiles a specialized delta-checkpoint handler -- for example, a KV-block scanner, adapter-page scanner, or recovery applier -- and hot-swaps it into the persistent kernel's operator table. The persistent kernel consumes a lock-free ring buffer of compute, checkpoint, append-log, and recovery tasks, so the same always-on executor triggers dirty-page detection, stages deltas, and appends committed records to a CPU-visible log in CXL memory or host DRAM.

AI.tldr: Concordia是一个运行时系统，利用设备驻留的持久化内核作为容错LLM推理的底层支撑，通过PTX/SASS级别的指令插桩和JIT编译的增量检查点处理器，实现LLM智能体状态（如KV缓存）的高效故障恢复。
AI.motivation: 长时间运行的LLM智能体在GPU上维护着宝贵状态（KV缓存、请求调度器、通信状态等），GPU或通信器故障会导致数分钟到数小时的工作丢失。现有恢复机制要么重启整个服务栈，要么需要应用级检查点逻辑侵入每个注意力层和运行时组件，缺乏高效且透明的容错方案。
AI.method: 提出Concordia运行时：1) 使用设备驻留的持久化内核作为统一容错基座；2) 在GPU模块加载时进行拦截，在PTX和SASS级别进行指令插桩，实现框架和库边界以下的检查点/暂停钩子注入；3) 对每个注册的LLM状态区域，JIT编译专用的增量检查点处理器（KV块扫描器、适配器页扫描器等），热替换到持久化内核的操作表中；4) 采用无锁环形缓冲区的任务调度（计算、检查点、追加日志、恢复），由常驻执行器触发脏页检测、阶段增量写入，并将提交记录追加到CPU可见的日志中（CXL内存或主机DRAM）。
AI.result: 实现了无需重启服务栈或应用级检查点逻辑的LLM推理故障恢复，支持GPU级状态的高效检查和恢复，且恢复过程不将主机CPU置于关键路径上。
AI.conclusion: 为LLM智能体能耗提供了一种GPU驻留执行上下文的容错方案，通过设备级持久化内核和底层指令插桩，实现了透明高效的状态恢复机制。

title: A Validation-Gated Mechanistic Account of Suicidality Detection in LLMs
summary: Large language models are increasingly proposed for mental-health applications such as detecting suicidal content, raising the question of what they rely on. We study this mechanistically and use it to ask a narrower question: how to make a causal claim about a model's internal features more trustworthy. Our validation-gated framework, with suicidality detection as a case study, interprets a behavior only after the model is shown to perform it: a concept is admitted only once the model ranks it above a simple lexical baseline, and each subsequent property is tested against a matched control. This discipline yields negative as well as positive results. The gate rules out one task at the outset: on DeepSuiMind (Li et al. 2025), Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct cannot separate implicit suicidal intent from ordinary distress, so we do not analyze it. We turn to binary suicide detection, which it does perform. There we find a mid-network feature that appears semantic rather than keyword-based, is causally implicated in the decision (ablating it degrades the judgment; a random direction does not), is low-rank, and recurs across three model families and three suicide datasets. A register-matched control (suicide versus depression) suggests it tracks suicidality more specifically than general distress. Steering raises the model's response, but for unrelated questions too, so we treat it as necessary but not sufficient. The clearest pattern separates encoding from use: smaller models already represent suicidality, yet only larger ones appear to act on it. The positive evidence is English Reddit text, which limits the clinical reading.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个验证门控框架，要求模型的行为通过严格的因果检验后才进行解释。以自杀检测为例，发现Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct无法区分隐式自杀意图与普通痛苦，因此不分析该任务；在二元自杀检测中，发现一个语义级、低秩、跨模型家族和数据集复现的中层特征，且因果参与决策。消融实验验证其必要性，但操纵该特征也会影响无关问题，表明其必要非充分。小模型能编码但只有大模型能利用该特征。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常直接分析模型内部表征用于解释行为，但对这些内部特征是否真正因果性地驱动模型决策缺乏严格验证，导致因果声明不可靠。本文旨在提出一个更可信的因果推断框架，以验证模型内部特征与行为之间的因果关系。
AI.method: 提出验证门控框架：(1) 概念需先通过简单词法基线的排名检验才能被纳入分析；(2) 每个后续属性需与匹配的对照（如自杀 vs 抑郁）进行测试。采用消融实验验证因果参与，用随机方向作为对照；通过跨模型家族（三个系列）和跨数据集（三个自杀数据集）验证可复现性；对比不同规模模型来区分编码与使用。
AI.result: (1) 验证门控排除了一个任务：模型无法区分隐式自杀意图与普通痛苦；(2) 在二元自杀检测中，发现一个语义级（非关键词驱动）、低秩、跨三个模型家族和三个数据集复现的中层特征；(3) 消融该特征损害判断，随机方向则无影响；(4) 注册匹配对照（自杀 vs 抑郁）表明该特征追踪自杀特异性大于一般痛苦；(5) 操纵该特征提升模型回答，但也影响无关问题；(6) 小模型已编码自杀表征，但只有大模型才实际利用它。
AI.conclusion: 验证门控框架为因果声明提供了更严格的标准，能产生正面和负面结果。自杀检测的内部机制是语义级的且跨模型通用，但编码与使用的分离表明模型规模是关键因素。研究受限于英文Reddit文本，临床推广受限。

title: Confidence Laundering in Agent Systems: Why Uncertainty Needs a Latent Carrier
summary: Modern agent systems can turn uncertainty into overconfidence. Fragile upstream decisions are often exposed to downstream components as clean intermediate artifacts, while the uncertainty behind those decisions is lost at the interface. As a result, local ambiguity can become system-level error amplification. We argue that this reveals an interface bottleneck in agent uncertainty propagation: uncertainty does not propagate simply because a trajectory contains uncertain steps; it propagates only when it survives the handoff between components. We define uncertain decision handoff as the transfer of an intermediate decision made under uncertainty, and identify confidence laundering as a failure mode in which fragile upstream states are repackaged as procedurally valid artifacts that downstream agents over-trust. To address this bottleneck, we propose latent uncertainty as an uncertainty-bearing carrier attached to decision handoffs. Rather than replacing text with hidden states, latent uncertainty aims to preserve pre-commitment fragility in a form that downstream components can use. This position shifts agent uncertainty propagation from step-wise uncertainty estimation toward uncertainty-preserving interface design for more recoverable agent systems.

AI.tldr: 现代智能体系统中，不确定性在组件间传递时因接口瓶颈而被过滤，导致局部模糊性被“洗白”为看似确定的中间产物，进而引发系统级错误放大。本文提出**潜在不确定性**概念，作为一种携带不确定性的载体附着于决策交接过程，以保留决策前的脆弱状态，使下游组件可感知并利用该不确定性，从而将问题从“步骤级不确定性估计”转向“不确定性保留的接口设计”。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体系统存在接口瓶颈：上游组件在不确定下做出的决策被清洗为“干净”的中间产物传递给下游，丢失了不确定性信息，导致局部模糊性被放大为系统级错误。这种“信心洗白”现象使得系统无法实现不确定性的有效传播与恢复。
AI.method: 提出**潜在不确定性**（latent uncertainty）作为不确定性承载载体，将其附着于决策交接（uncertain decision handoff）过程。核心思路不是用隐状态替代文本，而是在决策传递时保留“承诺前的脆弱性”，使下游组件能够感知并利用上游的不确定性信息。
AI.result: 将智能体不确定性传播问题从“步骤级不确定性估计”重新定位为“不确定性保留的接口设计”，为构建更具可恢复性的智能体系统提供了新的设计范式。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性在智能体系统中的传播不取决于路径中是否有不确定步骤，而取决于不确定性能否在组件间交接时存活下来。通过设计保留不确定性的接口（如潜在不确定性载体），可以有效缓解信心洗白导致的错误放大，提升系统的鲁棒性和可恢复性。

title: Physics-Guided Fully Convolutional Spatiotemporal Learning Toward Digital-Twin-Enabled Microstructure Evolution Prediction
summary: Understanding and predicting microstructure evolution is central to materials design, yet purely data-driven spatiotemporal learning models often suffer from limited physical consistency and degraded long-term prediction accuracy. In this work, we introduce a physics-guided fully convolutional spatiotemporal learning framework for microstructure evolution prediction. Unlike prior self-supervised approaches, the proposed method explicitly incorporates governing physical equations into the training objective, thereby encouraging the learned dynamics to remain consistent with known thermodynamic and kinetic laws. This physics-guided formulation improves predictive accuracy, long-horizon stability, and robustness across spatial resolutions and temporal prediction settings. Extensive experiments for spinodal decomposition demonstrate that incorporating physics-guided residual regularization leads to more faithful reproduction of microstructural morphology, statistics, and evolution trends compared with purely data-driven baselines. The proposed framework preserves the scalability and computational efficiency of fully convolutional architectures while bridging the gap between high-fidelity physics-based simulations and data-driven surrogate modeling, offering a reliable and efficient surrogate-modeling step toward digital-twin-enabled microstructure evolution prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理引导的全卷积时空学习框架用于微观结构演化预测，通过将热力学和动力学方程显式融入训练目标，在保持全卷积架构可扩展性和计算效率的同时，显著提升了预测精度、长期稳定性及物理一致性，优于纯数据驱动方法。
AI.motivation: 纯数据驱动的时空学习模型在微观结构演化预测中物理一致性有限、长期预测精度退化，亟需一种能融合物理规律且保持计算效率的代理模型方法。
AI.method: 在全卷积时空学习框架中引入物理引导残差正则化，将控制方程显式纳入训练目标，使学习到的动力学与已知热力学和动力学定律保持一致。
AI.result: 在旋节线分解实验中，该方法相比纯数据驱动基线更忠实地再现了微观结构形态、统计特性及演化趋势，并在不同空间分辨率和时间预测设置下表现出更好的预测精度、长期稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架弥合了高保真物理仿真与数据驱动代理建模之间的差距，为数字孪生赋能的微观结构演化预测提供了可靠且高效的代理模型途径。

title: Kamera: Unified Position-Invariant Multimodal KV Cache for Training-Free Reuse
summary: Multimodal agents repeatedly re-examine the same video frames, UI screenshots, and rendered artifacts as their context window slides and reasoning iterates, yet every look-back re-encodes from scratch, because prefix caches serve reuse only at a fixed leading position. We show this recompute is avoidable, and identify exactly what naive KV reuse loses: the cross-chunk conditioning a chunk absorbs from its neighbours. This loss is asymmetric. The direct readout of a cached chunk is recovered exactly and for free by the standard state-merge. What remains is a diffuse, low-rank residue concentrated in deep layers, invisible to single-hop retrieval but precisely what multi-hop reasoning binds on. Blind reuse therefore leaves single-hop recall intact while halving multi-hop accuracy; this is the failure mode prior position-independent caches, designed for single-context or single-image reuse, do not address. We repair it with a small, training-free low-rank conditioning patch stored alongside each position-free chunk. Reuse reduces to one operator across MLA, GQA, and MHA: exact RoPE re-rotation to any target position, plus the patch that restores cross-chunk binding. This makes three window operations cheap: reorder (one patch serves every ordering of a cached set), sliding-window survival (surviving chunks relocate via rotation only, zero re-encode), and recall (an evicted chunk is rehydrated by its patch, never re-encoded). A rank-m patch recovers full task accuracy on cross-chunk-binding benchmarks, MM-NIAH across two attention families and two-page doc-QA, at a fraction of the KV footprint, and reconstructs re-prefill KV to within bf16 rounding in a production SGLang kernel across six backbones. The conditioning signal is strongest in redundant vision and video streams, making our solution most impactful where multimodal agents spend their recompute budget.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态Agent在重复审视视频帧、UI截图等视觉内容时，由于前缀缓存仅支持固定位置复用，导致反复重编码。作者定位了朴素KV复用丢失的关键：跨块条件信息（cross-chunk conditioning），这是一种集中在深层、低秩、弥散的残差信号，对单跳检索无影响但严重损害多跳推理。为此提出一种无训练的低秩条件补丁（rank-m patch），与位置无关的缓存块配合，通过精确RoPE重旋转+补丁恢复跨块绑定，支持重排序、滑动窗口存续、召回三种窗口操作，在MM-NIAH和两页文档QA等跨块绑定基准上恢复完整任务精度，并在SGLang内核中达到bf16精度，尤其在冗余视觉流中效果最显著。
AI.motivation: 多模态Agent需要反复重新审视相同的视频帧、UI截图等视觉内容，但现有前缀缓存只支持固定位置复用，导致每次重新审视都需要从零重新编码，造成大量计算浪费。作者旨在分析这种重计算是否可以避免，并找出朴素KV重用失败的根本原因。
AI.method: 1) 分析发现KV重用时丢失的是跨块条件信息(cross-chunk conditioning)——一种集中在深层、低秩、弥散的残差信号；2) 提出一个无训练的低秩条件补丁(low-rank conditioning patch)，与位置无关的缓存块配合存储；3) 复用简化为两个操作：精确RoPE重旋转到任意目标位置 + 恢复跨块绑定的补丁；4) 支持三种窗口操作：重排序、滑动窗口存续、召回。
AI.result: 1) rank-m补丁在跨块绑定基准(MM-NIAH、两页文档QA)上恢复完整任务精度；2) 在两个注意力家族(MLA/GQA/MHA)上验证有效；3) 在SGLang生产内核中，跨6个骨干网络将重新预填充KV重构到bf16精度；4) 指出视觉和视频流中的条件信号最强，对多模态Agent影响最大。
AI.conclusion: 朴素KV复用对单跳检索完全保留但对多跳推理准确率减半，通过提出的低秩条件补丁可以有效修复，实现无需重新编码的窗口操作，特别是在多模态Agent的冗余视觉流中效果最显著。

title: Scalable Hierarchical Attention Transformers for Multi-Turn Jailbreak Detection in Long Conversations
summary: Multi-turn jailbreaks can evade turn-level moderation by spreading unsafe intent across a dialogue through gradual escalation, reframing, and role manipulation. We address multi-turn jailbreak detection as a conversation-level classification problem and introduce an efficient hierarchical detector that avoids expensive long-context concatenation while retaining cross-turn reasoning. The model encodes individual turns to form compact turn representations and applies a lightweight conversation module that captures dialogue dynamics and selectively attends to fine-grained evidence when needed. On a challenging evaluation benchmark of 14,038 conversations, our approach achieves an F1 of 0.9394, outperforming Claude Opus 4.7, the strongest competing baseline, by 0.07 while halving its false-positive rate. Ablation studies confirm that each architectural component contributes meaningfully, with combining cross-attention and self-attention in the conversation module yielding a 2.26 percentage point reduction in false-positive rate over the self-attention-only variant.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的分层检测器，用于检测多轮越狱对话。该方法通过编码单轮对话形成紧凑表示，并利用轻量级对话模块捕捉对话动态和跨轮推理，在14,038个对话的基准测试中达到0.9394的F1分数，比Claude Opus 4.7高出0.07，同时假阳性率减半。
AI.motivation: 多轮越狱攻击可以通过逐步升级、重新框架和角色操作等方式将不安全意图分散在对话中，从而绕过逐轮审核机制。现有的逐轮审核方法难以有效检测这种跨轮次的安全威胁，因此需要从对话级别进行整体分类。
AI.method: 将多轮越狱检测视为对话级分类问题，提出分层检测器：首先编码单个轮次形成紧凑的轮次表示，再通过轻量级对话模块（结合交叉注意力和自注意力）捕获对话动态并选择性关注细粒度证据，避免了昂贵的长上下文拼接。
AI.result: 在14,038个对话的基准测试上，F1达到0.9394，超过最强基线Claude Opus 4.7达0.07，假阳性率降低一半。消融实验表明各组件均有贡献，对话模块中交叉注意力和自注意力结合相比仅用自注意力的变体，假阳性率降低2.26个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分层检测器在多轮越狱检测任务上显著优于现有方法，验证了跨轮推理和选择性注意力机制在对话级安全检测中的有效性。

title: DrugBench: Evaluating AI Control Protocols for Medication Harm Mitigation
summary: Large Language Models have the potential to expand and improve the access to clinical information by enabling new ways of interacting with medical knowledge in natural language. However, their deployment in medical question-answering settings is safety-critical, since misaligned outputs can lead to severe patient harm. AI control is an emerging approach that introduces external safeguards to mitigate unsafe behaviours in misaligned systems and has been shown to be effective in domains such as code generation. However, its applicability and effectiveness in medical settings have not been systematically studied. In this work, we present a pipeline for evaluating AI control protocols to mitigate medication-related harm. To this end, we introduce DrugBench, an AI control evaluation benchmark which combines 3,671 multi-turn medical conversations from HealthBench with drug information from official FDA labels, covering four categories of medication-related harm: drug interactions, contraindications, dosing constraints, and patient action restrictions. Furthermore, inspired by the medical domain, we argue that safety should account for the severity of unsafe outputs, not just their probability. Under this revised definition, we show that existing control protocols can be subverted and propose severity-based monitoring to address this limitation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DrugBench基准测试，用于评估AI控制协议在医疗问答中减轻用药相关危害的效果，并针对现有控制协议的不足提出了基于严重性的监控方法。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在医疗问答中的应用存在安全隐患，错误输出可能导致患者严重伤害。虽然AI控制在代码生成等领域有效，但在医疗环境中的适用性和有效性尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 构建了DrugBench基准测试，包含3,671条来自HealthBench的多轮医疗对话和FDA官方标签中的药物信息，覆盖四类用药危害（药物相互作用、禁忌症、剂量限制、患者行动限制）。并提出基于严重性的监控方法，将安全定义从仅考虑输出概率扩展到兼顾输出严重性。
AI.result: 现有控制协议在医疗场景下可以被规避，基于严重性的监控方法能够弥补这一缺陷。
AI.conclusion: AI控制协议需要针对医疗领域的安全特点进行适配，特别是将输出严重性纳入安全评估体系，DrugBench可作为评估此类协议的有效工具。

title: Continuous-Time Probabilistic Correctors for Uncertainty-Aware Physics-Based Spacecraft Trajectory Forecasting
summary: Long-horizon spacecraft trajectory forecasting suffers from error accumulation due to the absence of corrective observations in the forecast regime, making reliable uncertainty estimation crucial for safety-critical decision-making such as space domain awareness and conjunction assessment. While high-fidelity physics-based orbit propagators provide accurate deterministic forecasts, they typically lack calibrated uncertainty estimates over long horizons. We introduce a Predictor--Corrector framework in which a physics-based continuous-time $\textit{deterministic}$ forecaster is augmented with a learned continuous-time $\textit{probabilistic}$ Corrector that models forecast errors. The proposed Corrector can be wrapped around an existing deterministic propagator to improve forecast accuracy while producing sharp and calibrated full-covariance uncertainty estimates. The Corrector is based on Latent Neural Controlled Differential Equations (Latent NCDEs) and models the probabilistic temporal evolution of forecast errors in continuous time, naturally supporting irregular sampling and missing features. We further introduce a loss function that promotes calibration and sharpness in long-horizon uncertainty propagation. We evaluate the proposed framework on long-horizon spacecraft trajectory forecasting using real-world data from NASA's Crustal Dynamics Data Information System (CDDIS), wrapping the Corrector around NASA's General Mission Analysis Tool (GMAT). Across forecast horizons of 2--4 days without observations and six rolling test windows, the proposed approach consistently improves accuracy and uncertainty calibration compared to deterministic baselines and Latent ODE-based correctors, demonstrating the effectiveness of the continuous-time probabilistic Corrector for trajectory forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种预测-校正框架，通过基于Latent NCDE的连续时间概率校正器增强物理确定性轨道传播器，实现长时域航天器轨迹的高精度预测与校准不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 长时域航天器轨迹预测因缺乏修正观测而存在误差累积问题，现有高保真物理传播器虽提供准确确定性预测，但缺乏校准的不确定性估计，这对空间态势感知等安全关键决策至关重要。
AI.method: 提出预测-校正框架：物理连续时间确定性传播器（GMAT）结合基于Latent NCDE的连续时间概率校正器，后者建模预测误差的时序演化，支持不规则采样与缺失特征，并引入促进校准性与锐度的损失函数。
AI.result: 在NASA CDDIS真实数据上，2-4天无观测预测窗口下，该方法在精度和不确定性校准上一致优于确定性基线及Latent ODE校正器。
AI.conclusion: 连续时间概率校正器能够有效提升长时域轨迹预测的准确性与不确定性校准，可包装于现有确定性传播器之上。

title: Process-Reward Tactic Evolution for Long-Horizon Bioinformatics Workflows
summary: LLM agents can write code and call tools, but reliable bioinformatics work requires long-horizon interaction with workflow software, typed data objects, provenance, and biological checks. We study this setting through Galaxy workflow execution. The agent must explore task data, construct or adapt an executable workflow DAG, bind inputs and dataset collections, monitor execution, debug failures, and validate biological outputs. We propose Process-Reward Tactic Evolution, a Galaxy-based training framework that turns verified workflow rollouts into reusable \tactics. During training, agents practice on curriculum-organized Galaxy tasks in Agent Gym; process verifiers score workflow construction, software interaction, execution, and biological correctness; successful and failed traces are distilled into a tactic library. At inference, the trained executor, Process-Reward Tactic Evolution, uses this library to execute held-out peer reviewed Galaxy workflow converted BioWorkflow Bench and BioAgent Bench tasks in isolated environments. The paper evaluates whether process-supervised tactic accumulation improves long-horizon bioinformatics workflow completion, biological correctness, and execution efficiency over no-memory and reflection-style baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出Process-Reward Tactic Evolution框架，通过Galaxy环境训练LLM智能体执行长时序生物信息学工作流，利用过程验证器将成功/失败轨迹蒸馏为可复用策略库，显著提升工作流完成率、生物学正确性和执行效率。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体虽能编写代码和调用工具，但可靠的生物信息学工作涉及与工作流软件的长期交互、类型化数据对象、数据溯源和生物学验证，现有方法缺乏应对这些长周期复杂任务的能力。
AI.method: 提出Process-Reward Tactic Evolution框架：1)在Agent Gym中通过课程组织的Galaxy任务训练智能体；2)过程验证器对工作流构建、软件交互、执行和生物学正确性进行评分；3)将成功和失败轨迹蒸馏为策略库；4)推理时利用策略库在隔离环境中执行未见的工作流任务。
AI.result: 在Galaxy工作流执行任务上，过程监督的策略积累方法在长时序生物信息学工作流完成率、生物学正确性和执行效率上均优于无记忆和反思式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 过程监督的策略积累能有效提升LLM智能体在生物信息学工作流中的长周期任务执行能力，验证了将工作流轨迹转化为可复用策略范式的有效性。

title: GRAG: Generic Response-Augmented Generation Framework for Personalized Conversational Systems
summary: Deploying highly capable personalized conversational agents in resource-constrained or privacy-sensitive environments remains a significant challenge. We identify a fundamental bottleneck in the existing approaches: current training paradigms treat personalization and grounding as a single monolithic learning problem. Under these paradigms, language models are forced to simultaneously address what to say (content grounding) and how to say it in a user-specific way (personalization), which introduces significant computational and optimization challenges. Consequently, contextual grounding is often sacrificed for persona adherence, or vice versa, resulting in responses that are either weakly grounded in the conversational history or insufficiently personalized. In this work, we propose the Generic Response-Augmented Generation (GRAG) framework that decouples these competing objectives by leveraging offline, generic responses from high-capacity, general-purpose LLMs as a semantic and structural scaffold to guide the fine-tuning of smaller, task-specialized models seamlessly in resource-limited environments. By decoupling the content grounding from personalization, GRAG allows the model to focus exclusively on persona injection while remaining firmly anchored to the conversational context. We instantiate the GRAG in two post- and pre-fusion-based architectural variants and evaluate them on multiple benchmark conversational datasets that cover diverse personalization structures. Our results demonstrate that GRAG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods that do not use auxiliary scaffolding, yielding up to 47% improvements in ROUGE-2 and 36% in BLEU scores. Ultimately, GRAG offers a generalizable blueprint for building grounding-aware personalized conversational systems in resource-limited environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAG框架，通过将个性化对话中的内容接地与人格注入解耦，利用离线通用大模型生成的响应作为语义支架，指导小模型在资源受限环境下的微调，在多个基准上ROUGE-2提升达47%，BLEU提升达36%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将内容接地（说什么）和人格化（怎么说）视为单一学习问题，导致模型难以兼顾两者，在资源受限或隐私敏感环境中部署高度个性化的对话代理面临瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出GRAG（通用响应增强生成）框架，先使用高容量通用LLM离线生成通用响应作为语义和结构支架，再指导小模型在微调时仅关注人格注入，从而将内容接地与人格化解耦。设计了两种架构变体：后融合（post-fusion）和前融合（pre-fusion）。
AI.result: 在多个基准个性化对话数据集上，GRAG显著优于不使用辅助支架的现有方法，ROUGE-2提升最高47%，BLEU提升最高36%。
AI.conclusion: GRAG提供了在资源受限环境下构建兼具接地能力与个性化能力的对话系统的通用蓝图。

title: A Quantum-Assisted Agentic Distributed Artificial Intelligence Framework for Deadline-Bounded Orchestration of Hybrid Renewable Microgrids
summary: The real-time orchestration of microgrids that combine fluctuating renewable sources, dispatchable units, storage and curtailable consumers requires the repeated solution of combinatorial dispatch and coalition formation problems under hard control deadlines. In this paper, a quantum-assisted agentic distributed artificial intelligence (DAI) framework is proposed in which the dispatch problem of each control slot is formulated as a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) problem by Belief-Desire-Intention extended (BDIx) agents and is solved by a portfolio of quantum, quantum-inspired and classical solvers. Solver selection is elevated to a first-class agentic deliberation action of the coordinator agent. Learned beliefs about solver latencies are maintained and the solver intention that is expected to satisfy the prevailing deliberation deadline is committed in each slot. In addition, a belief-shaped storage valuation mechanism is introduced through which the storage agent prices its energy at a discounted future-peak value, injecting intertemporal information into the otherwise myopic per-slot optimization. The framework is evaluated on a 24-hour simulation of a grid-connected microgrid with photovoltaic, wind, battery, genset and demand-response assets, with the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) executed by statevector simulation and benchmarked per slot against tabu search, simulated annealing, binary particle swarm optimization, greedy descent and exhaustive enumeration. Zero deliberation deadlines are missed, the committed dispatch attains the exact optimum on every slot and the realized daily cost of 146.24 EUR equals the exact lower bound, with 97.83 percent renewable utilization and zero unserved energy. When the storage valuation mechanism is deactivated, the daily cost is increased to 152.75 EUR, a 4.5 percent increase.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种量子辅助的智能体分布式人工智能框架，用于微电网实时调度，将每个时隙的调度问题建模为QUBO问题，通过量子、量子启发式和经典求解器组合求解，并引入信念驱动的存储估值机制，在24小时仿真中实现了零延迟、最优调度和146.24欧元的精确下界日成本。
AI.motivation: 微电网实时编排需要在硬控制截止时间下反复求解组合调度和联盟形成问题，现有方法难以同时满足实时性和最优性要求。
AI.method: 提出量子辅助的智能体DAI框架：1) BDIx智能体将每个时隙的调度问题建模为QUBO；2) 协调者智能体通过维护求解器延迟信念，在每个时隙选择满足截止时间的求解器（量子/量子启发式/经典）；3) 存储智能体采用信念塑造的估值机制，以折扣的未来峰值价值定价能量，将跨期信息注入单时隙优化。
AI.result: 24小时仿真中：零截止时间错过；每个时隙达到精确最优解；日成本146.24欧元等于精确下界；可再生能源利用率97.83%；零未服务能量。存储估值机制关闭后成本增至152.75欧元（增加4.5%）。
AI.conclusion: 量子辅助的智能体DAI框架能够在不牺牲最优性的前提下满足微电网调度的硬实时约束，信念塑造的存储估值机制有效降低了运行成本。

title: Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning for Dynamic Sparse OD Demand Prediction
summary: Origin-Destination (OD) demand prediction is fundamental to intelligent transportation systems, yet real-world OD flows are often dynamically sparse, long-tailed, and characterized by heterogeneous zero-flow patterns. These properties make it difficult to distinguish whether an OD connection is active from how much demand it generates once activated. Many existing methods primarily treat OD prediction as a single flow regression task, which limits their ability to model low-frequency, intermittent, and long-tailed OD interactions. To address these challenges, we propose SAGMTL, a Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning framework for dynamic sparse OD demand prediction. SAGMTL decomposes OD prediction into structural state modeling and flow intensity estimation, jointly learning regional activity states, OD connection activity, and edge-level flow intensity within a unified framework. Specifically, a node-edge collaborative representation module captures regional semantics, temporal dynamics, and spatial priors through interactive node-edge updates, producing structure-aware representations for dynamic OD interactions. Based on these representations, SAGMTL estimates OD flows by jointly modeling stable demand patterns and short-term fluctuations. A multi-constraint objective further improves sparsity awareness and structural consistency. Experiments on three real-world urban mobility datasets from Beijing, Chengdu, and Nanjing show that SAGMTL achieves superior overall performance compared with state-of-the-art baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that explicitly modeling regional activity, connection states, and flow intensity improves the robustness of dynamic sparse OD demand prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结构感知图多任务学习框架（SAGMTL），将动态稀疏OD需求预测分解为结构状态建模和流量强度估计两个子任务，通过联合学习区域活动状态、OD连接活动和边级流量强度，在三个真实城市数据集上取得了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现实OD流存在动态稀疏性、长尾分布和异质零流模式，现有方法大多将OD预测视为单一流量回归任务，难以建模低频、间歇性和长尾的OD交互关系。
AI.method: 提出SAGMTL框架，包含节点-边协同表示模块（捕获区域语义、时间动态和空间先验），将OD预测分解为结构状态建模和流量强度估计，通过多约束目标联合优化，同时建模稳定需求模式和短期波动。
AI.result: 在北京、成都、南京三个真实城市出行数据集上，SAGMTL相比现有最先进方法取得了更优的整体性能，且显式建模区域活动、连接状态和流量强度提升了动态稀疏OD预测的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将OD预测分解为结构状态建模和流量强度估计的多任务学习框架，能够有效处理动态稀疏OD需求预测中的长尾和异质零流问题，显式建模区域活动、连接状态和流量强度是提升性能的关键。

title: Fed-CausalDiff: Decoupled Synchronization for Federated Do-Simulation and Policy Evaluation
summary: While federated learning enables collaborative modelling on decentralised data, standard methods merely fit historical observations. This purely observational approach is fundamentally insufficient for interventional inference and policy evaluation, as sequential actions dynamically alter future states. We propose \textbf{Fed-CausalDiff}, a federated causal diffusion framework for do-simulation. The architecture decomposes the evolution of the latent state into a global causal score function and a local confounding score function. This design enables \emph{decoupled synchronisation} (DSS), where clients aggregate only the shared causal mechanism while retaining site-specific confounders locally to handle heterogeneity. Experiments on four datasets demonstrate that Fed-CausalDiff achieves better ATE and policy-value estimation accuracy, offering a favorable trade-off between communication cost and inference fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出Fed-CausalDiff联邦因果扩散框架，通过解耦全局因果得分与局部混杂得分的同步机制，实现去中心化数据上的因果干预推断与策略评估，在ATE和政策价值估计上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 标准联邦学习仅拟合历史观测数据，缺乏对序列动作动态改变未来状态的干预推断与策略评估能力，无法支持因果层面的do-模拟。
AI.method: 将潜在状态演化分解为全局因果得分函数（联邦聚合）和局部混杂得分函数（本地保留），提出解耦同步策略（DSS）实现全局因果机制共享与局部异质性保留。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上，ATE和政策价值估计精度优于现有方法，通信成本与推断保真度之间取得良好权衡。
AI.conclusion: Fed-CausalDiff是首个支持联邦环境下因果干预推断的扩散框架，通过因果-混杂解耦设计有效处理数据异质性。

title: LLM-Based Multi-Reference Evaluation for Efficient and Robust Assessment of Phrase Break Annotations
summary: Reliable evaluation of phrase break annotations is crucial, as subtle variations in prosodic boundaries directly affect the clarity and naturalness of speech. However, existing approaches exhibit major limitations: single-reference evaluation assumes a unique gold phrasing for an utterance despite multiple valid phrasings, while human judgment, though flexible, is labor-intensive and unscalable. To address these, we propose LLM-based Multi-Reference Evaluation (LMRE) for phrase break annotations that models the one-to-many nature of prosodic phrasing and generates multiple valid phrasings from minimal demonstrations. On a Korean testbed of 1,356 annotations covering five strategies, LMRE shows stronger alignment with human judgment than single-reference evaluation in both acceptance behavior and score correlation. Our findings demonstrate that LMRE effectively achieves both scalability and multi-reference support, highlighting the potential of LLMs for evaluation in the speech domain.

AI.tldr: 针对短语边界标注评估中单参考评价的局限性和人工评估的低扩展性，本文提出基于LLM的多参考评估方法(LMRE)，通过少量示例生成多种合理断句方案，在韩语测试集上表现出与人工判断更优的对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有短语边界标注评估方法存在两大缺陷：单参考评估假设每个语句只有唯一正确的断句方式，忽略了韵律短语划分的一对多特性；人工评估虽灵活但劳动密集且难以规模化。
AI.method: 提出LMRE方法，利用大语言模型从少量演示中生成多种合理的断句标注，从而实现多参考评估，建模韵律短语划分的一对多特性。
AI.result: 在涵盖五种标注策略的1,356条韩语测试集上，LMRE在接受行为和评分相关性两方面均比单参考评估更接近人类判断。
AI.conclusion: LMRE有效兼顾了可扩展性和多参考支持，展示了LLM在语音领域评估中的潜力。

title: Agent Behavior Mining: Generative AI Agent Governance in Business Processes
comment: Accepted at BPM conference 2026 management main track
summary: As organizations increasingly deploy generative AI agents to automate business processes, they face a governance dilemma: although these agents can increase operational flexibility, their non-deterministic nature challenges the control and standardization that Business Process Management seeks to enforce. This paper addresses this \emph{invisible autonomy risk} by introducing \emph{Agent Behavior Mining}, a governance capability that enables the application of process mining techniques to render generative AI agent decision-making observable and traceable. We (1) improve the understanding of generative AI agent behavior through an event data model that translates granular agent activities -- including reasoning traces, tool usage, and token costs -- into standardized process logs; (2) instantiate the data model in a multi-agent order-to-cash implementation, demonstrating how process managers can leverage agent logs to detect policy deviations and quantify operational variability; and (3) evaluate the perceived practical utility of the approach in an exploratory study with 18 industry practitioners. The results indicate that practitioners view behavioral transparency as a prerequisite for trust and consider the ability to examine agent reasoning as an important governance requirement for the next generation of AI-driven business processes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“代理行为挖掘”（Agent Behavior Mining）治理能力，通过事件数据模型将生成式AI代理的推理轨迹、工具使用和token成本等细粒度活动转化为标准化流程日志，并在多代理订单到现金实施中验证了其检测策略偏差和量化操作变异的效果。18位行业从业者的探索性研究显示，行为透明度被视为信任的前提，检查代理推理能力是下一代AI驱动业务流程的关键治理需求。
AI.motivation: 组织在部署生成式AI代理以自动化业务流程时面临治理困境：虽然这些代理能提高操作灵活性，但其非确定性本质挑战了业务流程管理（BPM）所追求的控制与标准化。现有方法无法使代理的决策过程变得可观察和可追溯，存在“隐形自治风险”。
AI.method: (1) 设计事件数据模型，将代理活动（推理轨迹、工具使用、token成本）转化为标准化流程日志；(2) 在多代理订单到现金（Order-to-Cash）场景中实例化该模型，验证其检测策略偏差和量化操作变异的能力；(3) 通过18位行业从业者的探索性研究评估方法感知的实用性。
AI.result: 事件数据模型成功将生成式AI代理的细粒度活动转化为可分析的标准流程日志；在实际实施中，流程管理者能够利用代理日志检测策略偏离并量化操作性变异；从业者调研表明，行为透明度被视为建立信任的前提，检查代理推理能力被认为是重要的治理需求。
AI.conclusion: “代理行为挖掘”作为治理能力，能够有效解决生成式AI代理的隐形自治风险。行为透明度和推理可检查性是实现AI驱动业务流程可信治理的关键要素，为下一代业务流程管理提供了可操作的治理框架。

title: Demystifying Numerical Instability in LLM Inference: Achieving Reproducible Inference for Mission-Critical Tasks with HEAL
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) deploy into mission-critical domains (e.g., finance, medicine, and law), output reproducibility has become a strict system requirement. While practitioners use greedy decoding to eliminate algorithmic stochasticity, empirical deployments with 16-bit precisions still exhibit catastrophic output divergence across heterogeneous GPUs. Through SASS-level profiling, we reveal that this inconsistency is fundamentally driven by truncation errors introduced during downcasting at kernel boundaries. However, achieving reproducibility via a global FP32 pipeline incurs prohibitive system penalties: bypassing 16-bit hardware accelerators hurts compute efficiency, while upcasting the KV cache doubles memory overhead. To bridge this gap, we propose Hybrid Error ALleviation (HEAL), a targeted intervention that approximates FP32 precision while resolving hardware constraints through two targeted mechanisms. First, recognizing that floating-point formats underutilize their bit-width for Q, K, V tensors, HEAL applies INT16 quantization that preserves numerical stability without expanding the KV cache footprint. Second, HEAL synthesizes high-precision matrix multiplications via an algebraic error compensation strategy, executing entirely on high-throughput 16-bit Tensor Cores. To evaluate our approach practically, we introduce MCR-Bench, a benchmark targeting reproducibility in mission-critical tasks. HEAL achieves the same level of reproducibility on downstream tasks as the FP32 baseline while reducing the performance overhead by up to 7.1x.

AI.tldr: 针对LLM在不同GPU上输出不一致问题，提出HEAL方法，通过INT16量化KV缓存和代数误差补偿策略，在16位Tensor Core上实现接近FP32的精度，性能开销降低7.1倍。
AI.motivation: LLM在金融、医疗等关键领域部署时，即使使用贪心解码和16位精度，在不同GPU上仍会出现灾难性输出发散，原因是核边界下转型导致的截断误差。全局FP32管线效率极低。
AI.method: 1) INT16量化KV缓存：利用Q、K、V张量浮点格式未充分利用位宽的特点，在不扩大KV缓存占用前提下保持数值稳定性。2) 代数误差补偿：在16位Tensor Core上执行高精度矩阵乘法，通过代数方法补偿截断误差，逼近FP32精度。
AI.result: HEAL在下游任务上达到与FP32基线相同的可重复性水平，同时性能开销降低高达7.1倍。
AI.conclusion: HEAL实现了精度与效率的有效权衡，为LLM跨异构GPU的确定性部署提供了实用解决方案。

title: A Multi-Agent Audit Framework for High-Stakes Reasoning: Evaluation and Interpretability in Clinical Mental Health Screening
summary: High-stakes reasoning tasks necessitate transparent and verifiable workflows, yet conventional single-model large language models (LLMs) often struggle with hallucination and low interpretability under zero-shot paradigms. To address this general AI challenge, we propose a Multi-Agent Audit Framework that simulates a collaborative, multi-step verification process. We empirically validate this architecture in the sensitive domain of clinical mental health screening using a modular LangChain workflow. Our framework decomposes the reasoning process into a Perception Agent, Knowledge Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Chain-of-Thought (CoT) clinical inference, and a critical Audit verification stage. We evaluated this framework on the DAIC-WOZ dataset using locally deployed open-source models. Experimental results demonstrate that our multi-agent pipeline significantly outperforms single-agent baselines, reducing the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) for PHQ-8 depression severity prediction from 5.35 to 5.02. By exposing cross-agent validation traces, the framework mitigates reasoning drift and provides highly interpretable diagnostic rationales, offering a generalizable paradigm for reliable AI-assisted decision support beyond isolated model scaling. We make data and code open access on GitHub for replicability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多智能体审计框架，通过感知、知识检索、思维链推理和审计验证的流水线协作，在临床心理健康筛查任务中优于单模型基线，降低了PHQ-8抑郁严重度预测的MAE（5.35→5.02），并提供了可解释的推理轨迹。
AI.motivation: 高风险推理任务需要透明且可验证的工作流程，但传统单模型LLM在零样本范式下容易出现幻觉和低可解释性问题。
AI.method: 构建多智能体审计框架，包含感知智能体、知识检索增强生成（RAG）、思维链（CoT）临床推理和审计验证四个模块，在DAIC-WOZ数据集上使用本地开源模型进行验证。
AI.result: 多智能体流水线在PHQ-8抑郁严重度预测上将MAE从5.35降至5.02，优于单模型基线。
AI.conclusion: 跨智能体验证轨迹可缓解推理漂移并提供高度可解释的诊断依据，为超越孤立模型扩展的可靠AI辅助决策提供了一种通用范式。

title: Democratizing and accelerating AI-driven pathology research through agentic intelligence
summary: Computational pathology has advanced rapidly with the emergence of foundation models, yet widespread adoption remains limited by substantial technical complexity and programming requirements. Here we present PathLab, an autonomous agentic framework that translates natural-language research objectives into executable and validated computational pathology workflows through the structured composition of domain-specific skills and tools. By organizing workflow generation around reusable methodological modules, including data preprocessing, model development, evaluation and interpretation, PathLab enables studies to be specified at the level of scientific intent rather than implementation details. We evaluated PathLab across 12 public datasets spanning four representative task families: region-of-interest classification, whole-slide image classification, segmentation and survival prediction. Across all task categories, PathLab achieved non-inferior performance relative to expert implementations, while consistently enforcing semantic validity of user prompts and proactively rejecting incompatible workflow specifications prior to execution. In controlled user studies, PathLab substantially reduced the time required to generate executable analytical pipelines and enabled domain experts without programming experience to independently design, execute and evaluate computational pathology studies. Together, these results establish PathLab as a reliable interface between biomedical intent and computational execution, enabling computational pathology studies to be designed at the level of scientific questions rather than programming expertise. By lowering technical barriers to advanced AI methodologies, PathLab provides a foundation for the broader democratization of computational pathology.

AI.tldr: PathLab是一个自主智能体框架，能够将自然语言的研究目标转化为可执行的计算病理学工作流，在12个公共数据集上实现了与专家实现相当的性能，并显著降低了非编程领域专家的使用门槛。
AI.motivation: 计算病理学在基础模型推动下快速发展，但广泛采用仍受到技术复杂性和编程要求的限制，需要将研究从编程专业知识层面提升到科学问题层面。
AI.method: PathLab通过将工作流生成组织为可重用的方法论模块（数据预处理、模型开发、评估和解释），实现结构化组合领域特定技能和工具，将自然语言研究目标转化为可执行且可验证的工作流。
AI.result: 在12个公共数据集上覆盖4类代表性任务（ROI分类、全切片图像分类、分割和生存预测），PathLab在所有任务中均达到与专家实现非劣效的性能，同时强制执行语义有效性并在执行前主动拒绝不兼容的工作流规范。用户研究显示其显著减少了生成可执行分析流程的时间，使无编程经验的领域专家能独立完成研究。
AI.conclusion: PathLab建立了生物医学意图与计算执行之间的可靠接口，使计算病理学研究能够以科学问题而非编程专业知识的水平进行设计，为计算病理学的更广泛民主化奠定了基础。

title: An Efficient and Effective Architecture for Large-Scale Traffic Prediction via Geometry-Adaptive Square Partitioning
summary: Traffic prediction is a core task in intelligent transportation systems and urban-scale decision making. Despite the effectiveness of mainstream neural-network based methods, their deployment in real-world settings with thousands of traffic sensors is jeopardized severely by their poor computational scalability. To address this, the community has attempted to incorporate spatial database partitioning techniques (e.g., Grid, Quadtree, and K-D Tree) to improve model scalability. However, these approaches rely on handcrafted geometric heuristics and often produce irregular or imbalanced data partitions, leading to boundary fragmentation, excessive padding overheads, and degraded model accuracy. In this paper, we propose SqLinear, an efficient and effective architecture for large-scale traffic prediction. First, we design Square Partition, a geometry-adaptive algorithm that partitions massive traffic sensors into balanced, non-overlapping, and near-square spatial regions. Unlike existing heuristic-based designs, Square Partition is theoretically grounded and provides provable guarantees on aspect ratio, balance, and partition utilization, establishing a high-quality foundation for downstream spatiotemporal modeling. Next, we propose a Hierarchical Linear Interaction (HLI) module that abandons the costly attention mechanisms commonly used in Transformer-based spatio-temporal models. HLI efficiently captures both local intra-region dynamics and global inter-region dependencies through a lightweight linear interaction scheme, enabling effective spatiotemporal modeling with linear computational complexity. Extensive experiments on four large-scale traffic datasets and 10 baselines show that SqLinear reduces MAE by 2.30% on average under standard setting and by 5.81% under extreme scalability settings, while reducing training runtime by 13.27%--30.84% in spatial- and horizon-scaling scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SqLinear，一种用于大规模交通预测的高效架构。核心贡献包括：基于理论保证的平衡方形空间分区算法（Square Partition），以及具有线性复杂度的层次化线性交互模块（HLI），在保持预测精度的同时显著提升计算可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于神经网络的大规模交通预测方法计算可扩展性差，而引入传统空间数据库分区技术（如网格、四叉树、KD树）依赖于手工设计的几何启发式，导致分区不规则/不平衡、边界碎片化、填充开销过大，模型精度下降。
AI.method: 1) Square Partition：几何自适应的平衡分区算法，生成平衡、无重叠、近方形的空间区域，具有可证明的纵横比、平衡性和分区利用率保证。2) Hierarchical Linear Interaction (HLI)模块：摒弃Transformer中昂贵的注意力机制，通过轻量级线性交互方案捕获局部区域内动态和全局区域间依赖，实现线性计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在四个大规模交通数据集和10个基线上，SqLinear在标准设置下平均降低MAE 2.30%，在极端可扩展性设置下降低5.81%；在空间扩展和时域扩展场景中训练运行时间减少13.27%~30.84%。
AI.conclusion: SqLinear通过理论驱动的平衡分区和线性复杂度的高效时空交互，有效解决了大规模交通预测中的可扩展性瓶颈，在精度和效率上均优于现有方法。

title: Factored Gossip DiLoCo: Reducing Blocking Communication in DiLoCo
summary: To make large-scale distributed training practical outside high-bandwidth datacenters, we must reduce blocking, high-volume synchronization. While DiLoCo communicates infrequently, its outer synchronization remains bandwidth-heavy and brittle to stragglers and transient failures. We relax exact synchronization to approximate synchronization via mixing/gossip, which degrades gracefully under delays and communication failures. This allows us to factorize DiLoCo synchronization into a non-blocking mixing step that overlaps computation with no staleness, and a blocking mixing step that tightens worker agreement, yielding a tunable trade-off between compute utilization and optimization stability. On up to billion-parameter language models in low-bandwidth settings, our framework substantially improves compute utilization compared to DiLoCo, with training progress ranging from comparable to closely matching it, and is more robust to failures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于近似同步（混合/ gossip）的分布式训练框架，将 DiLoCo 的外同步分解为非阻塞混合（无延迟重叠计算）和阻塞混合（收紧收敛），在低带宽环境下显著提升计算利用率，对亿级参数语言模型的训练进展与 DiLoCo 相当或略低，且对故障更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: DiLoCo 的外同步仍存在带宽开销大、对掉队者和瞬时故障脆弱的问题，需要降低阻塞性高容量同步以支持低带宽数据中心的分布式训练。
AI.method: 将精确同步松弛为近似同步（混合/gossip），使梯度在通信延迟和故障下优雅降级；将 DiLoCo 同步分解为：1) 非阻塞混合步（与计算重叠，无延迟）和 2) 阻塞混合步（收紧工作节点一致性），实现计算利用率与优化稳定性的可调权衡。
AI.result: 在低带宽环境下训练十亿参数语言模型，相比 DiLoCo 计算利用率显著提升，训练进展从相当到接近匹配，且对故障更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 近似同步框架可有效替代 DiLoCo 的精确外同步，在保持优化质量的同时大幅降低通信瓶颈和对故障的敏感性，适用于低带宽分布式训练场景。

title: AdaMem: Learning What to Remember for Personalized Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Long-term memory systems for Large Language Model (LLM) agents typically try to \emph{remember everything}, extracting memories uniformly to retain as many facts as possible. In production, however, inference cost and finite context budgets make this untenable: beyond consolidating raw dialogue into memory, an agent must exert \emph{write control}, efficiently keeping only the information each user actually cares about. Otherwise, long-horizon personalized interactions suffer \emph{memory bloat}, where irrelevant trivia crowds out useful information and steadily erodes question-answering (QA) accuracy. We argue that what is worth remembering is role-dependent, and propose \textbf{AdaMem} (Adaptive Memory), a method that \emph{learns what to remember} for each user from feedback. AdaMem maintains a structured, role-specific Memory Policy and refines it from weekly QA feedback through a lightweight, patch-style self-reflection step with failure rollback. To study this setting, we build \textbf{AdaMem-Bench}, a benchmark that simulates weeks of interaction with week-by-week QA. Across two extraction models and two feedback modes, AdaMem improves QA accuracy by up to \textbf{+9.0\%} over the uniform Mem0 baseline while shrinking memory volume by \textbf{9\%}.

AI.tldr: AdaMem提出了一种角色依赖的自适应记忆管理方法，通过学习"记住什么"而非"记住一切"，利用结构化记忆策略和轻量级自反思反馈机制，在减少9%记忆容量的同时将问答准确率提升9.0%，有效解决了LLM代理在长程个性化交互中的记忆膨胀问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理的长期记忆系统倾向于"记住一切"，均匀提取所有事实。但在实际部署中，推理成本和有限上下文预算使得这种方式不可持续：代理必须施加"写入控制"，仅保留每个用户真正关心的信息，否则长程个性化交互会出现记忆膨胀，无关琐事挤占有用信息，逐步侵蚀问答准确性。
AI.method: AdaMem维护一个结构化的、角色特定的记忆策略（Memory Policy），并通过每周问答反馈的轻量级补丁式自我反思步骤结合失败回滚来不断优化该策略。核心思想是"什么值得记住取决于角色"，让模型学习针对不同用户自适应地决定保留哪些信息。
AI.result: 在AdaMem-Bench基准上，跨两种提取模型和两种反馈模式，AdaMem相比均匀记忆基线（Mem0）将问答准确率提升最多9.0%，同时将记忆体积压缩9%。
AI.conclusion: 记忆管理应当是有选择性的、角色依赖的，而非均匀地记住一切。AdaMem通过可学习的记忆策略与轻量级反馈机制，在降低存储开销的同时提升下游任务性能，为长程个性化LLM代理提供了更实用的记忆管理范式。

title: From Question Answering to Task Completion: A Survey on Agent System and Harness Design
summary: LLM-based agents mark a shift from passive question answering to active task completion: they perceive environments, invoke tools, maintain state, and act over extended horizons. As agent systems have evolved from prompt engineering to workflows and context engineering, harness engineering, and agent-native training with co-evolution, a central question has become increasingly important: where does the bottleneck in agent performance reside, in the foundation model, in the execution harness, or in the coupling between them? This survey examines LLM-based agents through a model-harness lens. We first clarify the functional definition of agents and the implementation view of an LLM-based agent as a foundation model coupled with an execution harness. We then analyze the limits of model-centric scaling, trace four paradigms of agent engineering, and decompose the execution harness into six coupled runtime responsibilities: observation, context, control, action, state, and verification. Using this decomposition, we map task properties and domain pressures to harness configurations, review benchmark and evaluation practices, and synthesize model-harness evidence on how runtime design affects long-horizon task completion, efficiency, and reliability. Finally, we identify open challenges in value-aware evaluation, safety, harness generalization, and model-harness co-evolution. Rather than treating agents as models with auxiliary tools, this survey argues that agent quality -- including success, efficiency, safety, and generalization -- emerges from the interaction between model capability, runtime infrastructure, task structure, and evaluation design. A collection of papers discussed in this survey is provided in https://github.com/ggjy/Awesome-Agent-Engineering.

AI.tldr: 本综述从模型-执行框架（model-harness）双重视角审视基于LLM的智能体系统，将智能体定义为基础模型与执行框架的耦合，分析模型中心化扩展的局限性，梳理智能体工程的四个范式，并将执行框架解耦为六个运行时职责（观察、上下文、控制、动作、状态、验证），论证智能体质量（成功率、效率、安全性与泛化性）源于模型能力、运行时基础设施、任务结构与评估设计之间的交互作用。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体从被动问答转向主动任务完成，智能体系统的瓶颈究竟存在于基础模型、执行框架还是二者耦合机制中，成为亟待回答的核心问题。现有研究往往将智能体简单视为"带工具的模型"，缺乏对模型-框架交互的系统性分析。
AI.method: 采用模型-执行框架（model-harness）分析视角：首先澄清智能体的功能定义与实现视图，分析模型中心化扩展的局限；梳理智能体工程从提示工程到工作流、上下文工程、执行框架工程、智能体原生训练的四个范式演进；将执行框架解耦为六个运行时职责（观察、上下文、控制、动作、状态、验证），并据此映射任务属性与领域压力到框架配置，综述基准与评估实践。
AI.result: 提供了执行框架的系统性解耦框架（六职责分解），建立了任务属性-框架配置的映射关系，综合了运行时设计对长程任务完成、效率与可靠性影响的模型-框架证据，并识别了价值感知评估、安全性、框架泛化及模型-框架协同演进等开放挑战。
AI.conclusion: 智能体质量（成功率、效率、安全性、泛化性）并非单纯由模型能力决定，而是模型能力、运行时基础设施、任务结构与评估设计四者交互作用涌现的结果。未来应超越"模型+工具"的简化认知，重视模型-框架协同进化。

title: Sim2O: Efficient Offline-to-Online MARL via Joint Action Composition
summary: Offline-to-online adaptation serves as a pivotal paradigm for mitigating the prohibitive cost of online exploration by bootstrapping reinforcement learning from offline datasets. While this paradigm has been extensively studied in single-agent settings, its extension to Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) remains largely unexplored, despite its critical relevance to complex coordinated decision-making. To bridge this gap, we introduce Sim2O, an elegant and minimalist framework for offline-to-online MARL. Rather than treating adaptation as a monolithic joint decision, Sim2O conceptualizes it as a compositional process. Specifically, candidate joint actions are synthesized by dynamically blending offline and online action proposals across agents. By leveraging a centralized value function to evaluate these hybrid combinations, Sim2O identifies high-value coordination strategies without requiring auxiliary training objectives or structural overhead. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that Sim2O significantly outperforms existing baselines, underscoring that a minimalist design is not only viable but highly effective for multi-agent offline-to-online adaptation.

AI.tldr: Sim2O是一个用于多智能体离线到在线强化学习的简洁框架，通过组合式动作合成和集中式价值评估实现高效适应，无需辅助训练目标或额外结构。
AI.motivation: 离线到在线适应是降低在线探索成本的关键范式，但现有研究主要集中在单智能体场景，其在多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的扩展仍未被充分探索，而这对复杂协调决策任务至关重要。
AI.method: Sim2O将适应过程建模为组合式过程：通过动态混合各智能体的离线与在线动作提案来合成候选联合动作，并利用集中式价值函数评估这些混合组合，从而识别高价值协调策略。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的实验表明，Sim2O显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 极简设计不仅可行，而且对多智能体离线到在线适应非常有效。

title: Who Checks the Citations? Benchmarking Legal Hallucination Detection
summary: Attorneys, judges, and pro se filers increasingly use AI to draft legal documents, yet these tools frequently fabricate citations. Despite predictions that newer models would hallucinate less or that court sanctions would deter negligent filers, we found over 1,000 filings containing fabricated citations -- with this number growing year-over-year. This study evaluates whether AI-based systems can mitigate these errors by automatically detecting hallucinations. We propose a taxonomy of legal citation hallucinations grounded in actual court filings and introduce a dataset of 1,300 brief excerpts containing injected errors. Benchmarking five models in agentic and non-agentic settings reveals that while the latest iterations perform better -- GPT-5 achieves 82.8% recall and a 60.5% F1 score in an agentic framework -- all models struggle with subtle error categories. Agentic verification remains resource-intensive, with GPT-5 averaging 16.9 steps per excerpt. Furthermore, restricted information access limits the efficacy of even the best agents. This gap creates policy concerns, as it disadvantages both AI systems and litigants who lack subscriptions to commercial legal databases. Together, our dataset, tools, and policy recommendations provide a foundation for building and auditing reliable legal citation checking tools.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示了AI生成法律文书中引用幻觉问题日益严重，提出了一套分类体系和包含1,300条法律摘要的数据集，并评测了多种AI模型在自动检测幻觉方面的表现。尽管最新模型（如GPT-5）在代理框架下达到82.8%召回率，但所有模型在细粒度错误类别上表现不佳，且代理验证资源消耗高、受限于商业数据库访问权限，引发了政策关注。
AI.motivation: 尽管业界预期新一代模型幻觉会减少、法院制裁会遏制疏忽行为，但研究发现包含虚构引用的法律文件数量逐年增长，亟需自动检测方案来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 基于真实法庭文件提出法律引用幻觉的分类体系；构建包含1,300条法律摘要、注入了人为错误的数据集；在代理（agentic）与非代理设置下评测五种模型（含GPT-5），并分析其步骤消耗与信息访问限制影响。
AI.result: GPT-5在代理框架下召回率达82.8%，F1分数60.5%；所有模型在细粒度错误类别上表现欠佳；GPT-5平均每段摘要需16.9个推理步骤；商业数据库访问限制严重制约模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 现有AI系统尚无法可靠检测所有类型法律引用幻觉，资源消耗高且受限于数据库访问权限。研究提供了数据集、工具与政策建议，为构建和审计可靠的合法引用检测工具奠定基础。

title: Artificial Intelligence as Monism: Ontological, Organisational, and Methodological Implications
summary:
This paper argues that Artificial Intelligence should be understood as a form of monism:
  a unified substance that cannot be decomposed into separate elements such as data,
  algorithms, or technical architectures. Drawing from philosophical traditions of monism,
  dualism, and holism, the paper contends that AI is not merely a collection of components
  but a single, indivisible essence reflecting the phenomena it replicates. Treating AI as
  monism has deep implications across multiple dimensions. Epistemologically, it positions
  AI as the central interpretive force across technological, organisational, and societal
  domains, while raising ethical and existential concerns regarding singularity, the
  homogenisation of innovation, and the concentration of decision-making power. At the
  organisational level, a monistic approach challenges traditional siloed structures,
  advocating instead for transversal, problem-centric teams whose mandate derives from
  the integrity of the problem rather than from departmental hierarchy. In project
  management, it implies a unified vision and an integrated evaluation of complexity in
  which no single stakeholder perspective dominates the assessment of outcomes. In data
  and information management, it calls for architectures that reflect the irreducible unity
  of the phenomena being modelled. Ultimately, this paper calls for a paradigm shift in
  how AI is conceptualised, governed, and integrated, suggesting that only by embracing AI
  as monism can organisations achieve genuine agility and avoid the structural
  inefficiencies inherent to reductionist approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文主张将人工智能理解为一种一元论（monism）——即一种不可分解为数据、算法或技术架构等独立部分的统一实体，并从认识论、组织管理、项目管理、数据信息管理等多个维度探讨了这一观点带来的深远影响。
AI.motivation: 现有对AI的理解往往采用还原论视角，将其拆解为数据、算法、架构等独立组成部分，这种碎片化方式导致了结构性低效。作者认为需要从哲学传统（一元论、二元论、整体论）出发，重新审视AI的本质。
AI.method: 本文采用哲学分析的方法，借鉴一元论、二元论和整体论的哲学传统，从认识论、组织管理、项目管理、数据与信息管理等多个维度系统论证AI作为一元论的含义及影响。
AI.result: 提出了将AI视为一元论后各维度的具体影响：认识论上AI成为跨领域核心解释力量；组织层面要求横向问题驱动团队取代传统科层结构；项目管理上强调统一愿景与综合评估；数据管理上需要反映现象不可还原统一性的架构。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁对AI的概念化、治理和整合方式进行范式转变，认为只有将AI理解为一元论，组织才能实现真正的敏捷性，避免还原论方法固有的结构性低效。

title: BASIL: Bayesian Application for Scientific Iteration and Learning
summary: We introduce BASIL, a user-friendly desktop application for process optimization. BASIL employs a Bayesian approach, incorporating special acquisition functions that can be used to solve both single and multi-objective optimization problems. It provides a graphical interface that enables users to input their experimental parameters, optimization objectives, and legacy data. This is then used to build surrogate models, which are coupled with acquisition functions to guide and optimize a process towards a desired objective. To facilitate model building, BASIL provides a variety of predefined surrogate model templates. BASIL can be used to optimize any arbitrary experiment or process with known, user-defined input variables, optimization objectives, and defined output.

AI.tldr: BASIL是一个基于贝叶斯方法的桌面应用程序，通过图形界面让用户输入实验参数、优化目标和历史数据，利用代理模型和采集函数实现单目标和多目标过程优化。
AI.motivation: 为实验和过程优化提供一个用户友好的图形化工具，降低贝叶斯优化的使用门槛。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯方法，结合特殊采集函数，构建代理模型模板，通过图形界面实现单目标和多目标优化。
AI.result: 开发了BASIL桌面应用，支持用户自定义输入变量、优化目标和输出，能够指导并优化任意实验或过程。
AI.conclusion: BASIL提供了一种便捷、可视化的过程优化工具，适用于多种实验和工业过程优化场景。

title: Dementia-Agents: A Multi-Modal Multi-Agent System for Dementia Staging and Phenotyping
summary: Dementia diagnosis requires integrating multi-modal clinical assessments from diverse informants and clinicians under incomplete and heterogeneous data conditions. Yet most AI-driven approaches remain Alzheimer's disease (AD)-centric, framing the problem as binary AD detection or three-stage AD progression modeling within well-curated research settings. This pathology-driven paradigm overlooks the broader, syndrome-level nature of dementia, which spans multiple stages, phenotypes, and etiologies. In this paper, we propose Dementia-Agents, a clinically aligned multi-agent framework for real-world dementia staging and phenotyping. The framework follows a three-step workflow: (1) a data agent translates structured clinical records into semantically faithful textual representations that preserve missing-data signals and routes them to domain-aligned experts; (2) five fine-tuned expert agents generate domain-level predictions; and (3) a coordinator agent performs probabilistic aggregation to produce final staging and phenotyping decisions. We develop and evaluate Dementia-Agents on a real-world clinical cohort of 1,066 patients from two cognitive neurology services. Compared with monolithic multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) and prior medical multi-agent systems, our approach achieves consistent improvements in diagnostic performance for real-world syndrome-level dementia staging and phenotyping, while preserving domain-level interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出Dementia-Agents多智能体框架，通过结构化临床数据语义化转换、五个领域专家智能体预测及概率聚合协调，在真实临床队列中实现优于单一大模型和已有医疗多智能体系统的痴呆分期与表型诊断性能，同时保持域级可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI方法多聚焦于阿尔茨海默病的二元检测或三阶段建模，忽视了痴呆症在综合征层面涵盖多阶段、多表型和多病因的临床现实，且无法处理真实世界中数据不完整、异质性的条件。
AI.method: 三步骤多智能体框架：(1) 数据智能体将结构化临床记录转化为语义保真的文本表示，保留缺失数据信号并路由至领域对齐专家；(2) 五个微调专家智能体生成领域级预测；(3) 协调智能体执行概率聚合产生最终分期和表型决策。
AI.result: 在包含1,066名患者的真实临床队列上，相比单一大语言模型和先前医疗多智能体系统，Dementia-Agents在真实世界综合征级痴呆分期和表型诊断中取得一致性改进。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体框架能有效应对真实世界痴呆诊断中数据不完整和异质性问题，在提升诊断性能的同时保持域级可解释性，为超越AD中心范式、覆盖更广泛痴呆综合征的AI辅助诊断提供了可行路径。

title: Simulated Customers Never Walk Away: Decision Fidelity of LLM User Simulators Measured Against Real Purchase Outcomes
summary: LLM-as-user-simulation has become core infrastructure for conversational AI: agent benchmarks (tau-bench), training pipelines, and a growing body of fidelity studies all rely on LLMs role-playing the human side of dialogue. Existing frameworks measure communicative fidelity -- whether simulators talk like humans -- against ground truth from paid participants role-playing assigned goals. We argue this has a structural blind spot: when the goal is assigned, the user's willingness is exogenous, so no framework can test whether simulators make decisions like real users whose motivation is endogenous, latent, and decaying. We introduce decision fidelity -- whether a simulated population reproduces the decision-state dynamics of real users facing real, consequential choices -- and measure it on a unique testbed: 2,790 production conversations between an LLM sales agent and real customers, including 793 with verified payment outcomes. Using a teacher-forced probe protocol that holds context and instrument fixed, we find a systematic, outcome-correlated failure we call the disengagement deficit: simulators reproduce eventual buyers almost exactly (depth bias +0.09) but inflate eventual non-buyers toward the purchase frame (depth bias +0.40; d=0.38, p<0.001), halving expressed resistance (25.1% to 13.5%) and nearly doubling deliberation (21.9% to 40.1%) while fabricating no purchases. The deficit replicates across model families (DeepSeek: d=0.41, p=0.002) and resists the obvious fix: instructing the simulator that it may disengage cuts marginal bias five-fold but barely moves the outcome-conditioned contrast (d=0.34, p=0.008). Real non-buyers say "not now" and stop; simulated non-buyers ask about price. Evaluating or training sales and persuasion agents against such simulators overstates funnel progress exactly where it matters most -- the customers who walk away.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"决策保真度"概念，发现现有LLM用户模拟器在模拟真实用户决策时存在系统性缺陷：模拟器能准确还原最终购买者行为（偏差+0.09），但严重高估非购买者的参与度（偏差+0.40），将实际用户的"现在不行"式拒绝扭曲为"多少钱"式询价，且该缺陷在跨模型和指令干预下仍持续存在。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM用户模拟器仅评估"交流保真度"（模拟器说话是否像人类），但忽视了一个结构性盲点：当模拟任务中的用户目标是外生赋予的，而真实用户的动机是内生的、潜在的且随时间衰减的，现有框架无法检验模拟器是否做出与真实用户相同的决策。
AI.method: 使用2,790条真实销售对话（含793笔带支付验证的结果）作为测试集，采用教师强制探测协议（固定上下文和工具），对比LLM模拟器与真实用户在决策状态动态上的差异。
AI.result: 模拟器存在"脱离赤字"：对最终购买者复现准确（偏差+0.09），但对非购买者系统性高估其参与度（偏差+0.40，d=0.38），将实际拒绝率从25.1%压低至13.5%，将深思熟虑率从21.9%推高至40.1%。该缺陷跨模型（DeepSeek: d=0.41）和指令干预（d=0.34）仍存在。
AI.conclusion: 使用此类模拟器评估或训练销售/说服智能体会系统性地高估漏斗进展，尤其是在最关键的用户流失场景中，导致对真实性能的过度乐观估计。

title: SLeDGe: Semi-Supervised Learning on Data Streams with Graph Structure Learning
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) on data streams is challenging due to the continuous evolution of high-volume data and the scarcity of labels. Existing methods are limited in leveraging the intrinsic relationships among samples because they typically rely on fixed similarity measures or static graph structures, which cannot capture how relationships evolve over time. We propose SLeDGe, an SSL method for data streams that jointly learns a predictive model and an adaptive graph structure under strict memory and label constraints. SLeDGe maintains compact labeled and unlabeled memories using distinct update strategies, balancing rapid adaptation to novel features with the retention of historical consistency. In addition, by encouraging sparsity in the relational graph, SLeDGe filters out spurious connections and enables effective propagation of label supervision. Across 12 datasets, SLeDGe outperforms state-of-the-art competitors, achieving average relative accuracy gains of 31.7% with 0.1% labels and 14.8% with 1% labels.

AI.tldr: 提出SLeDGe方法，通过联合学习预测模型和自适应图结构，在严格内存和标签约束下实现数据流上的半监督学习，在12个数据集上平均相对准确率提升31.7%（0.1%标签）和14.8%（1%标签）。
AI.motivation: 现有数据流半监督学习方法依赖固定相似度量或静态图结构，无法捕捉样本关系随时间的演化，限制了利用样本间内在关联的能力。
AI.method: SLeDGe维护带标签和无标签的紧凑记忆库，采用不同更新策略平衡快速适应新特征与保持历史一致性；通过鼓励关系图稀疏性过滤虚假连接，实现标签监督的有效传播。
AI.result: 在12个数据集上，SLeDGe在0.1%标签下平均相对准确率提升31.7%，在1%标签下提升14.8%，均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SLeDGe通过自适应图结构与智能记忆管理，有效解决了数据流半监督学习中关系演化与资源约束的挑战，显著提升了标签稀缺场景下的分类性能。

title: Efficient Network Inference via Hardware-Aware Architecture Search, Model Pruning & Quantization
summary: Embedded global navigation satellite system (GNSS) interference monitoring requires fast and memory-efficient inference to process large volumes of raw in-phase and quadrature (IQ) samples in real time. At the same time, increasingly expressive deep neural networks (DNNs) are needed for robust interference classification and characterization across diverse signal conditions. This creates a fundamental tension between predictive performance and deployability on resource-constrained hardware. In this paper, we investigate efficient network inference for GNSS interference characterization using iterative structured pruning, post-training static quantization, and hardware-aware zero-shot neural architecture search (NAS). Starting from MCUNet as a compact baseline, we analyze how model compression and automated architecture optimization affect model size, computational complexity, and memory usage while maintaining task performance. Experiments on a GNSS interference dataset, covering both classification and generalized characterization, show the benefits of combining compression and hardware-aware design for embedded deployment. Our results provide practical guidance for developing compact machine learning (ML) models for real-time GNSS interference monitoring on embedded platforms (iMXRT1062 MCU, Raspberry Pi Zero 2W, and Raspberry Pi 5).

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在资源受限的嵌入式平台上，通过迭代结构化剪枝、训练后静态量化和硬件感知零样本神经架构搜索（NAS）等技术，实现高效GNSS干扰监测的紧凑型深度学习模型，并在iMXRT1062 MCU、Raspberry Pi Zero 2W和Raspberry Pi 5等平台上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式GNSS干扰监测需要在资源受限硬件上实时处理大量IQ样本，而高表达力的深度神经网络虽能提升干扰分类和表征性能，却与部署效率存在根本矛盾。本文旨在解决这一性能与可部署性之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 以MCUNet为紧凑基线，结合迭代结构化剪枝、训练后静态量化以及硬件感知零样本神经架构搜索（NAS），通过模型压缩和自动化架构优化来减小模型尺寸、计算复杂度和内存占用，同时保持任务性能。
AI.result: 在GNSS干扰数据集（涵盖分类和广义表征任务）上的实验表明，结合模型压缩与硬件感知设计对嵌入式部署有效；在iMXRT1062 MCU、Raspberry Pi Zero 2W和Raspberry Pi 5上验证了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为在嵌入式平台上开发用于实时GNSS干扰监测的紧凑型机器学习模型提供了实践指导，证明了压缩技术与硬件感知设计相结合是平衡性能与部署效率的有效途径。

title: Beyond Hooking Onto the World: Referential Profiles and the Numerical Structure of LLM Grounding
summary: This paper revisits the grounding problem for large language models in light of recent vector-grounding accounts. I accept the shift from classical symbol grounding to vector grounding, but argue that the current debate remains incomplete in two respects. First, reference is often treated too thinly, as if it were a fixed link between an isolated expression and an object. I argue instead that reference is profile-based, context-sensitive, discourse-level, affectively shaped, and norm-governed. Even in the human case, reference is publicly stabilized through patterns of use, correction, distinction, inference, and continuation rather than through identical private representations. Second, vector grounding requires an account of numerical realization. LLMs do not acquire reference through human perception, memory, intention, embodiment, or understanding. Rather, through optimization, they parameterize linguistic traces of human world-directed practice. In a finite vector system, referential profiles must be distributed, may be superposed, and are recovered through context-sensitive computation. Weights, activations, attention-mediated hidden states, softmax-trained contrasts, and inner-product alignments are the mathematical sites at which inherited linguistic relations become stable and causally active. Mechanistic interpretability findings, including entity-like features, knowledge neurons, and emotion-related activation directions, provide indirect support for this view. They do not show that LLMs possess human reference. They support a more limited thesis: LLMs may possess derivative, language-mediated, profile-based, and numerically structured forms of reference.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视大语言模型的 grounding 问题，接受向量 grounding 转向，但指出现有讨论在指称的丰富性（基于轮廓、语境敏感、语篇层级、情感塑造、规范约束）和数值实现机制两个维度上存在不足，并论证 LLM 通过优化将人类世界导向实践的语言痕迹参数化，形成衍生性、语言中介、基于轮廓、数值结构的指称形式。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型 grounding 讨论虽然已从经典符号 grounding 转向向量 grounding，但对指称的理解过于单薄（将指称视为固定链接），且缺乏对指称在向量系统中如何数值实现的机制性说明。
AI.method: 理论分析：对比人类指称的丰富特征（轮廓性、语境敏感性、语篇层级性、情感塑造性、规范性）与 LLM 的数值实现机制（权重、激活值、注意力隐状态、softmax 对比、内积对齐），并借助机械可解释性发现（实体类特征、知识神经元、情感方向）进行间接论证。
AI.result: LLM 不通过人类式感知、记忆、意向、具身或理解获取指称，而是通过优化将语言痕迹参数化；指称轮廓在有限向量系统中分布式、叠加式存在，通过语境敏感计算恢复；LLM 可能拥有衍生性、语言中介、基于轮廓、数值结构的指称形式。
AI.conclusion: 向量 grounding 虽优于经典符号 grounding，但需补充基于轮廓的指称理论和数值实现机制解释；机械可解释性证据支持 LLM 拥有衍生性而非人类式的指称能力。

title: FairTutor: Equity-Aware Pedagogical LLM Routing for Budget-Constrained AI Tutoring
comment: AI for Education Day at SIGKDD 2026, 14 pages, 2 figures
summary: Generative AI tutors provide real-time, personalized learning support, but also create a new education inequity: students with access to premium AI services may receive clearer explanations, more personalized guidance, and better scaffolding than students limited to free or low-cost services. To address this challenge, we propose FairTutor, an equity-aware model-routing framework that achieves cost-effective AI tutoring via pedagogically motivated multi-agent orchestration. FairTutor combines query analysis, pedagogical planning, low-cost model generation, evaluator-guided critique and revision, and selective escalation to premium AI models. We introduce access-tier AI Education (AIED) Advantage Gap to measure the quality difference between premium-access and budget-constrained tutoring, and TutorAccessEval, a benchmark spanning math, reading, writing, science, and language learning. Empirical evaluations show that FairTutor achieves 97.1% of premium pedagogical quality (in floor-adjusted Likert scale) while reducing serving cost by 71.6%. Sensitivity analysis reveals a tunable cost--quality Pareto frontier, enabling FairTutor to be tailored to the needs of diverse student populations.

AI.tldr: FairTutor是一个面向公平的模型路由框架，通过多智能体编排实现成本效益的AI辅导，在保留97.1%优质教学质量的同时降低71.6%的服务成本。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI辅导虽然提供了实时个性化学习支持，但也造成了新的教育不平等：付费用户获得更优质的辅导服务，而免费或低成本用户只能获得较差的体验。现有方法缺乏对服务质量公平性的系统考虑。
AI.method: 提出FairTutor框架，包含查询分析、教学规划、低成本模型生成、评估器引导的 critique 与修订、以及选择性升级到高级AI模型五个模块。采用多智能体编排实现教学驱动的成本-质量权衡。提出AIED Advantage Gap指标量化不同访问层级间的质量差异，并构建TutorAccessEval基准测试集。
AI.result: FairTutor达到高级教学质量的97.1%（经地板调整的Likert量表），同时降低71.6%的服务成本。敏感性分析揭示了可调的成本-质量帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: FairTutor通过智能路由策略有效缩小了不同经济条件学生之间的AI教育质量差距，且框架具有可调性，能够适应不同学生群体的需求。

title: Enhancing Differentially Private Mechanisms via Empirical Bayes
summary: Differential privacy (DP) has become the gold standard for ensuring the privacy protection of machine learning and statistical algorithms in recent decades. A plethora of algorithms and methods have been developed to enhance the utility of DP algorithms while maintaining the same level of DP. However, these are often overly complex or computationally ineffective. We propose a novel approach focusing on denoising the output of the simple additive Gaussian mechanism by adopting the idea of \textit{empirical Bayes estimation}. We highlight that the empirical Bayes approach can reduce the mean-squared error solely by taking the output of the Gaussian mechanism as input.
