The problem is particularly challenging due to the data scarcity for these tasks in the low-resource languages. Identifying such phenomena has become an active area of research and is addressed in SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual, Multicultural Online Polarization Detection. To address this problem we propose an architecture that leverages LaBSE embeddings - an unconventional choice typically reserved for retrieval tasks, to obtain strong cross-lingual learning which enhances scores in low-resource language by a score up to 0.2 macro F1. Furthermore, we provide a comprehensive ablation study evaluating the performance of diverse encoder models in the Qwen model family within a retrieval-based prompting framework. Our code will be soon available at https://github.com/carrycurious/PolarMind.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多语言、多文化环境下的在线极化现象检测问题，提出一种基于LaBSE嵌入的架构，在低资源语言上最多提升0.2 macro F1，并系统评估了Qwen系列编码器在检索式提示框架中的表现。
AI.motivation: 多语言、多文化环境中在线极化现象检测面临数据稀缺的挑战，尤其在低资源语言上表现不佳，亟需有效的跨语言学习方法。
AI.method: 提出基于LaBSE嵌入的架构（通常用于检索任务），通过跨语言学习提升低资源语言性能；并对Qwen模型家族中多种编码器在检索式提示框架下进行消融实验。
AI.result: 在低资源语言上macro F1提升最多达0.2。
AI.conclusion: LaBSE嵌入在跨语言极化检测任务中有效，检索式提示框架与不同编码器的组合值得进一步探索。

title: Learning Burst-Aware Early Warning Models for Capacity Stress under AI Workload Surges in Hyperscale Data Centers
summary: The rapid growth of large-scale AI workloads, particularly Large Language Model (LLM) training and inference, is fundamentally reshaping the operational dynamics of hyperscale data centers. Unlike traditional cloud workloads, AI-driven jobs exhibit bursty, high-intensity, and rapidly shifting resource demands, often leading to sudden capacity stress that cannot be effectively handled by reactive threshold-based mechanisms. In this paper, we propose a deployment-oriented, burst-aware early warning framework for proactive capacity stress prediction under AI workload surges. We formulate the problem as a high-recall forecasting task over multivariate telemetry windows, with the explicit goal of enabling operational intervention before system degradation occurs. The proposed framework integrates workload intensity, temporal variation, and system pressure signals, and employs a lightweight tree-based learning model to capture nonlinear interactions in highly imbalanced environments. To evaluate the system under realistic conditions, we introduce an AI workload surge injection methodology that simulates burst-driven demand patterns observed in large-scale AI systems. Our XGBoost-based model achieves an ROC AUC of 0.697 and an AP of 0.670, significantly outperforming baseline methods. Under deployment-oriented threshold selection, the framework achieves a Recall of 0.914, enabling the detection of the majority of stress-prone periods with acceptable false-alarm cost. Beyond predictive performance, we show how the proposed framework can be integrated into operational control loops to support proactive actions such as workload throttling and resource scaling. Our results highlight the practical value of high-recall, learning-based early warning systems in enabling resilient and adaptive data center operations in the era of AI-driven workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向部署的、突发感知的早期预警框架，用于在AI工作负载激增下进行主动容量压力预测。该框架采用轻量级树模型（XGBoost），在多变量遥测窗口上实现高召回率预测，在真实数据集上达到0.914的召回率，支持数据中心在工作负载拥塞发生前进行主动干预（如限流和资源扩缩）。
AI.motivation: 大规模AI工作负载（尤其是LLM训练和推理）在超大规模数据中心中呈现出突发性、高强度、快速变化的资源需求模式，传统的基于阈值的被动响应机制无法有效应对这种突发容量压力，亟需一种能够提前预测并预警系统压力的方法。
AI.method: 将问题建模为多变量遥测窗口上的高召回率预测任务；集成工作负载强度、时间变化和系统压力信号；采用轻量级树模型（XGBoost）捕捉高度不平衡环境中的非线性交互；引入AI工作负载突增注入方法模拟真实突发模式。
AI.result: XGBoost模型在ROC AUC上达到0.697，AP达到0.670，显著优于基线方法；在面向部署的阈值选择下，召回率达到0.914，能以可接受的误报成本检测大部分压力易发时段。
AI.conclusion: 高召回率、基于学习的早期预警系统在AI驱动工作负载时代具有实际价值，可集成到运营控制环路中支持主动操作（如限流和资源扩缩），实现数据中心弹性自适应运营。

title: SOHET: Sequence Of Heterogeneous Events Transformer with Self-Supervised Pre-Training
summary: Many machine learning applications rely on heterogeneous event streams to make predictions, either causally as events arrive or bidirectionally over complete sequences. We propose SOHET (Sequence Of Heterogeneous Events Transformer), a hierarchical architecture combining event-type-specific tabular encoders with temporal and type embeddings, processed by a causal or bidirectional transformer. We introduce three self-supervised pre-training objectives for the causal setting. On a proprietary large-scale real-world Booking.com fraud detection task with 17 event types, SOHET outperforms FlexTPP, NAPPT, and CIPPT by 5.8%. Pre-training yields an additional 2.6% gain and 2.4% faster convergence. On the EBES benchmark, bidirectional SOHET matches or exceeds the published best on 6 out of 8 tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出SOHET层级架构，结合事件类型特定表格编码器与时间/类型嵌入，通过因果或双向Transformer处理异构事件流。在Booking.com欺诈检测任务上优于基线5.8%，预训练额外提升2.6%并加速收敛2.4%；在EBES基准上8项任务中6项达到或超越最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对异构事件流中不同类型事件的独特模式挖掘不足，缺乏有效的预训练策略，难以同时支持在线因果预测与离线双向分析。
AI.method: SOHET层级架构：1) 事件类型特定的表格编码器捕获各类型特征；2) 结合时间嵌入与类型嵌入；3) 采用因果或双向Transformer建模序列依赖；4) 提出三种面向因果设置的自监督预训练目标。
AI.result: 在Booking.com欺诈检测任务（17种事件类型）中，SOHET相较FlexTPP/NAPPT/CIPPT提升5.8%；预训练带来额外2.6%增益及2.4%更快收敛；EBES基准上8项任务中6项达到或超越当前最佳。
AI.conclusion: SOHET有效处理异构事件流，在欺诈检测等多场景中表现优异，预训练策略可进一步提升因果预测性能。

title: Denoising Iterative Self-Correction: Structured Verification Loops for Reliable LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models produce fluent but often incorrect multi-step reasoning, and naive correction methods risk degrading already-correct answers. We introduce Denoising Iterative Self-Correction (DISC), a test-time procedure that treats verification question outputs as noisy measurements of where a solution may be corrupted. Using these signals, DISC progressively reduces errors across multiple verify-judge-correct passes, analogous to traditional iterative denoising. A binary judgment gate controls correction precision by blocking rewrites that would damage already-correct answers while the verifier and corrector together repair errors. We evaluate this trade-off using two paired diagnostics: an improvement-to-degradation ratio (precision) and a repair rate (recall). Across three benchmarks (BIG-Bench Mistake, HotpotQA, GPQA Diamond) and four models, DISC dominates Chain-of-Verification and Self-Refine on the precision-recall trade-off, reaching 81.6% accuracy with 13x more improvements per degradation than Chain-of-Verification and 5x more than Self-Refine on BIG-Bench Mistake (Sonnet~4.5). On GPQA Diamond, we identify a capability floor below which judges acknowledge contradictions in evidence but cannot translate that recognition into a correction. We further show that cross-model role allocation -- assigning verification and judgment to a model different from the generator -- mitigates self-confirmation bias.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DISC（去噪迭代自校正）的测试时推理方法，通过将验证问题的输出视为答案可能被污染的噪声测量，结合二元判断门控机制，在多次验证-判断-校正迭代中逐步减少推理错误，在多个基准测试中显著优于Chain-of-Verification和Self-Refine方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型生成的多步推理虽然流畅但常包含错误，而简单的校正方法可能破坏原本正确的答案。现有方法在修正精度（不破坏正确回答）和召回率（修复错误）之间存在难以平衡的问题，需要一种既能有效修复错误又不损害正确推理的迭代校正方法。
AI.method: DISC将验证问题的输出视为答案中可能被污染位置的噪声测量，通过多次"验证-判断-校正"迭代逐步降低错误。其中二元判断门控机制控制校正精度，阻止可能破坏正确回答的重写操作，而验证器和校正器共同修复错误。同时采用跨模型角色分配（将验证和判断任务分配给与生成器不同的模型）来减轻自我确认偏差。
AI.result: 在BIG-Bench Mistake、HotpotQA、GPQA Diamond三个基准测试和四个模型上，DISC在精度-召回率权衡上优于Chain-of-Verification和Self-Refine。在BIG-Bench Mistake上（Sonnet~4.5），达到81.6%准确率，每次改进与退化的比率比CoVe高13倍，比Self-Refine高5倍。在GPQA Diamond上发现存在能力下限，低于该下限的模型虽能识别证据矛盾但无法将其转化为修正。
AI.conclusion: DISC通过去噪视角和二元判断门控有效平衡了校正的精度和召回率，跨模型角色分配能缓解自我确认偏差。同时揭示了模型在复杂推理任务中存在能力阈值现象，即识别矛盾与修正矛盾之间可能存在能力断层。

title: Trip+: Benchmarking Agents in Personalized Interactive Travel Planning
summary: Interactive travel planning has become a popular use case for language models. Agents are deployed to manage evolving preferences and unexpected disruptions over multiple turns. Such settings require models to make complex, profile-conditioned planning decisions. However, existing benchmarks often evaluate feasibility, personalization, or interaction in relatively isolated settings. We therefore introduce Trip+ to measure the ability of agents to plan travel holistically. In Trip+, given traveler profiles and dynamic interactions, agents must generate and revise minute-level itineraries. End-to-end traveler experiences are evaluated via an LLM-based simulator, enabling the assessment of subjective metrics like fatigue. Our scenarios range from simple request resolutions to complex environment-driven replanning. We evaluate 18 LMs and find a consistent gap in experiential quality. Models favor technically feasible but exhausting itineraries that diverge sharply from profiled traveler preferences.

AI.tldr: Trip+是一个用于评估语言智能体在动态交互中规划行程能力的基准测试，涵盖从简单请求到复杂环境驱动的重新规划。研究发现，模型倾向于生成技术上可行但令人疲惫的行程，与用户画像偏好存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试往往在相对孤立的场景中评估可行性、个性化或交互性，缺乏对智能体在动态交互中端到端规划旅行体验的综合评估。
AI.method: 引入Trip+基准，要求智能体根据旅行者画像和动态交互生成并修订分钟级别的行程，通过基于LLM的模拟器评估端到端旅行体验（包括疲劳等主观指标）。
AI.result: 评估了18种语言模型，发现存在一致的体验质量差距，模型倾向于选择技术上可行但令人疲惫的行程，与用户画像偏好严重偏离。
AI.conclusion: Trip+揭示了现有语言模型在个性化动态旅行规划中的不足，模型在追求可行性的同时忽视了旅行者的主观体验偏好。

title: Predictive Repair Management Using a Multi-Head Attention Transformer and Online Learning
summary: Accurate prediction of repair duration is an important challenge in product maintenance due to its implications for resource allocation, customer satisfaction, and operational performance. This study aims to develop a deep learning framework to help fleet repair shops accurately categorize repair time given product historical data. The study uses an automobile repair and maintenance dataset and creates an end-to-end predictive framework by employing a multi-head attention network designed for tabular data. The developed framework combines categorical information, transformed through embeddings and attention mechanisms, with numerical historical data to facilitate integration and learning from diverse data features. A weighted loss function is introduced to overcome class imbalance issues in large datasets. Moreover, an online learning strategy is used for continuous incremental model updates to maintain predictive accuracy in evolving operational environments. Our empirical findings demonstrate that the multi-head attention mechanism extracts meaningful interactions between vehicle identifiers and repair types compared to a feed-forward neural network and a random forest model. Also, combining historical maintenance data with an online learning strategy facilitates real-time adjustments to changing patterns and increases the model's predictive performance on new data. The model is tested on real-world repair data spanning 2013 to 2020 and achieves an accuracy of 78%, with attention weight analyses illustrating feature interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多头注意力网络的深度学习框架，结合嵌入、加权损失函数和在线学习策略，用于精准预测汽车维修时长，在2013-2020年真实数据上达到78%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 维修时长准确预测对资源分配、客户满意度和运营绩效至关重要，但现有方法难以有效处理表格数据中的类别与数值特征交互及类别不平衡问题。
AI.method: 采用多头注意力网络处理表格数据，通过嵌入层将类别特征转换为稠密向量并与数值特征融合；引入加权损失函数缓解类别不平衡；采用在线学习策略实现持续增量更新。
AI.result: 在2013-2020年真实汽车维修数据集上达到78%准确率，注意力权重分析揭示了车辆标识与维修类型之间的特征交互，优于前馈神经网络和随机森林模型。
AI.conclusion: 多头注意力机制能有效提取表格数据中类别特征的交互关系，结合在线学习策略可在动态运营环境中保持预测性能，为维修时长分类提供了有效的端到端解决方案。

title: CalVerT: Augmenting Agents with Calibrated Verifier Telemetry Improves Action and Learning in Knowledge-Intensive Tasks
summary: LLM agents in knowledge intensive question answering take retrieval and reasoning actions with incomplete knowledge about whether their current answer is uncertain, unsupported, or already complete. This produces two failure modes: committing to confident but unsupported answers, which hurts accuracy, and over-retrieving when the evidence in hand already suffices, resulting in wasted compute. To give agents a more complete picture of the state space they are operating in, we introduce calibrated verifier telemetry (CalVerT), which augments the agent's state with additional telemetry: a calibrated self-confidence score and a grounding verifier score. We show that CalVerT can improve agents in both training-free and training-based settings. On four QA benchmarks, we find that CalVerT raises F1 by triggering retrieval in cases where agents over-rely on parametric knowledge, while cutting redundant retrieval in cases where agents have sufficient context to answer. We show that CalVerT can augment existing QA frameworks without training. Moreover, CalVerT also improves trained systems: by simply augmenting an agent's state with telemetry, we observe improvements after reinforcement learning, as compared to an agent with identical training but no CalVerT telemetry.

AI.tldr: 提出CalVerT方法，通过校准的自信心分数和基础验证器分数增强智能体状态，减少过度检索和不充分检索，在训练无关和训练设置中均提升QA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在知识密集型问答中存在两种失败模式：对不确定但缺乏支持的答案过度自信（损害准确率），以及在已有充分证据时过度检索（浪费计算资源）。智能体缺乏对当前状态（答案是否不确定、无支持或已完成）的完整认知。
AI.method: 引入CalVerT（校准验证器遥测），在智能体状态中增加两类遥测信息：校准的自信心分数（calibrated self-confidence score）和基础验证器分数（grounding verifier score），使智能体更全面地感知操作空间的状态。
AI.result: 在四个QA基准上，CalVerT通过触发检索（当智能体过度依赖参数知识时）提升F1分数，同时减少冗余检索（当智能体已有足够上下文时）。无需训练即可增强现有QA框架；在强化学习训练设置中，仅通过增强状态遥测即可观察到性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CalVerT通过提供校准的状态感知信号，能够同时提升训练无关和训练基于设置的智能体性能，有效缓解过度自信和过度检索问题。

title: Whistleblowing and the machine -- towards a considered position
comment: Presented at AAMAS-26 Workshop on Rebellion and Disobedience in AI, see https://sites.google.com/view/rad-ai/rad-ai/cfp?authuser=0
summary: Artificial intelligent agents and autonomous systems are embedded in our environments. They are both a commercial product and a personal tool that generates a lot of data and can draw conclusions from it: machines generate and keep secrets. But should machines protect all secrets? It has been shown that artificial agents are able to whistleblow and it has been argued that digital multi-agent environments should allow for agents in them to whistleblow. We argue that machine whistleblowing must be normative and principled and routed in the existing understanding of whistleblowing as an important rule-breaking mechanism in society. We also argue that there is a need for government regulators to formulate an informed stance on both what machines should be allowed to whistleblow on and how to legally protect those who develop whistleblowing machines

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能体与自治系统中的"机器告密"（machine whistleblowing）概念，主张机器告密应当基于现有社会对告密行为的理解，具有规范性和原则性，并呼吁政府监管机构对机器告密的内容和法律保护制定明确立场。
AI.motivation: 人工智能体已深度嵌入环境，既能生成数据也能从中得出结论，即机器能够"持有秘密"。已有研究表明智能体可以实施告密行为，且数字多智能体环境应允许告密。因此，需要为机器告密建立规范化、原则性的框架。
AI.method: 本文采用规范性论证方法，将机器告密植根于现有社会对告密作为重要规则打破机制的理解，并从法律和监管角度提出规范性要求。
AI.result: 论证了机器告密必须是有规范性和原则性的；提出了政府监管机构需要就机器被允许告密的内容以及如何法律保护开发告密机器的人制定明确立场。
AI.conclusion: 机器告密不应是无序的，而应基于社会对告密的既有理解；同时，亟需政府监管机构介入，明确界定机器的告密范围并为相关开发者提供法律保护。

title: Enhancing Creativity in 3D Generative Design via a TRIZ-Inspired Text-to-CAD Framework
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in supporting engineering design tasks, including computer-aided design (CAD) automation. However, most existing LLM-based 3D CAD generation approaches primarily focus on geometric precision and instruction-following performance, often overlooking the fundamental aspect of creative design exploration. This study presents a TRIZ-inspired text-to-CAD framework that leverages LLMs to generate high-quality, editable CAD models while systematically exploring creative design alternatives. The framework integrates the Theory of Inventive Problem Solving (TRIZ)-embedding deep human insights from extensive patent records-into LLM prompting strategies, enabling autonomous generation of innovative CAD variants that address technical contradictions. Through a comprehensive three-stage pipeline of design generation, enhancement, and optimization, the framework produces structurally diverse CAD models from well-crafted prompts. The present study implements and evaluates the first two stages, while positioning the design optimization stage as future work. A product design case study (chair) demonstrates that the TRIZ-inspired text-to-CAD framework generates multiple creative design alternatives by systematically applying TRIZ inventive principles such as segmentation, anti-weight, dynamics, and composite materials, achieving 4.0-14.7% mass reduction across all enhanced designs while maintaining structural integrity. The key findings suggest that integrating systematic innovation methodologies with LLM-based 3D CAD generation bridges the gap between precision-focused synthesis and creativity-focused exploration, advancing toward autonomous design systems where AI makes design decisions independently, supporting human decision-making in human-AI collaborative design for engineering applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受TRIZ启发的文本到CAD框架，利用大语言模型生成高质量、可编辑的CAD模型，同时系统地探索创造性设计替代方案。通过将TRIZ创新原理嵌入LLM提示策略，该框架在保持结构完整性的前提下实现了4.0-14.7%的质量减轻，为弥合精密合成与创造性探索之间的差距提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的3D CAD生成方法主要关注几何精度和指令跟随性能，忽视了创造性设计探索这一基本方面。因此，需要一种将系统化创新方法与LLM结合，以同时实现精度和创造性的框架。
AI.method: 提出TRIZ启发的文本到CAD框架，将TRIZ（发明问题解决理论）嵌入LLM提示策略中；采用三阶段流水线：设计生成、设计增强和设计优化（本文实现并评估前两个阶段）；通过系统应用TRIZ发明原理（如分割、反重量、动态性、复合材料）生成创新CAD变体。
AI.result: 以椅子产品设计案例验证，所有增强设计在保持结构完整性的前提下实现了4.0-14.7%的质量减轻，生成了多个创造性设计替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 将系统化创新方法论与基于LLM的3D CAD生成相结合，弥合了精度导向合成与创造力导向探索之间的差距，为推进自主设计系统（AI独立做出设计决策）以及人机协同工程设计提供了支持。

title: When to Plan, When to Polish: Noise Level as a Granularity Axis for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Standard tokenwise diffusion LMs keep training corruption and inference commitment at token granularity throughout denoising. At high noise, this leaves scattered local fragments rather than coherent evidence, making it hard to form early coarse structure, exactly what planning-sensitive generation requires. Hierarchical planning methods add coarse stages to separate planning from wording, but they need extra planners, block latents, or two stage designs. We propose Noise Dependent Granularity Control (NDGC), a single-level diffusion method that uses the noise level as a granularity cue. NDGC aligns training exposure and inference commitment with denoising progress. High noise steps use coherent token groups to support early meaning commitment, while low noise steps return to token level refinement. This creates planning like coarse to fine denoising without an explicit planner or hierarchical architecture. Across controlled tests, ablations, and WritingPrompts, NDGC shows earlier skeleton formation, better ordered recovery, and healthier outputs.

AI.tldr: 提出噪声相关粒度控制(NDGC)，利用噪声水平作为粒度线索，在高噪声阶段使用连贯token组进行粗粒度规划，低噪声阶段返回token级精炼，实现无需显式规划器的单层扩散LM。
AI.motivation: 标准token级扩散LM在去噪过程中仅保持token粒度的训练损坏和推理提交，在高噪声下产生分散的局部片段而非连贯证据，难以形成早期粗略结构，而这正是规划敏感生成所需要的。层次规划方法虽添加粗阶段来分离规划与措辞，但需要额外规划器、块潜在变量或两阶段设计。
AI.method: 提出NDGC方法，利用噪声水平作为粒度线索，对齐训练暴露和推理提交与去噪进度。高噪声步骤使用连贯token组支持早期意义提交，低噪声步骤返回token级精炼，实现从粗到细的去噪过程。
AI.result: 在控制测试、消融实验和WritingPrompts上，NDGC展示了更早的骨架形成、更好的有序恢复和更健康的输出。
AI.conclusion: NDGC方法在不使用显式规划器或层次架构的情况下，实现了类似规划的从粗到细的去噪过程，有效改善了扩散LM的生成质量。

title: ARCO: Adaptive Rubric with Co-Evolution for Multi-Step LLM-Based Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning for multi-step LLM agents often relies on scalar rewards that indicate success but cannot explain why a trajectory is good or bad. Rubric-based rewards improve interpretability through natural-language criteria, but existing methods score at the trajectory level and freeze the scorer behind a closed-source judge, leaving step-level credit assignment unresolved and the judge itself static. We propose ARCO (Adaptive Rubric CO-evolution), a rubric framework in which a same-scale model $μ$ shares a backbone with two heads: a generation head that produces per-step criteria, and a score head that predicts rubric-conditioned step-level rewards. A trajectory decomposition constraint ties the sum of step rewards to the terminal outcome, enabling credit assignment without step-level labels, while $μ$ and the policy $π$ are jointly updated on on-policy data so that the rubric content and the scoring function co-evolve at the parameter level. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue with two open-source backbones, ARCO improves the best EM in every setting over strong outcome-, rubric-, and process-reward baselines, and analyses show that its rubrics are step-specific, robust to design choices, and useful for diagnosing agent behavior. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/zihangtian/ARCO.

AI.tldr: ARCO提出了一种自适应标准协同进化框架，通过共享骨干模型的生成头和评分头，实现步骤级奖励分配和标准-评分的参数级共同进化，在多个多跳QA数据集上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法仅使用标量奖励，无法解释轨迹优劣的原因；基于标准（rubric）的奖励方法虽提高了可解释性，但仅在轨迹级别评分且使用冻结的闭源评判模型，无法解决步骤级信用分配问题，且评判模型本身是静态的。
AI.method: 提出ARCO框架：同一尺度模型μ共享一个骨干网络，包含两个头——生成头（生成每步标准）和评分头（预测标准条件下的步骤级奖励）。通过轨迹分解约束（步骤奖励之和等于终端结果）实现无步骤标签的信用分配，μ与策略π在在线数据上联合更新，实现标准内容和评分函数的参数级共同进化。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA和MuSiQue三个数据集上，使用两个开源骨干模型，ARCO在所有设置中均优于强基线的最佳EM值。分析表明其标准具有步骤特异性、对设计选择鲁棒，且可用于诊断智能体行为。
AI.conclusion: ARCO通过步骤级标准生成和自适应评分协同进化，有效解决了多步LLM智能体的信用分配问题，提升了推理任务的性能与可解释性。

title: Unsupervised Disentanglement Without Compromises : How Functional Orthogonality Enforces Identifiability
summary: This paper explores unsupervised disentangled representation learning from a functional perspective. We define latent concepts as factors that influence observations through locally orthogonal directions, formalized as an orthogonality constraint on the Jacobian of the generative mapping. We prove that this condition yields identifiability of general nonlinear generative models, without requiring statistical independence or causal assumptions, provided the latent domain admits all combinations of factor values. Experiments with orthogonality-regularized normalizing flows empirically confirm the theory, demonstrate reliable recovery of ground-truth factors, and shed light on the success of VAEs. These findings challenge the prevailing impossibility claims for unsupervised disentanglement and provide a principled alternative foundation.

AI.tldr: 本文从函数视角提出无监督解耦表示学习的新方法，通过生成映射的雅可比正交约束实现非线性生成模型的可识别性，挑战了无监督解耦不可能性的主流观点。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督解耦表示学习被认为在理论上不可行（缺乏可识别性），本文试图从函数视角重新审视该问题，寻找无需统计独立性或因果假设的可行方案。
AI.method: 将潜在概念定义为通过局部正交方向影响观测的因素，形式化为对生成映射雅可比矩阵的正交性约束；证明在潜在域包含所有因子值组合的条件下，该条件可使一般非线性生成模型达到可识别性。
AI.result: 正交正则化的归一化流实验验证了理论，可靠恢复了真实因子，并揭示了VAE成功的原因。
AI.conclusion: 无监督解耦在理论上并非不可能，正交性约束为可识别性提供了原则性替代基础。

title: Test-Time Training with Next-Token Prediction
summary: Next-token prediction is the self-supervised signal that trains language models, and every observed prompt token provides the same signal at test time. We study whether this signal can define the inner-loop objective for test-time training (TTT) in pretrained long-context language models. Many TTT architectures require models to be trained with test-time adaptation in mind, limiting their direct applicability to released LLM checkpoints. While recent in-place TTT methods make fast-weight adaptation possible for pretrained LLMs without redesigning the backbone, they leave a central question unresolved: what should each test-time write store? Existing recipes train the fast weight to match a learned local value proxy but they are not directly tied to the self-supervised next-token prediction signal. We introduce Test-Time Training with Next-Token Prediction (TTT-NTP), a drop-in fast-weight adaptation method for pretrained LLMs that instead supervises updates using the model's own next contextual hidden state. This makes each local write follow the same causal computation that supports next-token prediction: the value target is a pointwise linear projection of a single next-position contextual state. On RULER Full-13 (averaged over 4k, 8k, 16k, and 32k context lengths), TTT-NTP is the only method that consistently improves the released backbone across four models spanning three families and a 0.6--8B size range: Llama-3.1-8B (+3.9), Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.0), and the Qwen3 series (Qwen3-4B +4.1, Qwen3-0.6B +2.9). On the real-world LongBench-v2 long-document QA benchmark, TTT-NTP improves over the base model on both Llama-3.1-8B (+5.6) and Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.7), while preserving commonsense and knowledge performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TTT-NTP，一种即插即用的快速权重自适应方法，利用模型自身的下一位置上下文隐藏状态作为监督信号，在测试时通过下一词预测损失更新快速权重，无需重新设计骨干网络。在多个长上下文基准上，该方法一致地提升了Llama-3.1-8B、Mistral-7B-v0.3、Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-0.6B四种预训练模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时训练（TTT）方法要么需要重新设计模型架构导致无法直接应用于已发布的预训练LLM检查点，要么虽然支持即插即用但快速权重的更新目标与模型自身的自监督信号（下一词预测）脱节。本文旨在解决核心问题：测试时写入的快速权重应该存储什么内容？
AI.method: TTT-NTP将下一词预测的自我监督信号作为测试时训练的内部循环目标。具体地，快速权重的值目标被定义为单个下一位置上下文状态的点状线性投影，使得每次局部写入都遵循与下一词预测相同的因果计算过程。
AI.result: 在RULER Full-13（平均4k/8k/16k/32k上下文长度）上，TTT-NTP是唯一在所有四种模型（Llama-3.1-8B +3.9, Mistral-7B-v0.3 +3.0, Qwen3-4B +4.1, Qwen3-0.6B +2.9）上一致提升基线的方法。在LongBench-v2长文档QA基准上，Llama-3.1-8B (+5.6)和Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.7)均有提升，同时保持了常识和知识性能。
AI.conclusion: TTT-NTP表明，将下一词预测这一预训练阶段的自监督信号直接作为测试时训练目标，是一种简单且有效的快速权重自适应方法，能够跨模型家族和规模（0.6B-8B）一致提升长上下文性能，且不牺牲通用能力。

title: Towards Dys-XAI: Influence-Based Explanations for Dysarthria Severity Assessment
summary: Dysarthria severity assessment is essential for therapy planning and longitudinal monitoring, yet manual perceptual rating is time-consuming and variable across clinicians. Although deep learning models achieve strong performance, their black-box nature limits clinical adoption. Existing speech explainability methods typically provide acoustic feature importance scores that are difficult for end-users to interpret. We propose an influence-based, instance-level explainability framework that explains each decision through supportive and competing training samples. Using gradient-based influence approximations, we compute per-utterance influence scores to identify supportive and competing training samples for each prediction. Controlled deletion experiments from 5 to 20 percent validate the explanations, showing that removing highly influential samples systematically shifts predictions. This approach provides auditable explanations by linking decisions to perceptible reference cases.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于影响力的实例级可解释性框架，通过梯度影响力近似计算每段语音的影响力分数，识别支持性和竞争性训练样本，为构音障碍严重程度评估提供可审计的解释。
AI.motivation: 构音障碍严重程度评估对治疗计划和纵向监测至关重要，但手动感知评分耗时且临床医生间存在差异；深度学习模型虽性能优异但黑箱特性限制了临床应用，现有语音可解释性方法提供的声学特征重要性分数难以被最终用户理解。
AI.method: 提出基于影响力的实例级可解释性框架，使用梯度近似计算每段语音的影响力分数，识别支持性和竞争性训练样本，并通过控制性删除实验（5%至20%）验证解释有效性。
AI.result: 控制性删除实验（5%-20%）验证了解释的有效性：移除高影响力样本会系统性改变预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将决策链接到可感知的参考案例，提供了可审计的解释，有望提升深度学习模型在构音障碍评估中的临床可接受性。

title: VLA-FAIL: Efficient Task Failure Detection for Finetuned Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action models (VLAs) achieve state-of-the-art performance on many robotic manipulation tasks, yet they can still behave unpredictably in out-of-distribution scenarios. Runtime failure detection is therefore essential for the safe real-world deployment of VLAs. However, existing task failure detectors require computationally expensive action sampling, are based on architectural assumptions that limit their applicability to VLAs, or need access to failure rollouts. We propose VLA-FAIL, a lightweight and broadly applicable failure detection framework for VLAs that combines two novel failure detectors with minimal overhead, without requiring failure data. The first, last-layer Mahalanobis distance (LLMD), detects out-of-distribution states by measuring token-wise deviations in last-layer features relative to the training data. The second, action chunk consistency (ACC), exploits the temporal overlap induced by receding-horizon control and detects failures when consecutive action chunks become inconsistent. To capture the trade-off between detection accuracy and detection latency, we introduce AUCPDT, a threshold-independent metric that jointly evaluates precision, recall, and detection time. Through extensive real-world and simulation experiments, we demonstrate that LLMD and ACC capture complementary failure modes whose combination enables reliable and early failure detection across diverse tasks, frequently outperforming significantly more expensive baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 提出VLA-FAIL框架，结合最后一层马氏距离(LLMD)和动作块一致性(ACC)两种轻量级故障检测器，无需故障数据即可有效检测VLA模型在分布外场景中的运行故障，并引入新指标AUCPDT评估检测精度与延迟的权衡。
AI.motivation: VLA模型在机器人操作任务中表现优异，但在分布外场景中行为不可预测，现有故障检测方法存在计算开销大、依赖架构假设或需要故障数据等问题，缺乏轻量且广泛适用的运行时故障检测方案。
AI.method: 提出VLA-FAIL框架，包含两个检测器：(1) 最后一层马氏距离(LLMD)通过测量最后一层特征相对于训练数据的token级偏差检测分布外状态；(2) 动作块一致性(ACC)利用回退时域控制产生的时序重叠，在连续动作块不一致时检测故障。引入AUCPDT指标联合评估精度、召回率和检测时间。
AI.result: 在真实世界和仿真实验中，LLMD和ACC捕获互补的故障模式，组合后能够在多种任务中实现可靠且早期的故障检测，性能经常显著优于更昂贵的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: VLA-FAIL为VLA模型提供了一种轻量、无需故障数据、广泛适用的运行时故障检测框架，有效提升了VLA在真实世界部署中的安全性。

title: Fixed RAG Compression Collapses Measured Reader Scaling
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) compression papers often evaluate a compressor on one to three readers and treat the compressed evidence layer as evaluation-neutral. We show this assumption is false: fixed compression can raise average accuracy while hiding reader upgrades and reversing model rankings. Across 20 readers and ten domain-method settings over four QA benchmarks and one summarization benchmark, compression gain decreases with reader baseline (nine of ten settings significant, p < 0.05). Generic summarization flips 31% of pairwise model rankings on LongMemEval-S, and a fixed HotpotQA compressor hides 80% of the raw upgrade from Qwen 7B to GPT-4.1-mini. Two opposing forces explain this paradox: compression rescues weak readers by removing noise they cannot filter, and harms strong readers by dropping details they would have used. The pattern appears across structured compilation, generic summarization, three trained compressor families, query-focused summarization, and an external audit of nine published compression papers. We release ragscale, a toolkit built on 177,000 row-level compression transitions, so any compression paper can audit reader scaling with three readers in one day.

AI.tldr: RAG压缩方法在评估时通常假设压缩后的证据层是评估中性的，但本文证明这一假设错误：固定压缩会掩盖读者能力差异、颠倒模型排名。本文通过20个读者、10个领域-方法设置、4个QA和1个摘要基准实验，发现压缩收益随读者基线下降，压缩会拯救弱读者（去噪）但伤害强读者（丢失细节），并基于17.7万行压缩转换构建了ragscale工具包。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG压缩论文通常使用少量读者（1-3个）评估压缩器，并默认压缩后的证据层对评估结果无偏倚。作者质疑这一假设，试图揭示压缩对读者性能的影响并非中性，进而可能误导模型排名和读者能力判断。
AI.method: 在4个QA基准和1个摘要基准上，使用20个读者和10种领域-方法设置进行系统性实验；分析压缩收益与读者基线表现的关系；对比固定压缩前后读者排名变化；引入结构编译、通用摘要、三种训练压缩器族、查询聚焦摘要等多种压缩方式；构造17.7万行压缩转换数据集进行外部审计。
AI.result: 压缩收益随读者基线下降（10个设置中9个显著，p<0.05）；通用摘要翻转了LongMemEval-S上31%的成对模型排名；HotpotQA上的固定压缩器隐藏了Qwen 7B到GPT-4.1-mini升级中80%的提升；压缩对弱读者有去噪帮助，对强读者有细节丢失伤害。
AI.conclusion: RAG压缩评估不应将压缩视为评估中性层；固定压缩会系统性地偏向弱读者、低估强读者能力，导致排名反转和升级效果掩盖；建议使用ragscale工具包以三个读者在一天内完成读者扩展性审计。

title: Social World Model for Lifelong Social Intelligence
summary:
Social intelligence is a core competency for language agents, yet current research primarily focuses on static capability evaluation rather than how these skills are continuously shaped and accumulated. This gap calls for a shift toward sustainable learning paradigms. Currently, two methodological pain points exist: social interaction trajectories lack unified structured representations to form iterable learning signals, and capability improvement and retention are typically studied in isolation, hindering the assessment of continuous evolution.
  To bridge this gap, we propose the Social World Model. We decompose social interaction into five dimensions (scene setting, observation, mental state, action, and dialogue) to build a closed-loop learning framework. In this setup, agents collect interaction experiences, convert them into preference signals for model updating, and redeploy the updated policy for continued learning. Additionally, we provide a reusable data synthesis mechanism and a lifelong learning benchmark, transforming social capabilities from an "object of evaluation" into an "object of sustainable training".
  Validating our framework on the ASCENT-Bench, the interactively trained Qwen2.5-7B model outperforms its baseline across all five core metrics. Notably, it matches the closed-source Gemini 3 Flash in completion rate, exceeds it in pass rate, and achieves zero forgetting across three difficulty levels. Unlike prior works that merely report static comparisons or capability decay, this end-to-end approach provides a trainable, verifiable, and retainable pathway, demonstrating that small open-source models can sustainably acquire competitive social coordination capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出社会世界模型（Social World Model），将社交互动分解为五个维度构建闭环学习框架，使语言智能体能够可持续地学习并保持社交能力。在ASCENT-Bench上，Qwen2.5-7B模型经交互训练后在五项指标上均超越基线，在完成率上媲美Gemini 3 Flash、通过率更优，且实现零遗忘。
AI.motivation: 当前社交智能研究聚焦静态能力评估，缺乏可持续学习范式。两个痛点：社交轨迹缺乏统一结构化表示以形成可迭代学习信号；能力提升与保持被孤立研究，无法评估持续进化。
AI.method: 提出Social World Model，将社交交互分解为场景设定、观察、心理状态、动作、对话五个维度，构建闭环学习框架。智能体收集交互经验→转化为偏好信号更新模型→部署更新策略继续学习。同时提供可复用的数据合成机制和终身学习基准。
AI.result: 在ASCENT-Bench上，Qwen2.5-7B交互训练后在五项核心指标上均超越基线；完成率媲美Gemini 3 Flash，通过率更优；在三个难度级别上均实现零遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端方法提供了一条可训练、可验证、可保留的路径，证明小型开源模型可以可持续地获取具有竞争力的社交协调能力，将社交能力从"评估对象"转变为"可持续训练对象"。

title: Atomistic Language Models Understand and Generate Materials
summary: Atomistic structure and natural language have long been modeled separately, with language models either calling atomistic models as tools or being fine-tuned on lossy textual encodings that discard atomistic information. We introduce Atomistic Language Models (ALMs) to pursue native multimodality, in which a single language backbone understands atomistic structures, generates materials from natural language, and optimizes crystal structures as instructed by text. By unifying a pretrained atomistic encoder, large language model, and denoising diffusion model through purely continuous projectors and staged training, ALMs achieve state-of-the-art results on crystal structure prediction and de novo generation. ALMs are enabled by a continuous bridge that maps language model embeddings directly into the steering space of atomistic diffusion, and are assisted by Text-to-Crystal Feynman-Kac (T2C-FK), a particle-based sampler that scores partial denoising trajectories to enforce stoichiometric targets at inference time. To evaluate the ability of ALMs to optimize and generate materials from natural-language prompts and 3D atom-coordinate inputs, we introduce ALM Bench, the first benchmark for text-conditioned crystal generation and optimization. Code, training data, and model weights will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出原子语言模型(ALMs)，通过连续投影器和分阶段训练统一预训练原子编码器、大语言模型和去噪扩散模型，实现从自然语言理解、生成和优化晶体结构，在晶体结构预测和从头生成任务上达到SOTA，并提出了首个文本条件晶体生成与优化基准ALM Bench。
AI.motivation: 传统上原子结构与自然语言被分开建模，语言模型要么仅作为工具调用原子模型，要么在丢失原子信息的有损文本编码上微调，缺乏真正的多模态融合能力。
AI.method: ALMs通过连续投影器将预训练原子编码器、大语言模型和去噪扩散模型统一起来，采用分阶段训练策略；提出T2C-FK粒子采样器在推理时通过评分部分去噪轨迹来强制执行化学计量比目标。
AI.result: 在晶体结构预测和从头生成任务上达到SOTA；构建了首个文本条件晶体生成与优化基准ALM Bench。
AI.conclusion: ALMs成功实现了语言模型对原子结构的原生多模态理解与生成，为材料科学中的自然语言引导晶体优化提供了新范式。

title: Inverse Turing Bench: Evaluating Language Models as Judges of Human vs. AI Dialogue
summary: As AI systems integrate into online spaces, differentiating them from humans in conversations is increasingly important. We present Inverse Turing Bench, a benchmark that evaluates LLMs and other models on their ability to differentiate humans and AI in multi-turn text. The benchmark provides a collection of paired dialogue transcripts, wherein one dialogue is between two humans and the other is between a human and an AI. The task is to correctly identify which dialogue is human-only vs. human-AI. We evaluated a preliminary set of models against this benchmark, and found that GPTZero, Claude Opus-4.6, and GPT-5.5 achieve the highest accuracy: 89.41%, 77.92%, and 75.94% respectively. Our results suggest that statistical approaches to detection have semantic blind spots, but semantic approaches are susceptible to persona-prompting. Our work speaks to the Inverse Turing Test as a probe of LLM theory of mind, and motivates human-AI differentiation as a critical capability for AI systems. Our live benchmark can be found at https://huggingface.co/spaces/roc-hci/Inverse-Turing-Bench-Leaderboard (anonymity preserved).

AI.tldr: 提出Inverse Turing Bench基准，用于评估LLM区分人类与AI对话的能力。GPTZero、Claude Opus-4.6和GPT-5.5分别以89.41%、77.92%和75.94%的准确率领先。统计方法存在语义盲点，而语义方法易受角色提示攻击。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统融入在线空间，区分对话中的人类与AI变得越来越重要，但目前缺乏专门评估模型这一能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建包含成对对话转录的基准数据集（一对为人类间对话，另一对为人机对话），要求模型正确识别哪段对话是纯人类对话。
AI.result: GPTZero准确率最高（89.41%），其次为Claude Opus-4.6（77.92%）和GPT-5.5（75.94%）。统计检测方法存在语义盲点，语义方法易受角色提示攻击。
AI.conclusion: 人机差异化区分是AI系统的一项关键能力，该基准可作为LLM心智理论的探针，并揭示了现有检测方法的局限性。

title: Mind the Noise: Sensitivity of Transformer-based Interaction-Aware Trajectory Prediction Models to Noisy Data
summary: Trajectory prediction allows autonomous vehicles to anticipate the future behavior of surrounding objects (or agents) and, accordingly, maximize the safety and efficiency of their driving. State-of-the-art Transformed-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction models, which rely on attention mechanisms to capture multi-agent interactions and maximize prediction accuracy, are commonly trained and evaluated on long-range high-quality datasets. These datasets are typically obtained by aggregating data from multiple vehicles or drones and removing any object detection or tracking noise offline. Yet, information about a surrounding object's state (its position, speed, heading) is far from being noiseless in real-world deployments. Object state estimation is affected by perception uncertainties and localization errors that can be particularly large for objects received via Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communications. In this paper, we analyze the impact of noisy object state information on the trajectory prediction accuracy of a state-of-the-art Transformer-based interaction-aware trajectory prediction model. Our study demonstrates that trajectory prediction accuracy can rapidly deteriorate as the noise intensity increases. Numerical results show that the prediction accuracy can reduce by a 1.3x factor under small noise levels and by as much as a 3.9x factor under the highest (yet realistic) noise conditions. These findings reveal the strong sensitivity of trajectory prediction models to noisy data, underscoring the need for more realistic training and evaluation datasets as well as noise mitigation strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了噪声对基于Transformer的交互感知轨迹预测模型性能的影响，发现预测精度在低噪声下下降1.3倍，高噪声下下降3.9倍，表明模型对噪声高度敏感，需要更真实的训练数据和噪声缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型通常在高质量、无噪声的数据集上训练和评估，但实际部署中感知和定位误差不可避免，尤其是通过V2X通信获取的目标状态噪声更大，因此需要分析噪声对模型性能的实际影响。
AI.method: 对最先进的基于Transformer的交互感知轨迹预测模型输入添加不同程度的噪声，评估其在噪声环境下的预测精度变化，对比无噪声条件下的性能。
AI.result: 小噪声水平下预测精度下降1.3倍，最高（但现实）噪声条件下下降3.9倍，且精度随噪声强度增大而快速恶化。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹预测模型对噪声数据高度敏感，表明现有训练和评估数据集缺乏真实性，亟需包含噪声的真实数据集以及有效的噪声缓解策略。

title: One Size does not Fit All: Heterogeneous Latent Space Alignment for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
summary: Domain shift remains a major obstacle to the reliable deployment of machine learning models in high-stakes environments such as healthcare. While Domain adaptation aims to mitigate these effects, existing approaches suffer from limited expressiveness of latent representations and a reliance on handcrafted, static augmentations. In this work, we address these limitations by proposing a novel deep learning architecture for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA), specifically optimized for medical image segmentation. Our framework, ADualVUOT, integrates a dual-encoder Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with Continuous Normalizing Flows (CNFs) to increase modeling flexibility and posterior expressiveness. To achieve domain alignment, we leverage Unbalanced Optimal Transport (UOT) through the Gaussian-Gromov-Wasserstein (GGW) distance, which handles structural and topological discrepancies between domains. Furthermore, we incorporate an adversarial augmentation scheme to synthesize worst-case compositions, thus enhancing model robustness. Extensive experiments on medical imaging benchmarks show significant gains over prior OT-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ADualVUOT的无监督域适应框架，通过双编码器VAE、连续归一化流、非平衡最优传输（GGW距离）和对抗性增强，显著提升了医学图像分割在域偏移下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法存在潜表示表达能力有限、依赖手工设计的静态增强等问题，限制了在医疗等高可靠性场景中的部署。
AI.method: 1) 双编码器VAE结合连续归一化流(CNFs)增强后验表达性；2) 使用非平衡最优传输(UOT)中的高斯-格罗莫夫-瓦瑟斯坦(GGW)距离实现域对齐；3) 引入对抗性增强机制合成最坏情况组合。
AI.result: 在医学图像分割基准上的大量实验表明，该方法显著优于先前基于最优传输的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强模型在域偏移下的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为医学图像分割的无监督域适应提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Keyless Attention: Value-Space Routing and Value-Only Caching for Efficient Transformers
summary: We propose Keyless Attention, an attention mechanism that eliminates the key projection entirely, operating over queries and values only. This yields a Value-Only Cache that reduces KV cache memory and access overhead by exactly 50% over standard attention, while matching or exceeding standard attention's decode throughput. Beyond efficiency, we introduce Depth-$m$ Attention Factorization: standard attention computes a depth-2 factorization of the attention bilinear form, while Keyless Attention realizes a depth-$m$ instance of this family. At m=3, Keyless Attention matches the projection matrix count of standard attention via a value-space routing matrix that replaces the key projection and introduces a coupling between routing and retrieval. Experiments across five models and four architectures (GPT-2 280M, GPT-2 557M, Pythia 410M, Qwen2 1.5B, and Llama 3.2 1B) show that Keyless Attention matches or outperforms standard QKV attention on perplexity in 4 out of 5 models. On downstream zero-shot evaluation (GPT-2 557M), Keyless Attention outperforms on 4 out of 5 commonsense reasoning benchmarks, while achieving 50% KV cache reduction throughout.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Keyless Attention机制，完全消除键投影，仅使用查询和值，将KV缓存减少50%并在多数模型上匹配或超越标准注意力性能。
AI.motivation: 标准注意力机制中的键投影和KV缓存占用大量内存和访问开销，阻碍了大模型的高效推理。作者旨在通过消除键投影来降低KV缓存开销，同时保持甚至提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出Keyless Attention，移除键投影，仅保留查询和值投影，形成仅值缓存。引入深度m注意力因子分解框架，将标准注意力视为深度2特例，而Keyless Attention实现深度m实例（m=3时通过值空间路由矩阵替代键投影，耦合路由与检索）。
AI.result: 在5个模型（GPT-2 280M/557M、Pythia 410M、Qwen2 1.5B、Llama 3.2 1B）和4种架构上，Keyless Attention在4/5的模型上困惑度匹配或优于标准注意力；在GPT-2 557M的零样本评估中，5个常识推理基准上4个表现更优，同时实现50% KV缓存缩减。
AI.conclusion: Keyless Attention是一种有效的注意力简化方案，在显著降低KV缓存开销的同时，能在多种模型和任务上保持或提升性能，为高效Transformer推理提供了新方向。

title: Calibration Is Not Control: Why LLM-Agent Oversight Needs Intervention
summary: Runtime oversight for LLM agents is commonly framed as scalar risk prediction: estimate failure likelihood, confidence, or uncertainty, then intervene once the score crosses a threshold. We argue that this framing targets the wrong object for control. The relevant question is not how likely the agent is to fail if it continues, but whether an available intervention would improve the outcome. Two trajectory prefixes can have the same risk estimate while requiring different actions, because one remains recoverable and the other does not. We formalize this mismatch as target error and identify intervention advantage, the expected utility gain from intervening rather than continuing, as the decision object for oversight. To measure this mismatch, we introduce prefix branching, a same-prefix counterfactual protocol that executes candidate actions from identical trajectory states. Across four benchmarks, action-conditioned control yields regime-dependent gains over scalar routing. In a calibration decomposition, recalibrating the same scalar score improves prediction metrics but leaves control regret unchanged, showing that calibration alone does not repair target error. A simple prefix-only action-conditioned controller substantially reduces regret in the strongest interactive regime, from 0.506 to 0.110 on ALFWorld. Gains shrink when interventions are weak or when scalar routing already preserves intervention-relevant information. These results suggest that LLM-agent oversight should move from calibrated risk scoring toward action-conditioned value estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文指出LLM智能体运行时监督的标量风险预测存在目标错误，提出应以干预优势（intervention advantage）即干预相比继续执行的期望效用增益作为监督的决策对象，并引入前缀分支协议衡量该偏差。实验表明，基于动作条件的控制方法在多个基准上优于标量路由，且仅校准风险分数无法修复目标错误。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体监督框架将问题简化为标量风险预测（估计失败概率、置信度或不确定性，超过阈值则干预），但作者认为这一框架瞄准了错误的控制目标。两个轨迹前缀即使风险估计相同，可能一个仍可恢复、另一个已不可恢复，因此需要不同的干预策略。
AI.method: 形式化定义目标错误（target error）和干预优势（intervention advantage）；提出前缀分支（prefix branching）协议——从相同的轨迹状态执行候选动作进行同前缀反事实对比；设计基于动作条件的控制器，在四个基准上对比标量路由方法。
AI.result: 动作条件控制在多个基准上取得阶段性增益；标量分数重校准可改善预测指标但无法降低控制遗憾（control regret）；简单的前缀级动作条件控制器在最强交互场景下将ALFWorld上的遗憾从0.506降至0.110。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体监督应从校准风险评分转向动作条件价值估计。

title: Federated Temporal Attention Intelligence for Cyber-Resilient IoMT: Lightweight Digital Twins and PPO-Driven Honeypot Deception
summary: The rapid proliferation of Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) devices introduces critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in healthcare environments where resource-constrained medical devices operate under strict latency requirements and stringent data-privacy regulations. To address these challenges, this paper presents the Lightweight Digital Twin and Federated Reinforcement Learning (LDT-FRL) framework, a privacy-preserving defense architecture integrating four complementary mechanisms: a Temporal Attention Encoder (TAE) built on a GRU backbone with learned temporal self-attention for flow-level threat classification; lightweight LSTM-based Digital Twins trained on normal-class traffic to generate per-device anomaly scores that gate the TAE classifier through a learned sigmoid coupling; a Federated Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent selecting among ALLOW, ISOLATE, and HONEYPOT_REDIRECT actions based on a seven-dimensional state; and an intelligent honeypot layer that converts redirected suspicious traffic into actionable threat intelligence. A federated aggregation strategy employing EMA-smoothed per-client validation losses as inverse-weighted FedAvg coefficients stabilizes global model updates under non-IID client distributions. Evaluated on CICDDoS 2019 and TON-IoT benchmarks, LDT-FRL achieves 99.66% and 99.95% test accuracy respectively, with macro-F1 scores of 0.9913 and 0.9995, converging 81% faster than the DTFL-CD baseline while attaining perfect F1=1.000 on the severely imbalanced MITM class. Explainability analysis via SHAP, LIME, Grad-CAM, and counterfactual methods confirms that the TAE focuses on semantically meaningful flow features, providing interpretable evidence for each defense decision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LDT-FRL框架，融合轻量级数字孪生、时序注意力编码器、联邦PPO强化学习和智能蜜罐，在CICDDoS 2019和TON-IoT基准上分别达到99.66%和99.95%的测试准确率，相比基线收敛速度提升81%，并通过SHAP、LIME等方法提供了可解释性证据。
AI.motivation: 医疗物联网(IoMT)设备资源受限、延迟要求严格且数据隐私法规严苛，现有安全方案难以同时满足轻量级、隐私保护和实时防御的需求。
AI.method: LDT-FRL框架集成四个互补机制：(1)基于GRU骨干网络与时间自注意力的TAE进行流级威胁分类；(2)轻量级LSTM数字孪生基于正常流量生成设备级异常分数，通过sigmoid耦合门控TAE；(3)联邦PPO智能体基于七维状态选择ALLOW/ISOLATE/HONEYPOT_REDIRECT动作；(4)智能蜜罐层将重定向的可疑流量转化为威胁情报。联邦聚合采用EMA平滑的客户端验证损失作为逆加权FedAvg系数。
AI.result: 在CICDDoS 2019和TON-IoT数据集上分别达到99.66%和99.95%测试准确率，宏F1分数分别为0.9913和0.9995，收敛速度比DTFL-CD基线快81%，在严重不平衡的MITM类别上达到完美F1=1.000。
AI.conclusion: LDT-FRL在IoMT安全防御中实现了高精度、快速收敛、隐私保护和可解释性的统一，为资源受限的医疗环境提供了有效的安全解决方案。

title: TALAS: Teacher-Anchored Layer Alignment with Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization for Embedding Distillation
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) has established itself as a pivotal technique for compressing large pre-trained language models. However, existing methods that force a student to strictly mimic the teacher's sentence embeddings or internal features often incur prohibitive computational costs and yield suboptimal performance due to the inherent capacity gap. To address these challenges, we propose TALAS (Teacher-Anchored Layer Alignment with Sharpness-aware minimization), a unified framework that synergizes hierarchical (multi-layer) alignment with robust optimization. First, we introduce a Teacher-Anchored mechanism that selectively distills final sentence embeddings only into the student's upper layers, thereby reducing overhead while respecting capacity constraints. Second, we bridge the semantic gap in lower layers via Layer-Aligned Self-Distillation, which propagates knowledge top-down using internal geometric relational constraints in the embedding space. Finally, to prevent the student from memorizing point-wise teacher noise, we integrate Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization (ASAM) into the training objective, guiding the model towards flat minima for enhanced generalization. Empirical results on standard sentence embedding benchmarks demonstrate that TALAS consistently outperforms strong distillation baselines while achieving superior training efficiency in terms of computational cost and memory footprint.

AI.tldr: TALAS提出了一种统一的KD框架，通过教师锚定层对齐（仅在上层蒸馏最终句嵌入）、层对齐自蒸馏（利用几何关系约束在下层传播知识）以及自适应锐度感知最小化（引导模型走向平坦最小值）三个创新点，在降低计算开销的同时优于现有蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法强制学生严格模仿教师的句子嵌入或内部特征，导致计算成本高昂且因能力差距而性能次优。
AI.method: 1) 教师锚定机制：仅将教师的最终句嵌入选择性蒸馏到学生上层；2) 层对齐自蒸馏：通过嵌入空间的几何关系约束从上到下传播知识；3) 自适应锐度感知最小化：整合到训练目标中，引导模型走向平坦最小值以增强泛化。
AI.result: 在标准句嵌入基准上，TALAS一致优于强蒸馏基线，同时在计算成本和内存占用方面实现了更高的训练效率。
AI.conclusion: TALAS通过层级对齐与鲁棒优化的统一框架，有效解决了KD中能力差距和计算开销问题，实现了性能与效率的双重提升。

title: Don't Blindly Trust It: How Unreliable Feedback Breaks Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Tool-augmented agents are typically evaluated by their gains under reliable external feedback. Yet these gains leave open a key counterfactual: when feedback is unreliable, would the agent be better off receiving no task evidence? We study this question with a controlled matched-loop comparison that fixes the agent loop, prompt, action space, and decoding, while varying only the returned observation: faithful, misleading, or absent. Across question answering and fact verification, persistent misleading feedback produces a value inversion: agents that benefit from clean tools can perform worse than the matched no-feedback fallback. On HotpotQA, Qwen2.5-7B reaches 44.8 F1 with clean retrieval and 22.3 F1 with no feedback, but drops to 4.7 F1 under shuffled retrieval. The inversion persists under stronger clean retrieval and locally plausible distractors, but weakens when later clean evidence can repair the trajectory. Early trajectory signals predict many failures, yet simple repairs remain fallback-limited: rejecting bad evidence helps only when the exposed fallback is reliable. These results show that clean-tool gains can overstate tool value, and that matched no-feedback fallback controls are necessary for evaluating tool-augmented agents.

AI.tldr: 本文通过受控对比实验发现，工具增强型智能体在不可靠反馈下会出现价值反转——使用污染工具的表现（4.7 F1）甚至不如无反馈基线（22.3 F1），表明清洁工具增益会高估工具价值，需要匹配无反馈基线作为评估控制。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强智能体评估仅关注可靠外部反馈下的增益，未回答反事实问题：当反馈不可靠时，智能体是否比完全不接收任务证据更差？
AI.method: 设计匹配回路对比实验，固定智能体回路、提示、动作空间和解码方式，仅改变返回的观测（忠实/误导/缺失），在问答和事实验证任务上评估。
AI.result: 误导性反馈导致价值反转：Qwen2.5-7B在HotpotQA上清洁检索44.8 F1，无反馈22.3 F1，打乱检索仅4.7 F1。反转在更强清洁检索和局部合理干扰下持续存在，但在后续清洁证据可修复轨迹时减弱。早期轨迹信号可预测多数失败，但简单修复受限于退路可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 清洁工具增益会高估工具价值，评估工具增强智能体时必须引入匹配无反馈基线作为控制。

title: Dual-Attention Convolution Experts for Sparse Tensor Completion
summary: Tensor factorization (TF) has been widely adopted for high-dimensional sparse data completion tasks. Despite significant progress, neural TF methods often struggle to capture complex cross-mode interactions and remain vulnerable to (extreme) data sparsity. To address these challenges, we propose a novel neural tensor factorization approach, termed Dual-Attention Convolution Expert Networks with Group-Level Contrastive Learning (DCGC). For the first problem, DCGC generates diverse non-linear alignment patterns of latent factors via a multi-channel convolution network, and leverages the gated dual-attention mechanism to drive the model to focus on more important output channels (i.e., convolution experts) and the aligned features. Furthermore, DCGC introduces a group-level contrastive learning strategy that aggregates positive samples with identical feedback levels while separating negative samples across different levels. This strategy injects high-quality self-supervised signals to mitigate data sparsity. Extensive experiments conducted on five datasets demonstrate that our DCGC outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in sparse tensor completion for traffic and recommendation applications. Code to reproduce the experimental results in the paper is available at https://github.com/ku1z/DCGC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCGC模型，采用双通道注意力卷积专家网络和组级对比学习，解决神经张量分解中交叉模式交互捕获不足和数据稀疏问题，在五个数据集上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经张量分解方法难以捕获复杂的跨模式交互，且对（极端）数据稀疏性敏感。
AI.method: 1) 多通道卷积网络生成多样化非线性对齐模式；2) 门控双注意力机制聚焦重要输出通道和对齐特征；3) 组级对比学习策略，聚合相同反馈水平的正样本并分离不同水平的负样本，注入高质量自监督信号缓解数据稀疏。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上，DCGC在交通和推荐应用的稀疏张量补全任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DCGC通过双注意力卷积专家网络和组级对比学习有效提升了稀疏张量补全性能。

title: The Language-Energy Divide: Measuring Energy Costs of Multilingual LLM Inference
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in multilingual settings, yet the energy costs of serving these models across different languages remain poorly understood. We present a systematic study of inference energy consumption across languages with ML.Energy framework (Chung et al., 2026). We find striking disparities: energy consumption per output token varies by up to 8.3 times across languages, while total energy for a fixed set of requests varies by up to 179 times between the cheapest (English, 17.6 kJ) and the most expensive (Pashto, 3,147 kJ) languages. Our analysis shows that this disparity is driven by two compounding factors: (1) higher per-token energy costs for languages using complex or rare scripts, and (2) more tokens generated for low-resource languages. Moreover, we find a double cost + performance penalty: languages with the highest energy footprints also tend to achieve the lowest task accuracy. We reveal that the energy divide persists across models, hardware, and tasks, suggesting a systemic energy inequity in multilingual LLM deployment. Finally, we recommend that the community treat energy as a first-class evaluation axis, extend reporting checklists and model cards to include it, and adopt deployment-side mitigations for better energy efficiency.

AI.tldr: LLM在多语言部署中存在严重的能源不平等：不同语言的每token能耗差异高达8.3倍，完成相同请求的总能耗差异高达179倍（英语17.6 kJ vs 普什图语3,147 kJ），且高能耗语言往往伴随低任务准确率，形成双重惩罚。
AI.motivation: LLM在多语言场景中部署日益广泛，但不同语言间的推理能耗成本尚未得到系统研究。
AI.method: 使用ML.Energy框架（Chung et al., 2026）对LLM在不同语言上的推理能耗进行系统性研究。
AI.result: (1) 每token能耗跨语言差异高达8.3倍；(2) 相同请求集的总能耗跨语言差异高达179倍（英语最低17.6 kJ，普什图语最高3,147 kJ）；(3) 高能耗语言同时表现出低任务准确率；(4) 该能源鸿沟在跨模型、硬件和任务上持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 多语言LLM部署中存在系统性能源不平等，建议将能源作为第一类评估指标，在报告清单和模型卡中纳入能源信息，并采用部署端缓解措施提升能源效率。

title: AutoRAS: Learning Robust Agentic Systems with Primitive Representations
summary: The automated design of agentic systems offers a promising pathway for scaling large language models (LLMs) beyond single-agent reasoning. While prior work has advanced task performance through handcrafted or automatically generated multi-agent workflows, robustness is often treated as an afterthought, leaving systems vulnerable to external adversaries and internal failures. We propose AutoRAS, a framework for the Automated design of Robust Agentic Systems. AutoRAS formulates system design as generating a sequence of symbolic primitives that jointly encode structural connectivity and behavioral actions, and learns to optimize this sequence using execution-derived safety signals and flow-based sequence-level objectives. Extensive experiments show that AutoRAS achieves the best performance in both vanilla and adversarial settings, with the smallest performance degradation under attacks. Further analyses demonstrate strong transferability, stable optimization behavior, stability across primitive sets, and favorable cost trade-offs. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/guohezuy/AutoRAS}{\text{this https URL}}$.

AI.tldr: AutoRAS是一个自动化设计鲁棒多智能体系统的框架，通过将系统设计形式化为符号原语序列的生成与优化，结合执行安全信号和流程级目标，在常规和对抗性设置下均实现了最优性能，且性能退化最小。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化多智能体工作流设计方法主要关注任务性能提升，而将鲁棒性视为次要问题，导致系统易受外部攻击和内部故障影响。
AI.method: 将系统设计形式化为生成符号原语序列（联合编码结构连接和行为动作），并利用执行派生的安全信号和基于流程的序列级目标来优化该序列。
AI.result: 在常规和对抗性设置下均达到最佳性能，攻击下性能退化最小；展现出强迁移性、稳定优化行为、跨原语集稳定性以及良好的成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: AutoRAS有效填补了自动化多智能体系统设计中鲁棒性被忽视的空白，为构建更可靠的智能体系统提供了新范式。

title: Universal Encoders for Modular Relational Deep Learning
comment: Accepted to ECML PKDD 2026 in Naples, Italy
summary:
Relational Deep Learning (RDL) models multi-tabular databases as temporal heterogeneous graphs for end-to-end representation learning. While RDL is evolving rapidly, existing approaches face significant generalization obstacles. They are either schema-specific, requiring training from scratch for every new database, or they rely on monolithic architectures that entangle feature encoding with graph message-passing. Analyzing these limitations, we establish four core pillars for building foundational relational models: semantic granularity, structural topology, temporal causality, and unified optimization.
  Addressing these pillars, we propose a modular approach that decouples row encoding from graph message-passing. We introduce the Universal Row Encoder, a transformer-based module that integrates raw cell data with schema metadata$-$including column semantics, table names, and global distribution statistics$-$to produce table-width invariant row embeddings. By explicitly feeding global statistics to an intra-row self-attention mechanism, the encoder natively contextualizes unseen features and handles sparse data. Serving as a flexible "backend" for any downstream graph architecture, our pretrained encoder enhances cross-database knowledge transfer on the established RelBench benchmarks while improving learning convergence and memory footprint.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化关系深度学习方法，通过解耦行编码与图消息传递，引入通用行编码器（基于Transformer），整合原始单元格数据与模式元数据，实现跨数据库知识迁移，在RelBench基准上提升了学习收敛性和内存效率。
AI.motivation: 现有关系深度学习方法存在两大泛化障碍：要么是模式特定的（每个新数据库需从头训练），要么依赖将特征编码与图消息传递纠缠在一起的单体架构。作者分析这些局限性后，建立了构建基础关系模型的四个核心支柱：语义粒度、结构拓扑、时间因果性和统一优化。
AI.method: 提出模块化方法，解耦行编码与图消息传递。具体地，引入通用行编码器（Universal Row Encoder），这是一个基于Transformer的模块，通过整合原始单元格数据与模式元数据（包括列语义、表名和全局分布统计），生成表宽度不变的行嵌入。通过将全局统计信息显式馈送到行内自注意力机制中，编码器天然地能够对未见特征进行上下文化处理并处理稀疏数据。
AI.result: 在RelBench基准上，预训练的编码器作为任何下游图架构的灵活后端，增强了跨数据库知识迁移，同时改善了学习收敛性和内存占用。
AI.conclusion: 通过模块化解耦设计和通用行编码器，提出的方法有效克服了关系深度学习中的泛化障碍，为构建基础关系模型提供了可行方案。

title: Scaling Performance and Low-Resource Annotation with Many-Shot In-Context Learning for Named Entity Recognition
summary: In-context learning (ICL) with large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a powerful alternative to fine-tuning for Named Entity Recognition (NER), achieving strong performance with minimal annotation and no additional training. However, prior work has shown that despite their adaptability, LLMs still lag behind fully supervised models such as fine-tuned BERT in structured tasks like NER. While existing studies on ICL for NER have mainly explored few-shot settings, the potential of scaling to hundreds of demonstrations has not been thoroughly investigated. To address this gap, we conduct a comprehensive investigation of many-shot ICL for NER and further explore its effectiveness in annotating and refining data for low-resource NER tasks. Specifically, we evaluate various LLMs across multiple domains using hundreds of ICL examples and then assess the feasibility of using many-shot ICL as a data annotation framework. Our experiments demonstrate that: (1) scaling to hundreds of in-context examples enables LLMs to match or even surpass the performance of fully supervised BERT models; and (2) using about one hundred human-labeled examples as demonstrations, many-shot in-context annotation can generate high-quality labeled data, leading to approximately 10% absolute F1 improvement over existing state-of-the-art approaches when used to fine-tune BERT on low-resource NER.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了大规模上下文学习（many-shot ICL）在命名实体识别（NER）中的表现，发现使用数百个上下文示例可以使LLM达到甚至超越全监督BERT模型的性能；同时，利用约百个人工标注示例进行上下文标注，可为低资源NER生成高质量标注数据，使BERT微调后的F1值相比现有SOTA提升约10%。
AI.motivation: 现有ICL用于NER的研究主要聚焦于少样本设置，尚未充分探索扩展到数百个演示样本的潜力；同时，LLM在NER等结构化任务上仍落后于全监督微调模型（如BERT），需要探究大规模ICL是否能弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 在多个领域的NER数据集上，使用数百个上下文示例对多种LLM进行评估；随后将大规模ICL作为数据标注框架，利用约百个人工标注示例生成标注数据，再用这些数据微调BERT以提升低资源NER性能。
AI.result: (1) 扩展到数百个上下文示例后，LLM能够匹配甚至超越全监督BERT模型；(2) 使用约百个人工标注示例的大规模上下文标注可生成高质量标注数据，用于微调BERT后，在低资源NER上相比现有SOTA提升约10%的绝对F1值。
AI.conclusion: 大规模ICL不仅可以直接提升NER性能至全监督水平，还可以作为一种有效的数据标注框架，显著改善低资源NER任务的表现。

title: Towards Transparent Mental Health Insights: An Explainable AI Model for Career-Related Depression and Anxiety Among University Students Using Structured Data
comment: Accepted at AHTBE 2025 Conference, published in Medical Sciences Forum (MDPI). 18 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables
summary: Career anxiety and depression among university students present a growing challenge to mental health and academic achievement. This study proposes an Explainable AI (XAI) framework using multimodal data and Federated Learning (FL) to identify early indicators of career-related mental health problems in a privacy-preserving and culturally responsive manner. The framework combines structured behavioral data and facial emotion features from interview videos via an intermediate fusion neural network with attention mechanisms. Label smoothing was applied to improve model generalizability. FL was used across institutions to enable collaborative training without raw data sharing. Evaluation was conducted using the Student Mental Health Survey dataset from university students across Pakistan. Our model attained an F1-score of 89.12%, recall of 86.54%, accuracy of 92.08%, and precision of 91.88%. Using Integrated Gradients and SHAP, the model identified key behavioral markers of depression including avoidance of direct gaze, lower facial expressiveness, and social withdrawal, consistent with psychological theory. This research presents an interpretable, scalable, and context-sensitive AI system for mental health pre-diagnosis with potential integration into student support services globally.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合多模态数据和联邦学习的可解释AI框架，用于在保护隐私和适应文化背景下识别大学生职业相关心理健康问题的早期指标，在巴基斯坦大学生数据集上达到92.08%的准确率，并识别出回避直视、面部表情减少和社交退缩等关键行为标记。
AI.motivation: 大学生职业焦虑和抑郁对心理健康和学业成就构成日益严峻的挑战，现有方法在隐私保护和文化适应性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出可解释AI框架，结合结构化行为数据和面试视频中的面部情绪特征，通过带有注意力机制的中间融合神经网络进行多模态融合，采用标签平滑提升泛化能力，并通过联邦学习实现跨机构协作训练而不共享原始数据。
AI.result: 在巴基斯坦大学生心理健康调查数据集上，模型达到F1-score 89.12%、召回率86.54%、准确率92.08%、精确率91.88%。通过Integrated Gradients和SHAP识别出回避直视、面部表情减少和社交退缩等关键行为标记。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个可解释、可扩展且情境敏感的AI系统，用于心理健康预诊断，具有融入全球学生支持服务的潜力。

title: Fusing Backdoors, Machine Learning, and Optimization for Large-Scale Parametric Mixed-Integer Programs
summary:
Large-scale optimization problems are often solved repeatedly under similar structural conditions, leading to substantial computational overhead. This occurs in applications such as power systems, transportation, and supply chain networks, where the underlying structure is fixed while parameters frequently vary under perturbations.
  This paper proposes a Learning to Optimize (LTO) framework that accelerates the solution of large-scale general mixed-integer problems by leveraging the concept of a backdoor, i.e., a subset of variables that drive most of the computational complexity. The proposed BIPC framework consists of three phases. Phase I is an identification procedure that discovers a backdoor for a set of instances in the distribution. Phase II uses supervised learning to develop machine learning models that, given an instance, predict values for bounded-domain backdoor variables and intervals for wide-domain backdoor variables. These predictions define a reduced optimization problem where the predictions constrain the backdoor variables, while the other variables remain free. Phase III optimizes this reduced problem and, if necessary, applies a correction step to restore feasibility or the optimality guarantees.
  Experiments on real-world, large-scale problems show substantial reductions in solution time with only a limited loss in solution quality. The framework enables organizations to solve large-scale optimization problems efficiently in the presence of frequent perturbations, such as unexpected events, demand fluctuations, or operational changes. Because these changes affect parameters rather than the problem structure, BIPC can quickly provide high-quality, feasible solutions, offering a practical approach to integrating machine learning into existing optimization pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BIPC框架，通过识别和预测backdoor变量来加速大规模混合整数规划问题的求解，在保证解质量的前提下显著缩短求解时间。
AI.motivation: 大规模优化问题在固定结构但参数频繁变化的情况下需要重复求解，导致巨大计算开销，亟需一种能够利用问题结构相似性加速求解的方法。
AI.method: BIPC框架包含三个阶段：(1) 识别阶段，发现实例分布中的backdoor变量子集；(2) 监督学习阶段，训练ML模型预测有界域backdoor变量的值和宽域backdoor变量的区间；(3) 优化与修正阶段，求解约束后的简化问题，必要时进行校正以保证可行性和最优性。
AI.result: 在真实大规模问题上，该方法实现了求解时间的显著降低，同时仅损失有限的解质量。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够在参数频繁扰动（如突发事件、需求波动、运行变更）下快速提供高质量可行解，为将机器学习集成到现有优化流水线提供了实用方案。

title: Olfactory-Inspired Sparse Combinatorial Coding for Low-Resource Named Entity Recognition
summary: Named Entity Recognition (NER) in low-resource languages suffers from limited supervision and a lack of high-quality pretrained embeddings. Biological olfaction, which relies on sparse combinatorial coding through receptor and glomerular organization, offers a compelling paradigm for learning robust representations under uncertainty. In this paper, we introduce a receptor-glomerular bottleneck - a novel, biologically-inspired olfactory architecture - between standard token embeddings and a BiLSTM-CRF sequence model. We evaluate our architecture across six multilingual datasets trained entirely from scratch (without pre-trained embeddings) under varied data-scale conditions, including a strict 1k-sentence low-resource control. Our results demonstrate that introducing a representation bottleneck yields F1 score improvements under severe data scarcity, primarily by acting as a powerful regularizer. Under the 1k capped training condition, at least one olfactory-inspired configuration achieves the highest mean F1 score across all six datasets. While these improvements represent near-ties with generic bottleneck controls for most languages, the olfactory architecture provides a significant advantage in languages like Bangla (+6.23% F1 over standard baseline and +8.47% F1 over the best control baseline) where generic bottlenecks degrade performance. We also observe improvements in the ultra-low-resource Telugu setting (+4.43% F1) at full-scale, and find that sparse specialization naturally emerges within the receptor layer. Our findings suggest that structured sparse coding inspired by olfactory networks serves as an effective inductive bias and regularizer when representations must be learned from limited or noisy supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文受生物嗅觉系统启发，提出了一种受体-肾小球瓶颈结构（Receptor-Glomerular Bottleneck），用于低资源命名实体识别（NER）任务。该结构在无预训练词嵌入的条件下，作为强正则化器显著提升了低资源场景下的NER性能，尤其在孟加拉语（+6.23% F1）和泰卢固语（+4.43% F1）上效果突出，且受体层自然涌现出稀疏编码特性。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言NER面临标注数据稀缺和缺乏高质量预训练嵌入的双重挑战。生物嗅觉系统通过稀疏组合编码在不确定条件下学习鲁棒表征的机制，为解决该问题提供了启发。
AI.method: 在标准词嵌入与BiLSTM-CRF序列模型之间插入一个受嗅觉启发的受体-肾小球瓶颈结构，该结构模拟嗅觉系统的稀疏组合编码机制，作为表征瓶颈和正则化器。
AI.result: 在6个多语言数据集上（严格1k句子低资源控制），嗅觉瓶颈架构在多数语言上取得最高平均F1分数；孟加拉语提升6.23% F1（优于基线8.47%），泰卢固语在完整数据下提升4.43% F1；受体层自然涌现出稀疏专门化。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发的结构化稀疏编码可作为低资源NER场景下有效的归纳偏置和正则化器，尤其在通用瓶颈方法失效的语言中表现显著。

title: Balancing Performance and Diversity in GRPO Autoregressive Text-to-Image Post-Training
summary: Autoregressive text-to-image (T2I) generation has recently advanced rapidly, yet aligning generated images with human preferences remains challenging. GRPO-style online reinforcement learning provides an effective framework; however, existing methods typically treat reference-policy divergence as fixed, despite its direct impact on policy optimization. We study this overlooked factor within a unified f-divergence framework, encompassing forward KL, reverse KL, and JS divergence, for GRPO-style autoregressive T2I alignment. Our systematic theoretical analysis reveals that different divergences reshape token-level updates in distinct ways. In particular, under the sampled-token shaping form used, JS regularization achieves a favorable trade-off by mitigating uniform bias relative to the reference policy while still discouraging large deviations. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Janus-7B show that JS divergence achieves the strongest or highly competitive optimization performance on most evaluation metrics while maintaining favorable generation diversity. The code is available at https://github.com/tuoyou-hao/BPD-GRPO.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自回归文生图（T2I）模型中，基于GRPO风格在线强化学习对齐时，参考策略散度（KL/JS等）对优化效果的影响，并实验证明JS散度在性能与多样性之间取得了最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO风格的对齐方法通常将参考策略散度视为固定超参数，忽视了其直接影响策略优化效果的问题。
AI.method: 在统一的f-散度框架下（包括前向KL、反向KL和JS散度），系统分析不同散度对自回归T2I对齐中token级更新的影响，并提出JS正则化作为更优的权衡方案。
AI.result: 在LlamaGen和Janus-7B上的大量实验表明，JS散度在大多数评估指标上取得了最强或极具竞争力的优化性能，同时保持了良好的生成多样性。
AI.conclusion: JS散度通过缓解参考策略的均匀偏差并限制过大偏差，在GRPO式自回归T2I对齐中优于其他散度选择。

title: Fast-TurboQuant: A Multiplier-Free Online Vector Quantization Approach
summary: As large language models scale, memory bandwidth for key-value caches and retrieval-augmented generation systems becomes a critical bottleneck. While 1-bit quantization addresses this constraint, recent TurboQuant relies on dense random rotation matrices to condition the vector distribution before quantization. This projection demands millions of floating-point multiplications per embedding, making it difficult to deploy on constrained edge silicon. We introduce Fast-TurboQuant, a multiplier-free projection architecture that replaces the dense matrix with a structured fast Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform. By applying a Rademacher phase inversion followed by a fast Walsh-Hadamard transform (FWHT), the method leverages sub-Gaussian concentration to satisfy the prerequisites of scalar Lloyd-Max quantization without Gaussian projections. This substitution reduces the arithmetic complexity to only additions, eliminating hardware multipliers. Evaluation on DBpedia OpenAI-3 Large embeddings demonstrates a 19.7 times algorithmic speedup under sequential execution. Furthermore, the dimension expansion due to the FWHT zero-padding reduces the mean squared error and improves Recall@10.

AI.tldr: Fast-TurboQuant 提出了一种免乘法器投影架构，用快速沃尔什-哈达玛变换（FWHT）替代稠密随机旋转矩阵，在保持1比特量化质量的同时，实现了19.7倍算法加速，更适合边缘部署。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型扩展时，键值缓存和检索增强生成系统的内存带宽成为关键瓶颈。1比特量化可缓解此约束，但TurboQuant依赖稠密随机旋转矩阵进行投影，需要大量浮点乘法运算，难以部署在资源受限的边缘芯片上。
AI.method: 用结构化快速约翰逊-林登斯特劳斯变换（FJLT）替代稠密矩阵投影，具体包括：Rademacher相位反转 + 快速沃尔什-哈达玛变换（FWHT），利用亚高斯集中性满足标量Lloyd-Max量化的前提条件，将算术复杂度从浮点乘法降低为仅加法运算。
AI.result: 在DBpedia OpenAI-3 Large嵌入数据集上，顺序执行下实现19.7倍算法加速；FWHT零填充带来的维度扩展降低了均方误差，并提升了Recall@10指标。
AI.conclusion: Fast-TurboQuant通过消除硬件乘法器，使1比特量化投影在边缘设备上可行，兼顾了量化精度与计算效率。

title: Which Review Aspect Has a Greater Impact on the Duration of Open Peer Review in Multiple Rounds? -- Evidence from Nature Communications
summary:
Purpose: Peer review is essential to scientific publishing, but increasing submission volumes have placed growing pressure on reviewers and editors. This study examines the relationship between sentiment toward specific review aspects and peer review duration. It also investigates how this relationship varies across disciplines and review rounds, with the aim of supporting targeted manuscript revision and improving review efficiency.
  Design/methodology/approach: We adopt a two-stage approach. First, fine-grained aspects are extracted from peer review reports, and a sentiment classification model is used to determine the sentiment associated with each aspect. Second, correlations between aspect-level sentiment and peer review duration are analyzed. Sentiment scores are also calculated for different review rounds to determine whether these relationships change over successive rounds.
  Findings: Review sentiment has a weak but statistically significant negative correlation with peer review duration, indicating that more positive reviews tend to be associated with shorter review periods. Aspects concerning Evaluation and Results and Impact and Research Value show relatively stronger correlations with review duration. The relationships between aspect-level sentiment and review duration also differ significantly across review rounds.
  Originality/value: This study connects the textual content of peer review reports with the temporal characteristics of the review process. By identifying review aspects that are more closely associated with review duration, it provides evidence that may help authors prioritize revisions and assist reviewers and editors in improving review efficiency. The findings contribute to reducing the burden of peer review and accelerating scholarly communication and knowledge dissemination.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了同行评审报告中细粒度方面的情感与评审时长之间的关系，发现积极情感与较短评审周期弱相关，其中"评估与结果"及"影响与研究价值"方面的情感与时长关联更强，且这种关系在评审轮次间存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 同行评审是科学出版的关键环节，但日益增长的投稿量给审稿人和编辑带来了巨大压力。现有研究缺乏从细粒度方面情感角度分析其对评审时长影响的实证工作。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先从同行评审报告中提取细粒度方面，使用情感分类模型确定各方面的情感倾向；然后分析方面级情感与评审时长的相关性，并计算不同评审轮次的情感得分以观察变化。
AI.result: 评审情感与时长呈弱但统计显著的负相关；"评估与结果"和"影响与研究价值"方面的情感与时长关联较强；方面级情感与时长关系在不同评审轮次间存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将同行评审报告的文本内容与评审过程的时间特征联系起来，识别出与评审时长更密切相关的方面，有助于作者确定修订优先级，帮助审稿人和编辑提高评审效率，加速学术交流与知识传播。

title: AI Alignment From Social Choice Perspectives
comment: Accepted for publication in ACM SIGecom Exchanges
summary: Alignment from human feedback uses human judgments about model outputs to steer the behavior of language models after pretraining. When those judgments reflect conflicting views of desirable behavior, the learned objective becomes an aggregate determination of what the model should prefer. We survey recent work that has studied this aggregation problem through the lens of social choice theory. We illustrate how the social choice perspective helps identify failure modes in the feedback aggregation layer and reveals a broader design space for handling disagreement in explicit and principled ways.

AI.tldr: 本文通过社会选择理论视角，系统评述了人类反馈对齐中因冲突偏好导致的聚合问题，揭示了反馈聚合层的失败模式，并提出了处理分歧的显式且原则性的设计空间。
AI.motivation: 人类反馈对齐过程中，不同标注者的判断可能存在冲突，导致学习到的目标函数成为某种聚合结果，但现有方法缺乏对这类聚合问题的理论分析和系统解决方案。
AI.method: 采用社会选择理论作为分析框架，评述该领域近期工作，识别反馈聚合层的失败模式，并探索处理分歧的显式设计空间。
AI.result: 社会选择视角能够有效揭示现有反馈聚合中的失败模式，并扩展了处理标注者分歧的设计思路。
AI.conclusion: 社会选择理论为理解和改进人类反馈对齐中的聚合问题提供了原则性的理论基础和更广阔的设计空间。

title: Post-Training Speech Enhancement Language Models with Perceptual Rewards
summary: Speech enhancement language models achieve strong results when trained on discrete audio tokens, but their optimization relies on token-level cross-entropy rather than the perceptual metrics used for evaluation. We introduce a post-training stage for autoregressive speech enhancement language models using Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) with multi-metric perceptual rewards. Our method directly optimizes non-differentiable quality metrics (DNSMOS, WER, and UTMOS) as reward signals, without learned surrogates or offline preference pairs. Applied to two autoregressive base models, UniSE and GenSE, our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on the DNS2020 benchmark. A human evaluation ablation further shows that the composite multi-metric reward is preferred over any single-metric variant, confirming that multi-reward optimization avoids the reward hacking observed with single-metric training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于组序列策略优化（GSPO）的后训练方法，利用多指标感知奖励（DNSMOS、WER、UTMOS）直接优化非可微分的语音增强指标，在DNS2020基准上取得SOTA结果，并验证了多指标奖励优于单指标奖励。
AI.motivation: 自回归语音增强语言模型在使用离散音频令牌训练时依赖token级交叉熵损失，这与评估时使用的感知度量标准不一致，导致优化目标与评价指标之间存在差距。
AI.method: 提出Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO)后训练方法，以DNSMOS、WER和UTMOS等多种非可微感知指标作为奖励信号，直接优化自回归语音增强模型，无需学习代理模型或离线偏好对。
AI.result: 在UniSE和GenSE两个自回归基座模型上应用该方法，在DNS2020基准上取得最先进结果；消融实验表明复合多指标奖励优于任何单指标变体，避免了单指标训练中的reward hacking问题。
AI.conclusion: 多指标感知奖励的强化学习后训练可以有效对齐语音增强模型的优化目标与评估指标，多奖励优化策略能够避免单指标训练导致的奖励破解问题。

title: Deeper is Not Always Better: Mitigating the Alignment Tax via Confident Layer Decoding
summary: Autoregressive generation in large language models (LLMs) conventionally decodes from the final layer, assuming that deeper representations yield more reliable next-token predictions. We revisit this assumption by revealing a recurring Guess-Refine-Perturb dynamic: early layers form coarse guesses, intermediate layers refine reasoning-relevant semantics, and final layers can perturb these refined predictions toward generic or alignment-preferred tokens. We introduce Confident Decoding, a training-free decoding strategy that dynamically selects the most reliable near-final layer through entropy-guided conservative backward search. We further provide a theoretical formulation of layer selection as an optimal stopping problem, showing that under bounded projection noise and dominant late-stage alignment perturbation, our search rule filters perturbation while bounding the loss relative to the oracle refinement layer. Experiments across dense and Mixture-of-Experts LLMs demonstrate consistent gains on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, Omni-MATH, and HLE, with zero memory overhead and less than 2% latency increase. These results suggest dynamically bypassing final-layer perturbations can unlock stronger reasoning behavior from aligned LLMs.

AI.tldr: 论文发现LLM解码时存在"猜测-精炼-扰动"动态：浅层做粗略猜测，中间层精炼推理语义，最终层可能将预测扰动为通用或对齐偏好的token。作者提出Confident Decoding，一种无需训练的解码策略，通过熵引导的保守向后搜索动态选择最可靠的近最终层，并在理论层面将层选择建模为最优停止问题。实验显示该方法在GPQA-Diamond、Omni-MATH、HLE等推理基准上获得一致提升，零内存开销，延迟增加不到2%。
AI.motivation: 挑战"深层表示必然产生更可靠预测"的传统假设，揭示最终层可能存在扰动现象（将精炼后的预测推向通用或对齐偏好token），从而阻碍推理能力。
AI.method: 提出Confident Decoding：一种基于熵的保守向后搜索策略，无需训练，动态选择最可靠的近最终层进行解码。同时将层选择问题形式化为最优停止问题，给出理论保证。
AI.result: 在密集和MoE架构的LLM上，GPQA-Diamond、Omni-MATH、HLE等推理基准一致提升，零额外内存，延迟增加<2%。
AI.conclusion: 动态绕过最终层扰动可以释放对齐LLM更强的推理能力，表明当前对齐微调可能在推理任务中引入有害偏差。

title: Composing Verifiable Conceptual Models via Building Blocks: Towards Design-Time Verification of Agentic AI Workflows
comment: To appear at the 2026 Winter Simulation Conference
summary: Agentic AI systems orchestrate multiple LLM-based agents through workflow architectures that coordinate decisions, tools, and external actions. While current platforms emphasize runtime safeguards, little support exists for verifying workflows during system design. From a Modeling \& Simulation perspective, this gap is analogous to composing conceptual models without verifying whether their building blocks interact coherently. We propose a design-time verification approach that models agentic workflows as compositions of reusable building blocks and checks their compatibility through twelve structural rules. We implemented these rules in a software prototype and evaluated them using two openly released datasets: 48 workflows with known design flaws and 168 variants that preserve workflow logic but alter graph structure. Results show that our verifier reliably detects violations even when flawed designs are obscured through structural transformations such as splitting tasks between agents. Future works could combine our verification with community repositories of building blocks to compose safe agentic workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向智能体AI工作流的设计时验证方法，通过12条结构规则检查可复用构建块之间的兼容性，并实现原型工具在两个公开数据集上验证了其检测设计缺陷的有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体AI平台侧重运行时安全保障，缺乏对工作流设计阶段的验证支持；从建模与仿真视角看，相当于组合概念模型时未验证构建块之间的交互一致性。
AI.method: 将智能体工作流建模为可复用构建块的组合，通过12条结构规则检验构建块兼容性；实现软件原型，在48个已知缺陷工作流和168个保持逻辑但改变结构的变体上进行评估。
AI.result: 验证器能够可靠地检测违规行为，即使缺陷设计通过任务拆分等结构变换被掩盖时依然有效。
AI.conclusion: 未来可将该验证方法与社区构建块仓库结合，用于组合安全可靠的智能体工作流。

title: Deep Learning for Soil Moisture Estimation: Fusing Satellite Data with Optimally-Lagged Meteorological Features
summary: Accurate soil moisture estimation in semi-arid agricultural regions requires integrating remote sensing and meteorological information while accounting for the delayed response of soil moisture to atmospheric forcing. This study introduces a Cross-Correlation Function (CCF) methodology to determine optimal temporal lags (0-30 days) between meteorological variables and soil moisture, as well as inter-depth lags (0-15 days) describing vertical moisture propagation from the surface (10 cm) to deeper layers (20-50 cm). The approach was validated across seven agricultural plots in southeastern Spain.
