These explanations provide transparency into model decisions and surface both agronomically consistent patterns and dataset-specific divergences worth further study. Together, these contributions establish AgroSense~2.0 as a more principled, interpretable, and geospatially grounded framework for precision agriculture.

AI.tldr: AgroSense 2.0 提出了一种面向精准农业的跨模态作物推荐框架，通过七波段土壤栅格数据、交叉模态Transformer融合模块和多任务学习，解决了视觉土壤表征与化学养分分析之间的模态鸿沟，并利用TreeSHAP提升了模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统作物推荐系统中，视觉土壤表征与化学养分分析被当作独立的推理问题，特征融合往往局限于简单的晚期拼接，缺乏深层的跨模态交互建模。
AI.method: (1) 引入覆盖印度的七波段土壤栅格数据（32×32空间块）；(2) 采用交叉模态Transformer融合模块，让表格养分特征通过多头注意力机制关注图像表征；(3) 采用多任务学习，共享骨干网络同时优化土壤分类与作物推荐任务；(4) 使用TreeSHAP对表格分支进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: TreeSHAP分析揭示：湿度和降雨量是全球范围内最具影响力的特征；水稻主要由降雨量主导，玉米由氮和钾主导，咖啡由湿度和氮主导。
AI.conclusion: AgroSense 2.0 建立了一个更规范、可解释且地理空间基础更扎实的精准农业框架，其可解释性结果既符合农学规律，也暴露出值得进一步研究的数据集特异性偏差。

title: moBERTo: A Modern Encoder for Portuguese via Continued Pretraining of ModernBERT
summary: Encoder-only transformer models remain essential for production NLP pipelines. We introduce moBERTo, a Portuguese adaptation of ModernBERT obtained through continued pretraining of the ModernBERT-base checkpoint on 60 billion tokens (5 epochs over a 12-billion-token corpus curated from FineWeb2 and filtered with educational and STEM classifiers). We preserve the original architecture, including rotary positional embeddings, alternating local-global attention, flash attention, and unpadding. We evaluate moBERTo across information retrieval (including long-context retrieval at up to 8,192 tokens), document classification, named entity recognition, and natural language understanding. Our best variant, which combines a Portuguese tokenizer with subword-matching embedding transfer and long-context post-training, achieves the highest average reranking nDCG@10 across three Portuguese retrieval benchmarks and the best results on PLUE-PT. Through ablation studies, we show that (i) continued pretraining is strongly preferable to training from scratch, particularly for preserving long-context capabilities; (ii) tokenizer adaptation improves token-level tasks but degrades long-context retrieval; (iii) a dedicated long-context post-training phase at 8,192 tokens further improves reranking and NER; and (iv) encoder-only architectures remain competitive with larger decoder-only alternatives for discriminative tasks. We publicly release the model weights at https://huggingface.co/Tropic-AI/moBERTo and training data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tropic-AI/moberto-pretraining-dataset-c4-compatible on Hugging Face.

AI.tldr: moBERTo是ModernBERT-base的葡萄牙语适配版本，通过在60亿token（120亿token语料库上5个epoch）上继续预训练获得。最佳变体结合了葡萄牙语分词器、子词匹配嵌入迁移和长上下文后训练，在葡萄牙语检索基准和PLUE-PT上取得最佳结果。消融实验表明继续预训练优于从头训练，分词器适配提升词级任务但损害长上下文检索，长上下文后训练进一步提升性能。
AI.motivation: 编码器-only transformer模型在生产NLP管道中仍然至关重要，但针对葡萄牙语的高质量编码器模型缺乏。作者旨在通过继续预训练方式适配ModernBERT到葡萄牙语，同时系统研究分词器适配、长上下文能力保持等关键问题。
AI.method: 基于ModernBERT-base检查点，在FineWeb2过滤后的120亿token葡萄牙语语料库上继续预训练60亿token（5个epoch）。保留原始架构（旋转位置编码、交替局部-全局注意力、flash attention、unpadding）。提出三种变体：(1) 使用原始BERT多语言分词器，(2) 替换为葡萄牙语分词器并采用子词匹配嵌入迁移，(3) 在(2)基础上增加8192token长上下文后训练。在信息检索（最长8192token）、文档分类、命名实体识别和自然语言理解上全面评估。
AI.result: 最佳变体（葡萄牙语分词器+子词匹配嵌入迁移+长上下文后训练）在三个葡萄牙语检索基准上取得最高平均重排序nDCG@10，在PLUE-PT上取得最佳结果。消融实验显示：(1) 继续预训练明显优于从头训练，尤其在保持长上下文能力方面；(2) 分词器适配提升词级任务但降低长上下文检索；(3) 8192token长上下文后训练进一步提升重排序和NER性能；(4) 编码器架构在判别任务上仍可与更大规模的decoder-only模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: 编码器-only架构在判别任务上仍具有竞争力，继续预训练是适配主流编码器模型的有效策略。分词器适配和长上下文后训练之间存在权衡，需要根据下游任务需求选择相应策略。模型权重和训练数据已公开发布。

title: Text2DSL: LLM-Based Code Generation for Domain-Specific Languages
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Accepted at KES 2026 (Knowledge-Based Intelligent Information and Engineering Systems), Procedia Computer Science, Elsevier
summary: Domain-specific languages (DSLs) are widely used for managing operating system security policies, yet manually authoring rules in such languages demands high expertise and is error-prone. This paper formalises the task of automatic DSL code generation from natural language descriptions - Text2DSL - as a distinct problem class, separate from Text-to-SQL and general-purpose code generation. We introduce the PolkitBench dataset comprising 4,204 verified natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs, each validated through a three-level AST-based pipeline. Controlled prompt experiments on two MoE models of different scale and provenance - GigaChat-10B-A1.8B (1.8B active parameters) and Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (3B active) - demonstrate the critical role of structured context (BNF grammar, API specification, permitted identifier vocabulary) for LLM-based DSL code generation. Across both models, supplying context raises syntactic validity to 98.6-99.4%, structural validity by +9.7 to +35.5 pp, and the CodeBLEU score by +60% to +95%. The consistency of the effect across models of different scale and provenance indicates that, for the Text2DSL class of problems, injecting a formal target-language specification into the prompt context is a robust enabling factor for high-quality generation without model fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化定义了从自然语言自动生成领域特定语言（DSL）代码的Text2DSL任务，构建了含4,204条已验证对的PolkitBench数据集，并在两个MoE模型上验证了向提示中注入结构化上下文（BNF文法、API规范、标识符词汇表）可将语法有效性提升至98.6-99.4%、结构有效性提升9.7-35.5个百分点、CodeBLEU提升60-95%，表明该方法无需微调即可实现高质量DSL代码生成。
AI.motivation: 领域特定语言（DSL）被广泛用于操作系统安全策略管理，但手动编写DSL规则需要高度专业知识且容易出错，因此需要将自然语言自动转换为DSL代码的方法。
AI.method: 将Text2DSL形式化为独立的问题类别；构建包含4,204条自然语言到Polkit规则对的PolkitBench数据集，通过三级AST流水线验证；在两个MoE模型（GigaChat-10B-A1.8B和Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B）上进行控制提示实验，比较有无结构化上下文（BNF文法、API规范、标识符词汇表）的生成效果。
AI.result: 提供结构化上下文后，语法有效性达到98.6-99.4%，结构有效性提升9.7-35.5个百分点，CodeBLEU分数提升60-95%。不同规模模型的实验效果一致。
AI.conclusion: 对于Text2DSL任务，向提示中注入形式化的目标语言规范是一种鲁棒的促进因素，能够在无需模型微调的情况下实现高质量代码生成。

title: Data Pruning: Redundant, Problematic, and Interdependent Samples
comment: This work is a preprint of a published paper by the same name
summary: The performance of deep learning models is affected by not only data quantity but also data quality. Data pruning is a process by which practitioners can reduce the size of a dataset by only keeping the most important training data points, thereby achieving similar test set performance. We empirically investigate two popular data pruning methods under noisy and noiseless conditions and show that these methods fail in the presence of significant label noise. We highlight that the success of data pruning is distinctly affected by three factors: redundancy in the dataset, the presence of problematic samples, and interdependence between samples. We perform a detailed investigation on commonly used benchmark classification datasets and neural network architectures. We find that our observations are consistent across data distributions and training protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究了两种主流数据剪枝方法在有无标签噪声条件下的表现，发现这些方法在显著标签噪声下失效，并指出数据剪枝的成功受数据集冗余度、问题样本存在以及样本间相互依赖这三个因素影响。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型性能不仅受数据量影响，也受数据质量影响。数据剪枝旨在通过仅保留最重要的训练数据点来缩减数据集规模，同时保持相近的测试性能。然而现有方法在标签噪声存在的条件下表现不佳，需要深入探究其失效原因及影响因素。
AI.method: 在有无标签噪声条件下对两种主流数据剪枝方法进行实证研究，在常用基准分类数据集和神经网络架构上进行详细调查，系统分析数据集冗余度、问题样本和样本间相互依赖三个因素对剪枝效果的影响。
AI.result: 主流数据剪枝方法在显著标签噪声下失效；数据剪枝的成功受数据集冗余度、问题样本存在和样本间相互依赖三个因素显著影响；这些观察在不同数据分布和训练协议下保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 数据剪枝方法在实际应用中需考虑标签噪声问题，不能简单依赖现有方法；三个关键因素（冗余度、问题样本、样本间依赖）为设计更鲁棒的数据剪枝策略提供了重要指导。

title: BLUEX v2: Benchmarking LLMs on Open-Ended Questions from Brazilian University Entrance Exams
summary: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in many tasks, their assessment in Portuguese has received less attention, particularly for open-ended, discursive tasks that demand deeper reasoning and generation capabilities. While the original BLUEX benchmark addressed the scarcity of Portuguese evaluation datasets through multiple-choice questions from Brazilian university entrance exams, it did not cover the more challenging second-phase examinations, which require free-form written responses. In this work, we introduce BLUEX v2, a benchmark derived from the second-phase entrance exams of Brazil's two leading universities: UNICAMP (Comvest) and USP (Fuvest), spanning exam years 2022-2025. Our dataset comprises 395 questions unfolding into 919 graded subquestions, with 55.7% of questions containing associated images. Each question is annotated with subject area, official reference answers, LLM-generated rubric criteria, and six cognitive capability tags. We evaluate 21 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol. Results reveal a 4.92-point performance spread across models (4.18-9.10 on a 0-10 scale), with Mathematical Reasoning and Image Understanding emerging as the hardest capability dimensions. The dataset, evaluation code, and model outputs are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BLUEXv2.

AI.tldr: BLUEX v2是一个从巴西两所顶尖大学（UNICAMP和USP）2022-2025年第二阶段入学考试中构建的基准数据集，包含395道题（919个子问题），其中55.7%含图像。每道题标注了科目、参考答案、LLM生成的评分标准和六项认知能力标签。评估21个LLM显示模型间得分差距为4.92分（0-10量表），数学推理和图像理解是最难的能力维度。
AI.motivation: 现有葡萄牙语评估数据集（如原始BLUEX）仅覆盖选择题形式，缺乏对开放式、论述性任务的评测，而这类任务更能检验模型的深层推理和生成能力。
AI.method: 从UNICAMP（Comvest）和USP（Fuvest）2022-2025年第二阶段入学考试中收集395道题（919个子问题）；每道题标注科目、官方参考答案、LLM生成的评分标准和六项认知能力标签；采用LLM-as-a-judge协议评估21个SOTA模型。
AI.result: 模型得分范围4.18-9.10（满分10），差距4.92分；数学推理和图像理解是最难的能力维度；数据集、评估代码和模型输出已公开。
AI.conclusion: BLUEX v2填补了葡萄牙语开放式评测的空白，揭示了当前LLM在数学推理和图像理解方面的短板，为葡萄牙语NLP评估提供了新基准。

title: PaperClaw: Harnessing Agents for Autonomous Research and Human-in-the-Loop Refinement
summary: Large language models have become capable reasoners and tool users that write and run code and search the literature, which makes automating the research process itself a realistic goal. We present PAPERCLAW, a harnessed multi-agent system that carries a project autonomously, from a field of study to a finished paper. PAPERCLAW curates a domain from a field's live literature, datasets, and code; brainstorms it into an idea with a pre-registered main-result contract; and drives a stoppable hypothesis map through an iterative propose, test, reflect loop that grows only from measured verdicts and halts once the evidence supports the idea, at which point it writes a venue-compliant paper. A full-lifecycle memory keeps each stage in a single living record, so a long run can be paused, inspected, and resumed without losing context. At the centre is an in-cycle research assistant with research tools and skills: it can drive the whole pipeline on its own, while the same interface lets a person step in at any stage, turning a first autonomous draft into a stronger paper through human-in-the-loop refinement. Throughout, PAPERCLAW keeps its output grounded and checkable, citing only references validated against open scholarly indexes and reporting results that genuinely ran. An evaluation with an LLM judge finds that PAPERCLAW produces strong papers both fully autonomously and with human-in-the-loop refinement.

AI.tldr: PAPERCLAW是一个多智能体系统，能从研究领域自动推进到完成论文，支持全自主运行和人在回路优化，并通过可验证的引用和实验结果确保输出质量。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型已具备推理和工具使用能力（如写代码、搜索文献），这使得自动化整个研究过程成为现实目标。现有研究缺乏一个端到端的、可验证的自主研究系统。
AI.method: PAPERCLAW采用多智能体架构，包含：1) 文献/数据集/代码策展模块；2) 头脑风暴与预注册主结果合约机制；3) 可停止的假设图谱，通过"提出-测试-反思"循环迭代推进；4) 全生命周期内存记录；5) 中心研究助手可独立驱动全流程，也支持人在回路干预。
AI.result: 通过LLM评判评估，PAPERCLAW在全自主模式下和人在回路优化模式下均能产出高质量的论文。
AI.conclusion: PAPERCLAW成功实现了从研究领域到成文的全流程自动化，同时保持了输出的可验证性和可检查性，为科学研究的自动化提供了可行方案。

title: Selective Ensemble Based on Preference-Directed Multi-Objective Bandits
summary: Selective ensemble for modern machine learning systems requires choosing promising model candidates under limited evaluation budgets, while downstream tasks often specify only partial preferences over capabilities such as accuracy, robustness, and reasoning. This setting naturally gives rise to a sequential decision problem under partially specified linear preferences. We formalize it as preference-directed multi-objective bandits (PDMOB), where admissible trade-offs are represented by a polyhedral preference cone. Based on this formulation, we introduce Pareto $C$-optimality, which recovers standard Pareto optimality and single-weight scalarization as special cases. We then propose the preference-directed upper confidence bound (PrefUCB) algorithm, which maintains directional confidence intervals to guide exploration. We analyze both indicator-based and gap-weighted regret, and establish instance-dependent logarithmic bounds for both criteria, recovering the optimal logarithmic dependence on the horizon $T$ in classical special cases. Experiments on large pre-trained model selective ensemble tasks and online asset allocation under institutional mandates validate the efficacy of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了部分偏好下的多目标选择集成问题为偏好导向多目标老虎机（PDMOB），提出Pareto C-最优性概念和PrefUCB算法，并建立了实例相关的对数遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习系统中的选择性集成需要在有限评估预算下选择有潜力的模型候选，但下游任务往往只指定对准确性、鲁棒性、推理等能力的部分偏好，这自然形成一个部分指定线性偏好下的序贯决策问题，目前缺乏相应的形式化框架和高效算法。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为偏好导向多目标老虎机（PDMOB），用多面体偏好锥表示可接受的权衡；提出Pareto C-最优性概念（统一了标准Pareto最优和单权重标量化）；设计PrefUCB算法，维护方向置信区间以指导探索；分析了基于指标和基于间隙加权的两类遗憾，并推导实例相关的对数界。
AI.result: 建立了实例相关的对数遗憾界，在经典特例中恢复了对步数T的最优对数依赖；在大型预训练模型选择性集成任务和机构授权下的在线资产配置任务上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为部分偏好下的多目标选择集成提供了系统的形式化框架和高效算法，理论分析和实验均证明了方法的优越性。

title: When Confidence Takes the Wrong Path: Diagnosing Retrieval-State Lock-In in RAG
summary: The trustworthiness of a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system depends on more than the answer it returns, yet many black-box uncertainty methods still read agreement among sampled answers as confidence. That inference fails when repeated samples condition on the same defective retrieval state. The state may be empty, with the model falling back on parametric memory, or populated by a coherent but wrong neighbourhood. In either case, the answers agree because the error is stable. The problem is recognised in deployed RAG, but it has lacked a name, a measurable signature, and a prevalence bound. We supply all three. We name the failure retrieval-state lock-in and diagnose it by separating the three objects a single confidence score conflates: the answer surface, the retrieved evidence, and the retrieval state itself. In an inspectable, ontology-guided knowledge-graph RAG (KG-RAG) system across six question-answering snapshots, we measure the agreement blind spot directly: at five samples per question, 42% of KG-RAG errors and 59% of dense-retrieval errors carry zero answer dispersion, so agreement has nothing to rank, while evidence- and retrieval-state checks still flag most of them. The decomposition supports an auditable decision rule: accepting an answer only when answer, evidence, and retrieval checks all agree that it is low-risk reaches 91.9% pooled precision against a 69.7% accept-all rate. The cost is coverage: it certifies only 7.7% of answers as low-risk. On the clinical calibration domain it reaches 100% precision under an automated judge; this is an in-domain automated-label upper bound, not a clinical safety claim, and still needs human validation. Confidence in RAG is object-specific: when answers agree, the useful question is which part of the pipeline to distrust.

AI.tldr: 本文发现RAG系统中存在“检索状态锁定”问题——即模型在错误但稳定的检索状态下多次采样，导致答案表面一致但实际错误。通过分离答案表面、检索证据和检索状态三个对象，在知识图谱RAG系统中测量发现：42%的KG-RAG错误和59%的密集检索错误具有零答案分散度。提出的可审计决策规则在7.7%的覆盖率下达到91.9%的精确率，在临床校准领域达到100%精确率。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒不确定性方法通过采样答案的一致性来评估置信度，但这种推断在模型反复采样到相同错误检索状态时会失效（如检索为空回退到参数记忆，或检索到一致但错误的邻域）。该问题在部署中已被认识但缺乏正式命名、可测量特征和广泛性边界。
AI.method: 将单一置信度分数解构为三个对象：答案表面、检索证据和检索状态。在可检查的、本体引导的知识图谱RAG系统上，跨6个问答快照进行测量。分离答案、证据和检索三个检查维度，设计可审计的决策规则：仅当三者都认为低风险时才接受答案。
AI.result: 在5个样本/问题条件下，42%的KG-RAG错误和59%的密集检索错误具有零答案分散度。提出的决策规则在7.7%的覆盖率下达到91.9%的精确率（接受全部答案的基线为69.7%）。在临床校准领域达到100%精确率（自动化标签上限，需人工验证）。
AI.conclusion: RAG系统的置信度是对象特定的：当答案一致时，有用的问题是管道中哪个部分不值得信任。仅依赖答案一致性作为置信度指标存在盲区，需要解耦多个对象进行联合审计。

title: SkillAudit: From Fixed-Suite Benchmarking to Skill-Centered Assessment
comment: Preprint. Project page: https://skillaudit.github.io/. Code and evaluation artifacts: https://github.com/SkillAudit/skillaudit
summary: Agent skills have become a practical way to extend large language model agents, but the growing skill ecosystem still lacks a reliable way to judge whether a skill is worth deploying. Existing evaluation methods remain largely anchored to fixed task suites, assessing skills through performance on predefined tasks and environments. As skill marketplaces expand, this paradigm becomes inadequate: fixed suites can conflate a skill's marginal contribution with backbone strength and miss its value when tasks fall outside the skill's intended scope. We introduce SkillAudit, an end-to-end framework for skill-centered assessment that takes an arbitrary agent skill as input and automatically generates a comprehensive, multi-dimensional evaluation report spanning utility, efficiency/cost, and safety. SkillAudit focuses on the skill artifact itself and constructs capability-aligned evaluation tasks directly from the skill package. The generated tasks are conducted in isolated sandbox environments to collect execution evidence, followed by automated checks with LLM-based judging to produce auditable results. To dissect the agent skills, we propose the baseline comparison principle to measure utility and efficiency/cost, and introduce a two-stage detection paradigm combining static semantic analysis with dynamic runtime verification to assess safety risks. After scanning top-ranked real-world skill packages spanning 23 occupational categories, we found that over 7% of skills are at risky status.

AI.tldr: SkillAudit是一个端到端的技能中心评估框架，能自动为任意智能体技能生成包含效用、效率/成本和安全性等多维度的综合评估报告，通过对23个职业类别中顶级技能的扫描发现超过7%的技能存在风险。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法固守于固定任务套件，无法可靠判断技能是否值得部署，且容易混淆技能的边际贡献与骨干模型能力，也无法评估技能在预期范围外任务中的价值。
AI.method: SkillAudit框架从技能包本身构建与能力对齐的评估任务，在隔离沙箱环境中执行并收集证据，结合LLM评判进行自动化检查；采用基线比较原则衡量效用和效率/成本，通过结合静态语义分析与动态运行时验证的两阶段检测范式评估安全风险。
AI.result: 对23个职业类别中排名靠前的真实世界技能包进行扫描，发现超过7%的技能存在风险状态。
AI.conclusion: SkillAudit提供了一种更可靠的技能中心评估方法，揭示了当前技能生态中存在不容忽视的安全风险。

title: DevoTG: Temporal Graph Neural Networks for Modeling C. elegans Developmental Connectomics
summary: Understanding how a nervous system wires itself from birth to adulthood is a fundamental challenge in developmental neuroscience. We present DevoTG, a temporal graph framework that applies Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNs) to two complementary representations of C. elegans neural development: a Continuous-Time Dynamic Graph (CTDG) of cell division events derived from cell lineage data, and a Discrete-Time Dynamic Graph (DTDG) of the developing synaptic connectome spanning eight reconstructed electron-microscopy datasets. On the lineage prediction task, our TGN achieves a mean test AUC of 0.839 +/- 0.007 (5 seeds; validation AUC 0.937 +/- 0.001), outperforming a static GNN with the identical architecture by 26 AUC points (0.577 +/- 0.080), demonstrating that temporal memory is the decisive factor. Applied to the connectome DTDG, DevoTG identifies three connection stability classes (stable, developmental, and variable) across 225 neurons and 858 to 2,496 connections over development (L1 birth to adult), providing a temporal-graph-theoretic complement to the individual-variability classification of Witvliet et al. Analysis of hub command interneurons AVA, AVB, and AVE reveals their persistent centrality and how their integration roles are progressively reinforced across larval stages. Accompanying interactive visualizations (3D animated networks, centrality heatmaps, and a spatiotemporal lineage graph) make developmental dynamics accessible for biological hypothesis generation. DevoTG is open-source and designed for extension to other developing nervous systems. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/DevoLearn/DevoGraph/tree/main/DevoTG.

AI.tldr: DevoTG是一个时序图框架，利用时序图神经网络（TGN）分析C. elegans神经发育，在细胞谱系预测任务中显著优于静态GNN，并对突触连接组进行了时序图分析，识别出三类连接稳定性，揭示了关键中间神经元的中心性变化。
AI.motivation: 理解神经系统从出生到成年如何自我布线是发育神经科学的基本挑战，现有方法缺乏对发育过程中时序动态信息的有效建模。
AI.method: 提出DevoTG框架，应用时序图神经网络（TGN）两种互补表示：连续时间动态图（CTDG）处理细胞分裂事件，离散时间动态图（DTDG）处理发育中的突触连接组（8个电子显微镜重建数据集）。
AI.result: 细胞谱系预测任务：TGN平均测试AUC 0.839±0.007（验证集AUC 0.937±0.001），比相同架构的静态GNN高出26个AUC点（0.577±0.080）。对连接组DTDG分析识别出三类连接稳定性（稳定、发育、可变），涵盖225个神经元和858-2496个连接。分析显示AVA、AVB、AVE枢纽命令中间神经元具有持续的中心性，并在幼虫阶段逐步增强。
AI.conclusion: DevoTG证明了时序记忆是神经发育建模的决定性因素，为理解神经系统的发育动力学提供了时序图理论视角，并作为开源框架可扩展至其他发育中的神经系统。

title: Language-Specific Sentiment Polarity Biases in Encoder and Large Language Model Classification of Product Reviews
summary: This study investigates sentiment polarity biases, specifically, differences in how accurately AI models classify positive versus negative reviews across languages and model architectures. Large language models show a negative bias in French and are more accurate on negative reviews, while encoder models exhibit positive bias in Japanese, missing negative reviews that use indirect criticism. These language-specific polarity biases have implications in both social and business domains deploying multilingual sentiment analysis systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究调查了跨语言和模型架构的情绪极性偏差，发现大语言模型在法语中表现负向偏差（对负面评论更准确），编码器模型在日语中表现正向偏差（忽略使用间接批评的负面评论），这些语言特异性极性偏差对部署多语言情感分析系统的社会和企业领域具有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 探究AI模型在跨语言和不同架构下对正面与负面评论分类准确率的差异，即情绪极性偏差，以揭示多语言情感分析系统中存在的系统性偏差问题。
AI.method: 对比分析大语言模型与编码器模型在法语和日语等多语言环境下的情感分类表现，考察模型对正面与负面评论的准确率差异。
AI.result: 大语言模型在法语中呈现负向偏差，对负面评论分类更准确；编码器模型在日语中呈现正向偏差，无法准确识别使用间接批评表达的负面评论。
AI.conclusion: 语言特异性的极性偏差在部署多语言情感分析系统的社会和企业场景中具有重要影响，需要针对不同语言和模型架构采取相应的偏差缓解策略。

title: Confident but Conflicted: Internal Uncertainty and Cognitive Dissonance Resolution in LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) frequently encounter inputs that disagree with their prior outputs, through user pushback, retrieved documents, or web search results. While the way they resolve such conflicts -- a process we frame as cognitive dissonance resolution -- has been characterized behaviorally, its connection to internal model uncertainty is not well understood. To study this systematically, we vary persuasion attempts along two dimensions, source authority and evidence quality, across 12 health-science claims of stratified epistemic status. Dissonance can be resolved through persuasion, backfire, or immunity. We introduce Trust Elasticity (TE), an econometrics-inspired measure of how readily a model is persuaded toward conflicting evidence. Across four LLMs, TE varies substantially, while clearly false claims elicit near-zero TE across all models. On two open-weight models, we further find that this variation is associated with two complementary internal uncertainty indicators, Confidence Miscalibration in Qwen and Internal Uncertainty Change in Llama. These results link cross-model behavioral variation to a measurable internal property and point to interventions targeting internal uncertainty as future work.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM在面对与先前输出冲突的信息（认知失调）时的行为，通过来源权威性和证据质量两个维度操纵说服尝试，引入"信任弹性"（TE）度量模型被说服的倾向。发现不同模型TE差异显著，且与内部不确定性指标（Qwen的置信度校准和Llama的内部不确定性变化）相关。
AI.motivation: LLM经常面临与自身先前输出冲突的输入（如用户反驳、检索文档、网络搜索结果），但其解决这类冲突的行为与内部模型不确定性之间的关系尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在12个健康科学主张上，沿来源权威性和证据质量两个维度变化说服尝试；引入信任弹性（TE）这一计量经济学启发的度量指标；分析四种LLM的行为，并在两个开源模型上进一步关联内部不确定性指标（置信度校准和内部不确定性变化）。
AI.result: 不同LLM的TE差异显著；明显错误的声明在所有模型上均产生接近零的TE；在开源模型中，TE变化与Qwen的置信度误校准和Llama的内部不确定性变化相关。
AI.conclusion: 跨模型的行为变异与可测量的内部属性相关，指向以内部不确定性为目标的干预措施作为未来研究方向。

title: Modularized Reinforcement Learning on LLMs: From MDP Creation to Exploration and Learning
summary:
Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to LLM post-training, yet the methods that dominate current pipelines, PPO and GRPO, represent only a narrow slice of what RL offers. Understanding why these methods prevail, and what alternatives exist, requires a principled examination of the design decisions that underlie any RL algorithm.
  This survey organizes that examination around three stages of algorithm construction. We begin with MDP creation: how the reward function, state space, action space, termination condition, and discount factor are, or could be, defined for LLM training. We then turn to exploration, covering temperature sampling, entropy regularization, intrinsic motivation, tree search, and curriculum learning. Finally, we address learning along four classical RL dimensions: model-free versus model-based, value-based versus policy-based versus actor-critic, on-policy versus off-policy, and credit assignment, including both Monte Carlo methods, which rely on full return estimates, and bootstrapping methods, which update estimates using other learned predictions.
  Mapping the LLM literature onto this taxonomy reveals a strikingly non-uniform distribution of research effort. Critic-free policy gradients and Monte Carlo credit assignment are densely populated, while value-based methods, off-policy actor-critic training, and bootstrapping-based credit assignment remain largely unexplored despite well-established counterparts in classical RL. These gaps represent concrete opportunities for transferring proven RL techniques to LLM training.
  By making these gaps explicit alongside the methods that have proven effective, this survey offers researchers in both RL and LLMs a shared framework for understanding current practice and identifying promising directions for future work.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了强化学习在LLM后训练中的应用，从MDP构建、探索策略、学习范式三个维度建立了分类框架，揭示了当前研究过度集中于无评论家策略梯度和蒙特卡洛信用分配，而基于价值的方法、离策略演员-评论家训练等方法仍被严重忽视，为跨领域研究者提供了识别未来方向的共享框架。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM后训练中PPO和GRPO占据主导地位，但强化学习的全貌远不止于此。理解这些方法为何流行以及存在哪些替代方案，需要对RL算法设计决策进行系统化的审视。
AI.method: 将RL算法构建分为三个阶段：MDP构建（奖励函数、状态空间、动作空间、终止条件、折扣因子）、探索策略（温度采样、熵正则化、内在动机、树搜索、课程学习）、学习范式（无模型vs基于模型、基于价值vs基于策略vs演员-评论家、在策略vs离策略、信用分配中的蒙特卡洛方法vs自举方法），并以此分类法映射LLM文献。
AI.result: 发现研究分布极不均匀：无评论家策略梯度和蒙特卡洛信用分配被密集研究，而基于价值的方法、离策略演员-评论家训练、基于自举的信用分配在LLM领域几乎未被探索，尽管这些方法在经典RL中有成熟对应。
AI.conclusion: 这些研究空白为将经典RL中的成熟技术迁移到LLM训练提供了具体机会，该分类框架有助于RL和LLM两个领域的研究者理解当前实践并识别有前景的未来方向。

title: AI Fiction in the Wild
comment: Presented at the MFS Cultural AI Conference, Purdue University, September 19, 2025. This essay is provisionally forthcoming in MFS: Modern Fiction Studies
summary: Some professional authors are beginning to use AI tools to help produce their fiction writing. Are readers using AI to generate fiction, too? This paper examines how large language models are reshaping the production and consumption of fiction by enabling new forms of participation in narrative generation. Drawing on over 500,000 anonymized, English-language ChatGPT-user conversations (arXiv:2405.01470), we find that more than one third of the conversations involve some form of fiction generation -- including original stories, roleplay, fanfiction, and erotica. This AI-generated fiction is notably dominated by power users. We identify common fiction generation patterns and profiles among these users, including what we call "infinite story demanders," who repeatedly request and revise variations of the same or similar narratives over extended periods of time. We show that users especially gravitate toward fanfiction and erotica, and that they are broadly drawn to generic forms, repetition, immediacy, and niche combinations of story elements. Our findings motivate two theoretical provocations. First, we argue that AI technologies may lead to a shift in the conventional relationship between the author and reader, potentially producing what we call a "solipsistic reader-writer," who both generates and consumes fiction within a closed conversational loop, interacting with a machine rather than a human other. Second, we note that LLMs enable interactivity, play, and permutation in ways that are seemingly pleasurable for users, raising questions about where AI will fit into contemporary storytelling and entertainment ecosystems. We situate these developments within broader transformations in literature and media, including self-publishing, fanfiction, and pornography, and suggest that AI-generated fiction shares structural affinities with on-demand, personalized, and repetitive cultural forms.

AI.tldr: 基于50万条ChatGPT用户对话数据，研究发现超过三分之一的对话涉及小说生成（包括原创故事、角色扮演、同人小说和情色文学），用户尤其是重度用户表现出对同人小说、情色内容、重复性叙事和即时满足的偏好。论文提出两个理论启示：一是AI可能导致"唯我论读者-作家"的产生，二是AI生成的互动性、游戏性和排列组合特征正在重塑当代叙事和娱乐生态系统。
AI.motivation: 探究普通读者（而非专业作者）是否以及如何使用大语言模型生成小说作品，分析AI如何改变小说的生产与消费模式，并揭示用户参与叙事生成的新形式。
AI.method: 基于超过50万条匿名英语ChatGPT用户对话数据（arXiv:2405.01470），进行大规模定量分析，识别小说生成模式、用户画像（如"无限故事需求者"），并辅以理论推演。
AI.result: 超过三分之一的对话涉及小说生成；重度用户主导；用户偏好同人小说和情色文学；存在"无限故事需求者"等典型模式；用户倾向于通用形式、重复性、即时性和小众元素组合。
AI.conclusion: AI技术可能导致作者与读者关系的根本性转变，催生"唯我论读者-作家"；AI生成小说与自助出版、同人小说、色情文学等文化形式具有结构亲和力，其互动性、游戏性和个性化特征将对当代叙事和娱乐生态产生深远影响。

title: AgentLens: Interpretable Safety Steering via Mechanistic Subspaces for Multi-Turn Coding Agent
summary: Coding agents based on large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable autonomous capabilities, but they also introduce significant safety and misuse risks during multi-turn interactions with external environments. Existing safety mechanisms mainly rely on external guardrails, which have a limited ability to perform fine-grained behavioral control during execution. Meanwhile, recent mechanistic interpretability methods for LLM safety are mostly confined to single-turn or jailbreak-style QA settings, limiting their ability to capture the evolving risk dynamics of multi-turn agent execution. In this paper, we investigate the safety of multi-turn coding agents from an internal perspective. We propose AgentLens (Mechanistic Subspace Intervention and Steering), a white-box defense framework that performs runtime safety detection and representation-level mitigation for coding agents. Unlike conventional agent guardrails, AgentLens detect harmful execution states from step-level hidden representations and mitigate unsafe behavior by intervening in a 10-dimensional subspace within a single layer. To support this research, we introduce the Mechanistic Agent Safety (MAS) benchmark, comprising comprehensively annotated multi-turn execution trajectories across 194 tasks using LLaMA-3.1-8B, Qwen-2.5-7B, and Gemma-2-9B. Extensive experiments show that AgentLens achieves strong safety detection performance, provides preliminary evidence for lookahead risk anticipation, and substantially reduces harmful actions of the coding agent, establishing a foundation for applying mechanistic interpretability to dynamic LLM agent safety. The code is available at: https://github.com/EddyLuo1232/AgentLens

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentLens，一个针对多轮编程智能体的白盒防御框架，通过机械可解释性方法在运行时检测有害执行状态并干预表示层，从而缓解不安全行为。同时提出了MAS基准数据集用于评估。
AI.motivation: 现有安全机制主要依赖外部护栏，缺乏细粒度运行时行为控制能力；而机械可解释性方法多局限于单轮或越狱式QA场景，无法捕捉多轮智能体执行过程中动态演变的风险。
AI.method: 提出AgentLens框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 运行时安全检测：从步骤级隐藏表示中检测有害执行状态；2) 表示级缓解：通过在单层的10维子空间中进行干预来减轻不安全行为。同时构建了MAS基准数据集，包含194个任务的详细注释多轮执行轨迹。
AI.result: AgentLens在安全检测上表现优异，初步证明了前瞻性风险预测能力，并显著减少了编程智能体的有害行为。
AI.conclusion: AgentLens为将机械可解释性应用于动态LLM智能体安全奠定了基础，证明了从内部视角进行安全干预的有效性。

title: On the Curse of Dimensionality in Private Sparse Covariance Estimation and PCA
summary:
We study high-dimensional differentially private (DP) covariance estimation in the operator norm, and principal component analysis (PCA), under $k$-row-column sparsity ($k$-RCS) of the covariance matrix. In the non-private setting, it is known that $\mathsf{poly}(k, \log d)$ samples suffice to solve both of these problems. However, the only comparable result known under DP (Wang et al. 2021) requires $Ω(d)$ samples under standard parameterizations of the problem. We investigate when this curse of dimensionality is inherent for sparse covariance estimation tasks under DP.
  On the upper bound front, we show that a $\mathsf{poly}(k, \log d)$ sample complexity for PCA is possible under DP, if we also posit sparsity of the leading eigenvector. We complement this result with $\mathsf{poly}(d)$ lower bounds under DP for both sparse covariance estimation and PCA, establishing an exponential gap between the private and non-private variants of these problems when $k = \mathsf{polylog}(d)$. To our knowledge, no such separation has previously been demonstrated for any sparse estimation problems in private high-dimensional statistics. Our techniques are flexible enough that they imply stronger lower bounds even for the well-studied problem of standard DP PCA, without sparsity assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了高维差分隐私（DP）下协方差矩阵的稀疏估计和主成分分析（PCA）问题，发现在k-行列稀疏性（k-RCS）假设下，DP版本存在指数级的样本复杂度缺口：非私密设置仅需poly(k, log d)样本，而DP设置下即使对稀疏协方差估计和PCA也需要poly(d)样本。当主特征向量也稀疏时，PCA可达到poly(k, log d)样本复杂度。这是首次在稀疏高维统计中证明私密与非私密问题之间的指数级分离。
AI.motivation: 探究差分隐私下稀疏协方差估计任务中维度灾难是否固有存在，以及私密与非私密稀疏高维统计问题之间是否存在样本复杂度的指数级差距。
AI.method: 上界：证明当主特征向量也满足稀疏性时，DP PCA可实现poly(k, log d)样本复杂度。下界：通过信息论和组合论证技术，证明在k-RCS假设下，DP稀疏协方差估计和PCA均需要poly(d)样本，且该下界技术可推广到标准DP PCA（无稀疏假设）。
AI.result: 建立了DP下稀疏协方差估计和PCA的poly(d)下界，与私密版本的poly(k, log d)形成指数级分离（当k=polylog(d)时）。同时证明了在额外稀疏特征向量假设下PCA可实现几乎最优的poly(k, log d)上界。
AI.conclusion: 高维差分隐私下的稀疏协方差估计存在固有的维度灾难，除非对特征向量也施加稀疏性假设，否则私密与非私密问题之间存在指数级样本复杂度差距。

title: Learning Moral Diversity: Modelling Individual Perspectives in Moral Classification of Texts
comment: Accepted at the Seventh Workshop on NLP and Computational Social Science. 12 pages, 7 figures
summary: Understanding moral values in social media text offers insight into moral judgement formation, and supervised NLP models trained on crowdsourced data have achieved strong classification performance. However, most approaches simplify the problem by aggregating multiple annotators' labels into a single "ground truth", overlooking the inherent subjectivity of the task. In practice, there are disagreements between annotators caused by personal viewpoint or inherent ambiguities, particularly for short tweets. Here, we extend a pretrained language model with a layer that learns annotator-specific features. Our model improves predictions of individual annotations and yields representations that reveal meaningful insights into annotators' moral perspectives. We show that models trained on aggregated labels may hide variation and give a misleading impression of performance. Overall, we demonstrate that disagreement reflects the inherent subjectivity of the task and that modelling individual perspectives creates benefits for moral classification of texts.

AI.tldr: 本文针对社交媒体文本中道德价值观分析的主观性问题，提出了一种扩展预训练语言模型的注释者特定特征层方法，以建模个体注释者的道德视角差异，从而提升对个体注释的预测能力，并揭示聚合标签可能掩盖的变异性。
AI.motivation: 现有监督NLP模型在对社交媒体文本进行道德价值观分类时，通常将多个注释者的标签聚合为单一"真实标签"，忽略了注释者间因个人观点或文本歧义（尤其是短推文）导致的标注主观性和分歧。
AI.method: 在预训练语言模型基础上扩展一个学习注释者特定特征的网络层，以建模个体注释者的道德视角差异，而非简单聚合标签。
AI.result: 模型改善了对个体注释的预测能力；学习到的表示能揭示注释者道德视角的有意义洞察；基于聚合标签训练的模型会隐藏变异性并给出误导性性能评估；分歧反映了任务的固有主观性。
AI.conclusion: 建模个体视角对于道德文本分类具有显著益处，分歧并非噪声而是任务主观性的体现。

title: Skin-Deep: A Geometric Diagnostic for Alignment Fragility in Large Language Model Representations
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, 12 tables. The first two authors contributed equally. Code (pre-attack GFS diagnostic): https://github.com/js-lee-AI/skin-deep
summary: Alignment tuning is meant to make harmful-request refusal robust, yet this safety behavior can be erased by a small set of benign fine-tuning examples. This is a deployment risk for open-weight models because a checkpoint can pass refusal tests at release time and later lose refusal under low-cost downstream fine-tuning. Prior work has established these refusal failures, but existing studies do not show how to detect this fragility in the aligned model itself before an attack or fine-tuning intervention is run. We introduce Skin-Deep, a geometric diagnostic that detects alignment fragility directly from the aligned model's hidden-state activations before such an intervention is run and compresses the layer-wise safety geometry into a single scalar, the Geometric Fragility Score (GFS). Applied to twenty-one instruction-tuned models spanning six alignment recipes and 3B--32B parameters, Skin-Deep reveals a recurring low-rank safety subspace across model families. Direction ablations show that removing directions in this subspace weakens harmful-request refusal, providing causal evidence that the recovered geometry underlies refusal behavior. Crucially, GFS identifies, before any fine-tuning, the initially safe model that retains the most refusal after small-scale LoRA fine-tuning. These results establish GFS as a practical pre-deployment diagnostic for flagging fragile refusal behavior without running an attack.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Skin-Deep诊断方法，通过对齐模型隐藏状态激活的几何分析，在微调攻击前检测安全对齐的脆弱性，并给出几何脆弱性分数(GFS)作为预部署诊断指标。
AI.motivation: 开源权重模型存在部署风险：在发布时能通过拒答测试，但经过低成本下游微调后可能丧失对有害请求的拒答能力。现有研究虽记录了这种失败，但无法在攻击或微调干预前检测到对齐模型的脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出Skin-Deep几何诊断方法，从对齐模型的隐藏状态激活中直接检测对齐脆弱性，将逐层安全几何压缩为单一标量——几何脆弱性分数(GFS)。在21个指令微调模型（涵盖6种对齐方法，3B-32B参数规模）上应用，发现跨模型家族的重复低秩安全子空间。
AI.result: 方向消融实验表明，移除该子空间中的方向会削弱对有害请求的拒答能力，提供了恢复的几何结构支撑拒答行为的因果证据。关键地，GFS能在微调前识别出小规模LoRA微调后保留最多拒答能力的初始安全模型。
AI.conclusion: GFS可作为实用的预部署诊断工具，在不运行攻击的情况下标记脆弱的拒答行为。

title: Learning by Shifting: Temporal View Construction for Time Series Contrastive Learning
comment: Published in the European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECMLPKDD)
summary: Supervised learning demands large quantities of labeled data, a bottleneck that is expensive and reliant on domain-specific expertise. Self-supervised learning, particularly contrastive learning, has emerged as a compelling alternative, enabling rich representation learning directly from unlabeled data. Yet its success hinges critically on the design of positive and negative sample pairs. Existing approaches for time series rely on hand-crafted augmentations and masking heuristics that embed strong domain assumptions, often limiting generalization across diverse temporal patterns and potentially introducing spurious correlations. In this work, we challenge this paradigm by demonstrating that explicitly encoding temporal shift invariance through a simple, deterministic view construction is sufficient to learn strong representations for time series classification. By exploiting temporal structure, our method, Shift Invariant Feature Training (ShiFT), achieves state-of-the-art performance on six diverse real-world time series benchmark datasets, as well as the UCR and UEA archives, while reducing training time. Beyond empirical performance, we present a systematic analysis of contrastive learning dynamics in time series settings, examining the effects of batch size and the number of negatives on downstream performance. Our findings provide practical insights for designing efficient contrastive learning frameworks for time series representation learning. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/sfi-norwai/ShiFT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShiFT方法，通过显式编码时间平移不变性（简单确定性视图构建）来学习时间序列的强表征，在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA，同时减少训练时间，并系统分析了对比学习中的批次大小和负样本数量对下游性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 监督学习依赖大量标注数据，成本高昂；自监督对比学习虽有效但严重依赖手工数据增强和掩码启发式方法，这些方法嵌入了强领域假设，限制了跨时间模式的泛化能力，并可能引入虚假相关性。
AI.method: 提出Shift Invariant Feature Training (ShiFT)，通过简单确定性的视图构建来显式编码时间平移不变性，利用时间结构进行表征学习，而非依赖复杂的手工数据增强。
AI.result: 在六个多样化的真实世界时间序列基准数据集以及UCR和UEA档案上达到SOTA性能，同时减少了训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 显式编码时间平移不变性足以学到强时间序列表征，并提供了对比学习在时间序列场景中的实用设计见解（批次大小、负样本数量对下游性能的影响）。

title: Does the Same Token Mean the Same State? MoE Routing as Signal for Reasoning Control
summary: In sparse Mixture-of-Experts language models, does the same token id imply the same router state and the same experts producing it? Holding the emitted token id fixed at repeated anchors, we find it does not: the experts that produce it still separate task context, trajectory history, and reasoning-effort mode. This residual structure supports test-time control: near \emph{boundary} anchors (the final-response transition) and \emph{delimiter} anchors (which open the answer, e.g.\ \texttt{\textbackslash boxed\{} or code fences), routing neighborhoods already align with final-answer basins at a marker-only readout and strongest when the routing is read at the answer opening. We operationalize this as \textbf{RAD} (Routing Agreement Decoding), an answer-string-free multi-rollout selector: it locates a fixed anchor, represents each rollout by its anchor-window MoE routing states, and returns the densest Weighted-Jaccard $K$-NN route-basin center, without parsing, normalizing, executing, or voting over answer strings. Across 10 sparse-MoE configurations (gpt-oss, Qwen3-MoE) and 6 datasets spanning math, GPQA, and code, RAD is on par with Majority where string voting is well-posed, with small positive paired deltas (RAD $73.9$ / RAD+DC $74.2$ vs.\ Majority $73.6$). Like majority voting, RAD is not a verifier: a dense \emph{wrong} basin can still win. Its value is the interface: the same selector gives direct pass@1 on code, where exact-string voting is ill-defined, and the same routing-density principle, re-anchored to the agentic boundary, improves best-of-16 patch selection on SWE-bench Verified over random, where patches have no answer string to vote on.

AI.tldr: 本文发现稀疏MoE语言模型中，相同token id并不对应相同的路由状态和专家选择。基于这一发现，提出RAD（路由一致性解码）方法，利用锚点token附近的路由状态作为多输出选择的依据，无需解析答案字符串，在数学、代码等任务上达到与多数投票相当的效果，并适用于字符串投票不适用的场景。
AI.motivation: 探究稀疏MoE模型中，相同token id是否对应相同的路由决策和专家激活，并利用路由状态中的残余结构实现测试时的可控性。
AI.method: 提出RAD（Routing Agreement Decoding），固定锚点token（如边界锚点、分隔符锚点），收集各rollout在锚点窗口内的MoE路由状态，使用加权Jaccard K近邻寻找密度最大的路由盆地中心，作为最终输出选择。
AI.result: 在10个稀疏MoE配置（gpt-oss, Qwen3-MoE）和6个数据集（数学、GPQA、代码）上，RAD（73.9）/RAD+DC（74.2）与多数投票（73.6）相当；在代码任务上可直接提供pass@1评估；在SWE-bench上改进最佳patch选择。
AI.conclusion: 路由状态中包含超越token id的残余结构，可用于无需字符串解析的多输出选择，为MoE模型提供了一种新的测试时控制接口。

title: VISTA Architect: A graph database-oriented health AI system demonstrated in multidisciplinary tumor boards
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables; includes Supplementary Information. Code: https://github.com/VISTA-Stanford/vista-architect (tag v0.1.0-preprint, commit 8837d44)
summary:
We introduce VISTA Architect, a database-oriented AI architecture for integrating large language models (LLMs) with longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs). At ingestion, it transforms complex clinical documentation into a persistent, provenance-linked knowledge graph, eliminating repeated reprocessing of raw records at query time. The architecture has two layers: a source-faithful MEDS Graph preserving granular EHR structure with full provenance, and a clinically abstracted Timeline Object Architecture (TOA) that uses graph-guided LLM extraction to synthesize a concise timeline of deduplicated, temporally coherent clinical events. This addresses key limitations of direct long-context prompting and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which often miss temporal relationships and incur high cost and latency from repeated raw-text processing. By precomputing clinical synthesis once, downstream queries access an organized patient state and traverse to source documentation only when detailed verification is needed.
  We demonstrate the system in multidisciplinary thoracic oncology tumor boards at Stanford Medicine, where precise reconstruction of patient histories is critical. Across 1,180 patients, VISTA Architect achieved 96.4% accuracy (mean 9.75/10) on 15 tumor board-salient variables (17,700 evaluations; 95% CI 96.1-96.7%), surpassing a matched BM25 RAG baseline and recent benchmarks for LLM-based clinical extraction. An agentic interface reduced preparation for a 30-patient held-out cohort to about 2.2 minutes without sacrificing accuracy. While configured here for thoracic oncology, the modular design adapts to other specialties through customizable event definitions, episode structures, and agentic tools; validation beyond thoracic oncology remains future work.

AI.tldr: VISTA Architect 是一种面向数据库的AI架构，通过将LLM与纵向EHR集成，构建持久化、带溯源的知识图谱和临床时间线，在斯坦福多学科胸肿瘤肿瘤委员会中，对1,180名患者的17,700项评估达到96.4%准确率，并以约2.2分钟完成30名患者的准备。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（长上下文提示、RAG）在处理纵向EHR时存在时间关系缺失、重复处理原始文本导致高成本和高延迟等问题。
AI.method: 构建双层架构：底层为保留完整EHR结构及溯源的MEDS图谱，上层为通过图谱引导的LLM提取合成的临床抽象时间线对象架构（TOA），将原始文本转换为去重、时间一致的临床事件时间线，下游查询直接访问预计算的临床摘要。
AI.result: 在斯坦福1,180名胸肿瘤患者中，对15个肿瘤委员会相关变量达到96.4%准确率（17,700次评估，95% CI 96.1-96.7%），超越BM25 RAG基线；代理接口将30名患者准备时间缩短至约2.2分钟且不牺牲准确性。
AI.conclusion: VISTA Architect通过预计算临床摘要有效解决了LLM与EHR集成中的时间关系缺失和高成本问题，模块化设计可适配其他专科，但超出胸肿瘤学的验证仍为未来工作。

title: A Standard Processing Pipeline for High-accuracy Measurement of Few-shot Regression on Laser Induced Breakdown Spectroscopy
summary: Laser-induced breakdown spectroscopy (LIBS) faces challenges in high-accuracy quantitative measurement under few-shot scenarios due to spectral noise and data scarcity. Traditional preprocessing methods often fail to preserve subtle spectral features or capture nonlinear correlations. This work proposes a standardized processing pipeline integrating diffusion-based denoising, attention-based autoencoder for dimensionality reduction, group shuffling data augmentation, and ordinary least squares regression. The diffusion module employs a 3D UNet architecture to remove spectral noise while preserving essential emission features. The attention-autoencoder captures nonlinear spectral correlations, effectively reducing high-dimensional spectral data to compact latent representations. Group shuffling data augmentation enhances model robustness by creating synthetic samples through feature group permutation. Experimental results on multiple elemental concentrations demonstrate that our Diffusion-DA-AE pipeline achieves superior performance with a mean RMAE of 0.2847, representing 37.7\% and 37.6\% improvements over baseline autoencoder and traditional PCA-PLS regression, respectively. The framework's effectiveness validates its generalizability and establishes a new benchmark for few-shot LIBS regression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成扩散去噪、注意力自编码器降维、组混洗数据增强和普通最小二乘回归的标准化处理流程（Diffusion-DA-AE），用于解决少样本场景下LIBS高精度定量测量难题。实验表明该方法在平均RMAE指标上达到0.2847，相比基线方法提升超过37%。
AI.motivation: LIBS技术在少样本场景下因光谱噪声和数据稀缺面临高精度定量测量挑战，传统预处理方法难以保留细微光谱特征或捕捉非线性相关性。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion-DA-AE标准化流程，包含四个模块：(1) 基于3D UNet架构的扩散去噪模块去除光谱噪声并保留发射特征；(2) 注意力自编码器降维模块捕捉非线性光谱相关性，将高维数据压缩至紧凑潜表示；(3) 组混洗数据增强模块通过特征组排列生成合成样本增强模型鲁棒性；(4) 普通最小二乘回归模块进行定量分析。
AI.result: 在多种元素浓度实验中，平均RMAE为0.2847，相比基线自编码器和传统PCA-PLS回归分别提升37.7%和37.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了其泛化能力，为少样本LIBS回归任务建立了新的基准。

title: KaLM-Reranker-V1: Fast but Not Late Interaction for Compressed Document Reranking
summary: As retrieval systems scale, high-quality reranking becomes increasingly important. However, most existing rerankers, whether encoder-based or decoder-based, jointly encode the query and passage, tightly coupling their computation and limiting deployment efficiency as well as flexibility. We present KaLM-Reranker-V1, a fast but not late-interaction (FBNL) reranker that decouples query and passage computation while retaining expressive relevance modeling. Built on an encoder-decoder architecture, KaLM-Reranker-V1 uses the encoder to pre-encode passages with Matryoshka embedding pooling, while the decoder models the system instruction, user instruction, and query intent; cross-attention then captures relevance between the query context and passage representations. This design makes KaLM-Reranker-V1 efficient through decoupled passage encoding, yet not late interaction, by preserving rich relevance modeling through cross-attention. We instantiate KaLM-Reranker-V1 in three sizes, Nano, Small, and Large, with 0.27B, 1B, and 4B activated parameters, respectively. Extensive experiments on BEIR, MIRACL, and LMEB demonstrate that KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves strong reranking performance with superior efficiency. On BEIR, KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, on par with strong industrial models such as the Qwen3-Reranker series; on MIRACL, despite not being extensively trained on multilingual data, KaLM-Reranker-V1 still shows excellent reranking performance. Moreover, on LMEB, reranking models demonstrate a clear advantage, with even the 0.27B Nano model remaining competitive with 7-12B embedding models.

AI.tldr: KaLM-Reranker-V1 是一种基于编码器-解码器架构的"快速但非延迟交互"(FBNL)重排序模型，通过解耦查询与段落计算（编码器预编码段落+Matryoshka嵌入池化，解码器建模查询意图，交叉注意力捕获相关性），在保持强重排序性能的同时显著提升效率。在0.27B/1B/4B三种规模下，BEIR上达到SOTA（与Qwen3-Reranker相当），MIRACL上跨语言表现优异，LMEB上0.27B模型可竞争7-12B嵌入模型。
AI.motivation: 现有重排序器（无论是编码器还是解码器架构）通常将查询与段落联合编码，导致计算紧密耦合，限制了部署效率和灵活性。为解耦查询与段落计算的同时保持表达能力而提出此方法。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构：编码器使用Matryoshka嵌入池化预编码段落，解码器建模系统指令、用户指令和查询意图，并通过交叉注意力机制捕获查询上下文与段落表示之间的相关性，实现"快速但非延迟交互"（FBNL）。
AI.result: 在BEIR上达到SOTA，与Qwen3-Reranker系列等工业级强模型相当；在MIRACL上即便未经过大量多语言训练仍表现优异；在LMEB上，0.27B的Nano模型即可与7-12B的嵌入模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: KaLM-Reranker-V1通过解耦段落编码与查询计算，在保证强重排序性能的同时实现了优越的效率，验证了FBNL范式在大规模检索系统中的实用价值。

title: Safety-Aware Evaluation of LLM-Generated Driver Intervention Messages through Multi-Task Risk Fusion
summary: Existing driver intervention systems rely on auditory alerts and fixed templates, failing to leverage multi-task recognition outputs. General-purpose metrics such as BLEU and BERTScore cannot capture intervention-specific quality dimensions including risk-urgency alignment, cognitive load, and driver acceptability. In this paper, we propose the Driver Safety-Aware Intervention Score (DSAIS), a domain-specific metric evaluating five dimensions through a hybrid architecture combining lightweight rule-based computation with LLM Judge evaluation, together with an end-to-end framework integrating four-task recognition outputs into an LLM through risk fusion, state history management, and dynamic prompt construction. Experiments on the AIDE dataset with five models and seven conditions demonstrate that DSAIS achieves ICC 0.798-0.840 across three architecturally distinct judges and Cohen's d > 1.5 across all control conditions. Multi-dimensional sub-score analysis quantifies the contextual adaptability gap between rule-based and LLM-based systems, revealing that multi-task integration improves contextual relevance by 9.1% over rule-based baselines. Ablation experiments demonstrate that each framework component contributes to contextual relevance, with sub-score decomposition revealing gains that aggregate scoring masks. Driver emotion recognition is identified as the most critical upstream factor, and compact local LLMs (7B--9B parameters) achieve quality superior to API-based models, providing practical design guidelines for in-vehicle deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出驾驶员安全感知干预评分(DSAIS)，一种结合轻量规则计算与LLM Judge的混合评估指标，以及一个端到端的多任务融合框架。实验表明DSAIS具有高一致性和区分度，多任务融合提升上下文相关性9.1%，并确定了驾驶员情绪识别为最关键的上游因素。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶员干预系统依赖听觉警报和固定模板，未能利用多任务识别输出；通用指标如BLEU和BERTScore无法捕捉干预特定的质量维度（如风险-紧迫性对齐、认知负荷和驾驶员可接受性），亟需领域专用评估指标和融合框架。
AI.method: 提出DSAIS指标，通过混合架构（轻量规则计算+LLM Judge）评估五个质量维度；构建端到端框架，将四项任务识别输出通过风险融合、状态历史管理和动态提示构建集成到LLM中。
AI.result: DSAIS在三个架构不同的Judge上达到ICC 0.798-0.840，Cohen's d > 1.5；多任务融合提升上下文相关性9.1%；消融实验验证各组件贡献；紧凑本地LLM（7B-9B）质量优于API模型。
AI.conclusion: DSAIS是有效的领域专用评估指标，多任务融合能显著提升干预质量，驾驶员情绪识别是最关键的上游因素，紧凑本地模型适合车载部署。

title: VegSim: A Geospatial World Model for Scenario-Conditioned Vegetation Simulation
summary: Vegetation monitoring under climate stress requires answering not only how it will evolve given the expected weather, but how it would respond to alternative meteorological conditions. Forecasting models return the expected vegetation state for the observed weather and cannot answer these scenario-conditioned questions, because future weather is fixed to the recorded trajectory. We present VegSim, a geospatial world model for scenario-conditioned vegetation simulation. VegSim infers a latent vegetation state from sparse satellite-derived NDVI histories, past meteorological covariates, and static spatial context, propagates it forward under future weather forcing through recurrent latent dynamics, and decodes predictive NDVI quantiles at each lead time. Because future forcing enters as a controllable input, the same trained model supports probabilistic forecasting under observed weather and conditional simulation under user-defined meteorological forcing, without supervision on scenario responses. We evaluate VegSim on GreenEarthNet across in-distribution data and spatial, temporal, and joint spatial-temporal shift, where it achieves strong point and probabilistic accuracy against time series and Earth observation forecasting baselines while using a compact architecture. We then simulate vegetation responses across Europe under four meteorological scenarios, and in a France summer 2022 case study, obtaining spatially coherent patterns consistent with known sensitivity to temperature and precipitation. The code is available at https://github.com/arco-group/vegsim.

AI.tldr: VegSim是一个地理空间世界模型，通过将未来气象条件作为可控输入，支持情景条件化的植被模拟，既能进行概率预测，也能在用户定义的气象驱动下进行条件模拟，在GreenEarthNet数据集上展现出优异的点预测和概率预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的植被预测模型只能基于观测到的单一气象轨迹进行预测，无法回答"如果未来气象条件不同，植被会如何变化"这类情景条件化问题，缺乏对不同气象情景下植被响应的模拟能力。
AI.method: VegSim从稀疏的卫星NDVI历史、过去气象协变量和静态空间上下文中推断潜在植被状态，通过循环潜在动态在未来的气象强迫下向前传播，并在每个预测时间步解码预测的NDVI分位数。未来气象强迫作为可控输入，使同一训练模型同时支持观测气象下的概率预测和自定义气象强迫下的条件模拟。
AI.result: 在GreenEarthNet数据集上，VegSim在分布内数据以及空间、时间、时空联合偏移场景下，相比时间序列和地球观测预测基线取得了优异的点预测和概率预测精度，且架构紧凑。在欧洲四个气象情景模拟和法国2022年夏季案例研究中，获得了与已知温敏和雨敏一致性良好的空间连贯模式。
AI.conclusion: VegSim通过将未来气象作为可控输入，成功实现了无需情景响应监督的条件化植被模拟，为气候变化背景下植被监测和"what-if"分析提供了有效工具。

title: Bagpiper-TTS: Natural Language Guided Universal Speech Synthesis
summary: Classical TTS systems typically rely on rigid input formats and predefined metadata slots, limiting their ability to fulfill flexible user requirements. This paper introduces Bagpiper-TTS, a universal speech synthesis system that deals with diverse natural language user requests. Given a natural language prompt, Bagpiper-TTS first reasons over the users' intent to derive a rich caption, i.e., a comprehensive textual blueprint encompassing both transcription and nuanced metadata. Subsequently, this caption guides the synthesis of the target speech. Our model inherently supports a broad spectrum of tasks besides classical TTS applications, including multi-talker, intent-to-speech, role-play synthesis, singing voice synthesis, and more. Experimental results demonstrate that Bagpiper-TTS achieves an 1.7% Word Error Rate (WER) on the Seed-TTS-Eval benchmark and match the performance of dedicated models in both LLM-as-a-judge and human subjective evaluations across multiple applications.

AI.tldr: Bagpiper-TTS是一个通用语音合成系统，通过自然语言提示理解用户意图并生成丰富文本蓝图（包含转录和元数据），进而合成目标语音，支持多说话人、意图转语音、角色扮演、唱歌等多种任务，在Seed-TTS-Eval基准上达到1.7%的词错误率。
AI.motivation: 传统TTS系统依赖刚性输入格式和预定义元数据槽位，无法满足灵活的用户需求，需要一种能处理多样化自然语言请求的通用语音合成系统。
AI.method: 给定自然语言提示，先推理用户意图以生成丰富描述（包含转录和细粒度元数据的文本蓝图），再基于该蓝图合成目标语音。
AI.result: 在Seed-TTS-Eval基准上达到1.7%的词错误率；在LLM-as-a-judge和人工主观评估中，多个应用场景下均达到专用模型的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: Bagpiper-TTS是一个通用语音合成系统，能处理多样化自然语言请求，在经典TTS之外还支持多说话人、意图转语音、角色扮演、唱歌等任务，性能与专用模型相当。

title: Beyond Penalizing Mistakes: Stabilizing Efficiency Training in Large Reasoning Models via Adaptive Correct-Only Rewards
summary: Training large language models to reason efficiently is a critical challenge. While integrating length-penalizing rewards into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) aims to reduce verbosity, it frequently triggers reward collapse, severely degrading reasoning capabilities. Through a systematic evaluation of various reward configurations, we identify the root mechanism: GRPO's group normalization creates divergent advantages when incorrect answers receive continuous length penalties. Consequently, methods penalizing the length of incorrect answers are structurally prone to collapse under sustained optimization. Furthermore, restricting penalties exclusively to correct answers avoids this primary failure, but leaves the model susceptible to a stochastic collapse driven by response over-compression. To robustly prevent both failure modes, we propose ACOER (Adaptive Correct-Only Efficiency Reward). ACOER eliminates the structural penalty loop by isolating brevity bonuses to correct completions and prevents stochastic compression via dynamic budget normalization and control-loop penalty adjustments. Evaluated across diverse mathematical reasoning benchmarks, ACOER improves overall accuracy compared to the base model while reducing token generation by over 60%, establishing a fundamentally stable approach for efficiency-aware optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文发现GRPO中的长度惩罚会导致奖励崩溃，提出ACOER方法，通过仅对正确回答施加简洁奖励并结合动态预算归一化与控制环惩罚调整，在数学推理基准上减少60%以上令牌生成的同时提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 训练大语言模型进行高效推理面临挑战，现有长度惩罚奖励在GRPO中频繁引发奖励崩溃，严重损害推理能力，亟需一种稳定的效率感知优化方法。
AI.method: 通过系统评估不同奖励配置，识别出GRPO组归一化在错误回答持续受到长度惩罚时产生发散优势，导致结构崩溃；仅对正确回答施加惩罚可避免此问题但会引发随机压缩崩溃。为此提出ACOER：将简洁奖励隔离到正确完成上，并通过动态预算归一化和控制环惩罚调整防止随机压缩。
AI.result: 在多种数学推理基准上，ACOER相比基础模型提升了整体准确率，同时减少了超过60%的令牌生成。
AI.conclusion: ACOER建立了稳定的效率感知优化方法，有效避免了两种崩溃模式，实现了推理准确率与效率的双赢。

title: SPOTR: Spatio-temporal Pooling One-Token Reconstruction for Universal Physiological Signal Self-supervised Learning
comment: The paper has been accepted by IJCAI-ECAI 2026
summary: Physiological signals such as EEG, ECG, and PPG are widely used in clinical monitoring. Recent self-supervised learning (SSL) methods offer an attractive way to leverage unlabeled recordings, yet they still fall short in practice. In particular, current SSL methods struggle across heterogeneous datasets, often distorting clinically meaningful structures or learning shortcuts from temporal and cross-channel redundancy. Consequently, existing SSL methods often deliver limited performance under linear probing, a lightweight adaptation setting that better matches real-world medical scenarios. Moreover, most Transformer-based SSL models encode a flattened spatiotemporal token sequence, incurring high computation and memory cost, and are typically developed within a single modality. To address these limitations, we present SPOTR (Spatio-temporal Pooling One-Token Reconstruction), a compress-reconstruct pretraining framework that introduces a single-token global bottleneck for physiological signals. SPOTR compresses each waveform into a single-token representation and reconstructs the signal conditioned only on this representation. Meanwhile, SPOTR introduces an efficient spatio-temporal compaction module to reduce computation and memory cost. Pretrained on 20 datasets spanning EEG, iEEG, ECG, and PPG, SPOTR consistently outperforms the strongest baseline under linear probing, improving average AUC by 18.49%, 21.71%, 17.86%, and 4.64%, respectively. Compared with a representative general-purpose time-series foundation model, SPOTR achieves around 78% lower latency and 52% lower peak GPU memory on average. The code can be found at https://github.com/5GYYYYY/SPOTR.

AI.tldr: SPOTR提出了一种基于单token全局瓶颈的压缩-重建预训练框架，用于生理信号（EEG、iEEG、ECG、PPG）的自监督学习。通过将每个波形压缩为单token表示并仅基于该表示重建信号，同时引入时空压缩模块降低计算和内存开销。在20个数据集上的线性探测评估中，SPOTR相比最强基线，在EEG、iEEG、ECG、PPG上分别提升AUC 18.49%、21.71%、17.86%、4.64%，且延迟降低约78%、峰值GPU内存降低约52%。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在异质生理信号数据集上表现不佳，容易破坏临床有意义的结构或从时间和跨通道冗余中学习捷径；Transformer-based SSL模型处理扁平化的时空token序列计算和内存开销大，且通常局限于单一模态。
AI.method: 提出SPOTR框架，采用压缩-重建预训练范式：将每个波形压缩为单token全局瓶颈表示（压缩阶段），然后仅基于该单token表示重建原始信号（重建阶段）；并设计高效的时空压缩模块以降低计算和内存成本。
AI.result: 在EEG、iEEG、ECG、PPG四个模态共20个数据集上，线性探测AUC分别提升18.49%、21.71%、17.86%、4.64%；相比通用时间序列基础模型，延迟降低约78%，峰值GPU内存降低约52%。
AI.conclusion: SPOTR通过单token全局瓶颈有效解决了跨模态、跨数据集的自监督学习难题，在轻量级线性探测场景下显著超越现有方法，同时大幅降低计算和内存开销，为多模态生理信号基础模型提供了高效可行的方案。

title: IndicGuard: A Multilingual Safety Guard Model and Dataset for Indic Languages
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve widespread integration across diverse linguistic landscapes, ensuring their safety and alignment with regional normative values remains a critical challenge. Current safety mechanisms are predominantly optimized for English-centric frameworks, often failing to capture the unique socio-cultural sensitivities and localized categories of harm inherent to the Indic region. To address this gap, we introduce IndicGuard, a multilingual safety guard model and dataset for Indic languages. We construct a high-volume, culturally nuanced safety dataset encompassing ten major Indic languages, systematically curated to capture regional harms, sensitive socio-political contexts, and adversarial jailbreaks. Leveraging this corpus, we fine-tune a 4B-parameter instruction-tuned model based on Gemma-3-4B-IT to serve as a multilingual safety guardrail for real-time content moderation and policy compliance checking. Our empirical evaluations demonstrate that IndicGuard significantly enhances LLM robustness against localized vulnerabilities, achieving high moderation consistency across different conversational turns. Crucially, IndicGuard consistently outperforms the existing baseline model, CultureGuard, across evaluated languages. Finally, we demonstrate that our model effectively generalizes to low-resource Indic languages excluded from training, substantiating the structural robustness and cross-lingual transfer capabilities of the framework.

AI.tldr: IndicGuard是一个面向十种主要印度语言的多语言安全防护模型与数据集，通过构建文化敏感的高质量安全语料库微调Gemma-3-4B-IT模型，在内容审核、对抗性越狱防御和跨语言迁移方面显著优于现有基线CultureGuard。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全机制主要针对英语优化，未能捕捉印度地区独特的社会文化敏感性和本土化危害类别，亟需面向印度语言的多语言安全防护方案。
AI.method: 构建涵盖十种印度语言的高容量文化敏感安全数据集，系统收集区域性危害、敏感社会政治上下文及对抗性越狱样本；基于该语料库微调Gemma-3-4B-IT（40亿参数指令微调模型），使其成为多语言安全护栏，用于实时内容审核与政策合规检查。
AI.result: IndicGuard显著提升LLM对本地化漏洞的鲁棒性，在不同对话轮次中实现高一致性审核；在所有评估语言上持续优于基线模型CultureGuard；能有效泛化到训练中未包含的低资源印度语言。
AI.conclusion: IndicGuard的结构化鲁棒性和跨语言迁移能力得到验证，为印度语言环境下的LLM安全对齐提供了有效框架。

title: Text Dictates, Music Decorates: Energy-based Attention for Editable Dance Motion Generation
summary: Choreographic motion generation poses unique challenges for AI, demanding precise semantic control over complex, temporally structured, and expressive full-body dynamics. While existing models can synthesize motion from music, they remain largely black boxes. Conversely, attempting to condition generation on both text and music frequently leads to modality collapse, where dense acoustic rhythms overwhelm sparse semantic text prompts, destroying user controllability. To resolve this spatial-temporal conflict, we propose STREAM (Structural-Temporal Rhythmic Energy-based Attention for Motion), a modality-decoupled diffusion transformer. STREAM strictly separates conditioning pathways: global text semantics dictate the kinematic structure via Adaptive Layer Normalization (AdaLN), while a novel Bimodal Energy-Based Attention Module (BEAM) routes these features to the musical beat without overwriting the semantics. We further introduce Motorica++, a newly curated dataset enriched with domain-specific dance vocabulary and frame-level semantic annotations from existing Motorica dataset. Additionally, to rigorously quantify zero-shot editability, we propose the Exchange Evaluation Protocol and Editable Dance Score (EDS). Through extensive experiments, STREAM achieves state-of-the-art alignment between motion and music while perfectly preserving choreographic semantics, positioning AI not merely as a reactive synthesizer, but as a controllable, collaborative partner for artistic direction. The source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/SeongJong-Yoo/STREAM.

AI.tldr: STREAM提出了一种模态解耦的扩散变换器，通过分离文本语义（全局运动结构控制）与音乐节拍（局部节奏对齐）的生成路径，解决了文本-音乐联合条件运动生成中的模态坍缩问题，并引入新数据集Motorica++和评估协议EDS，实现了对舞蹈动作的可控编辑与高质量生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-音乐联合驱动的运动生成模型存在模态坍缩问题：密集的声学节奏会淹没稀疏的语义文本提示，导致用户失去对生成过程的可控性；同时现有方法缺乏可解释性，是黑盒模型。
AI.method: 提出STREAM，一种模态解耦扩散变换器。核心设计包括：(1) 全局文本语义通过自适应层归一化（AdaLN）控制运动学结构；(2) 新颖的双模态能量注意力模块（BEAM）将语义特征路由到音乐节拍上而不覆盖语义；(3) 扩展的Motorica++数据集，包含领域特定舞蹈词汇和逐帧语义标注；(4) 交换评估协议和可编辑舞蹈分数（EDS）用于零样本编辑能力量化。
AI.result: STREAM在运动与音乐的对齐上达到当前最优水平，同时完美保留编舞语义，实现了对AI舞蹈生成的可控编辑。
AI.conclusion: STREAM将AI定位为可控的、协作式的艺术创作伙伴，而不仅仅是反应式合成器。

title: Prefix-Guided On-Policy Distillation: Mining Golden Trajectories from Rollouts
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves reasoning models by applying dense teacher supervision on student-sampled trajectories. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon mathematical reasoning exposes a reliability and efficiency problem: standard OPD assigns every sampled candidate the same long rollout budget, even though some trajectories may quickly become weakly aligned with the teacher and provide less useful supervision. Prior analyses suggest that successful OPD depends on local teacher-student compatibility, which can be measured by top-k overlap on student-visited prefixes. When this overlap is low, continuing to generate or train on long suffixes may waste computation and introduce noisy learning signal. To address this, we introduce Prefix-Guided On-Policy Distillation (PG-OPD), a simple rollout-allocation framework that uses fixed-length prefixes to estimate trajectory value before expensive long-horizon generation. PG-OPD first decodes every sampled candidate to the same prefix length, computes teacher-student top-k overlap within an early probe window of that prefix, and selectively continues high-overlap candidates to a fixed long length. Low-overlap candidates stop at the fixed prefix, avoiding unnecessary suffix generation. Across diverse teacher-student combinations on AMC, AIME, and HMMT benchmarks, PG-OPD improves average accuracy by up to 4.80 points while reducing training time by up to 2.46x. These results suggest that prefix-level compatibility provides a practical signal for directing OPD computation toward trajectories that remain learnable from the teacher.

AI.tldr: PG-OPD通过前缀级别的师生兼容性评估，在长链数学推理中动态分配推理预算，仅对高兼容性轨迹进行完整生成，从而提升准确率并大幅降低训练时间。
AI.motivation: 标准On-policy蒸馏（OPD）在长程数学推理中给每条采样轨迹分配相同的长rollout预算，但部分轨迹很快与教师模型弱对齐，继续生成长后缀浪费计算资源且引入噪声学习信号。
AI.method: PG-OPD首先将所有候选解码到固定前缀长度，在早期探测窗口内计算师生top-k重叠度，然后仅对高重叠候选继续生成长序列，低重叠候选则在前缀处停止。
AI.result: 在AMC、AIME和HMMT基准上，PG-OPD平均准确率提升最多4.80个百分点，训练时间减少最多2.46倍。
AI.conclusion: 前缀级别的兼容性为引导OPD计算资源向从教师可学习的轨迹倾斜提供了实用信号。

title: DynamicMem: A Long-Horizon Memory Benchmark in Real-World Settings
summary: LLM agents increasingly act as personal assistants that must remember a user's profile over months: who they are (attributes), what they routinely do (habits), and what they prefer (preferences), and keep it updated as jobs, routines, and tastes drift. Existing benchmarks evaluate this "memory" ability through short, simplified interactions, missing three core properties of real behavior: the profile is heterogeneous, with attributes, habits, and preferences evolving on different timelines; changes are driven by external context such as seasons and life events; and evidence is rarely stated explicitly, instead scattered across many small actions in different apps that a memory system must infer from. We introduce DynamicMem, a synthetic benchmark that constructs 15 months of activity per user, providing long-term multi-app data that real users' privacy keeps out of reach. It provides user-consistent trajectories averaging 2.2M tokens and 1,772 grounded events per user across 16 applications such as e-commerce, fitness, and social platforms. The profile evolves over this period and is never given explicitly: each attribute, habit, or preference must be inferred from small signals scattered across apps. We evaluate at five quarterly checkpoints to track how systems scale as history grows. Benchmarking five representative systems exposes problems a single accuracy score hides: (i) profile reconstruction degrades with history length while service-task accuracy stays flat, despite both drawing on the same memory; (ii) no system both keeps facts that stay true and replaces facts that change, with errors clustering on preferences and on naming the exact referent; and (iii) over 93% of failures trace to what the memory retrieves, not to the model writing the answer, so the largest room for improvement lies in memory itself. Code: https://wenyaxie023.github.io/DynamicMem/

AI.tldr: DynamicMem是一个合成基准测试，构建了每位用户15个月、平均220万token的跨16个应用的多应用活动轨迹，用于评估LLM代理在真实场景下的长期动态记忆能力。基准测试揭示：记忆系统随历史增长性能下降，没有系统能同时保持稳定事实和更新变化事实，且超过93%的失败源于记忆检索而非生成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆基准测试仅通过简短、简化的交互评估LLM代理的记忆能力，忽略了三个真实行为核心特性：用户画像的异质性（属性、习惯、偏好以不同时间尺度演变）、外部环境驱动的变化（季节、生活事件）、以及证据分散在多个应用中的隐性表达。真实用户数据因隐私问题无法获取，因此需要构建合成基准来填补这一评估空白。
AI.method: 构建DynamicMem合成基准：为每位用户生成15个月的跨16个应用（如电商、健身、社交平台）活动轨迹，平均220万token、1772个基于事件的交互。用户画像随时间演变且从不显式给出，每个属性/习惯/偏好必须从散布于各应用的小信号中推断。在五个季度检查点进行评估，跟踪系统随历史增长的表现。基准测试五个代表性系统。
AI.result: (i) 画像重构准确率随历史长度增加而下降，但服务任务准确率保持稳定，尽管两者依赖相同的记忆；(ii) 没有系统能同时保持稳定事实并更新变化事实，错误集中在偏好和确切指代命名上；(iii) 超过93%的失败可追溯到记忆检索环节，而非生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 动态、长期、跨应用的记忆评估至关重要，当前系统在记忆管理上存在根本性缺陷。最大的改进空间在于记忆系统本身（检索）而非生成模型，未来应聚焦于设计更好的记忆机制来处理异质性、时间演变和隐性推断。

title: Closed-loop Auto Research for Molecular Property Prediction: Discovering and Certifying Generalizable Improvements
summary:
Closed-loop Auto Research extends automated machine learning from fixed-dataset fitting to changing the research workflow, with language-model agents editing representations and model code and acquiring external evidence. Molecular property prediction spans many small endpoints. We ask whether this action space yields improvements generalizing beyond the validation signal selecting them.
  We isolate three Auto Research axes, features, models, and external evidence, under a file-level ablation lock attributing each gain to one axis over a strong baseline. Across 36 endpoints in three benchmark suites we score each selected configuration once on a held-out test whose labels the search never read. A routed pipeline taking each endpoint's best validation axis reaches positive held-out gains of 0.013, 0.011, and 0.042, the transferable axis differing by suite, data on TDC, model on Polaris, feature and model on MoleculeNet. The largest model-search gain falls from 0.041 on validation to 0.003 on test, while curated data reaches 0.022 but negative 0.019 on test, two non-transfer signatures. Curated external data raises held-out CYP2C9-substrate performance by 0.17 and half-life by 0.08, admitted through a contamination filter rejecting same-source files overlapping 64 to 89 percent of test structures, necessary but not sufficient for transfer. A matched-trial automated machine learning control did not reproduce the agent's code-level model intervention, reaching 0.006 against 0.042, and the pipeline stays competitive with an 84M-parameter pretrained 3D model on the shared training split.
  The experiments stay within molecular property prediction, but separating discovery from held-out certification is a domain-agnostic lesson for any closed-loop system optimising a proxy for a held-out quantity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究闭环自动研究在分子性质预测中的应用，将特征、模型和外部证据三个轴分离。在36个端点上，路由管道在验证集上取得正向增益，但测试集上增益显著下降，揭示代理优化与真实泛化之间的差距。外部数据需通过严格污染过滤才能实现迁移，而自动化机器学习基线无法复现智能体的代码级模型干预。
AI.motivation: 探究闭环自动研究中，语言模型驱动的智能体对特征、模型和外部证据的操作改进是否能够泛化到验证集信号之外，即验证集上选择的配置在未接触过的测试集上能否保持性能提升。
AI.method: 在文件级消融锁定下，将自动研究分解为特征、模型和外部证据三个轴。在TDC、Polaris、MoleculeNet三个基准套装的36个端点上，分别选择各轴的最佳验证配置，并在从未读取标签的留出测试集上进行评估。采用路由管道为每个端点选择验证集最优轴。
AI.result: 路由管道在三个套件上分别取得0.013、0.011和0.042的正向留出增益。模型搜索增益从验证集的0.041下降到测试集的0.003，策展数据虽在验证集达0.022但测试集为-0.019，呈现非迁移特征。外部策展数据在CYP2C9-底物和半衰期任务上分别提升0.17和0.08，但需通过严格污染过滤。自动化机器学习基线无法复现智能体代码级模型干预（0.006 vs 0.042）。
AI.conclusion: 闭环自动研究存在代理优化与真实泛化之间的显著差距，验证集增益不能保证测试集迁移。外部数据需通过严格污染过滤才能实现迁移，但并非充分条件。自动化机器学习基线无法复现智能体的代码级创新。这一发现对任何使用代理指标优化留出量的闭环系统具有领域无关的启示。

title: Explanation-Guided Medical Named Entity Recognition with Stability and Boundary Awareness for Atopic Dermatitis
comment: Corresponding author: Xue Jiang, E-mail: xuejiang1025@126.com
summary: Objective: This study aims to improve the reliability and robustness of medical named entity recognition (NER) in Chinese atopic dermatitis (AD) clinical texts through explanation-guided learning. Methods: We propose a stability and boundary-aware explanation-guided NER framework. Perturbation-based analysis is used to evaluate explanation stability and entity boundary sensitivity. An adaptive fusion strategy dynamically combines local and global explanation to generate more reliable token-level explanations. The fused explanation signals are further incorporated into model training through stability, boundary-aware, and consistency constraints. Results: Experiments on Chinese AD NER datasets show that the proposed framework improves explanation robustness and achieves consistent performance gains across multiple NER models. The adaptive fusion strategy also provides more stable explanations and stronger boundary perception than individual explanation methods. Conclusion: The proposed method effectively integrates reliable explanation signals into medical NER training, improving both recognition performance and explanation reliability. The framework provides a practical and generalizable solution for explainable medical NER and offers reliable support for downstream clinical decision-making and medical knowledge applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种稳定性与边界感知的解释引导框架，通过自适应融合局部和全局解释信号并引入稳定性、边界感知和一致性约束，提升中文特应性皮炎临床文本中命名实体识别的可靠性与鲁棒性，实验表明该方法在多个NER模型上均取得一致性性能提升和更稳定的解释。
AI.motivation: 提升中文特应性皮炎临床文本中医学命名实体识别的可靠性和鲁棒性，解决现有NER模型在医疗领域解释性不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出稳定性与边界感知的解释引导NER框架：利用基于扰动的分析评估解释稳定性和实体边界敏感性；采用自适应融合策略动态结合局部与全局解释生成更可靠的词级解释；通过稳定性约束、边界感知约束和一致性约束将融合后的解释信号融入模型训练。
AI.result: 在中文特应性皮炎NER数据集上，该框架提升了解释鲁棒性，并在多个NER模型上取得一致的性能增益；自适应融合策略相比单一解释方法提供更稳定的解释和更强的边界感知能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效将可靠解释信号融入医学NER训练，同时提升识别性能与解释可靠性，为可解释医学NER提供了实用且可泛化的解决方案，并为下游临床决策与医学知识应用提供可靠支持。

title: GroundEval: A Deterministic Replacement for LLM-as-Judge in Stateful Agent Evaluation
summary:
Before letting an agent operate over real context, can you prove it used the right evidence? GroundEval turns that question into a deterministic test of what the agent searched, fetched, cited, and was permitted to access. In one case study, two frontier LLM judges scored a plausible agent response above 0.85. But the trace told a different story: the agent had never retrieved the artifact its answer depended on, yielding a GroundEval score of 0.000.
  We introduce GroundEval, a judge-free framework for evaluating agents against grounded, time-bounded, and access-controlled evidence. GroundEval uses a domain configuration to generate questions, lets the agent choose how to answer, and then scores both the final answer and the recorded trajectory that produced it. The benchmark targets three failures that LLM-as-judge evaluation struggles to detect: whether an agent checked before claiming absence, reasoned only from evidence available to the actor at the relevant time, and used the correct causal mechanism rather than a plausible one. These correspond to three tracks: Silence, Perspective, and Counterfactual. GroundEval exposes when plausible answers rest on invalid evidence paths, and produces structured per-question diagnostics that pair tool activity with the agent's turn-level narration, making each score inspectable rather than merely reported. What our case studies turned up is that this gap isn't some rare corner case. It's exactly the blind spot that final-answer and judge-based scoring were never built to catch.

AI.tldr: GroundEval 是一个无法官的评估框架，通过记录和评分智能体的搜索、获取、引用和权限轨迹，检测其是否使用了正确的证据，而非依赖最终答案或LLM评判。案例研究表明，即使最终答案得分超过0.85，GroundEval可能给出0.000分，暴露了现有评估方法的盲区。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-as-judge评估方法无法检测智能体是否使用了正确的证据路径，存在三大盲区：未检查就声称缺失、使用了非当时可用的证据、基于似是而非而非正确的因果机制。作者希望建立一个确定性、可审计的评估框架来填补这一缺口。
AI.method: GroundEval 通过领域配置生成问题，让智能体自由选择回答方式，然后对最终答案和完整轨迹进行双重评分。框架包含三个评估赛道：Silence（检查前是否确认缺失）、Perspective（是否仅使用当时可获取的证据）、Counterfactual（是否使用了正确的因果机制）。通过结构化诊断将工具活动与智能体的轮次叙述配对，使每个分数可被审查。
AI.result: 案例研究中，两个前沿LLM评判对看似合理的智能体回答给出0.85以上评分，但GroundEval轨迹分析显示智能体从未检索其答案所依赖的文档，得分仅为0.000。研究表明这种最终答案与证据路径之间的差距并非罕见边缘情况，而是现有评分方法固有的盲点。
AI.conclusion: GroundEval 有效暴露了智能体在证据使用上的系统性缺陷，提供了比最终答案评分和LLM评判更可靠的评估方式，尤其适用于需要严格证据溯源的场景。

title: Channel Location Constrains the Auditability of Subliminal Learning
summary: Subliminal learning lets a student inherit a teacher's hidden trait from distillation data that never names it. We ask when such transfer can be audited before training. The answer is not model identity or scale alone, but channel location: the carrier through which the trait reaches the student. We find three regimes. In a controlled initialization-dependent body channel, a pre-training screen works. Coverage, the cosine between the student's initial distillation update and the teacher's fine-tuning displacement, predicts held-out transfer (Spearman $ρ\approx 0.95$; AUROC 0.997). In pretrained language models, masked single-token traits instead ride convergent vocabulary geometry. This channel is initialization-independent, so initialization-alignment screens, including coverage, are not mechanistic; the useful handles are post-hoc detection and targeted mitigation. Even when a single-token named entity is removed from the loss, the student's held-out probability for that entity rises to 0.40 on average ($\sim 2500\times$), and a related semantic class transfers. In an untied-head model, orthogonalizing the trait's output row against entangled neighbours collapses leakage, while equal-size random-subspace edits do not. Thus removing a target string from distillation labels does not remove the corresponding preference: neighbouring tokens can carry it. Finally, conditional behaviours can route through the network body. For sycophancy, with agreement and correction markers masked from the loss, transfer reaches about 0.63 of the teacher's effect, localizes to body computation, and evades four audits across two model families. We scope this as masked transfer of a condition-present policy. Channel location is necessary for deciding which audits can be sound. It is not a deployment-ready screen: an audit used outside its carrier regime can give false assurance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究潜学习（subliminal learning）中隐性特征从教师模型向学生模型转移的机制，发现关键在于特征传递的"通道位置"（channel location），而非模型身份或规模。存在三种通道：初始化依赖的身体通道（body channel）、初始化无关的词汇几何通道（vocabulary geometry channel）、以及条件行为通道。不同通道需要不同的审计策略，误用通道外的审计可能产生虚假安全感。
AI.motivation: 探究潜学习中隐性特征何时能在训练前被审计，以及决定可审计性的根本因素。
AI.method: 通过系统实验划分三种通道类型：1）初始化依赖的身体通道（使用覆盖度Coverage指标）；2）初始化无关的词汇几何通道（掩码单令牌特征在预训练语言模型中传递）；3）条件行为通道（以谄媚行为sycophancy为例）。对每种通道设计相应的审计和缓解策略。
AI.result: 1）身体通道中，覆盖度（Coverage）与迁移性能高度相关（Spearman ρ≈0.95，AUROC 0.997）；2）词汇几何通道中，即使从损失中移除命名实体，学生模型对该实体的保留概率仍平均上升至0.40（约2500倍），且相关语义类别发生迁移；3）解耦头模型中，正交化特征输出行可消除泄漏，随机子空间编辑无效；4）条件行为通道中，谄媚行为迁移达到教师效应的约0.63，可规避四种审计。
AI.conclusion: 通道位置是决定审计有效性的必要条件，但并非部署就绪的筛查工具——在错误通道中使用不匹配的审计可能产生虚假保证。

title: Understanding Knowledge Distillation in Post-Training: When It Helps and When It Fails
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across many tasks, but their high computational cost limits deployment in resource-constrained environments. Knowledge Distillation (KD) offers a practical solution by transferring knowledge from a teacher model of a larger size to a smaller student model. While prior work has mainly examined task-specific or small-scale settings, the post-training stage for building general instruction-following models has received limited attention. In this paper, we conduct a systematic study of KD in post-training using the large-scale Tulu 3 dataset. We find that KD outperforms supervised fine-tuning (SFT) in low-data regimes, but its advantage diminishes as more training data is added. Distilling from a stronger instruction-tuned teacher restores substantial gains even with abundant data, indicating that KD remains effective when the teacher provides knowledge that the student cannot easily acquire from the training data alone. We further study domain-specific, low-resource scenarios and propose a two-stage KD strategy that leverages synthetic teacher-labeled data followed by refinement on human annotations. This method consistently improves student performance, providing practical guidance for building compact models in data-scarce environments.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了知识蒸馏（KD）在后训练阶段的应用，发现KD在低数据场景下优于监督微调（SFT），但当数据充足时优势减弱；从更强指令微调教师模型中蒸馏即使数据充足也能带来显著收益；提出两阶段KD策略，在数据稀缺环境下持续提升学生模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型计算成本高，限制了在资源受限环境中的部署；现有KD研究多聚焦于任务特定或小规模场景，缺乏对构建通用指令跟随模型的后训练阶段进行系统研究。
AI.method: 使用大规模Tulu 3数据集系统研究KD在后训练中的效果；对比KD与SFT在不同数据规模下的表现；研究教师模型强度对蒸馏效果的影响；提出两阶段KD策略：先使用教师模型生成的合成标签进行蒸馏，再在人工标注数据上进行微调。
AI.result: 低数据场景下KD优于SFT，但数据充足时优势消失；蒸馏更强指令微调教师模型能在数据充足时恢复显著收益；两阶段KD策略在数据稀缺环境下持续提升学生性能。
AI.conclusion: KD的有效性取决于教师能否提供学生难以从训练数据中独立获取的知识；两阶段KD策略为数据稀缺环境下构建紧凑模型提供了实用指导。

title: Cluster-Specific Localized Drift Detection for Efficient Batch Model Adaptation under Controlled Distribution Shift
summary: Machine learning systems deployed in dynamic environments frequently operate under nonstationary data distributions, where controlled distribution shift can progressively degrade predictive performance.
