However, many widely used tabular benchmark datasets lack explicit temporal structure, limiting reproducible evaluation of drift adaptation methods. This work proposes a cluster-induced distribution shift simulation framework that transforms static tabular datasets into controlled evolving data streams through structured perturbations across featurespace partitions. Using this framework, six adaptation strategies are systematically evaluated: static learning, sliding-window retraining, global ADWIN retraining, cluster-local ADWIN retraining, random subspace drift detection, and feature-partitioned drift detection. Experiments are conducted on five benchmark datasets covering both classification and regression tasks using diverse predictive model families, including linear models, k-Nearest Neighbours, tree ensembles, boosting methods, and adaptive online learners.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于聚类的分布漂移模拟框架，将静态表格数据转化为受控演化的数据流，并系统评估了六种漂移适应策略在不同模型上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习系统在动态环境中常面临非平稳数据分布，但多数表格基准数据集缺乏显式时间结构，限制了漂移适应方法的可重复评估。
AI.method: 构建聚类诱导的分布漂移模拟框架，通过对特征空间分区施加结构化扰动，将静态表格数据转化为受控演化的数据流。在此框架上评估六种适应策略：静态学习、滑动窗口重训练、全局ADWIN重训练、聚类局部ADWIN重训练、随机子空间漂移检测和特征分区漂移检测。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集（涵盖分类与回归任务）上，使用线性模型、k近邻、树集成、提升方法和自适应在线学习者等多种模型族进行实验。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为在静态表格数据上可控地模拟分布漂移提供了有效途径，为系统性评估漂移适应策略建立了标准化基准。

title: StatABench: Dataset and Framework for Evaluating Statistical Analysis Capabilities of LLMs
summary: Statistical analysis is a broad, complex field requiring both domain knowledge and tool proficiency. While prior work has evaluated large language models (LLMs) in this domain, existing benchmarks remain limited in scope and format. To bridge this gap, we introduce StatABench (Statistical AnalysisBenchmark), a benchmark designed to systematically assess LLMs' statistical analysis capabilities. StatABench comprises two complementary components: Stat-Closed, containing 404 questions across 18 statistical topics in multiple formats (multiple-choice, fill-in-the-blank, decision-making, and practical application), and Stat-Open, featuring 30 complex open-ended modeling tasks adapted from professional competitions. We evaluate diverse LLMs using the LangChain MCP framework and multiple data science agents, and assess Stat-Open solutions via a validated LLM-as-Judge protocol. Experiments show that even GPT-5.1 achieves only 68.6% on Stat-Closed, while the best open-source model reaches 60.6%. On Stat-Open, the top agent framework scores 61.86 on average. These results reveal the gap between current LLMs and reliable statistical analysis, highlighting persistent challenges in tool-grounded reasoning, methodological decision-making, and end-to-end statistical modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 StatABench，一个系统评估大语言模型统计分析能力的基准，包含封闭式（404题，18个统计主题，多种格式）和开放式（30个复杂建模任务）两部分。实验表明，即使最强的GPT-5.1在封闭式任务上仅达68.6%，最佳开源模型60.6%，最佳智能体框架在开放式任务上平均61.86分，揭示了大语言模型在工具推理、方法决策和端到端统计建模方面的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在统计分析领域的评估基准在范围和格式上存在局限，缺乏系统全面的评测方案，因此需要构建更完备的基准来揭示模型的实际能力与不足。
AI.method: 构建StatABench基准，包含Stat-Closed（404道题，涵盖18个统计主题，包括选择题、填空题、决策题和应用题）和Stat-Open（30个源自专业竞赛的开放端到端建模任务）；使用LangChain MCP框架和多种数据科学智能体评估模型；采用LLM-as-Judge协议评估开放式解决方案。
AI.result: GPT-5.1在Stat-Closed上仅达68.6%，最佳开源模型为60.6%；Stat-Open上最佳智能体框架平均得分61.86。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型离可靠的统计分析能力仍有显著差距，在工具接地推理、方法决策和端到端统计建模方面存在持续挑战。

title: The Origins of Stochasticity: Comprehensive Investigations on Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Models
summary: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled sophisticated reasoning and content generation, yet their inherent stochasticity poses significant challenges for ensuring predictive credibility. While traditional uncertainty taxonomy paradigms, such as the dichotomy of aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties, provide conceptual foundations, they often fail to capture the multi-component and multi-stage nature of LLM generation and struggle to evaluate the effectiveness of various Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) methods. In this paper, we propose a granular uncertainty taxonomy that systematically attributes LLM uncertainty into input-level, parameter-level, token-level, and decoding-process sources. Correspondingly, we categorize existing UQ methods into Bayesian, ensemble, consensus-based, and single-pass approaches. Furthermore, we introduce a comprehensive evaluation framework covering diverse generation settings and metrics. We empirically evaluate 21 typical UQ methods across three prominent LLM families, including Qwen3, Llama 3.2, and DeepSeek-V3, on benchmarks such as TriviaQA, GSM8K, and HumanEval. Our experimental results demonstrate that (i) the effectiveness of UQ methods is sensitive to task types and generation settings; (ii) consensus-based methods, typed Deg and EigV, consistently outperform other UQ approaches; and (iii) larger model scales correlate with lower uncertainty estimates, suggesting an empirical scaling law for LLM uncertainty. This work bridges the gap between theoretical origins and practical deployment, providing a versatile diagnostic tool for systematically quantifying uncertainty in LLM applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种细粒度不确定性分类体系，将LLM不确定性归因于输入级、参数级、token级和解码过程四个来源，并将现有UQ方法分为贝叶斯、集成、基于共识和单次前向四类。通过在三个LLM家族上评估21种UQ方法，发现基于共识的方法（Deg和EigV）表现最优，且更大模型规模与更低不确定性估计相关。
AI.motivation: 传统不确定性分类（如偶然不确定性和认知不确定性）无法捕捉LLM生成过程中多组件、多阶段的特性，也难以有效评估各种不确定性量化（UQ）方法的效果，因此需要更细粒度的分类体系和统一的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出细粒度不确定性分类体系（输入级、参数级、token级、解码过程），将UQ方法分为四类（贝叶斯、集成、基于共识、单次前向），并构建包含多种生成设置和指标的评估框架，在Qwen3、Llama 3.2、DeepSeek-V3上对21种UQ方法在TriviaQA、GSM8K、HumanEval基准上进行实证评估。
AI.result: (i) UQ方法的有效性对任务类型和生成设置敏感；(ii) 基于共识的方法（Deg和EigV）持续优于其他UQ方法；(iii) 更大模型规模与更低不确定性估计相关，呈现经验性标度律。
AI.conclusion: 该工作弥合了理论起源与实际部署之间的差距，为系统量化LLM应用中的不确定性提供了通用诊断工具。

title: A Completion-Aware Framework for Impactful Counterfactual Explainability in Graph Neural Networks
summary: In this study, we propose a novel pipeline for generic, model-agnostic, local-level counterfactual explainability in graph neural networks (GNNs). Although counterfactual explainers capable of both adding and removing edges have emerged in recent years, the need for generic and efficient solutions remains unmet, particularly concerning qualitative explanation generation. Our approach couples progress in factual explainability with missing edge prediction models rooted in link prediction research, in order to enhance the quality, robustness and intuitiveness of explanations. A multi-faceted experimental analysis conducted on real-world and synthetic graph classification benchmarks, both binary and multi-label, demonstrates the advancements in comparison to state-of-the-art baselines across diverse metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通用的、模型无关的、局部层面的反事实可解释性方法，将事实可解释性与链路预测中的缺失边预测模型相结合，以提升GNN解释的质量、鲁棒性和直观性，在多种图分类基准上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的GNN反事实解释器虽能增删边，但缺乏通用且高效的方法，特别是在生成高质量定性解释方面存在不足。
AI.method: 将事实可解释性进展与基于链路预测的缺失边预测模型耦合，实现模型无关的局部反事实解释。
AI.result: 在真实和合成的二分类及多标签图分类基准上，多项指标均优于当前最优基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了反事实解释的质量、鲁棒性和直观性，填补了通用反事实可解释性方法的空白。

title: Predicate Importance Estimation and Decoupled Rationale-Score Distillation for Entity Alignment
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) are increasingly used as structured context for Large Language Models (LLMs), but industrial KG-RAG systems often need to integrate public and domain-specific KGs constructed from heterogeneous databases. This integration relies on Entity Alignment (EA), where lexical matching alone is insufficient under predicate-name variation and incomplete local neighborhoods. We address EA for KG integration by constructing a pairwise EA dataset and proposing two complementary modules: Predicate Importance Estimation (PIE) and Decoupled Rationale-Score Distillation (DRSD). PIE is a compact embedding-based approach that removes the subject information from each 1-hop triple, encodes the resulting subjectless triples, and aggregates them with learnable predicate-importance weights to build predicate-aware entity embeddings. DRSD trains a distilled small language model (SLM) with pseudo-answers produced by a teacher LLM through distinct prompts. By converting binary EA labels into text-based supervision and decoupling confidence-score estimation from label-consistent rationales, DRSD enables the SLM to learn task-specific reasoning while retaining a less label-biased confidence signal. Experiments show that PIE and DRSD improve EA classification. Moreover, because DRSD decouples confidence-score estimation from the decision, a discrepancy between the two flags an uncertain prediction for human review, thereby enabling a practical discrepancy between automatic acceptance and human-in-the-loop verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIE和DRSD两个互补模块用于知识图谱实体对齐：PIE通过谓词重要性估计构建谓词感知的实体嵌入，DRSD通过教师LLM蒸馏训练小语言模型，将二元对齐标签转化为文本监督并解耦置信度评分与决策理由，从而提升对齐性能并支持人机协同验证。
AI.motivation: 工业级KG-RAG系统常需整合来自异构数据库的公共领域和专业领域知识图谱，但此整合依赖实体对齐（EA）。在谓词名称变化和局部邻域不完整的情况下，仅靠词汇匹配不足以完成对齐任务。
AI.method: 1) PIE：去除每个1跳三元组中的主语信息，编码无主语三元组，并用可学习的谓词重要性权重聚合，构建谓词感知的实体嵌入。2) DRSD：利用教师LLM通过不同提示生成伪答案，蒸馏训练小语言模型；将二元EA标签转换为文本监督，并将置信度分数估计与标签一致的推理理由解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明PIE和DRSD均能提升实体对齐分类性能。此外，DRSD解耦置信度分数估计与决策，当两者不一致时可触发人工审核，实现自动接受与人机协同验证之间的实用差异检测。
AI.conclusion: PIE和DRSD两模块有效提升了实体对齐效果，且DRSD的置信度-决策解耦机制为实际部署中的人机协同提供了可行方案。

title: A Formula-Driven Survey and Research Agenda for On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains an LLM on states induced by the current or recent student policy: the student generates complete or partial rollouts, a teacher or self-teacher scores the resulting tokens under their generated contexts, and dense log-probability, logit, or distributional signals are converted into post-training updates. This survey studies OPD as a feedback-to-update problem rather than a single loss family. We develop a formula-driven taxonomy from two routes -- direct distributional losses and policy-gradient-style log-ratio updates -- and use it to organize core methods, verifier- or outcome-guided hybrids, industrial reports, framework implementations, failure modes, and stabilization recipes under explicit evidence boundaries. The taxonomy shows that OPD effectiveness depends not only on KL direction or teacher access, but also on state compatibility, support construction, temporal credit, vocabulary-level probability routing, gates and weights, and regularization. We further separate two mechanisms often conflated in sampled-token OPD stability discussions. Temporal credit asks how teacher-student log-ratio returns should weight sampled actions across a rollout; vocabulary routing asks where probability mass should move when negative feedback suppresses a sampled token. This distinction yields bias boundaries for immediate, return-to-go, discounted, and baseline-corrected estimators, motivates GAE-OPD as a value-based hypothesis for log-ratio returns, and motivates Counterfactual Routed OPD (CR-OPD) for routing probability mass toward teacher-supported, student-reachable alternatives. We close by mapping actionability diagnostics, failure mechanisms, case studies, open problems, and a reporting checklist onto the same feedback-to-update variables.

AI.tldr: 本文对在线策略蒸馏（On-policy Distillation, OPD）进行了系统综述，将其定义为从反馈到更新的问题而非单一损失函数族。作者提出了基于公式驱动的分类体系，区分了直接分布损失和策略梯度式对数比更新两条路径，并在此基础上梳理了核心方法、验证器混合方法、工业报告、框架实现、失败模式及稳定化策略。特别地，论文清晰区分了时间信用分配（temporal credit）和词汇级概率路由（vocabulary routing）两个常被混淆的机制，提出了GAE-OPD和CR-OPD等新假设，最后给出了可操作诊断、失败机制、案例研究、开放问题及报告清单。
AI.motivation: 现有文献将OPD视为单一损失函数族，忽略了其作为从反馈到更新的完整过程。本文旨在通过统一的反馈到更新视角重新审视OPD，澄清被混淆的关键机制，为方法分类、稳定性分析和未来研究提供系统性框架。
AI.method: 采用公式驱动的分类学方法，从两条路径（直接分布损失与策略梯度式对数比更新）组织文献。进一步分离时间信用分配（如何沿轨迹加权学生动作的对数比回报）与词汇路由（负反馈抑制采样词时概率质量应向何处移动）两个机制，提出GAE-OPD（基于价值函数的对数比回报假设）和CR-OPD（将概率路由向教师支持且学生可达的替代词）作为新方法假设。
AI.result: 建立了基于反馈到更新变量的统一分类体系；揭示了OPD有效性依赖于状态兼容性、支持集构建、时间信用、词汇级概率路由、门控与权重、正则化等因素；区分了时间信用与词汇路由两个被混淆的机制；提出了GAE-OPD和CR-OPD两个新方法方向；给出了立即回报、return-to-go、折扣回报、基线校正等估计量的偏置边界。
AI.conclusion: OPD应被视为从反馈到更新的完整问题，其核心挑战在于时间信用分配与词汇路由两个正交机制。未来工作可围绕GAE-OPD、CR-OPD、可操作诊断、失败机制分析及标准化报告清单展开。

title: Gradient-Descent Steps to Success over Mean Accuracy: A Paradigm Shift for ML
summary: Traditional evaluation of machine learning (ML) models typically focuses on achieving the maximum possible accuracy irrespective of the computational cost. In this article, we propose a paradigm shift towards evaluating performance based on computational effort-explicitly defined here as the total number of gradient descent steps required to reach an acceptable level of accuracy with high probability. Building upon the concept of computational effort originally introduced by Koza for Genetic Programming, we extend this metric to any ML model trained via gradient descent. Furthermore, we demonstrate that minimising this effort acts as a novel form of Automatic Machine Learning (AutoML). By evaluating it across 11 diverse ML models and five standard classification datasets, we uncover significant insights into the dynamics of gradient-based learning. Our findings reveal that optimal hyper-parameters consistently favour unusually large learning rates. Crucially, we demonstrate that the rapid, aggressive landscape traversal enabled by these large rates not only promotes generalisation-as seen in phenomena like superconvergence-but also statistically minimises the expected computational effort for training. Furthermore, we identify distinct phase transitions in the optimal search strategy: while a single training run suffices for lower accuracy targets, reaching a model's performance limit requires a dramatic shift towards conducting numerous independent, short restarts. Finally, we illustrate how this effort-based paradigm provides a robust framework for model selection, allowing practitioners to choose optimal algorithms based on the difficulty of a problem as perceived by different models for a given target accuracy, or to maximise the achievable accuracy for a fixed budget of gradient descent steps.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将机器学习模型评估从追求最高准确率转向基于计算效率（梯度下降步数）的新范式，发现最优超参数倾向于使用异常大的学习率，并揭示了训练策略中的相变现象。
AI.motivation: 传统ML评估只关注最终准确率而忽略计算成本，缺乏一个统一的计算效率度量标准来衡量不同模型在有限资源下的表现。
AI.method: 将遗传编程中的"计算努力"概念扩展到任意梯度下降训练的ML模型，定义为以高概率达到可接受准确率所需的总梯度下降步数；在11种ML模型和5个标准分类数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 最优超参数一致偏向异常大的学习率；大学习率能快速穿越损失景观，促进泛化并最小化期望计算努力；存在相变：低准确率目标单次训练即可，达到性能极限需要大量独立短重启。
AI.conclusion: 基于计算努力的范式为模型选择和AutoML提供了新框架，允许根据问题难度和计算预算选择最优算法。

title: Machine Translation and Post-Editing: Comparative Evaluation of Different MT Systems and Post-Editor Groups in Specialised Translation
summary: This article aims to evaluate the quality of machine translation (MT) and post-editing (PE) in the context of specialised translation from English into French. Three MT systems (DeepL, eTranslation and Systran) were compared, and two groups of post-editors -linguists/translators and NLP experts -were asked to perform post-editing. Translation assessment is based on error annotation using an error typology adapted to MT and PE evaluation. The results reveal significant differences between the three MT systems and the two groups of post-editors, particularly in terms of terminological accuracy and fluency. This study highlights the importance of domain knowledge in specialised translation, as well as the limitations and variable performance of MT systems in language for specific purposes (LSP).

AI.tldr: 本文评估了英译法专业翻译中三种机器翻译系统（DeepL、eTranslation、Systran）的翻译质量，以及语言学家/翻译者和NLP专家两组人群的译后编辑效果，发现系统间和编辑组间在术语准确性和流利度上存在显著差异，强调了领域知识在专业翻译中的重要性及MT系统在专门用途语言中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 评估机器翻译和译后编辑在专业翻译（英译法）中的质量，探究不同MT系统与不同背景译后编辑者的表现差异，以及领域知识对翻译质量的影响。
AI.method: 对比三种MT系统（DeepL、eTranslation、Systran），并让两组译后编辑者（语言学家/翻译者 vs. NLP专家）进行译后编辑，采用适用于MT和PE评估的误差标注类型进行翻译质量评估。
AI.result: 三种MT系统与两组译后编辑者之间均存在显著差异，尤其在术语准确性和流利度方面表现出明显不同。
AI.conclusion: 领域知识在专业翻译中至关重要；MT系统在专门用途语言（LSP）翻译中表现不一且存在局限性。

title: Measuring Behavior Portability in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous decision makers, yet the behavioral mapping they exhibit can vary substantially across decision environments that are payoff-equivalent by construction-environments that share identical payoff-relevant structure but differ in surface presentation. This sensitivity renders suite-based evaluation fragile and raises a fundamental question of behavioral portability: how well does a behavioral mapping learned in one decision environment informative on another that preserves the same underlying incentive structure? We introduce a formal framework to measure this property. Our protocol fits an interpretable behavioral model on data pooled from a set of source environments and evaluates its out-of-sample predictive performance in a held-out target environment, benchmarking against an oracle trained directly on target data. Portability is quantified via a loss-agnostic measure that delivers worst-case bounds on the performance of the induced prediction-action mapping in the target environment. In controlled experiments spanning seven canonical economic decision problems, we document substantial and systematic portability losses, suggesting that behavioral characterizations of LLMs obtained in one decision environment cannot be assumed to transfer reliably to structurally equivalent alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个正式框架，用于衡量大型语言模型在激励结构相同但表面呈现不同的决策环境之间的行为可移植性。通过七类经典经济决策问题的受控实验，发现LLM的行为映射存在显著且系统的可移植性损失，表明在一个决策环境中获得的LLM行为特征无法可靠地迁移到结构等价的替代环境中。
AI.motivation: LLM在决策中的行为映射会因决策环境的表面呈现差异而显著变化，即使这些环境在激励结构上完全相同。这种敏感性使得基于特定套件的评估不可靠，引出一个根本问题：在一个决策环境中学习到的行为映射在多大程度上能为另一个保持相同激励结构的环境提供信息。
AI.method: 提出一个正式框架：在多个源环境池化的数据上拟合可解释行为模型，评估其在保留目标环境上的样本外预测性能，并与直接在目标数据上训练的Oracle模型进行对比。通过一种损失无关的度量来量化可移植性，提供目标环境中预测-行动映射的最坏情况性能界限。
AI.result: 在涵盖七类经典经济决策问题的受控实验中，观察到显著且系统的可移植性损失，表明LLM的行为特征无法可靠地在结构等价的替代环境之间迁移。
AI.conclusion: LLM在决策环境中的行为可移植性存在系统性缺陷，在一个决策环境中获得的行为特征不能可靠地迁移到结构等价的替代环境中，这对LLM作为自主决策者的可靠部署提出了挑战。

title: Provably Efficient Policy-Reward Co-Pretraining for Adversarial Imitation Learning
summary: Adversarial imitation learning (AIL) achieves high-quality imitation compared to behavioral cloning (BC), but demands substantial online environment interaction. Recent empirical work has explored initializing AIL algorithms with BC pretrained policies to address this limitation, yet a rigorous theoretical understanding of pretraining's role in AIL remains elusive. This paper provides a systematic theoretical analysis and introduces principled pretraining algorithms for accelerating AIL. We begin by analyzing AIL with policy pretraining alone, identifying reward error as the dominant source of suboptimality. This reveals a critical and previously overlooked gap: the absence of reward pretraining. Motivated by this finding, we develop a principled policy-reward co-pretraining approach grounded in a reward shaping analysis. Our analysis uncovers a fundamental connection between expert policies and shaping rewards, which naturally gives rise to CoPT-AIL, an approach that jointly pretrains both policy and reward through a single BC procedure. We prove that CoPT-AIL achieves an improved imitation gap bound over standard AIL, establishing the first theoretical guarantee for the benefits of pretraining in AIL. Experimental results confirm CoPT-AIL's superior performance over existing AIL methods.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了预训练在对抗模仿学习（AIL）中的作用，发现仅策略预训练存在奖励误差问题，进而提出策略-奖励联合预训练方法CoPT-AIL，通过单一行为克隆过程同时预训练策略和奖励，首次从理论上证明了预训练对AIL的益处，实验验证了其优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AIL方法需要大量在线环境交互，虽然已有研究尝试用行为克隆预训练策略来初始化AIL算法，但预训练在AIL中的作用缺乏严格的理论理解。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 首先理论分析表明仅策略预训练时奖励误差是主要的次优性来源；基于此发现，通过奖励塑形分析提出策略-奖励联合预训练方法CoPT-AIL，利用单一行为克隆过程同时预训练策略和奖励函数。
AI.result: 证明了CoPT-AIL比标准AIL具有更优的模仿差距界，首次建立了预训练在AIL中带来益处的理论保证；实验证实CoPT-AIL优于现有AIL方法。
AI.conclusion: 策略和奖励的联合预训练可以有效加速AIL，弥补了仅策略预训练存在的奖励误差缺陷，为预训练在AIL中的应用提供了理论支撑。

title: Have You Ever Seen Them? Entity-level Membership Inference through Interrogating Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) raise growing concerns about privacy leakage and copyright compliance. Membership inference is a key tool for assessing such risks, but existing studies mainly focus on whether specific samples or sample-based data units are used for training. We argue that LLMs exhibit a human-memory-like behavior: an LLM may not memorize a specific sample verbatim, yet it can accumulate and reveal knowledge about a real-world entity from scattered mentions. This analogy motivates us to examine whether an LLM can be interrogated like a human interviewee to reveal its exposure to entity-related information. Motivated by this question, we propose entity-level membership inference, which determines whether information related to a target entity is used in LLM training. We study this task in the practical label-only black-box setting, where only generated texts are observable. We formalize the task under clue, input, and model constraints, establish the necessary and sufficient conditions for its feasibility, and instantiate five interrogation strategies based on this formalization. The strategies use limited entity clues to construct prompts, elicit entity-related responses, and infer membership from semantic features among the generated texts. We construct entity-level datasets and adapt state-of-the-art sample-level label-only methods to the entity-level setting as baselines. Experiments on person entities show that our methods achieve AUC up to 0.97 and bring gains of 6.0%--17.5% in Balanced Accuracy over the best adapted baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出实体级别的成员推断攻击，判断目标实体的信息是否被用于LLM训练，在仅标签的黑盒设置下通过有限线索构造提示词，从生成的文本中提取语义特征进行推断，在人物实体上AUC达0.97。
AI.motivation: 现有成员推断主要关注样本级别的训练数据泄露，但LLM可能不会逐字记忆特定样本，而是像人类记忆一样从分散提及中积累和暴露关于真实世界实体的知识。因此需要一种实体级别的成员推断方法。
AI.method: 形式化定义了实体级成员推断任务，在仅标签黑盒设置下（仅可观察生成文本），建立了可行性所需的条件（线索、输入、模型约束），基于此形式化设计了五种讯问策略，利用有限实体线索构建提示词，生成响应并从语义特征推断成员关系。
AI.result: 在人物实体数据集上，该方法AUC最高达0.97，平衡准确率比最优基线方法提升6.0%-17.5%。
AI.conclusion: 实体级成员推断在仅标签黑盒设置下是可行的，且能有效检测LLM对实体知识的暴露程度，为隐私泄露和版权合规风险评估提供了新工具。

title: AI-Assisted Help-Seeking Trajectories in Programming Education from an SRL-Informed Perspective
summary: Generative AI tools provide novice programmers with instant, personalized support, but also raise concerns about whether AI use supports or bypasses students' regulation of problem-solving. Existing work has largely focused on correctness, usability, or overall usage frequency, with less attention to how student--AI help-seeking unfolds. This study addresses this gap by analyzing AI-assisted help-seeking trajectories in university-level programming. Using an SRL-informed analytical framework that links prompt-level help-seeking codes to conceptual, implementation, debugging, and reflective forms of support, we analyzed 1,290 task-specific student prompts linked to 17,190 code submissions from 71 students in introductory Python programming courses. Specifically, we examined how help-seeking interactions were structured across turns and attempts, and how trajectory patterns related to task scores and the number of code submissions. Results indicate that many students primarily used AI for reactive troubleshooting rather than for planned, self-regulated problem-solving. Although trajectory patterns were not associated with significant differences in task scores, they differed substantially in the number of code submissions required. These findings suggest that the educational significance of AI support lies not only in whether students use AI, but in how their help-seeking trajectories develop during programming problem-solving.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了71名大学生在Python编程课程中的1,290条AI辅助求助轨迹，发现学生主要将AI用于被动故障排除而非主动自我调节学习，不同轨迹模式虽未显著影响任务分数，但在代码提交次数上差异显著。
AI.motivation: 现有关于生成式AI辅助编程的研究多关注正确性、可用性或整体使用频率，忽视了学生与AI交互的求助过程如何展开，特别是AI使用是支持还是绕过了学生的自我调节学习。
AI.method: 采用自我调节学习(SRL)驱动的分析框架，将提示级别的求助代码与概念、实现、调试和反思四种支持类型关联，分析了71名学生针对具体任务的1,290条提示及17,190次代码提交，考察了求助交互在轮次和尝试中的结构模式及其与任务分数和提交次数的关系。
AI.result: 多数学生主要将AI用作反应性故障排除工具而非自我调节的问题解决方式；不同轨迹模式在任务得分上无显著差异，但在代码提交次数上差异显著。
AI.conclusion: AI支持的教育意义不仅在于学生是否使用AI，更在于其在编程问题解决过程中的求助轨迹如何发展。

title: New Smooth Loss functions for Robust Regression that Closely Approximate Absolute Error and Provide Improved Performance on Datasets With Significant Outliers
summary: The performance of supervised machine learning models is directly related to the quality of the training dataset. In particular, the presence of significantly many outliers in the training data can lead to low accuracy because popular loss function like the Mean Squared Error (MSE) assign very high importance to large errors. The Mean Absolute Error (MAE) loss assigns equal importance to all errors and is most robust to outliers, but suffers from being non-differentiable at the origin. MAE also has large derivative values close to its minimum leading to instability and oscillations during training. Thus differentiable approximations to MAE namely Huber and Log-Cosh losses were introduced for robust regression tasks. This paper introduces two new infinitely differentiable loss functions that more closely approximate the MAE loss and provide improved performance on regression tasks with significantly many outliers in the training dataset. A comparison of the performance of regression models with different loss functions on a wide variety of benchmarks and datasets is presented to demonstrate the superior performance of the Square Root Loss (SRL) and Smooth Mean Absolute Error (SMAE) losses proposed in this paper. The SRL loss is shown to be strictly convex and the SMAE loss is shown to be strictly quasi-convex. Given the fundamental importance of linear regression, two new robust linear regression models are presented.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种新的无穷可微损失函数——平方根损失(SRL)和平滑平均绝对误差(SMAE)，它们更接近MAE损失，能在训练数据包含大量异常值的回归任务中提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: MSE损失对异常值过于敏感，而MAE损失虽鲁棒但不可微且训练不稳定，现有Huber和Log-Cosh损失是MAE的可微近似但仍有局限，因此需要更好的可微鲁棒损失函数。
AI.method: 提出SRL和SMAE两种无穷可微损失函数；SRL被证明是严格凸的，SMAE被证明是严格拟凸的；在多种基准和数据集上对比不同损失函数下回归模型的性能；基于新损失函数提出两种鲁棒线性回归模型。
AI.result: 在包含大量异常值的回归任务中，SRL和SMAE损失相比MSE、MAE、Huber和Log-Cosh损失表现出更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: SRL和SMAE是更接近MAE的无穷可微近似，在异常值较多的回归任务中具有优越性，且可推导出新的鲁棒线性回归模型。

title: Training Open Models for Agentic Phone Use
summary: Phones are becoming an important execution surface for general-purpose agents, but training open models for reliable phone use remains difficult because the environment that matters at deployment, real devices running real apps, is slow, stateful, side-effectful, and hard to reset or verify, while scalable mock environments only approximate real behavior. We present PhoneBuddy, a training recipe and open-model line for agentic phone use that combines a real-app environment with a mock-app environment, PhoneWorld, which reconstructs runnable mock apps from real GUI usage structure. PhoneBuddy first builds a shared supervised fine-tuning stage from trajectories collected in both environments, then compares real-app RL against mixed RL across both environments. Across a 150-task human evaluation on real phones spanning apps, mini-apps, and cross-app workflows, task success rate improves from 36.67\% after supervised fine-tuning to 40.67\% after real-app RL and 45.33\% after mixed RL. On AndroidWorld, the same progression rises from 60.3\% to 77.2\% to 83.2\%. These results show that mock-app training is not a replacement for real-app RL, but a complementary source of scalable, resettable, and automatically checked interaction. The gains are strongest on app and mini-app tasks, while long-horizontal cross-app workflows remain an important open challenge.

AI.tldr: PhoneBuddy提出了一种结合真实应用环境与可扩展模拟应用环境（PhoneWorld）的训练方案，用于训练通用手机操作智能体。通过混合强化学习（混合RL），在150项真实手机任务中成功率达到45.33%，在AndroidWorld上达到83.2%，表明模拟环境训练是真实环境RL的补充而非替代。
AI.motivation: 真实手机设备运行缓慢、有状态、有副作用、难以重置或验证，而可扩展的模拟环境只能近似真实行为，两者之间存在差距，需要一种能结合两者优势的训练方案。
AI.method: 1) 构建PhoneWorld模拟环境，从真实GUI使用结构重建可运行的模拟应用；2) 在真实环境和模拟环境中收集轨迹，进行共享监督微调；3) 比较纯真实环境RL与混合环境（真实+模拟）RL的效果。
AI.result: 在150项真实手机任务评估中，监督微调后成功率36.67%，真实环境RL提升至40.67%，混合RL提升至45.33%。AndroidWorld上从60.3%提升至77.2%再到83.2%。跨应用长时工作流仍是重要开放挑战。
AI.conclusion: 模拟环境训练不是真实环境RL的替代品，而是可扩展、可重置、可自动检查交互的补充来源。混合RL在应用和小型应用任务上增益最强。

title: Active Inference as the Test-Time Scaling Law for Physical AI Agents
summary: In this paper, a novel test-time scaling law for physical artificial intelligence (AI) agents is introduced. This scaling law enables physical AI agents to reason with their world models to generalize in unforeseen scenarios at test time. The derived scaling law is grounded in the first principle of active inference, which equips agents with the general objective to survive in the real world, under which their specific task objectives are subsumed. Active inference achieves this by providing the reasoning to resolve prediction errors that arise when the agent encounters unforeseen situations outside its training distribution, enabling generalization in non-stationary environments. The proposed scaling law captures this by dynamically updating the agent's policy with this reasoning at test time. This policy update is modeled as a soft Bayesian inference process in which beliefs about the policy are updated using the reasoning that reduces expected prediction errors under allowable policies as a likelihood. The resulting posterior policy admits a biological interpretation, recovering the scaling mechanism that engages the brain's basal ganglia and prefrontal cortex at test time. To solve this analytically intractable problem, a variational inference solution minimizing free energy bounds is developed. This solution extends to enable learning beyond training by reinforcing new instances, resolved at test time, in both the policy and world model. Unlike existing scaling laws constrained by model size and training data, the derived solution scales with the continuous real-world experience of a physical AI agent. Simulation results on an autonomous driving task demonstrate that the proposed solution outperforms model-free Q-learning and model-based Bayesian reinforcement learning, achieving robust generalization to unforeseen scenarios while improving inference efficiency by over 36%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向物理人工智能智能体的测试时缩放律，基于主动推理第一原理，使智能体在测试时通过世界模型推理实现非平稳环境中的泛化，并采用变分推理求解，在自动驾驶任务上相比基线方法推理效率提升超36%。
AI.motivation: 现有缩放律受限于模型规模和训练数据，无法使物理AI智能体在测试时应对训练分布外的未知场景。本文旨在从第一性原理出发，赋予智能体在真实世界中生存的通用目标，使其能在非平稳环境中通过测试时推理实现泛化。
AI.method: 基于主动推理理论，将测试时策略更新建模为软贝叶斯推理过程，以最小化期望预测误差为似然更新策略信念；通过变分推理求解自由能下界；在策略和世界模型中强化测试时解决的新实例，实现超越训练的学习。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶任务上，所提方法优于无模型Q学习和基于模型的贝叶斯强化学习，在未预见场景中实现鲁棒泛化，推理效率提升超过36%。
AI.conclusion: 推导出的缩放律不依赖于模型规模和训练数据，而是随物理AI智能体的连续真实世界经验而扩展，为测试时泛化提供了生物学可解释的计算框架。

title: Frequency-Domain Neural ODEs for Modeling Non-Linear Dynamical Systems
comment: 11 pages. figures, tables, and results are at the bottom of the file
summary: Standard continuous-depth models, such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), offer significant advantages in modeling physical systems by learning continuous vector fields rather than discrete temporal steps. However, when applied to complex dynamical systems, standard NODEs frequently struggle with highly nonlinear dynamics. This paper investigates the Frequency-domain Neural ODE (FNODE), an architecture that projects continuous temporal dynamics into the frequency domain using the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT). By operating in the frequency domain, the model provides better generalization to the dynamical system. The architecture is empirically evaluated against discrete models, specifically Gated Recurrent Units (GRUs) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTMs), and other continuous-depth variants, including Augmented Neural ODE (ANODE), across four distinct dynamical systems: the Lotka-Volterra model, the forced Duffing oscillator, the Van der Pol oscillator, and the Lorenz system. To rigorously assess generalization and robustness, curriculum and ensemble learning are used to evaluate the model's convergence by estimating confidence intervals across different ensemble models. The empirical results demonstrate that the FNODE architecture achieves better generalization while exhibiting remarkable convergence stability.

AI.tldr: 论文提出频率域神经ODE（FNODE），利用傅里叶变换将连续时间动力学映射到频域学习，在四个复杂动力系统上相比传统NODE、ANODE及离散模型（GRU/LSTM）展现出更好的泛化能力和收敛稳定性。
AI.motivation: 标准神经常微分方程（NODEs）在处理高度非线性动力系统时常常表现不佳，需要一种能更好泛化到复杂动力学系统的方法。
AI.method: 提出FNODE架构，通过快速傅里叶变换（FFT）将连续时间动力学投影到频率域进行操作，并结合课程学习与集成学习评估模型收敛性与鲁棒性。
AI.result: FNODE在四个动力系统（Lotka-Volterra、Duffing振子、Van der Pol振子、Lorenz系统）上相比GRU、LSTM、ANODE等基线模型取得了更好的泛化性能，且展现出显著的收敛稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 频率域建模策略有效提升了NODE在复杂动力系统上的泛化能力与稳定性，FNODE是一种优于现有连续深度模型和离散时序模型的架构选择。

title: PIVOTSBench: Evaluating Fine-Grained Interpersonal Relationship Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Humans possess an innate ability to understand fine-grained interpersonal relationships, which is central to everyday social interactions. Although such reasoning is inherently multimodal, it remains largely unexplored by existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs). To address this gap, we introduce PIVOTS, the first benchmark built from Social-IQ 2.0 and YouTube data to evaluate MLLMs' ability to predict bidirectional interpersonal relationship dimensions grounded in established psychology research. In addition, PIVOTS includes auxiliary tasks that assess models' ability to identify and leverage the critical visual cues underlying such predictions. We evaluate both proprietary and open-source MLLMs and conduct detailed ablation studies to analyze the effects of visual modalities and explicit social role information in conversational utterances. We further examine how joint and pairwise prediction settings benefit MLLMs in scoring bidirectional PIVOTS dimensions. Project page and resources: https://flynnzhangsx.github.io/PIVOTSBench/ .

AI.tldr: 提出PIVOTS基准，基于Social-IQ 2.0和YouTube数据，评估多模态大语言模型预测双向人际关系维度的能力，并包含辅助任务测试模型识别关键视觉线索的能力。
AI.motivation: 人类天然具备理解细粒度人际关系的能力，但现有MLLMs在多模态人际关系推理方面尚缺乏系统评估，该领域存在空白。
AI.method: 从Social-IQ 2.0和YouTube构建PIVOTS基准，包含双向人际关系维度预测及辅助任务；评估多种闭源和开源MLLMs，进行消融实验分析视觉模态和社会角色信息的影响，研究联合预测与成对预测设置的效果。
AI.result: 评估了多种闭源和开源MLLMs，通过消融实验揭示了视觉模态和社会角色信息对预测的影响，以及联合/成对预测设置的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PIVOTS填补了MLLMs在多模态人际关系推理评估方面的空白，为未来研究提供了基准和洞见。

title: MINCE: Shrinking LLM Evaluation Datasets via Few-Model Monte Carlo Calibration
summary: Evaluating LLMs across many model variants -- quantized, fine-tuned, or deployment-specific -- requires running large benchmarks repeatedly, a process that can take tens of hours per model on edge hardware such as NPUs. Existing subset selection methods reduce this cost but depend on large calibration pools or learned prediction layers. We introduce MINCE (Monte Carlo Informed N-sizing for Compact Evaluation), which uses Monte Carlo simulation over per-item logs from a small set of calibration models to find the minimum subset size that bounds accuracy drift and then fixes a randomly sampled subset at that size, with no prediction layer needed. MINCE reduces IFEVAL by 54\%, MMLU by 89\%, and GSM8K by 70\% with maximum drift $\leq$2.62\,pp on BF16 models and mean drift of 0.77--3.59\,pp on held-out NPU models, while delivering median GPU evaluation speedups of 2.7--8.1$\times$ and NPU evaluation speedups of 1.7--2.0$\times$. The method is robust to calibration pool size and achieves lower drift than tinyBenchmarks (12$\times$ lower on MMLU, 3.3$\times$ on GSM8K) while using 57$\times$ fewer calibration models.

AI.tldr: 提出MINCE方法，通过蒙特卡洛模拟从少量校准模型的逐项日志中确定最小子集大小，无需预测层，在保持精度漂移≤2.62pp的同时，将IFEVAL、MMLU、GSM8K分别减少54%、89%、70%，在边缘硬件上实现1.7-8.1倍加速。
AI.motivation: 在NPU等边缘硬件上评估LLM的量化、微调等变体时，运行完整基准测试需要数十小时，现有子集选择方法依赖大规模校准池或学习型预测层，成本高昂。
AI.method: MINCE使用蒙特卡洛模拟对少量校准模型的逐项日志进行分析，计算能约束精度漂移的最小子集大小，然后在该大小下固定随机采样子集。
AI.result: IFEVAL减少54%，MMLU减少89%，GSM8K减少70%，最大漂移≤2.62pp；在保留NPU模型上平均漂移0.77-3.59pp；GPU加速2.7-8.1倍，NPU加速1.7-2.0倍；优于tinyBenchmarks且所需校准模型减少57倍。
AI.conclusion: MINCE无需预测层即可高效选择评估子集，在边缘硬件上实现显著加速，且对校准池规模鲁棒，性能优于现有方法。

title: OphthaDT: Generative Digital Twins for Forecasting Visual Acuity Trajectories in Ophthalmology
summary: Precision medicine in ophthalmology requires accurate longitudinal predictions, but the fragmented nature of multimodal clinical data remains a barrier to forecasting. We introduce OphthaDT, an LLM-based digital twin for ophthalmology that serializes longitudinal patient histories from 3,220 patients across four Phase III clinical trials into structured narratives to forecast best corrected visual acuity (BCVA). In benchmarks spanning up to 100 weeks, OphthaDT demonstrated the lowest prediction error in neovascular age-related macular degeneration (nAMD), achieving an average mean absolute error (MAE) reduction of 6.0% compared to all baselines. In diabetic macular edema (DME), OphthaDT demonstrated competitive performance against all baselines while outperforming Random Forest and XGBoost by an average MAE reduction of 2.6% and 6.9%, respectively. Results reveal that OphthaDT's predictive advantage scales with trajectory complexity: whereas linear models remain effective for the more stable treatment responses of DME, OphthaDT's capacity is better suited for capturing the high longitudinal variability of nAMD. Finally, OphthaDT handles irregular sampling without imputation, positioning LLM-based clinical trajectory modeling as a methodology that could reduce patient burden and accelerate drug development.

AI.tldr: OphthaDT是一个基于LLM的眼科数字孪生系统，利用3,220名患者历时100周的纵向临床数据预测最佳矫正视力（BCVA），在nAMD中优于所有基线（MAE降低6.0%），在DME中优于随机森林和XGBoost（MAE分别降低2.6%和6.9%），并能处理不规则采样而无需插补。
AI.motivation: 眼科精准医学需要准确的纵向预测，但多模态临床数据的碎片化特性阻碍了这一目标，现有方法难以有效处理高变异性的疾病轨迹和不规则采样数据。
AI.method: OphthaDT将来自四项III期临床试验的3,220名患者的纵向病史序列化为结构化叙事文本，利用LLM进行时序建模，不依赖插补即可处理不规则采样数据，直接预测最佳矫正视力（BCVA）。
AI.result: 在长达100周的基准测试中，OphthaDT在nAMD上实现平均MAE降低6.0%（优于所有基线）；在DME上，优于随机森林（MAE降低2.6%）和XGBoost（MAE降低6.9%）。其预测优势随轨迹复杂性增加而扩大，在nAMD这类高纵向变异性的疾病中表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的临床轨迹建模能够有效应对眼科纵向预测中的复杂变异性与数据不规则性，有望减少患者负担并加速药物研发。

title: A Dual-Track Framework for Template-Constrained LaTeX Conversion
summary: With the increasing demands for advanced document conversion, mapping structured Markdown drafts into template-compliant formats like LaTeX remains a challenge. Existing approaches largely depend on either deterministic rule-based converters or pure end-to-end Large Language Model (LLM) generation. The former fails to correctly handle asset insertions and template-specific constraints, while the latter tends to induce semantic drift, leading to hallucinations that are difficult to debug. To address these limitations, we introduce a robust Dual-Track Framework that systematically decouples template formatting from document processing: an offline track extracts template constraints into a reusable manifest, while an online track implements a hybrid execution pipeline. This pipeline confines LLM usage exclusively to reasoning-intensive components (e.g., semantic metadata, bibliographic references, and complex visual/tabular layouts) while delegating rule-based engines for deterministic processing. Empirical evaluation across 7 LaTeX templates and 56 published research papers demonstrates that our method preserves better structural fidelity, satisfies diverse layout constraints, and achieves a higher compilation success rate compared to the previous baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个双轨框架（Dual-Track Framework），将模板格式化与文档处理解耦，通过离线轨提取模板约束、在线轨混合执行（LLM处理推理密集型任务+规则引擎处理确定性任务），在7个LaTeX模板和56篇论文上实现了更好的结构保真度和编译成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖确定性规则转换器（无法处理资产插入和模板特定约束），要么依赖纯端到端LLM生成（导致语义漂移和幻觉且难以调试），因此需要一种能够兼顾两者优势的新方法。
AI.method: 提出双轨框架：离线轨从模板中提取约束生成可复用的清单（manifest）；在线轨实现混合执行管道，将LLM限制用于推理密集型组件（语义元数据、参考文献、复杂图表布局），将规则引擎用于确定性处理。
AI.result: 在7个LaTeX模板和56篇已发表研究论文上的实验表明，该方法相比基线方法具有更好的结构保真度、满足多样化的布局约束，并实现了更高的编译成功率。
AI.conclusion: 双轨框架有效解决了Markdown到LaTeX转换中规则系统灵活不足和纯LLM幻觉问题的权衡，通过任务拆分实现了可靠且可调试的文档生成。

title: Finding the Evidence: Discovering Decision-Supporting Tokens for On-Policy Reasoning Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation transfers reasoning ability through dense token-level supervision, yet the nature of the transferable signal remains unclear. We discover that reasoning chains contain two types of knowledge that require different discovery mechanisms: decisions (where to branch), which surface through student uncertainty, and evidence (intermediate steps that justify decisions), which hides in positions where the student is confident yet wrong. Current methods capture only decisions; the substantive knowledge in evidence tokens remains untransferred. We propose DEAR(Decision-Evidence Aware Reasoning Distillation), which first identifies decisions via student entropy, then discovers their supporting evidence through hidden-state cosine similarity to decision anchors, boosted by teacher-student divergence to prioritize the largest knowledge gaps. Across three student-teacher configurations on math and code benchmarks, DEAR consistently outperforms standard OPD, with up to +2.5pp on competition math and +5.7pp on code generation.

AI.tldr: 本文发现推理链蒸馏中存在决策（分支点）和证据（决策依据）两种知识，前者可通过学生不确定性捕获，后者隐藏在学生自信但错误的位置。提出DEAR方法，通过学生熵识别决策点，利用隐状态余弦相似度及师生差异发现证据，在数学和代码任务上显著优于标准在线策略蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 现有在线策略蒸馏仅能传递推理链中的决策知识，而支撑决策的证据知识（学生自信但错误位置的中间步骤）未被有效转移，导致推理能力蒸馏不完整。
AI.method: 提出DEAR方法：1) 通过学生熵识别决策（分支点）；2) 利用隐状态余弦相似度计算与决策锚点的关联，并结合师生差异优先覆盖最大知识差距，从而发现证据知识。
AI.result: 在数学和代码基准测试上，DEAR在三种师生配置下均优于标准在线策略蒸馏，竞赛数学提升+2.5pp，代码生成提升+5.7pp。
AI.conclusion: 推理链中决策与证据是两种不同性质的需不同机制发现的知识，DEAR通过分别捕获两者实现了更完整的推理能力蒸馏。

title: Meta-Reinforcement Learning via Evolution for Multi-Objective Combinatorial Supply Chain Optimisation
summary: Meta-reinforcement learning is a promising approach to multi-objective optimisation because it enables rapid policy adaptation across changing environments and preference settings. However, conventional few-shot methods usually fine-tune from a single shared meta-policy, which can reduce solution diversity and limit exploration of the Pareto front, especially in high-dimensional combinatorial problems such as supply chain optimisation. We propose a population-based Meta-reinforcement learning framework that combines decomposition with evolutionary search in scalarisation weight space. The framework maintains a population of weight vectors, each associated with a distinct meta-policy trained through gradient-based meta-learning, and iteratively refines this population through elitist selection, crossover, and mutation guided by hypervolume and entropy contributions. We evaluate the method in a multi-objective supply chain setting with conflicting economic, environmental, and social goals, and further test its generality on standard reinforcement learning problems. The results show that the proposed approach yields more diverse, better distributed Pareto front approximations, improves cross-task adaptation, increases hypervolume by up to 32\% over Meta-multi-objective reinforcement learning in the complex case, and attains the lowest average Hausdorff distance among all compared methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于种群的元强化学习框架，将分解策略与进化搜索相结合，在多目标供应链优化中生成更优、更均衡的Pareto前沿，超体积提升达32%。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本元强化学习方法通常从单一共享元策略微调，导致解多样性不足、Pareto前沿探索受限，难以应对高维多目标组合优化问题（如供应链优化）。
AI.method: 提出基于种群的元强化学习框架，维护一组权重向量种群，每个权重对应一个通过梯度元学习训练的独立元策略；通过精英选择、交叉和变异（以超体积和熵贡献为指导）迭代优化种群。
AI.result: 在复杂供应链案例中超体积比Meta-MORL提升32%，在所有对比方法中平均Hausdorff距离最低，生成更丰富、分布更均匀的Pareto前沿近似，跨任务适应能力更强。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在多目标优化中有效提升了解的多样性和Pareto前沿质量，适用于供应链优化及标准强化学习问题。

title: PRIDE: Privileged Information-enhanced Distillation for Empathetic Dialogue Generation
summary: Large language models have demonstrated significant capabilities in generating diverse and context-aware responses for empathetic dialogue. However, their computational demands severely limit their deployment in resource-constrained environments. While knowledge distillation offers a promising compression solution, it often fails to transfer the nuanced understanding essential for empathy, as it overlooks the implicit contextual cues that guide human connection. To bridge this gap, we propose a \textbf{pr}ivileged \textbf{i}nformation-enhanced knowledge \textbf{d}istillation method for \textbf{e}mpathetic dialogue generation (PRIDE). Our method leverages privileged information, such as expert psychological annotations or future event summaries, which is available exclusively during training but unavailable at inference time. This allows us to transfer the teacher model's empathetic reasoning to smaller models without relying on extra inputs during deployment. Specifically, PRIDE has three key components: (1) An empathy-reasoning prompt that guides the teacher to explicitly decompose the empathetic process into understanding feelings and analyzing situations step-by-step; (2) A multi-source attention mechanism that directs the student to effectively integrate privileged information; (3) A dual-alignment loss that combines reversed Kullback-Leibler divergence and maximum mean discrepancy to ensure robust knowledge transfer at both logit and feature levels. Experiments on multi-modal and text-only datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance, and in some cases matches or even surpasses larger teacher models in terms of accuracy and semantic relevance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRIDE方法，一种基于特权信息增强的知识蒸馏技术，用于在资源受限环境下生成高质量的同理心对话。该方法利用训练时可用但推理时不可用的特权信息（如专家心理标注或未来事件摘要），通过同理心推理提示、多源注意力机制和双对齐损失三个核心组件，将教师模型的同理心推理能力有效迁移至轻量学生模型。实验表明，PRIDE在多项指标上达到甚至超越大型教师模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在同理心对话生成中表现出色，但其巨大的计算开销严重限制了在资源受限环境中的部署。现有的知识蒸馏方法虽然能实现模型压缩，但未能有效传递同理心所需的对隐含语境线索的细粒度理解，导致蒸馏后模型的同理心能力显著下降。
AI.method: PRIDE方法包含三个核心组件：(1) 同理心推理提示，引导教师模型将同理心过程显式分解为理解情感和分析情境两个步骤；(2) 多源注意力机制，指导学生模型有效整合特权信息；(3) 双对齐损失，结合反向KL散度和最大均值差异，在logit层和特征层实现稳健的知识迁移。特权信息（如专家心理标注或未来事件摘要）仅在训练阶段可用，推理时不需额外输入。
AI.result: 在多模态和纯文本数据集上的实验表明，PRIDE方法取得了有竞争力的性能，在某些指标上（如准确率和语义相关性）甚至达到或超越了更大的教师模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用训练阶段独有的特权信息进行知识蒸馏，PRIDE有效弥合了模型压缩过程中同理心能力传递的鸿沟，为在资源受限场景下部署高质量同理心对话系统提供了可行方案。

title: RaMem: Contextual Reinstatement for Long-term Agentic Memory
summary: Long-term memory has become increasingly important for LLM agents that operate across extended interactions and evolving task contexts. Recent memory systems have made past experiences more persistent, compact, and retrievable, but retrieval alone does not ensure that a memory provides valid evidence for the current query. When experiences are compressed into reusable fragments, memories from different situations may appear equally relevant if they involve recurring entities or user states. We refer to this failure as context collapse: memories lose the surrounding context needed to judge whether they provide valid evidence for the current query. To address this problem, we propose Contextual Reinstatement for Agentic Memory (RaMem), a framework that turns retrieved memory fragments into contextually verifiable evidence. RaMem operates through four coordinated stages: (i) evidence anchoring grounds each memory in its original episodic conditions, especially event time, mention time, session span, and participants; (ii) recall condition induction derives the evidence conditions implied by the query; (iii) validity-aware retrieval uses these conditions to prioritize context-compatible memories while retaining content-relevant candidates as fallback evidence; and (iv) context-preserved synthesis keeps the selected memories' structured context available to the generator. Experiments on long-term memory benchmarks show that RaMem consistently improves performance over strong memory baselines, with average F1 gains of more than 10% across several backbones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RaMem框架，通过四阶段机制（证据锚定、回忆条件归纳、有效性感知检索、上下文保留合成）解决LLM长期记忆中的"上下文坍塌"问题，在多个记忆基准上平均F1提升超10%。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在长时间交互中依赖长期记忆，但现有记忆系统仅关注持久性、紧凑性和可检索性，忽略了记忆作为当前查询有效证据的可验证性。当经验被压缩为可复用片段时，不同情境下的记忆因涉及相同实体或用户状态而显得同等相关，导致"上下文坍塌"——记忆丢失了判断其是否为当前查询提供有效证据所需的周边上下文。
AI.method: RaMem框架包含四个协调阶段：(i) 证据锚定——将每个记忆锚定到原始情境条件（事件时间、提及时间、会话跨度、参与者）；(ii) 回忆条件归纳——从查询中推导出所需的证据条件；(iii) 有效性感知检索——根据条件优先检索上下文兼容的记忆，同时保留内容相关候选作为备选证据；(iv) 上下文保留合成——将选定记忆的结构化上下文保留给生成器。
AI.result: 在长期记忆基准实验上，RaMem相比强基线方法持续提升性能，在多个骨干模型上平均F1提升超过10%。
AI.conclusion: RaMem通过将检索到的记忆片段转化为上下文可验证的证据，有效解决了上下文坍塌问题，为LLM智能体的长期记忆系统提供了更可靠的证据验证机制。

title: Parameterized Representations via Implicit Stochastic Modulation for High-Dimensional and High-Order Neural PDE Solvers
summary: Solving high-dimensional and high-order PDEs is challenged by the coupled growth of spatial dimensionality and derivative order. Recent stochastic derivative estimators reduce this cost by replacing full derivative tensors with randomized dimension or Taylor estimators, but they are mostly designed for fixed physical parameters and require retraining for each new parameter. We show that direct conditional parameterization of such solvers entangles physical parameters with the high-order automatic differentiation graph, causing extra memory growth and parameter-induced variance amplification. We propose Parameterized Representations via Implicit Stochastic Modulation (PRISM), a plug-and-play framework for parameterized high-dimensional and high-order stochastic neural PDE solvers. PRISM uses a hyper-generator to map physical parameters to affine modulators that scale and shift a purely spatial latent manifold, while keeping parameter branches value-connected but spatial-tangent-disconnected. This design preserves unbiased stochastic dimension and Taylor estimators, removes the parameter encoder from high-order spatial AD, and provides a variance-aware Lipschitz envelope over the parameter space. We prove parameterized unbiasedness, estimation-error bounds, and convergence under bounded stochastic variance. Experiments with PRISM-STDE and PRISM-SDGD on nonlinear parameterized PDEs show stable zero-shot generalization, reduced memory usage, and scalability up to 100,000 dimensions on a single GPU, with efficient low-rank SVD adaptation for unseen parameters.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个即插即用框架，通过隐式随机调制实现参数化高维高阶随机神经PDE求解器，避免传统条件参数化带来的内存增长和方差放大问题，支持零样本泛化并在单GPU上扩展到10万维。
AI.motivation: 现有随机导数估计器（如STDE、SDGD）求解高维高阶PDE时，针对固定物理参数设计，每更换参数需重新训练。直接的条件参数化会纠缠物理参数与高阶自动微分图，导致额外内存增长和参数诱导的方差放大。
AI.method: PRISM使用超生成器将物理参数映射为仿射调制器（缩放和移位），作用于纯空间潜流形；参数分支与空间分支保持值连接但空间切向断开，使参数编码器脱离高阶空间自动微分；结合随机维度估计器（STDE）和随机Taylor估计器（SDGD），并引入方差感知的Lipschitz包络。
AI.result: 在非线性参数化PDE上，PRISM-STDE和PRISM-SDGD实现稳定的零样本泛化，降低内存使用，单GPU可扩展至10万维；支持高效低秩SVD适应未见参数。
AI.conclusion: PRISM从理论上证明了参数化无偏性、估计误差界和有界随机方差下的收敛性，为参数化高维高阶随机神经PDE求解器提供了一种高效、可扩展的通用框架。

title: Same question, different history: language, national identity, and credit in large language models
comment: 27 pages (main text and Supplementary Information combined), 5 figures, 9 tables
summary:
Who invented the radio, Russia's Alexander Popov or Italy's Guglielmo Marconi? Was the telephone the achievement of Bell in the United States or Meucci in Italy? Does printing belong to China's Bi Sheng or Germany's Gutenberg? The answer depends not only on historical record but also on language and perspective.
  We analyse eleven widely used large language models across 21 disputed inventions and discoveries, evaluated in twelve languages and 75,896 responses. While models generally acknowledge that credit is contested, query language systematically affects which claimant is surfaced. Lower-status claimants are more likely to appear when questions are asked in their associated language, whereas dominant Anglophone figures remain stable across languages.
  These patterns persist after controlling for response length, model differences, historical prominence, and levels of national commemoration. Language thus acts as a switch that activates different national versions of the same history, producing systematically different national memories from the same question.
  We interpret this as evidence that large language models function as distributed systems of cultural memory, where language conditions which histories become visible, contributing to a computational form of banal nationalism.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型在不同语言下对争议性发明归属的回答存在系统性差异，语言像开关一样激活不同国家的历史版本，导致同一问题产生不同的国家记忆。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言模型在处理跨文化、跨语言的争议性历史问题时，是否受到语言和视角的影响，以及这种影响如何塑造历史记忆。
AI.method: 分析11个广泛使用的大型语言模型，覆盖21项有争议的发明和发现，在12种语言中进行评估，共收集75,896条回复。控制响应长度、模型差异、历史知名度和国家纪念程度等变量。
AI.result: 模型通常承认存在争议，但查询语言会系统性地影响哪个主张者被呈现。低地位的发明者在与其关联语言提问时更可能被提及，而占主导地位的英语圈人物在不同语言下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型作为文化记忆的分布式系统运行，语言条件决定了哪些历史变得可见，构成了一种计算形式的平庸民族主义。

title: AI Scientists as Engines of Discovery: A Case for Development within Reformed Institutions
summary: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) systems are beginning to assist, accelerate, and partially automate scientific discovery, performing tasks that span literature synthesis, code generation, data analysis, hypothesis proposal, and model criticism. We argue that this transition is qualitative rather than incremental, and that suitably designed multi-agent systems may evolve from passive computational tools into ``AI scientists'' that can expand the hypothesis-generating and verification capacity of science. Such systems must be developed and deployed within a scientific ecosystem fit for purpose: institutions must be redesigned for verification, accountability, interpretability, and dual-use safety. We sketch how multi-agent architectures, illustrated by the prototype framework \textit{Denario}, accelerate the discovery cycle and traverse model spaces beyond human reach; examine what this implies for authorship, peer review, and the enduring role of human scientists; and close with recommendations for governing AI as an epistemic actor rather than a mere instrument.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了从AI辅助工具到“AI科学家”的转变是质变而非量变，提出多智能体系统可在科学发现中承担假设生成与验证等核心任务，并以Denario框架为例说明其加速发现周期的能力，最后讨论了作者身份、同行评审及AI作为认知行动者的治理建议。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统已开始协助科学发现的各个环节，但这种帮助仍被视为工具层面的增量改进。作者认为这一转变是质的飞跃，需要重新审视AI在科学中的角色定位，以及如何设计与之相适应的制度框架。
AI.method: 通过概念论证与原型框架Denario的展示，分析多智能体架构如何加速科学发现周期并遍历远超人类能力的模型空间，同时从制度设计角度提出验证、问责、可解释性和双重用途安全等要求。
AI.result: 多智能体系统能够以远超人类的速度和广度探索假设空间，但这也要求科学机构在设计上进行根本性变革；Denario框架作为示例展示了这种加速如何实现。
AI.conclusion: AI应被视为科学中的认知行动者（epistemic actor）而非工具，需要建立新的治理框架、重新定义作者身份和同行评审流程，同时保持人类科学家的核心角色。

title: Drowning in Routine: Signal Dilution in Multi-Turn Agent Training
comment: Accepted at the FAGEN Workshop at ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea. 14 pages, 9 figures
summary: Multi-turn agents interleave consequential decisions with routine execution: some actions change the downstream return distribution, while others are necessary but reward-equivalent. The cost of trajectory-level credit assignment, often attributed to long horizons, is in fact governed by decision density $ρ$: the fraction of turns whose actions affect the return. When decision density is low, routine turns create signal dilution: they add gradient variance to trajectory-level estimators such as GRPO without adding expected signal. Under explicit assumptions, the resulting turn-level to trajectory-level signal-to-noise ratio scales as $ρ^{-1/2}$, provided critic error remains controlled. The same analysis identifies the complementary regime: at high decision density, trajectory-level methods can remain competitive while avoiding the cost of a critic. In a controlled environment where $ρ$ is exactly tunable, the predicted scaling is recovered with $R^2 = 0.999$, and the training-step gap widens significantly as $ρ\to 0$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"决策密度"ρ（影响回报的动作占比）是决定多轮智能体信用分配难度的关键因素。低决策密度下，常规轨迹级方法（如GRPO）面临信号稀释问题，信噪比按ρ^{-1/2}比例下降；高决策密度下，轨迹级方法保持竞争力且无需批评网络。实验以R²=0.999验证了该预测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常将多轮智能体信用分配的困难归因于长轨迹长度，但本文质疑这一观点，提出实际上是由"决策密度"而非单纯的时间步长主导。
AI.method: 形式化定义决策密度ρ（影响回报的动作占总动作的比例），理论分析低ρ下轨迹级估计器的信噪比缩放规律为ρ^{-1/2}，并在可精确调控ρ的受控环境中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 理论预测与实验吻合度极高（R²=0.999），当ρ→0时训练步数差距显著扩大；同时识别出高ρ下轨迹级方法可避免批评网络开销的互补区间。
AI.conclusion: 决策密度是比轨迹长度更根本的信用分配困难度量指标，为选择回合级vs.步骤级强化学习方法提供了理论指导。

title: When Does Intrinsic Self-Correction Help? A Task-Sensitive Analysis
summary: Intrinsic self-correction (SC) aims to improve large language model outputs by prompting a model to revisit its own initial answer without external feedback. Recent studies have questioned the reliability of this approach, showing that models often struggle to judge whether their initial responses are correct. In this work, we take a task-sensitive view of SC. Rather than asking whether it works in general, we examine settings where SC may operate through different mechanisms: verifying explicit constraints, revisiting a complex reasoning process, or providing a second opinion over competing strategies in word-game tasks. Across multiple benchmarks and models, we find that SC can yield consistent performance gains when the underlying task structure facilitates these modes of revision. These results suggest that SC is best understood as a task-dependent inference-time strategy whose usefulness depends on the role the revision stage can play in a given task, rather than as a uniformly reliable method for improving initial model outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出任务敏感视角下的内在自校正(SC)研究，发现SC在特定任务结构（验证显式约束、复现复杂推理、提供第二意见）下能带来一致性能提升，证明SC的有效性取决于任务本身而非通用方法。
AI.motivation: 近期研究质疑内在自校正的可靠性，表明模型难以判断自身初始回答的正确性。本文旨在探究SC在不同任务结构下的表现差异，而非笼统地判断其是否有效。
AI.method: 采用任务敏感视角，将SC机制分为三类：验证显式约束、复现复杂推理过程、在文字游戏任务中对竞争策略提供第二意见。在多个基准测试和模型上进行实验评估。
AI.result: 当底层任务结构有利于上述三种修正模式时，SC能够带来一致的性能提升。SC并非普遍可靠的方法，其效用取决于修正阶段在特定任务中能发挥的作用。
AI.conclusion: 内在自校正应被理解为一种任务依赖的推理时策略，其有用性取决于特定任务中修正阶段能扮演的角色，而非一种统一可靠的初始输出改进方法。

title: CLI-Universe: Towards Verifiable Task Synthesis Engine for Terminal Agents
summary: While recent LLM-based terminal agents have demonstrated promising capabilities, the scarcity of high-quality, executable training data remains a critical bottleneck. Existing synthesis pipelines typically scale by retrofitting surface-level artifacts into tasks, frequently yielding ambiguous instructions, shallow execution paths, and brittle tests that provide weak learning signals. To overcome this, we introduce CLI-Universe, a principled synthesis engine that constructs terminal-agent tasks. CLI-Universe generates candidate tasks by sampling combinations across a multi-dimensional capability taxonomy (domain, skill type, capability, and engineering pillar), then grounds each candidate through evidence-guided deep research over real-world technical materials. To ensure rigorous supervision, validated blueprints are instantiated into Dockerized environments and subjected to a multi-stage executable verification pipeline featuring rubric-gated test construction, hint-conditional filtering, and strict fail-to-pass checking. Across the full pipeline, from candidate generation to verification, approximately two-thirds of candidates are discarded, retaining only those that are genuine, verifiable, and non-trivially challenging. To validate our framework, we instantiate a highly distilled dataset of 6,000 trajectories called CLI-Universe-6K. Remarkably, fine-tuning Qwen3-32B on CLI-Universe-6K achieves 33.4% on Terminal-Bench 2.0. This sets a new state-of-the-art for models trained on open-source data at or below 32B parameters, and outperforms several models an order of magnitude larger, demonstrating the profound data efficiency of structured, high-fidelity synthesis.

AI.tldr: CLI-Universe 是一种基于原则的终端智能体训练数据合成引擎，通过多维能力分类、证据驱动深度调研和严格的多阶段可执行验证管道生成高质量任务。基于该框架蒸馏的 CLI-Universe-6K 数据集微调 Qwen3-32B 模型在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上达到 33.4% 的 SOTA，超越了多个参数量大一个数量级的模型，证明了结构化高保真合成数据的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的终端智能体受限于高质量、可执行训练数据的稀缺。现有合成管道通常通过表面伪影改造任务，产生模糊指令、浅层执行路径和脆弱的测试，提供弱学习信号，亟需一种能生成真实、可验证且具有非平凡挑战性训练数据的方法。
AI.method: CLI-Universe 包含三个核心阶段：(1) 候选任务生成：在多维能力分类（领域、技能类型、能力、工程支柱）上采样组合；(2) 证据驱动深度调研：基于真实技术材料进行调研以接地候选任务；(3) 可执行验证管道：将验证蓝图实例化为Docker环境，经过rubric门控测试构建、提示条件过滤和严格的fail-to-pass检查。整个管道丢弃约三分之二的候选任务。
AI.result: 蒸馏出包含6000条轨迹的 CLI-Universe-6K 数据集。微调 Qwen3-32B 在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上达到 33.4% 的准确率，创下基于开源数据训练的32B及以下参数模型的新SOTA，并超越多个参数量大一个数量级的模型。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、高保真的合成数据能够显著提升终端智能体的训练效率，即使远小于更大模型的参数量也能实现优异性能，表明高质量合成数据是突破数据瓶颈的关键方向。

title: Early-Exit Graph Neural Networks for Link Prediction
summary: Graph Neural Networks are great for link prediction in various network-like structures; however, the question of their speed/quality tradeoff has been barely studied. While in practice the time it takes to do inference matters little for small benchmarks, the latency does limit applicability in large-scale domains. In this work, we explore early-exiting strategies that can be applied to Graph Neural Networks to solve the problem of link-prediction faster. We use no auxiliary losses to enforce early exiting, allowing it to emerge as an implicit property of the architecture. We show that our method enables early exiting in several setups, moving the Pareto frontier on the HeaRT benchmark for GCN and SAS-GNN backbones. Our findings show that inference speed of GNNs on many link-prediction problems can be improved, while losing little, or even winning in terms of prediction quality. The code is available in our repository: https://github.com/knyazer/link_prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了图神经网络中用于链接预测的早期退出策略，在不使用辅助损失的情况下实现了更快的推理速度，并在多个设置下推动了Pareto前沿。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络在链接预测中表现优异，但推理速度与质量的权衡问题鲜有研究。实际应用中，延迟限制了模型在大规模场景下的可用性，因此需要探索加速推理的方法。
AI.method: 采用早期退出（early-exiting）策略，不使用任何辅助损失来强制早期退出，而是让早期退出作为架构的隐式属性自然涌现。
AI.result: 该方法在多个设置下实现了早期退出，在GCN和SAS-GNN骨干网络上推动了HeaRT基准测试的Pareto前沿。推理速度提升的同时，预测质量几乎没有损失甚至有所提升。
AI.conclusion: GNN在链接预测问题上的推理速度可以得到有效提升，且无需牺牲预测质量，早期退出是一种可行且高效的加速策略。

title: MuPPET: A Benchmark for Contextual Privacy of LLM Assistants in Multi-Party Conversations
summary: LLM agents are increasingly deployed in multi-party environments, handling sensitive personal data on behalf of individual users, for instance in group chats. When such an agent discloses private information, it reaches every group member at once. This risk is structurally harder to control than in one-to-one settings, as every piece of private information must be appropriate for every recipient in the group. Yet all existing contextual privacy benchmarks consider only single-interlocutor settings, leaving multi-party privacy risks unmeasured. We introduce MuPPET (Multi-Party Privacy Exposure Testing), a benchmark for contextual privacy in multi-party conversations. Our experiments show that models leak substantially more in multi-party settings than one-to-one evaluations suggest. Frontier models are vulnerable, and smaller open-weights models, often preferred for local deployment with sensitive data, even more so. Existing contextual privacy defences offer only partial protection, degrade utility, and do not resolve the underlying party-tracking problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuPPET基准测试，用于评估多轮对话中LLM代理的上下文隐私泄露问题。实验表明，多用户场景下的隐私泄露远比一对一设置严重，现有防御措施效果有限且会降低实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文隐私基准仅考虑单对话者场景，未衡量多用户环境下的隐私风险。在多用户群聊中，每一条私密信息必须对群内所有成员都合适，隐私控制难度远高于一对一对话。
AI.method: 提出MuPPET（多用户隐私暴露测试）基准，系统性地测试LLM在多用户对话中的上下文隐私泄露情况，并与一对一设置进行对比实验。
AI.result: 模型在多用户设置下的隐私泄露率显著高于一对一评估结果；前沿模型存在漏洞，小型开源模型（常被用于本地部署敏感数据）问题更严重；现有上下文隐私防御措施仅提供部分保护，且会降低模型实用性。
AI.conclusion: 多用户环境下的隐私保护面临更严峻的挑战，现有防御手段无法从根本上解决参与方追踪问题，需要开发专门针对多用户场景的隐私保护机制。

title: Agent-as-a-Router: Agentic Model Routing for Coding Tasks
comment: 39 pages, 21 figures, a living technical report with a living benchmark that continuously updates
summary: Real-world users typically have access to multiple Large Language Models (LLMs) from different providers, and these LLMs often excel at distinct domains, yet none dominate all. Consequently, routing each task to the most suitable model becomes critical for both performance and cost. Existing routers treat this as a static, one-off classification problem. However, we identify the performance bottleneck for these routers as information deficit: simply augmenting a vanilla LLM router with performance statistics at the task-dimension level yields a 15.3% relative gain, surpassing a heuristic router built on the same dimension-level priors. Motivated by this finding, we propose Agent-as-a-Router, a framework that formalizes routing as a C-A-F loop (Context->Action->Feedback->Context). It closes the information gap by accumulating execution-grounded experience during deployment. We instantiate this framework as ACRouter, composed of an Orchestrator, a Verifier, a Memory module, and introduce CodeRouterBench, an evaluation environment comprising ~10K task instances with verified scores from 8 frontier LLMs, enabling regret-based router comparison on streaming tasks. Experiments show that ACRouter achieves the lowest cumulative regret on in-distribution tasks and generalizes to out-of-distribution agentic-programming tasks, demonstrating that our routing framework actively closes the information gap. Codes and benchmarks are released at https://github.com/LanceZPF/agent-as-a-router.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent-as-a-Router框架，将路由问题形式化为C-A-F循环（上下文→动作→反馈→上下文），通过在执行过程中积累经验来填补信息缺口。实现的ACRouter系统由编排器、验证器、记忆模块组成，并配套发布CodeRouterBench评估环境。实验表明ACRouter在分布内任务上实现最低累积遗憾，并泛化到分布外任务。
AI.motivation: 现有路由方法将多LLM选择视为静态一次性分类问题，存在信息不足的性能瓶颈。作者发现仅向普通LLM路由器补充任务维度级别的性能统计数据即可获得15.3%的相对提升，说明信息缺口是制约路由性能的关键因素。
AI.method: 提出Agent-as-a-Router框架，将路由建模为C-A-F（上下文→动作→反馈→上下文）循环，通过执行过程中的反馈不断积累经验填补信息缺口。具体实现ACRouter包含三个核心模块：Orchestrator（编排器）、Verifier（验证器）、Memory（记忆模块），并构建CodeRouterBench评估环境（含约1万个任务实例，使用8个前沿LLM的已验证分数），采用遗憾值（regret）作为路由对比指标。
AI.result: ACRouter在分布内任务上实现最低累积遗憾，并能泛化到分布外的智能体编程任务。简单增强基线（补充任务维度统计信息）即可超越基于相同维度先验的启发式路由器15.3%。
AI.conclusion: 路由框架通过主动积累执行经验来填补信息缺口，能够持续提升多LLM路由的性能，优于现有的静态路由方法。

title: Beyond Time Series: Spatial Reasoning for Epidemic Forecasting via Multimodal Learning
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026), AI for Science Track
summary: Epidemic forecasting models typically rely on surveillance data reported over administrative regions, treating them as atomic units, thereby obscuring sub-regional spatial structure that shapes disease dynamics. We introduce a spatially structured multimodal epidemic forecasting setting that integrates region-level temporal surveillance data with spatially localized auxiliary signals that are misaligned in resolution and structure, reflecting realistic public health reporting constraints. Building on this formulation, we propose M-SPICE (Multimodal SPatIal Context for Epidemic Forecasting), a structure-aware spatiotemporal forecasting framework that performs joint reasoning over temporal disease dynamics and spatial context via attention-based multimodal fusion, allowing spatial signals to selectively condition temporal representations across forecast horizons. We evaluate our approach on real-world COVID-19, influenza, and influenza-like illness (ILI) forecasting tasks under realistic real-time evaluation protocols. Across all forecasting settings, our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multivariate time-series, multimodal, and epidemiological forecasting baselines while maintaining strong probabilistic forecasting performance. Finally, interpretability analyses reveal when, where, and how spatial signals are leveraged, highlighting settings in which purely temporal, region-aggregated models are most likely to fail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M-SPICE框架，通过多模态融合将区域级时间序列数据与空间局部信号结合，在COVID-19、流感和ILI预测任务上显著优于现有基线模型，并揭示了纯时间聚合模型的失败场景。
AI.motivation: 传统流行病预测模型将行政区域视为原子单元，忽略了区域内部空间结构对疾病传播动态的影响，且现有方法难以整合分辨率不匹配的多模态空间信号。
AI.method: 提出M-SPICE框架，构建空间结构化多模态流行病预测设置，通过基于注意力的多模态融合机制，在时间预测中动态整合空间上下文信号，实现时空联合推理。
AI.result: 在COVID-19、流感和ILI真实世界预测任务中，M-SPICE一致优于多变量时间序列、多模态和流行病学预测基线，并保持强概率预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 空间信号能有效提升流行病预测精度，纯时间聚合模型在空间异质性显著的场景中容易失效。

title: Judgment-Grounded Expansion for Peer Review Generation
summary: Automatic review generation is a promising direction for accelerating scientific progress. While most work adopts an end-to-end setup, its fully automated nature makes it less suitable for settings that demand accountability. To better balance automation and accountability, we formalize judgment-grounded expansion, a human-AI collaboration mode where a reviewer provides an evaluative claim and the system expands it into review comment candidate(s). We model it as a structured generate-check-refine process and conduct a user study to collect human-model interaction data. We study two practical challenges for judgment-grounded expansion: scalable evaluation and candidate set curation. We develop methods to simulate the process for large-scale evaluation, and show that conformal prediction is well suited to balancing candidate set size and target coverage. Our work establishes judgment-grounded expansion as a concrete task and provides empirical and methodological foundations for the design of future collaborative review generation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"判断引导扩展"的人机协作模式，用于自动生成学术评审意见。该模式通过结构化的生成-检查-优化流程，在自动化与问责制之间取得平衡，并利用共形预测来平衡候选集大小与覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 现有全自动评审生成方法虽然高效，但缺乏问责机制，难以在需要人工负责的场景中应用。因此，本文旨在设计一种人机协作模式，在保留自动化的同时确保评审的可追溯性和可问责性。
AI.method: 形式化了"判断引导扩展"（judgment-grounded expansion）任务，即评审者提供评价性主张，系统将其扩展为完整的评审意见候选。采用结构化的生成-检查-优化流程，并通过用户研究收集人机交互数据。针对两个实际挑战（可扩展评估和候选集策展），设计了模拟大规模评估的方法，并应用共形预测来平衡候选集大小与目标覆盖率。
AI.result: 通过用户研究收集了人机交互数据，证明了所提出的生成-检查-优化流程的有效性；共形预测方法能较好地平衡候选集大小与目标覆盖率，为大规模评估提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将判断引导扩展确立为一个具体任务，为未来协作式评审生成系统的设计提供了经验和方法论基础，在人机协作的自动评审生成方向迈出了重要一步。

title: ThermoLLM: Thermodynamics-Aware HVAC Control with Spatial-Semantic Knowledge Graph
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to ACM SIGSPATIAL 2026
summary: Multi-zone HVAC control is a spatial decision problem in which indoor thermal evolution and control decisions depend not only on outdoor conditions and internal heat gains but also on zone layout, physical adjacency, and delayed thermal interactions across the building. Recent LLM-based HVAC controllers have shown that prompt-based control is feasible. However, these methods typically rely on task descriptions, observation values, short textual feedback, or unstructured retrieval, which limits their ability to reason about zone coupling, thermal response, and building dynamics. This paper presents a thermodynamics-aware LLM control framework for a five-zone EnergyPlus building simulation. The controller is grounded in a physics-informed spatial knowledge graph derived from Brick-style building semantics and linked with recent interaction history. At each control step, the model receives the current building state, graph-structured spatial context, and recent environment-controller history, enabling it to make decisions that reflect both building structure and short-term thermal evolution. We evaluate the framework against standard control baselines and several LLM-based alternatives. Results show that the proposed approach achieves the best overall energy-comfort trade-off and the lowest PMV violation while maintaining energy-efficient operation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于热力学感知的LLM控制框架，利用物理信息空间知识图（源自Brick语义）和交互历史，在五区域EnergyPlus建筑仿真中实现多区域HVAC控制，在能量-舒适度权衡和PMV违规方面优于传统基线和其他LLM方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的LLM HVAC控制器依赖于任务描述、观测值、短文本反馈或非结构化检索，难以对区域耦合、热响应和建筑动态进行推理，限制了其在多区域HVAC控制中的性能。
AI.method: 构建了一个热力学感知的LLM控制框架，该控制器基于来自Brick风格建筑语义的物理信息空间知识图，并与近期交互历史链接。在每个控制步骤中，模型接收当前建筑状态、图结构化的空间上下文和最近的环境-控制器历史，从而做出反映建筑结构和短期热演变的决策。
AI.result: 在五区域EnergyPlus建筑仿真中，该框架在能量-舒适度权衡方面达到最佳整体表现，PMV违规最低，同时保持节能运行。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息空间知识图与交互历史的结合能显著提升LLM在多区域HVAC控制中的空间推理和动力学建模能力，实现更优的能量-舒适度折衷。

title: Gated MLPs as Symmetry-Broken Rank-1 Bilinear Attention
summary: We show that the conventional gated MLP can be viewed as a rank-1 approximation to a bilinear attention mechanism with two distinct factors corresponding to the query and the key. We further show that moving the nonlinearity onto one factor breaks the exchange symmetry between the two factors and, for non-homogeneous activations, the inverse-scaling symmetry as well. This perspective may help explain why gated MLPs are effective in practice and inform the design of future architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了门控MLP可视为双线性注意力机制的秩-1近似，其中两个因子分别对应查询和键。将非线性激活施加于一个因子会打破两个因子之间的交换对称性，对于非齐次激活函数还会破坏逆缩放对称性，这有助于解释门控MLP的有效性并指导未来架构设计。
AI.motivation: 理解门控MLP为何在实践中有效，并为其有效性提供理论解释，同时为未来架构设计提供指导。
AI.method: 从数学上证明门控MLP是双线性注意力机制的秩-1近似（两个因子分别对应查询和键），并分析非线性激活放置位置对对称性的影响。
AI.result: 门控MLP等价于一种简化的注意力机制，且非线性放置方式会破坏交换对称性和逆缩放对称性。
AI.conclusion: 这一视角为门控MLP的有效性提供了理论依据，并可能启发新的架构设计思路。

title: Scaling LLM Knowledge Boundaries via Distribution-Optimized Synthesis
summary: Knowledge injection via synthetic data is crucial for enhancing Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current synthesis methods simply stop at preset token counts or fixed data ratios, lacking awareness of knowledge distribution. This results in some domains being sparse while others are redundant, limiting LLM knowledge boundaries. We revisit knowledge injection from a distribution perspective and hypothesize that an optimal knowledge distribution exists to maximize knowledge boundary expansion. We propose KDoS (Knowledge Distribution-optimized Synthesis), a framework that introduces knowledge density to drive synthesis through a three-stage feedback mechanism, shifting from blind generation to distribution-optimized synthesis. We construct Wikipedia-based synthetic data with varying knowledge distributions and conduct experiments on models from 0.6B to 16B (Qwen, Ling, LLaMA) and data scales from 1B to 5B tokens. Our key findings are: (1) an optimal knowledge distribution consistently maximizes boundary expansion; (2) this distribution is stable across backbones and scales; (3) KDoS outperforms baselines across six knowledge benchmarks. Our work offers a new perspective and practical framework for synthetic data-driven knowledge injection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KDoS框架，从知识分布角度优化合成数据的生成，通过知识密度驱动的三阶段反馈机制替代盲目生成，发现存在最优知识分布能最大化LLM知识边界扩展，且在多种模型和数据规模下具有一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前合成数据方法仅在预设token数量或固定数据比例上停止生成，缺乏对知识分布的感知，导致某些领域稀疏而另一些冗余，限制了LLM知识边界的扩展。作者假设存在一个最优知识分布能最大化知识边界扩展。
AI.method: 提出KDoS（Knowledge Distribution-optimized Synthesis）框架，引入知识密度概念，通过三阶段反馈机制将合成数据从盲目生成转变为分布优化合成。构建基于Wikipedia的不同知识分布的合成数据，在0.6B到16B参数模型（Qwen、Ling、LLaMA）和1B到5B token数据规模上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 三个关键发现：(1)存在最优知识分布能持续最大化知识边界扩展；(2)该分布在不同骨干网络和模型规模上保持稳定；(3)KDoS在六个知识基准上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种新的视角（知识分布优化）和实用框架（KDoS）用于合成数据驱动的知识注入，证明了从分布角度优化合成数据生成的有效性。

title: Intent-Governed Tool Authorization for AI Agents
summary: AI agents increasingly act through external tools: they read private data, construct structured payloads, submit write requests, export records, and coordinate workflows across application boundaries. Existing authorization mechanisms usually ask whether an integration credential, app, or token can call a tool. That question is necessary but incomplete. A tool call can be authorized by static credentials and still be unjustified by the user's current request. For example, a credential that can read and export records should not expose export authority when the user only asked for a bounded summary, and a model-generated delete call should not execute merely because the integration has a delete scope. This paper proposes Intent-Governed Access Control (IGAC), a server-side authorization layer that treats the user's expressed intent as a monotone, auditable policy attribute for AI-agent tool use. IGAC introduces intent certificates, session-scoped policy narrowing, intent-aware manifest filtering, and intent-tool-payload consistency checks. The central invariant is that user intent may only reduce the authority granted by static integration policy; it never expands scopes, data policy, tenant boundaries, or review requirements. We map IGAC onto OpenPort, an existing governance substrate that already implements authorization-dependent discovery, scope and ABAC-style policy checks, draft-first writes, preflight impact binding, state-witness checks, idempotency, stable reason codes, and audit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出意图驱动的访问控制（IGAC），一种服务器端授权机制，将用户意图作为AI代理工具调用的单调、可审计策略属性，通过意图证书、会话级策略收紧、意图感知清单过滤和一致性检查，确保意图只能缩减而非扩展静态集成策略授予的权限。
AI.motivation: 现有授权机制仅验证集成凭证、应用或令牌能否调用工具，但无法判断工具调用是否与用户当前请求的意图一致。例如，拥有读取和导出权限的凭证不应在用户仅请求摘要时暴露导出权限，模型生成的删除调用不应仅因集成拥有删除范围而执行。
AI.method: IGAC作为服务器端授权层，引入意图证书、会话级策略收紧、意图感知清单过滤和意图-工具-载荷一致性检查。核心不变量是用户意图只能缩减静态集成策略授予的权限，绝不扩展作用域、数据策略、租户边界或审查要求。将IGAC映射到OpenPort治理框架。
AI.result: IGAC实现了意图驱动的细粒度访问控制，确保工具调用在静态授权通过的前提下，还需与用户意图一致，从而防止权限滥用。
AI.conclusion: IGAC为AI代理工具使用提供了更安全的授权层，解决了静态凭证授权无法感知用户当前意图的问题，是现有授权机制的必要补充。

title: Residue-Level Attributions in Protein Language Models Do Not Recover Allergen Epitopes
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop (peer-reviewed)
summary: Deep allergenicity classifiers are increasingly used in safety screening of novel foods, and recent protein language models have substantially improved protein-level allergenicity prediction. However, whether their explanations capture biologically meaningful information remains unclear. We introduce an epitope-grounded residue-level benchmark for quantitatively evaluating attribution faithfulness in protein allergenicity models. Across frozen ESM-2, multi-task ESM-2, and DeepPlantAllergy, protein-level classification was robust, yet classification-head explanation signals did not significantly exceed random in their residue-level alignment with annotated epitopes across AUROC, AUPRC, and Precision@k. Integrated Gradients identified residues that were functionally important to the model, but not overlapping annotated epitopes. Saturation mutagenesis further suggested classifiers may rely on physicochemical and compositional sequence features rather than epitope-specific mechanisms. Residue-level importance signals should therefore not be interpreted as immunological explanations for safety screening or hypoallergen design without quantitative validation. Code available: https://github.com/Jeffateth/XAllergen2.0-paper

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于表位注释的残基级基准，用于定量评估蛋白质过敏原性分类器的归因忠实度。研究发现，尽管ESM-2、多任务ESM-2和DeepPlantAllergy在蛋白质层面的分类表现稳健，但其分类头的解释信号在残基级上与注释表位的对齐程度并未显著优于随机水平，表明这些模型依赖的理论化学和组成性序列特征而非表位特异性机制，因此残基级重要性信号不应被直接解释为免疫学解释。
AI.motivation: 深度过敏原性分类器越来越多地用于新型食品的安全性筛查，且近期蛋白质语言模型显著提升了蛋白质层面的过敏原性预测性能。然而，这些模型的解释是否捕捉到生物学上有意义的信息尚不清楚。为此，作者希望建立一个定量基准来评估模型归因的忠实度。
AI.method: 引入了一个基于表位注释的残基级基准，对ESM-2（冻结版）、多任务ESM-2和DeepPlantAllergy三种模型进行评估，使用AUROC、AUPRC和Precision@k等指标衡量残基级解释信号与注释表位的对齐程度，并采用Integrated Gradients和饱和突变分析进一步探究模型依赖的特征。
AI.result: 蛋白质层面的分类性能稳健，但分类头解释信号在残基级上与注释表位的对齐程度未显著优于随机水平。Integrated Gradients识别的残基虽对模型功能重要，但与注释表位不重叠。饱和突变分析表明分类器可能依赖理化性质和组成性序列特征，而非表位特异性机制。
AI.conclusion: 残基级重要性信号不应被直接解释为用于安全性筛查或低过敏原设计的免疫学解释，除非经过定量验证。

title: Towards Root Memories: Benchmarking and Enhancing Implicit Logical Memory Retrieval for Personalized LLMs
summary: Memory systems are essential for personalized Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing retrieval methods in these systems primarily rely on semantic similarity, potentially missing logically critical memories with limited semantic overlap. Current benchmarks remain inadequate for evaluating this problem. To address this gap, we construct IMLogic, the first high-quality benchmark targeting implicit logical memory retrieval in long-dialogue scenarios. Motivated by this challenge, we introduce root memory, a structured, decision-preserving representation that distills reusable personalized logic from long-term user histories. We then propose RootMem, a plug-and-play framework that first distills raw histories into structured root memories and then uses an LLM-based router to activate logically relevant ones, complementing semantic retrieval with personalized decision logic. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RootMem significantly outperforms the strongest retrieval baselines and consistently boosts the accuracy of existing memory agents. Our benchmark and codes will be available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/IMLogic-DBB3.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型记忆系统中现有检索方法仅依赖语义相似性、难以召回逻辑相关但语义重叠少的记忆这一问题，构建了首个面向隐式逻辑记忆检索的高质量基准IMLogic，并提出RootMem框架，通过将用户历史蒸馏为结构化的“根记忆”（root memory），并利用基于LLM的路由器激活逻辑相关的记忆，显著提升了检索准确率和下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统的检索方法主要依赖语义相似度，但逻辑上关键的记忆往往与当前查询语义重叠较少，导致检索遗漏；且缺乏专门评估此类逻辑记忆检索能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建IMLogic基准（首个面向隐式逻辑记忆检索的高质量长对话场景基准）；提出root memory（结构化的、保留决策逻辑的表示）及RootMem框架（即插即用，先将原始历史蒸馏为结构化根记忆，再通过LLM路由激活逻辑相关的根记忆，与语义检索互补）。
AI.result: RootMem显著优于最强的检索基线，并能持续提升现有记忆代理的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 引入结构化逻辑记忆表示和混合检索策略是提升LLM记忆系统效果的有效方向。

title: When Agents Commit Too Soon: Diagnosing Premature Commitment in LLM Agents
comment: 22 pages, 16 figures Primary: cs.AI Secondary: cs.CL
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents can fail quietly: they settle on one reading of the evidence early, then spend the rest of the run defending it. We call this premature commitment.
