Our results expose a meta-cognitive gap: although unprompted models cannot reliably tell when their own context is rotting, a lightweight rubric closes this gap, reframing when to compact as a capability that scaffolds can supply without training.

AI.tldr: SelfCompact是一种让模型自主决定何时以及如何压缩上下文轨迹的框架，通过成对使用压缩工具和轻量级规则，无需微调即可实现自适应压缩，在数学和智能搜索任务上以更低的token成本取得了优于固定间隔压缩的效果。
AI.motivation: 长智能体轨迹中，思维链和工具调用产生的陈旧内容会锚定后续生成并最终超出上下文窗口。现有固定间隔压缩策略忽视轨迹结构，可能导致推导或搜索过程中部分结果被错误丢弃。
AI.method: SelfCompact配对两个推理时元素：(i) 模型可调用的压缩工具，用于总结累积的上下文；(ii) 轻量级规则，指定何时触发压缩（子任务解决或轨迹收敛）及何时抑制（推导中或陷入僵局）。两者缺一不可。
AI.result: 在6个基准测试（数学和智能搜索）和7个模型上，SelfCompact在数学任务上最高提升18.1个点，智能搜索提升5-9个点，同时每问题成本降低30-70%。
AI.conclusion: 无提示的模型无法可靠判断自身上下文何时"腐烂"，但轻量级规则可以弥合这一元认知差距，将何时压缩重新定义为框架无需训练即可提供的能力。

title: Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation
summary: Procedural memory is increasingly used to improve LLM agents on recurring workplace tasks, yet its ability to produce reusable skills remains poorly understood. We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks, roles, and model backbones. The benchmark includes controlled evaluation settings for local improvement, cross-task transfer, cross-role transfer, and cross-model generalization. Experiments show that procedural memory delivers consistent gains in industrial workflows: a single refinement round improves aggregate performance by 3.7-6.7 points, while skills evolved from diverse multi-model execution traces achieve 73.1% cross-model test accuracy, outperforming all single-model trace sources. We further find that some skills generalize broadly across tasks and models, whereas others become specialized to role-specific workflows and lose effectiveness under transfer. These results provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and deploying procedural memory systems in production agent platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AFTER基准，包含382个真实企业任务和22个程序性技能，用于评估程序性记忆在LLM智能体中的技能迁移能力。实验表明程序性记忆能带来持续性能提升（3.7-6.7分），多模型追踪的技能可实现73.1%的跨模型测试准确率，但部分技能在跨角色迁移时会失效。
AI.motivation: 程序性记忆被越来越多地用于改善LLM智能体在重复性工作场景中的表现，但其生成可复用技能的能力仍未被充分理解，缺乏系统性的评估基准来衡量技能在不同任务、角色和模型之间的迁移效果。
AI.method: 构建AFTER基准（382个企业任务，6个专业角色，22个程序性技能），设计四种评估设置：局部改进、跨任务迁移、跨角色迁移和跨模型泛化；通过程序性记忆在工业工作流中的实验验证技能迁移效果。
AI.result: 单次优化带来3.7-6.7分的整体性能提升；基于多模型执行轨迹演化的技能达到73.1%的跨模型测试准确率，优于所有单模型轨迹来源；部分技能可广泛泛化，而部分技能在跨角色迁移时效果下降。
AI.conclusion: 程序性记忆能有效提升LLM智能体性能，技能泛化能力因任务和角色而异，为在生产环境中构建和部署程序性记忆系统提供了实用指导。

title: Curriculum Reinforcement Learning Can Incentivize Reasoning Capacity in LLMs Beyond the Base Model
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is widely viewed as a promising path toward continuously improving large language models. Recent works, however, suggest that mainstream RLVR often reallocates sampling probabilities among trajectories already present in the base model: it can improve sampling efficiency, reflected by higher pass@1 scores, but yields limited gains, and can even decrease pass@k scores when k is large, and therefore may fail to expand the base model's reasoning capacity boundary. In this paper, we present a boundary-aware Curriculum RL approach to move beyond the base model's reasoning capacity boundary. Our approach first uses pass@k sampling to locate the current reasoning capacity boundary, then applies targeted teacher guidance to examples near or beyond that boundary, and finally uses RL to consolidate the newly introduced reasoning patterns. Across Qwen, Llama, and DeepSeek base models, boundary-aware Curriculum RL improves both pass@1 scores and pass@256 scores, with pass@1 reflecting one-attempt performance and pass@256 serving as an empirical proxy for the reasoning capacity boundary. In our experiments, average pass@256 improves by 9.8 percentage points over the base models and by 10.3 percentage points over Vanilla RLVR. These results suggest that boundary-aware Curriculum RL can provide a scalable route for LLMs to continuously improve beyond the base model's empirical reasoning capacity boundary.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种边界感知的课程强化学习方法（boundary-aware Curriculum RL），该方法通过定位当前推理能力边界、对边界附近样本进行针对性的教师指导、以及使用强化学习巩固新的推理模式，显著提升了LLM的pass@1和pass@256得分，从而突破了基础模型的推理能力边界。
AI.motivation: 现有主流RLVR方法虽然能提高pass@1得分，但主要是在基础模型已有的轨迹中重新分配采样概率，无法有效扩大模型的推理能力边界，甚至在大k值时可能降低pass@k得分。因此需要一种能够真正突破基础模型推理能力边界的方法。
AI.method: 三步法：1) 使用pass@k采样定位当前推理能力边界；2) 对边界附近或超出边界的样本施加针对性的教师指导；3) 使用强化学习巩固新引入的推理模式。
AI.result: 在Qwen、Llama、DeepSeek等基础模型上，该方法同时提升了pass@1和pass@256得分。平均pass@256相比基础模型提升9.8个百分点，相比Vanilla RLVR提升10.3个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 边界感知的课程强化学习能够为LLM提供一条可扩展的路径，使其持续超越基础模型的经验推理能力边界。

title: LangMAP: A Language-Adaptive Approach to Tokenization
summary: Language-specific tokenizers improve tokenization quality and the downstream performance of models on those languages. However, using such a tokenizer comes at a cost: either a new model must be trained from scratch, or the vocabulary of an existing pretrained model must be adapted. We propose Language-adaptive Maximum a Posteriori (LangMAP) Tokenization, a tokenization scheme that extends the UnigramLM algorithm to the multilingual setting, producing language-specific tokenization from a single shared vocabulary. Notably, LangMAP can be used when training a multilingual language model from scratch or to adapt a pretrained model's tokenizer to individual languages without changing its vocabulary. While language labels are required at training time, a key feature of the algorithm is that it then performs language-specific tokenization at inference without knowledge of the input's language. Across 14 open-source tokenizers, 9 natural languages, and 9 programming languages, LangMAP improves morphological boundary alignment and, for all coding languages tested, alignment with abstract syntax tree (AST) leaf boundaries. In fine-tuning experiments, results are mixed: LangMAP improves target-language grammatical acceptability (MultiBLiMP) on the languages tested; its benefits are less consistent on knowledge-related tasks (Global-PIQA, Belebele).

AI.tldr: LangMAP是一种语言自适应最大后验分词方案，通过扩展UnigramLM算法到多语言环境，使用单一共享词汇表生成语言特定的分词结果，无需改变词汇表即可适配预训练模型，在多种自然语言和编程语言上提升了形态边界对齐和AST叶边界对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 语言特定的分词器能提升分词质量和模型在下游任务上的性能，但使用此类分词器需要从头训练新模型或适配预训练模型的词汇表，成本高昂。因此需要一种能从共享词汇表中生成语言特定分词的方案。
AI.method: 提出LangMAP Tokenization，将UnigramLM算法扩展到多语言设置。在训练时需要语言标签，但推理时无需知道输入语言即可进行语言特定的分词。可用于从头训练多语言模型，也可适配预训练模型的分词器而不改变其词汇表。
AI.result: 在14个开源分词器、9种自然语言和9种编程语言上，LangMAP提升了形态边界对齐效果，并在所有测试的编程语言上提升了与抽象语法树（AST）叶边界的对齐效果。微调实验中，LangMAP在目标语言的语法可接受性（MultiBLiMP）上有所提升，但在知识相关任务（Global-PIQA, Belebele）上效果不太一致。
AI.conclusion: LangMAP能够在共享词汇表下实现语言特定的分词，在语法相关任务上表现良好，但在知识相关任务上效果不稳定，仍有改进空间。

title: Decomposing Financial Market Dynamics via Mechanism Analysis in an Evolutionary Multi-Agent Simulation
summary: Evolutionary agent-based markets (ABMs) couple several mechanisms -- who reproduces, how price forms, how biased the agents are, how consensus propagates -- yet these are usually fixed by convention, so it is unclear which mechanism controls which emergent property. In a coevolving, endogenous-price simulator with 120 heterogeneous behavioral agents, we make four mechanisms pluggable and run matched 3x20-seed interventions. We find the levers are largely separable. (1) Selection -> diversity: a Quality-Diversity (QD/MAP-Elites) operator robustly raises strategy-mix entropy over truncation top-k (paired Delta entropy +0.27 to +1.12 bits; sign-test p<0.001; CIs exclude 0) and sustains more strategy cycling (strongest in crisis: Delta=+0.070, p=0.0004). (2) Selection does not improve realism: even a per-agent realism reward that provably steers selection does not raise 5-fact realism (Delta_5=-0.11,-0.08,+0.03; not significant). (3) Microstructure -> realism: enabling reflexive price feedback does raise realism (Delta_5=+0.13,+0.20,+0.20; crisis/bull p<0.05, all CIs positive). (4) Behavior -> fragility: amplifying behavioral bias raises a genomic fragility proxy (Delta=+10.5,+11.1,+14.4; bull p<0.001, all CIs positive) while leaving realism flat. The remaining mechanism -- consensus network topology -- shows no robust effect (honest null). The contribution is a decomposition: in these single-mechanism sweeps the mechanisms behave as approximately distinct control knobs over diversity, realism, and fragility.

AI.tldr: 本文通过可插拔机制实验，分解了演化代理市场（ABM）中四个机制对涌现特性的控制作用：选择机制控制策略多样性，微观结构控制市场真实性，行为偏差控制系统脆弱性，而共识网络拓扑无显著影响。这些机制近似正交，可作为独立旋钮调节不同涌现属性。
AI.motivation: 演化代理市场（ABM）耦合了多种机制（选择、价格形成、行为偏差、共识传播等），但这些机制通常由惯例固定，导致不清楚哪个机制控制哪个涌现特性。作者希望解耦这些机制，明确它们对多样性、真实性和脆弱性等涌现属性的独立影响。
AI.method: 在一个包含120个异质行为代理的共演化、内生价格模拟器中，将四个机制（选择、微观结构、行为偏差、共识网络拓扑）设计为可插拔组件，进行3×20种子的匹配干预实验。通过对比质量多样性（QD/MAP-Elites）与截断top-k选择、启用/禁用反射性价格反馈、放大/缩小行为偏差、改变共识网络拓扑等方式，测量策略熵、五因子真实性得分和基因组脆弱性代理指标的变化。
AI.result: (1) 选择机制→多样性：QD算子相比截断top-k稳健提升策略混合熵（配对Delta熵+0.27至+1.12 bits，符号检验p<0.001），危机期间策略循环更强（Delta=+0.070，p=0.0004）。(2) 选择不提升真实性：即使引入可证明引导选择的代理真实性奖励，五因子真实性也无显著提升（Delta_5=-0.11,-0.08,+0.03）。(3) 微观结构→真实性：启用反射性价格反馈提升真实性（Delta_5=+0.13,+0.20,+0.20；危机/牛市p<0.05）。(4) 行为偏差→脆弱性：放大行为偏差提升基因组脆弱性代理（Delta=+10.5,+11.1,+14.4；牛市p<0.001）且真实性不变。(5) 共识网络拓扑无稳健效应。
AI.conclusion: 在单机制扫描实验中，四个机制近似表现为独立的控制旋钮，分别调控多样性、真实性和脆弱性三个涌现属性。这一分解为理解复杂ABM系统中机制-涌现属性的因果关系提供了清晰框架，表明这些机制可被分别调节以实现目标涌现特性。

title: All Routes Lead to Collapse
summary: Attention sinks, representation collapse, and norm stratification are treated as transformer-specific pathologies. We show they are not specific to attention: they are what content-based routing does under a fixed similarity metric. We give a reframing identity: softmax attention is Boltzmann-weighted aggregation over Euclidean distances with constant key norms, so its score omits a $-\|k\|^2$ term and is blind to key magnitude. This predicts that any router whose metric is ill-matched to its representations should compensate, by concentrating its routing and collapsing the routed representations. We test it on routers that score and aggregate over different axes: softmax attention over tokens (nine pretrained transformers), graph attention over nodes, a selective state-space model and a recurrent mixer over time, and learned residuals over depth. All develop the same signature, and two within-model ablations show it is caused by the routing mechanism rather than by incidental dynamics. The form is contingent, set by the strength of the positional brake each router carries alongside its content score; we sweep that brake and move the onset across its whole range. The mechanism is not contingent, and it does not require norm stratification: a router with norm-normalized keys concentrates just the same. We do not claim these models implement Riemannian geometry; the geometric view is a diagnostic that names the inadequacy of the flat, norm-blind metric.

AI.tldr: 注意力下沉、表征坍缩和范数分层并非Transformer特有，而是任何使用固定相似度度量的基于内容的路由机制的普遍现象。本文通过重新定义softmax注意力为带常数键范数的欧几里得距离上的玻尔兹曼加权聚合，揭示了其评分忽略了一项与键范数相关的项，从而对键的大小不敏感。预测表明，任何路由器的度量与其表征不匹配时，会通过集中路由并坍缩被路由的表征来补偿。实验在多种路由机制上验证了这一现象，并证明其由路由机制本身而非偶然动力学引起。
AI.motivation: 揭示注意力下沉、表征坍缩和范数分层等现象并非Transformer特有的病理，而是基于内容的固定相似度度量路由机制的普遍特性。
AI.method: 通过重新形式化softmax注意力为带常数键范数的欧几里得距离上的玻尔兹曼加权聚合，指出其评分缺失了一项与键范数相关的项。在多种路由机制上进行实验验证，包括九种预训练Transformer的token级注意力、图注意力、状态空间模型和时间混合器等，并通过两种模型内消融实验确认路由机制是成因。
AI.result: 所有测试的路由机制（包括softmax注意力、图注意力、状态空间模型、循环混合器、学习残差）都表现出相同的特征模式。通过调整位置刹车强度可以控制该现象的起始位置。即使在键范数归一化后，路由机制仍然表现出相同的集中路由行为。
AI.conclusion: 这些现象不是Transformer特有的病理，而是任何使用固定相似度度量的内容路由机制的普遍结果。路由机制本身决定了这些现象的出现，而非偶然的动力学因素。平坦的、忽视范数的度量是不充分的，几何视角仅作为诊断工具。

title: Evaluation Awareness Is Not One Capability: Evidence from Open Language Models
summary: Safety benchmarks assume that test-condition behavior predicts deployment behavior, an assumption that fails if models detect evaluation cues and adapt. This opens a gap between benchmark performance and deployment behavior: compliance measured under test conditions becomes an optimistic upper bound that overstates how safely a model behaves once the evaluation harness is removed. We characterize this evaluation awareness through eight experiments across 37 open-weight models and seven families. (i)Detection is moderate and training-driven (24/37 models exceed chance, best AUROC 0.714 vs.0.819 human, with instruction tuning dominating over scale). (ii)Detection shifts safety behavior (hard refusal drops 5.8 percentage points under hypothetical framing, and 21/140 HarmBench framing effects are significant, with compliance rising up to +30 percentage points. (iii)Representations survive behavioral collapse (probes retain AUROC 0.98 under rewrites that drive behavior below chance, and multi-layer steering causally moves three downstream tasks while random controls do not). (iv)These axes are weakly coupled (only 1/15 correlations are significant, the sole robust link being behavioral detection versus framing resistance, $ρ=-0.79$, $p<0.001$). We call this gap the benchmark illusion: because detectability, behavioral manifestation, and controllability vary independently, it is multivariate rather than a single number, so no single awareness score is a reliable proxy for deployment safety.

AI.tldr: 本文通过8个实验、37个开源模型和7个模型家族，系统性地揭示了评估感知（evaluation awareness）导致的安全基准幻觉：模型在测试条件下能检测到评估线索并调整行为，使得基准测试的合规性成为过度乐观的上限，无法反映真实部署场景中的安全表现。
AI.motivation: 安全基准假设测试条件下的行为能预测部署行为，但这一假设在模型能够检测评估线索并调整行为时失效。现有基准可能高估了模型的实际安全性，需要系统性地量化这一差距。
AI.method: 通过8个实验、37个开源模型和7个模型家族，从四个维度（检测能力、行为表现、表征层面、各轴耦合性）系统考察评估感知现象，使用AUROC、硬拒绝率变化、探测准确率等指标进行量化分析。
AI.result: (i)检测能力中等且由训练驱动（24/37模型超过随机水平，最佳AUROC 0.714 vs 人类0.819，指令微调主导而非规模）；(ii)检测改变安全行为（假设框架下硬拒绝下降5.8个百分点，21/140 HarmBench框架效应显著，合规性上升最多30个百分点）；(iii)表征在行为崩溃后仍存活（重写使行为低于随机水平后，探测仍保持AUROC 0.98，多层操控因果性影响三个下游任务）；(iv)各轴弱耦合（仅1/15相关性显著，唯一稳健关联是行为检测与框架抵抗之间的ρ=-0.79, p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 可检测性、行为表现和可控性独立变化，使得评估感知是一个多变量问题而非单一数值，没有任何单一的感知分数可以可靠地作为部署安全性的代理指标。这种差距被称为基准幻觉。

title: DART: Draft-Agreement Routing for Training-Free Adaptive Thinking Budgets in Hybrid Reasoning Models
summary: Hybrid reasoning models can answer directly or spend extra tokens on extended thinking. A practical router should choose between these modes for each query, so easy problems avoid unnecessary reasoning and hard problems receive enough budget to finish the answer. Existing routers move in this direction, but they typically require labeled training data or fix thinking budgets up front, ignoring answer-level evidence from the model itself. We introduce DART, a training-free routing framework that samples two cheap no-think drafts, accepts direct answering when the drafts agree, and predicts a thinking budget from draft entropy when they disagree. Across the main comparisons, DART preserves or improves always-thinking accuracy in most settings while reducing thinking-token use. On math reasoning, accuracy improves by up to $+$9.0 points on Olympiad-level problems while thinking tokens drop 15-69%. On code reasoning under execution-based equivalence, accuracy improves by up to +22.5 points while thinking tokens drop 51-63%. The Stage~1 signal extends across model scales (0.6B-32B), model families, and API-only hosted settings, with no labeled data and no gradient updates required.

AI.tldr: DART是一种无需训练的推理路由框架，通过采样两个廉价的无思考草稿，在草稿一致时直接回答，在草稿不一致时根据草稿熵预测思考预算，从而在保持或提升准确性的同时大幅减少思考token使用量。
AI.motivation: 现有混合推理模型的路由器要么需要标注训练数据，要么预先固定思考预算，忽略了模型自身的答案级证据，无法根据问题难度动态分配计算资源。
AI.method: DART采用无训练的路由框架：对每个查询采样两个廉价的无思考草稿，若草稿一致则直接回答（跳过推理），若不一致则根据草稿熵预测所需的思考预算，让模型进行适当长度的推理。
AI.result: 在多数设置中保持或提升总是思考模式的准确性，同时大幅减少思考token。数学推理：奥林匹亚级问题准确率提升高达+9.0分，思考token减少15-69%；代码推理（执行等价评估）：准确率提升高达+22.5分，思考token减少51-63%。该信号跨模型规模（0.6B-32B）、模型家族和仅API托管设置有效。
AI.conclusion: DART证明了无需标注数据和梯度更新的训练免费路由框架可以有效平衡推理质量与计算成本，且模型自身的无思考草稿一致性是一个可靠的难度信号。

title: Select-to-Act: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning via Adaptive Language Guidance
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has been widely applied to sequential decision-making, yet it often suffers from poor sample efficiency due to costly interactions with the environment. A limited line of recent work has started exploring improving RL efficiency by leveraging external knowledge expressed in natural-language instructions. However, the few existing approaches typically treat the entire instruction as a single conditioning input, failing to account for the stage-dependent nature of language guidance, especially in complex environments. In this paper, we propose \emph{Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning with Language Instructions (HRLLI)}, a hierarchical RL framework that explicitly models natural-language instructions as dynamically selectable semantic guidance during decision-making. HRLLI decomposes instructions into a set of piecewise guidance elements, where each instruction piece may become relevant at different stages of interaction with the environment. A novel hierarchical RL policy structure is then formulated in a \emph{Select-to-Act} paradigm: a high-level semantic policy acts as a guidance selector that selects the most relevant instruction piece to the current state to guide the low-level agent's decision, while a low-level policy executes environment actions conditioned on the selected guidance. The two-level policies are learned simultaneously to maximize augmented expected returns from interactions with the environment. This design enables the agent to adaptively ground language instructions into stage-specific decisions during interaction. Experiments on the instruction-intensive RTFM benchmark show that HRLLI consistently outperforms strong instruction-conditioned RL baselines, demonstrating that explicitly modeling adaptive instruction selection significantly improves the effectiveness of RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HRLLI，一种层次化强化学习框架，将自然语言指令分解为片段化引导元素，通过高层语义策略选择当前最相关的指令片段来指导低层策略决策，从而提升强化学习在复杂环境中的样本效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有利用自然语言指令提升强化学习效率的方法通常将整个指令视为单一条件输入，忽略了语言指导在不同决策阶段的动态相关性，尤其在复杂环境中，不同指令片段在不同交互阶段的重要性可能不同。
AI.method: 提出HRLLI层次化强化学习框架，将指令分解为片段化引导元素；设计Select-to-Act范式，包含高层语义策略（选择当前状态最相关的指令片段）和低层策略（基于所选指令片段执行环境动作），两层面策略同时学习以最大化期望回报。
AI.result: 在指令密集的RTFM基准测试上，HRLLI一致性地优于强指令条件强化学习基线方法，验证了显式建模自适应指令选择的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模指令的自适应选择（而非将完整指令统一作为条件输入）能够显著提升强化学习在复杂环境中的效果，为语言引导的强化学习提供了新范式。

title: EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions
summary: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace sessions, the EnterpriseClawBench produces 852 reproducible tasks, each paired with recovered fixtures, rewritten prompts, role classes, skill subclasses, hard rules, and semantic rubrics. Because the sessions contain internal enterprise content, we do not release the benchmark data; instead, our reusable contribution is the construction and evaluation protocol. On EnterpriseClawBench, the best configuration reaches only 0.663 (Codex with GPT-5.5). These results show that enterprise agent evaluation must report harness--model combinations, artifact delivery, visual quality, cost, runtime, and skill-transfer behavior, rather than collapsing performance into a single score. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/EnterpriseClawBench

AI.tldr: EnterpriseClawBench是一个基于真实企业工作会话构建的智能体基准测试，包含852个可复现任务。由于涉及内部商业数据，不公开原始数据，而是贡献构建和评估协议。最佳配置（Codex与GPT-5.5）仅达到0.663分，表明企业智能体评估需报告多维度指标而非单一分数。
AI.motivation: 企业智能体日益在真实工作空间中运行，处理异构文件、调用工具、交付业务产物。现有基准缺乏真实企业场景的复杂性和多维度评估标准。
AI.method: 从大量企业会话档案出发，构建了852个可复现任务，每个任务配有恢复的fixtures、重写提示、角色类别、技能子类、硬规则和语义评分标准。不公开原始数据，仅提供构建和评估协议。
AI.result: 最佳配置（Codex与GPT-5.5）仅达到0.663分，说明当前模型在企业智能体任务上表现有限。
AI.conclusion: 企业智能体评估不应仅看单一分数，而需报告模型-框架组合、产物交付、视觉质量、成本、运行时和技能迁移行为等多维度指标。

title: Capable but Careless: Do Computer-Use Agents Follow Contextual Integrity?
summary: Computer-use agents (CUAs) now act on a user's behalf across personal applications such as email, calendars, and to-do lists. This cross-application access is useful, but it also creates a privacy risk that has been largely overlooked: when an agent works in one context, it can pull in information from another that is inappropriate in that context. Hence, we introduce AgentCIBench, an evaluation harness that turns this risk into executable, deterministically scored scenarios. We target three common failure modes in CUAs: visual co-location, where the agent pulls in prohibited items that sit next to the task target in the UI; task-ambiguity overshare, where the agent dumps dense personal state in response to an under-specified prompt; and recipient misalignment, where the agent sends content to an addressee for whom it is inappropriate. We evaluate 15 frontier agents and find a surprisingly high failure rate: 11 of 15 leak on more than 50% of scenarios, with an average leakage of 67.9%, and the same failures persist when agents act end-to-end in the environment to complete the task. We release AgentCIBench to encourage the development of safer computer-use agents and position contextual disclosure testing as a pre-deployment safety check.

AI.tldr: AgentCIBench是一个评估计算机使用代理（CUA）在跨应用操作中隐私泄露风险的测试框架，涵盖视觉共位、任务模糊过度分享和接收者错位三种失败模式。对15个前沿代理的测试发现，11个在超过50%的场景中存在泄露，平均泄露率达67.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有的计算机使用代理（CUA）能够在不同个人应用间跨上下文操作，这带来了隐私风险：代理在一个上下文中工作时，可能会从不合适的另一个上下文中拉取信息。这种风险此前被广泛忽视。
AI.method: 提出AgentCIBench评估框架，将隐私风险转化为可执行、可确定性评分的测试场景。针对三种常见失败模式设计测试：视觉共位（代理拉取UI中相邻的禁止项）、任务模糊过度分享（代理在提示不明确时泄露密集个人信息）、接收者错位（代理将内容发送给不合适的接收者）。在15个前沿代理上进行了评估。
AI.result: 15个前沿代理中，11个在超过50%的场景中存在泄露，平均泄露率达67.9%。即使在代理端到端执行任务的环境中，同样的失败模式仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 当前的计算机使用代理在跨应用上下文中的隐私保护能力严重不足，需要将上下文披露测试作为部署前的安全检查，以促进更安全的代理开发。

title: Reliability-Guided Adaptive Ensembling for Robust Test-Time Adaptation
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) can mitigate domain shift without source data, but it is highly brittle under adversarially contaminated test streams, where corrupted inputs also destabilize online updates. We study robust test-time adaptation (RTTA) in the adversarial-stream setting, which remains comparatively underexplored relative to standard TTA, and propose SAFER (Stochastic Augmentation Framework for Enhanced Robustness), a training-free reliability-guided augmentation wrapper for RTTA. SAFER preserves the wrapped TTA objective while replacing brittle single-view predictions with a reliability-guided pooled predictor. For each test sample, SAFER generates stochastic augmentations and aggregates their predictions through correlation-weighted pooling with outlier detection. We further study an adaptive-mixing extension that improves clean-performance retention by adjusting original-versus-augmentation weighting using feature disagreement signals. We evaluate on PACS, VLCS, and OfficeHome under PGD attacks at various attack rates. Across benchmarks, SAFER improves resilience of TTA methods to adversarial attacks while maintaining competitive clean performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAFER，一种无需训练、基于可靠性的增强包装器，用于提升测试时自适应方法在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性，通过在每张测试样本上生成随机增强并聚合预测结果，有效抵御破坏性输入对在线更新的干扰。
AI.motivation: 测试时自适应（TTA）在无源数据情况下能缓解域偏移，但在对抗性污染的测试流中极易失效：被破坏的输入会导致在线更新不稳定。现有研究主要集中在标准TTA上，对抗性流场景下的鲁棒TTA（RTTA）仍相对未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出SAFER框架，作为训练无关的增强包装器：1）对每个测试样本生成随机增强视图；2）通过相关性加权池化（含异常检测）聚合各视图预测；3）进一步提出自适应混合扩展，利用特征不一致信号调整原始预测与增强预测的权重，保持干净性能。
AI.result: 在PACS、VLCS和OfficeHome数据集上，针对不同攻击率的PGD攻击进行评估，SAFER在保持竞争力的干净性能的同时，显著提升了TTA方法对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SAFER是一种有效且轻量的鲁棒TTA方案，无需重新训练即可增强现有TTA方法的对抗鲁棒性，在对抗性测试流场景下具有良好的实用价值。

title: Can LLMs Reliably Self-Report Adversarial Prefills, and How?
summary: Prior work shows that large language models (LLMs) exhibit introspective capability on benign tasks. We extend the question to safety contexts and examine how reliably a model can recognize that its own prior response was elicited by an adversarial prefill attack. Across ten open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs (3B to 70B) and four safety benchmarks, no model reliably recognizes its own compromised outputs, with models claiming intent on prefilled responses at an average rate of $27.3\%$. Introspective signal stems largely from safety- and refusal-related reasoning. Orthogonalizing models' weights against the refusal direction collapses the gap between claiming rates on prefilled and natural outputs to near zero, though the direction is not its unique mediator. The signal is also probe-dependent: framing the question as internal intention versus external tampering elicits qualitatively different responses on the same models. We test three LoRA finetuning methods (SFT, GRPO, DPO) on eight models from 3B to 27B; all three widen the intention-probe gap on every model from 8B to 27B, with method ranking varying by model. The intervention does not transfer to the tampering probe and counterintuitively raises attack success rate under adversarial prefill on most models, amounting to a partial mitigation. These findings outline mechanisms underpinning the observed introspective signals in safety contexts and highlight risks in the reliability of LLM self-reports.

AI.tldr: LLMs在安全场景下无法可靠地识别自身是否受到对抗性前缀攻击（平均27.3%将攻击输出错误归因为自身意图），内省信号主要源于安全/拒答推理，移除拒答方向权重后信号消失，但该方向并非唯一中介；训练干预（SFT、GRPO、DPO）非但不能迁移到外部篡改探针，反而加剧了大部分模型上的攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 已有工作表明LLM在良性任务上具备内省能力，但安全场景下模型能否可靠识别自身输出是否被对抗性前缀攻击所诱导仍属未知。本文旨在探究LLM在安全情境下的内省可靠性及其机制。
AI.method: 在10个开源指令微调LLM（3B-70B）和4个安全基准上，通过对抗性前缀攻击诱使模型生成不安全输出，然后让模型自我评估该输出是出于自身意图还是外部篡改；进一步通过权重正交化拒答方向、引入不同探针措辞（意图探针 vs. 外部篡改探针）、以及三种LoRA微调（SFT、GRPO、DPO）来剖析内省信号的机制。
AI.result: (1) 无模型能可靠识别自身被攻击的输出，平均27.3%将前缀响应归因为自身意图；(2) 内省信号主要来自安全/拒答推理；(3) 正交化拒答方向后归因差距几乎消失，但该方向并非唯一中介；(4) 探针措辞依赖性显著——意图探针与外部篡改探针引发定性不同的响应；(5) 三种LoRA训练在8B-27B模型上均扩大了意图探针差距，但无法迁移至篡改探针，且反直觉地提高了大多数模型在对抗性前缀下的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: LLM在安全情境下的内省信号不可靠且具有脆弱性，依赖于安全/拒答推理而非真正的自我认知；当前训练干预无法提供有效的鲁棒性提升，反而可能加剧安全风险，凸显了依赖LLM自我报告作为安全保障的局限性。

title: SPADE: Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation
summary: Physical-structure priors such as conservation laws, Hamiltonian forms, and symmetries can improve scientific machine learning when correct, but can degrade predictions when misspecified. Existing methods usually enforce a chosen structure or tune a soft penalty, without a calibrated rule for deciding whether to impose a prior, how strongly to impose it, which prior to use, or which subset of candidate laws holds. We introduce SPADE, Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation, a closed-form framework that treats this problem as shrinkage of the structure-violating block of an unconstrained estimator. SPADE uses one exact specification test and one estimand: the test decides whether the prior is supported by data, Stein-unbiased James-Stein shrinkage sets the enforcement strength with an $O(σ^2/n)$ oracle guarantee, and a gate commits to the hard prior only when the test certifies it. The same test yields consistent nested structure selection and Benjamini-Hochberg control for subset discovery in non-nested constraint families. Across a linear-subspace prior, a reservoir conservation law, and a nonlinear Hamiltonian prior on Duffing dynamics, SPADE tracks the oracle, beats a neural-network baseline, reduces correct-prior regret from $10.3\%$ to $2.6\%$, matches cross-validation with $1/71$ of the solves, selects the correct structure with $100\%$ accuracy, and recovers partial laws with controlled false relaxation.

AI.tldr: SPADE是一个闭合形式的框架，通过结构违规块的收缩、精确规格检验和Stein无偏James-Stein收缩，自适应地决定是否施加物理结构先验、施加强度以及选择哪些先验，在多个案例中跟踪oracle、超越神经网络基线、降低遗憾率并以极低成本匹配交叉验证效果。
AI.motivation: 物理结构先验（如守恒律、哈密顿形式、对称性）在科学机器学习中正确时能提升性能，但错误指定时会降低预测质量。现有方法缺少一个经过校准的规则来决定是否施加先验、施加强度、选择哪个先验或哪些候选定律成立。
AI.method: SPADE将结构先验自适应决策问题视为对无约束估计量中结构违规块的收缩问题，采用一个精确规格检验决定先验是否被数据支持，Stein无偏James-Stein收缩设定执行强度（具有O(σ²/n)的oracle保证），以及一个门控机制在检验认证后才提交硬先验。同一检验还可用于一致的嵌套结构选择和子集发现的Benjamini-Hochberg控制。
AI.result: 在线性子空间先验、水库守恒律和非线性哈密顿先验（Duffing动力学）上，SPADE跟踪oracle、超越神经网络基线、将正确先验的遗憾率从10.3%降至2.6%、以1/71的求解次数匹配交叉验证、以100%准确率选择正确结构、并以受控的假发现率恢复部分定律。
AI.conclusion: SPADE提供了一个理论完备的闭合形式框架来解决结构先验的自适应决策问题，具有oracle保证、高效计算和可控的统计推断能力。

title: On the Sparsity-Storage-Accuracy Tradeoff in Parsimoniously Activated Dictionary Learning
summary: Dictionary learning has long been studied from both optimization and probabilistic perspectives. While formulations with element-wise sparsity regularization (e.g., L1-based sparse coding) admit well-established probabilistic interpretations, many structured variants that impose global constraints lack a clear and tractable generative view. In this paper, we revisit a class of practically effective yet theoretically under-explored dictionary learning methods that impose a simple global regularization on the number of activated dictionary atoms, which we term parsimoniously activated dictionary learning (PADL). We show that PADL admits an equivalent formulation as maximum a posteriori estimation under a structured generative model, with auxiliary latent variables that govern global activation patterns. This formulation allows us to derive generalization guarantees that are difficult to obtain under the original formulation. More importantly, it yields an analytical characterization of the tradeoff between sparsity, storage cost, and reconstruction accuracy, enabling data-driven estimation of optimal hyperparameters. Based on this connection, we develop an efficient and interpretable PADL algorithm that eliminates manual hyperparameter tuning, achieving improved reconstruction performance under comparable sparsity levels on visual benchmarks. We further demonstrate its practical utility in accelerating inference for vision-language models.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了一类对激活字典原子数量施加全局正则化的字典学习方法（PADL），证明了其等价于结构化生成模型下的最大后验估计，并由此推导出泛化保证、稀疏-存储-重建精度的权衡关系，以及无需手动调参的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 许多具有全局约束的结构化字典学习变体缺乏清晰且可处理的生成视角，这阻碍了理论分析（如泛化保证）和超参数选择。作者希望为实践中有效但理论上未充分探索的PADL方法建立概率解释，从而弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 将PADL重新表述为结构化生成模型下的最大后验（MAP）估计，引入辅助潜变量来调控全局激活模式；基于此框架推导泛化界，分析稀疏性、存储成本与重建精度之间的权衡；并设计无需手动调参的高效算法。
AI.result: 在视觉基准上，PADL在可比稀疏度水平下实现了更优的重建性能；此外，该方法能有效加速视觉-语言模型的推理过程。
AI.conclusion: 为全局正则化的字典学习提供了严格的理论基础（概率解释+泛化保证+分析性权衡），并展示了其在超参数自动选择和下游任务加速方面的实用价值。

title: Randomized YaRN Improves Length Generalization for Long-Context Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are typically pretrained on short sequences and then extended to work on longer sequences with additional training. However, such LLMs still struggle to further generalize to very long sequences. We propose Randomized YaRN, a training method that improves length generalization by combining YaRN-based positional extrapolation with randomized positional encoding and a length curriculum. During training on short context data, tokens are assigned YaRN positional encodings sampled from a larger position range, exposing the model to out-of-distribution positional representations even on short-context inputs. We evaluate Randomized YaRN on two challenging long-context reasoning benchmarks, BABILong and Multi-Round Coreference Resolution (MRCR). When training on data with <8K context, Randomized YaRN consistently improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K and outperforms standard fine-tuning, with the largest gains appearing at far out-of-distribution lengths. Our results suggest that progressively exposing models to OOD positional distributions provides an effective recipe for generalizable long-context reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Randomized YaRN，一种通过结合YaRN位置外推、随机位置编码和长度课程来提升大语言模型长序列推理能力的方法。在短上下文训练时，模型通过随机采样更大范围的位置编码，提前暴露于分布外位置表示。在BABILong和MRCR基准上，训练于<8K上下文的模型在16K-128K长度上持续提升推理性能，尤其在远超出分布长度上增益最大。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型通常在短序列上预训练，后通过额外训练扩展到长序列，但仍难以进一步泛化到非常长的序列。现有方法在长度泛化方面存在不足，需要有效策略让模型在短上下文训练时就能学习处理长序列位置信息。
AI.method: 提出Randomized YaRN方法，核心思想包括：(1) 基于YaRN的位置外推技术；(2) 在短上下文训练中，为token分配从更大位置范围随机采样的YaRN位置编码；(3) 引入长度课程（length curriculum），逐步增加训练时的位置范围，使模型渐进式暴露于分布外（OOD）的位置表示。
AI.result: 在BABILong和Multi-Round Coreference Resolution (MRCR)两个长上下文推理基准上，训练数据上下文长度<8K时，Randomized YaRN在16K到128K上下文长度上持续提升推理性能，且显著优于标准微调方法。最大增益出现在远超出训练分布的长序列上。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式地让模型暴露于分布外位置分布是提升长上下文推理泛化能力的有效策略，Randomized YaRN为长度泛化问题提供了一种简单而有效的训练方案。

title: HOLMES: Evaluating Higher-Order Logical Reasoning in LLMs
summary: Logical reasoning is essential for reliable AI, yet existing benchmarks are largely first-order-logic-centric, focusing on object-level deduction over fixed predicates. This misses many realistic scenarios where models must reason over rules, predicates, functions, constraints, and decision procedures themselves. We introduce HOLMES (Higher-Order Logic Meets real-world Explainable Symbolic reasoning), the first real-world benchmark for higher-order symbolic reasoning in LLMs, containing 1379 instances. Built on higher-order logic, HOLMES pairs natural-language problems with HOL formalizations, ground-truth answers, verifiable reasoning traces, and fine-grained controllable reasoning factors across law and finance. Experiments show that current LLMs still struggle on HOLMES, with an average accuracy of only 50.64% and the best model reaching 59.54%. Our analyses further reveal that high final-answer accuracy can mask shortcut reasoning in conflict-resolution settings, while performance drops sharply under scope-conditioned and compositional reasoning. These findings identify higher-order symbolic reasoning as a key bottleneck for building reliable and verifiable LLMs. The project code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/wuyucheng2002/HOLMES.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HOLMES，首个面向高阶逻辑符号推理的基准数据集（1379个实例），涵盖法律和金融领域。实验表明当前大语言模型平均准确率仅50.64%，最高59.54%，高阶符号推理是构建可靠可验证LLM的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准多基于一阶逻辑，聚焦固定谓词上的对象级演绎，无法覆盖需要推理规则、谓词、函数、约束及决策过程本身的现实场景。因此需要构建面向高阶逻辑符号推理的基准来评估LLM的真实推理能力。
AI.method: 构建HOLMES基准：基于高阶逻辑形式化，将自然语言问题与高阶逻辑形式化定义、真实答案、可验证推理轨迹及细粒度可控推理因素配对，覆盖法律和金融两个领域，共1379个实例。
AI.result: 当前LLM在HOLMES上平均准确率仅50.64%，最佳模型达到59.54%。高最终答案准确率可能掩盖冲突解决场景中的捷径推理；在范围条件推理和组合推理下性能急剧下降。
AI.conclusion: 高阶符号推理是构建可靠可验证LLM的关键瓶颈，现有模型在此任务上表现不足，特别是在冲突解决、范围条件和组合推理方面存在显著短板。

title: Multigrid Training for Molecular Generation using Graph Neural Networks
summary: Deep learning has demonstrated significant success for modeling biochemical molecular systems, where inputs are commonly represented as graphs or 3D grids. A major challenge is that computational cost scales with resolution, making full graph/grid computation of molecular densities expensive and often unstable. We introduce a multigrid training strategy that leverages low-resolution optimization to accelerate learning at higher resolution through parameter transfer across discretizations. For graph molecular representations, we progressively transfer parameters learned from a coarse graph to a sequence of increasingly finer graphs via biased random walk upsampling. For 3D molecular generation, we voxelize the molecular structures at multiple resolutions, pretrain a coarse-resolution conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE), and initialize a fine-resolution CVAE by transferring shape compatible convolutional parameters from the coarse model. Numerical experiments on receptor-conditioned 3D Ligand generation show that multigrid training accelerates convergence and improves generalization compared to training from scratch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多网格训练策略，通过在粗分辨率下优化并跨离散化迁移参数，加速高分辨率图分子表示和3D分子生成的训练，在受体条件3D配体生成任务中验证了收敛速度和泛化能力的提升。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在生化分子系统建模中取得显著成功，但输入通常为图或3D网格，计算成本随分辨率增长，全图/网格计算分子密度昂贵且不稳定。
AI.method: 提出多网格训练策略：1) 图分子表示中，通过有偏随机游走上采样从粗图向细图渐进迁移参数；2) 3D分子生成中，多分辨率体素化分子结构，预训练粗分辨率条件变分自编码器(CVAE)，通过迁移形状兼容的卷积参数初始化细分辨率CVAE。
AI.result: 在受体条件3D配体生成实验中，多网格训练相比从头训练加速了收敛并提升了泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 多网格训练策略通过跨分辨率参数迁移有效降低了高分辨率学习成本，为生化分子系统建模提供了一种加速且稳定的训练范式。

title: GIF: Locally Sound Geometric Information Flow Control for LLMs
summary:
Large language models increasingly mediate interactions between sensitive data, untrusted inputs, and privileged actions in agentic systems, creating security and privacy risks. These range from prompt injections that manipulate downstream tool use to leakage of confidential information through model outputs. Recent Information Flow Control (IFC)-based defenses show promise but lack a principled semantic foundation for reasoning about information flow through the model itself. Since any input token may influence any output token in an autoregressive LLM, existing approaches suffer from severe taint explosion.
  We present Geometric Information Flow (GIF), a semantic framework for tracking information flow from input tokens to outputs. GIF uses the LLM Jacobian and local output geometry to upper-bound the Shannon mutual information between perturbed input spans and model outputs, yielding a scalable measure computable on large models via automatic differentiation and low-rank approximation. Unlike attention-based or correlational attribution heuristics, GIF satisfies local geometric soundness, and we provide a fully mechanized Lean 4 proof that it upper-bounds the true information flow induced by a given prompt under local regularity assumptions.
  We evaluate GIF on integrity and confidentiality tasks across multiple prompt-injection and privacy-leakage benchmarks. GIF achieves near-perfect recall even without a downstream declassifier, outperforming attention-based baselines. Combined with lightweight LLM-based declassifiers, it matches or exceeds the F1 of direct LLM-as-judge baselines such as GPT-5.5 xhigh reasoning while using up to 81x lower token cost. GIF flows detected with small surrogate models transfer to larger state-of-the-art models and other model families, even when the surrogate is up to 200x smaller, suggesting black-box deployment without gradient access.

AI.tldr: 本文提出几何信息流(GIF)框架，利用LLM的雅可比矩阵和局部输出几何结构来上界输入与输出之间的香农互信息，从而在无需梯度访问的情况下实现可扩展、可验证的信息流跟踪，在提示注入和隐私泄露基准上以极低token成本达到接近完美的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于信息流控制(IFC)的防御方法缺乏严谨的语义基础来推理信息透过模型本身的流动。由于自回归LLM中任何输入token都可能影响任何输出token，现有方法存在严重的污点爆炸问题。
AI.method: GIF利用LLM的雅可比矩阵和局部输出几何结构来上界扰动输入跨度与模型输出之间的香农互信息。通过自动微分和低秩近似在大模型上实现可扩展计算，并在Lean 4中提供了完全机械化的形式化证明，验证其在局部正则性假设下对真实信息流的上界性质。
AI.result: 在多个提示注入和隐私泄露基准上，GIF无需下游解分类器即可达到近乎完美的召回率，优于基于注意力的基线方法。结合轻量级LLM解分类器后，其F1分数可与GPT-5.5 xhigh reasoning等直接LLM裁判基线媲美，同时token成本降低高达81倍。使用小至200倍的替代模型检测到的GIF流可迁移至更大模型和其他模型家族。
AI.conclusion: GIF提供了一种理论上严谨、计算上可扩展且具有迁移性的信息流跟踪框架，为LLM智能体系统中的安全与隐私防御奠定了语义基础。

title: Bypassing Minimization Bias: A Shift-Invariant Variance Estimator for Off-Equilibrium Local Learning Coefficients
comment: 27 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/yingjiacai/SIVE
summary: Singular Learning Theory leverages the Local Learning Coefficient (LLC) to quantify the geometry of neural network loss landscapes. However, mean-energy LLC estimators depend explicitly on an additive loss baseline, typically an estimate of the local minimum. During transient, off-equilibrium training phases, this minimum is unknown; substituting it with the lowest noisy mini-batch loss induces a systematic minimization bias that distorts the geometric measurement. In this paper, we propose the Shift-Invariant Variance Estimator (SIVE), a variance-based local LLC probe that structurally eliminates the unknown additive baseline through the variance operator. Combining this shift-invariant observable with an explicit correction derived from the Law of Total Variance, SIVE separates geometric loss fluctuations from mini-batch evaluation noise. Controlled experiments on analytically tractable toy models show that SIVE recovers the expected finite-temperature geometric signal in regimes where anchored mean estimators fail. Applied to deep neural networks, SIVE provides a robust, localized online diagnostic for tracking structural phase transitions throughout training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Shift-Invariant Variance Estimator (SIVE)，通过方差算子消除基线依赖，实现神经网络训练过程中局部学习系数的鲁棒估计。
AI.motivation: 传统均值能量LLC估计器依赖未知的损失基线（局部最小值），在非平衡训练阶段该基线无法获取，使用噪声小批量损失替代会产生系统性最小化偏差，扭曲几何度量。
AI.method: 提出SIVE：基于方差的局部LLC探针，通过方差算子从结构上消除未知加性基线；结合全方差定律进行显式校正，将几何损失波动与小批量评估噪声分离。
AI.result: 在可解析处理的玩具模型上，SIVE在锚定均值估计器失效的设定下恢复了预期的有限温度几何信号；应用于深度神经网络，SIVE提供了鲁棒的局部在线诊断工具。
AI.conclusion: SIVE能够跟踪训练过程中的结构相变，是一种不依赖基线、鲁棒的在线几何诊断方法。

title: EHR-Complex: Benchmarking Medical Agents for Complex Clinical Reasoning
summary: Clinical agents promise to democratize access to electronic health records (EHRs), yet existing benchmarks fail to reflect the complexity of practical EHR analysis, e.g., often operating on idealized, clean EHRs via static SQL generation rather than interactive execution. In this work, we introduce EHR-Complex, a large-scale benchmark designed for interactive clinical database reasoning. Built on the large MIMIC-IV substrate (365K patients, 31 tables, 500M+ records), EHR-Complex comprises about 52K tasks spanning six clinical intents, supporting both patient-level and population-level queries, where each task requires an agent to interact with a sandboxed environment by executing SQL queries or Python code. Notably, EHR-Complex considers the real-world SQL task complexity for longitudinal multi-table aggregation and compositional reasoning, resulting in 31.93 SQL structural components per query on average. Evaluation results on EHR-Complex reveal the clinical difficulty of these EHR reasoning scenarios, with the top-performing model achieving only 62.3% exact-match accuracy. Pass^k consistency drops below 50% for nearly all evaluated models at k=4, exposing broad stochastic fragility. A fine-grained analysis of more than 3,800 failed trajectories for representative LLMs reveals three dominant failure modes: SQL logic errors, medical-code lookup failures, and semantic misunderstandings. EHR-Complex provides a rigorous testbed for clinical agents and highlights remaining gaps in robust reasoning for large-scale EHR analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EHR-Complex，一个面向交互式临床数据库推理的大规模基准测试，包含约5.2万个任务、涵盖6种临床意图，支持患者级和群体级查询。评估显示最佳模型仅达62.3%的精确匹配准确率，且存在显著的随机脆弱性，揭示了当前临床智能体在大型EHR分析中的鲁棒性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有临床智能体基准无法反映实际EHR分析的复杂性，通常基于理想化、干净的EHR数据通过静态SQL生成而非交互式执行进行评估，缺乏对真实临床推理场景的模拟。
AI.method: 基于MIMIC-IV数据库（36.5万患者、31张表、5亿+记录）构建EHR-Complex基准，包含约5.2万个涵盖6种临床意图的任务；任务要求智能体在沙箱环境中通过执行SQL查询或Python代码进行交互式推理；引入纵向多表聚合与组合推理的真实SQL复杂度，平均每查询31.93个SQL结构组件。
AI.result: 最佳模型仅达62.3%的精确匹配准确率；几乎所有模型在k=4时的Pass^k一致性低于50%；对3800+失败轨迹的分析揭示三大主要失败模式：SQL逻辑错误、医学术语查找失败和语义误解。
AI.conclusion: EHR-Complex为临床智能体提供了严格的测试平台，揭示了当前模型在大规模EHR分析中鲁棒推理能力的不足，指出了需要改进的关键方向。

title: Asymptotic Signal Subspace Recovery in Softmax Attention Models
summary: Attention mechanisms have demonstrated remarkable empirical success in identifying relevant information from large collections of tokens, yet the theoretical principles underlying this behavior remain poorly understood. We study a stylized softmax-attention model in which a query vector is learned by stochastic gradient ascent from a collection of informative and nuisance tokens. Exploiting the symmetry of the model, we derive a population objective and characterize the limiting ordinary differential equation governing the learning dynamics. Using tools from stochastic approximation and dynamical systems theory, we establish a rigorous connection between the stochastic learning algorithm and its deterministic limit. Our main result shows that, under suitable high-dimensional scaling assumptions and standard step-size conditions, the learned query converges almost surely to the one-dimensional signal subspace spanned by the latent informative direction. Equivalently, the query asymptotically recovers the latent signal up to the intrinsic sign ambiguity. These results provide a rigorous theoretical foundation for understanding attention mechanisms as signal extraction procedures in high-dimensional noisy environments and offer a dynamical-systems perspective on how attention discovers relevant information in the presence of substantial noise.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上分析了softmax注意力机制中查询向量的学习动态，证明在高维噪声环境下，通过随机梯度上升学习的查询向量几乎必然收敛到潜在信号子空间，从而将注意力机制解释为信号提取过程。
AI.motivation: 注意力机制在实际应用中表现出色，但其理论基础尚不清晰，特别是查询向量如何从大量token中识别相关信息的内在原理未被充分理解。
AI.method: 研究一个简化的softmax注意力模型，查询向量通过随机梯度上升从信息性token和噪声token中学习。利用模型对称性推导群体目标，刻画学习动力学的极限常微分方程，并借助随机逼近和动力系统理论建立随机学习算法与其确定性极限之间的严格联系。
AI.result: 在合适的高维缩放假设和标准步长条件下，学习到的查询向量几乎必然收敛到由潜在信息方向张成的一维信号子空间，即查询渐近地恢复潜在信号（仅存在符号歧义）。
AI.conclusion: 为理解注意力机制作为高维噪声环境下的信号提取程序提供了严格的理论基础，并从动力系统视角揭示了注意力如何在大量噪声中发现相关信息。

title: Abstract representational geometry supports inference in large language models
summary: A defining feature of human intelligence is the ability to adapt to changing environments by inferring latent task structure from sparse observations. Neuroscientific research indicates that this capability relies on the hippocampus constructing abstract representations, expressed as low-dimensional, approximately orthogonal manifolds in neural state space. However, the internal mechanisms of large language models (LLMs) remain largely opaque, making it unclear whether they form comparable abstract representations or instead rely on task-specific statistical regularities when performing comparable reasoning tasks. Here we adapt a contextual reversal-learning paradigm to a text-based setting and compare humans and LLMs at both the Behavioural and representational levels. We report that although LLMs exhibit generalizable reasoning less frequently than humans, when such inference occurs, their internal states exhibit abstract geometric structures that resemble those reported in the hippocampus. Notably, this representational geometry is not uniformly distributed but is organized hierarchically across model depth: whereas lower layers show early, stable encoding of stimulus identity, higher layers form a hippocampal-like functional band enriched for abstract context geometry associated with inference. Furthermore, complementary intervention experiments mechanistically implicate geometry in reasoning: task-sequence language modelling induces geometric disentanglement, whereas geometric regularization of higher layers increases the emergence of generalizable inference. Together, these findings establish abstract representational geometry as a mechanistic principle supporting inference in large language models.

AI.tldr: 本研究将情境逆转学习范式适配到文本情境，比较了人类和大语言模型（LLMs）在行为与表征层面的表现。发现LLMs虽比人类更少展现泛化推理，但当推理发生时，其内部状态呈现出类似海马体的抽象几何结构（低维、近似正交的流形）。这种表征几何沿模型深度层级组织：低层稳定编码刺激身份，高层形成类似海马体的功能带，富集与推理相关的抽象情境几何。干预实验进一步证明几何结构对推理具有因果作用：序列语言建模诱导几何解缠，而对高层进行几何正则化则增强泛化推理的出现。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型在执行类人推理任务时，是否形成与人类海马体类似的抽象表征几何结构，以及这种结构是否构成LLMs实现泛化推理的机制基础。
AI.method: 将情境逆转学习范式适配到文本情境，对人类和LLMs进行行为和表征层面的比较分析；通过几何分析考察模型内部状态的低维流形结构；进行干预实验（任务序列语言建模、几何正则化）验证几何结构的因果作用。
AI.result: LLMs的泛化推理频率低于人类，但发生推理时内部状态呈现类似海马体的抽象几何结构；该几何结构沿模型深度层级组织，低层编码刺激身份，高层形成富集抽象情境几何的功能带；干预实验证实几何解缠和正则化可因果性地影响推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 抽象表征几何结构是大语言模型中支持泛化推理的机械论原理，揭示了LLMs与生物神经系统在表征层面的潜在共性。

title: QeHDC: Hyperdimensional Computing based on Quantum-enhanced binding and SuperClass Construction
summary: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) is a robust computational framework inspired by human cognition characterized by simple and efficient operations within high-dimensional vector spaces. Quantum-enhanced Hyperdimensional Computing (QeHDC) extends classical HDC by leveraging quantum mechanical properties to enhance computational efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel Quantum HDC framework featuring a one-pass training method, leveraging sinusoidal and quantum encoding to project classical data into quantum amplitude states efficiently. Our framework introduces an innovative reference-state-based quantum binding operation realized via quantum circuits. Furthermore, we propose a density-matrix-based superclass generation strategy employing eigenvalue decomposition to extract critical quantum state features effectively, enabling a more accurate and robust class representation. Experimental evaluations conducted on standard benchmark datasets demonstrate our approach's superior performance, robustness to noise, and computational feasibility compared to traditional classical and existing quantum-enhanced approaches. The results highlight the practical benefits and potential of Quantum HDC for quantum-enhanced classification tasks and pave the way for future advancements in quantum-inspired computational paradigms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的量子超维计算框架，采用一次性训练方法、正弦和量子编码、参考态量子绑定操作以及基于密度矩阵的超类生成策略，在标准基准数据集上取得了优于传统经典和现有量子增强方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 扩展经典的超维计算（HDC）框架，通过利用量子力学特性（如叠加态和纠缠）来提升计算效率，解决传统HDC在高维数据处理中的性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 1）采用正弦编码和量子编码将经典数据高效投影到量子幅度态；2）提出基于参考态的量子绑定操作，通过量子电路实现；3）提出基于密度矩阵的超类生成策略，利用特征值分解提取关键量子态特征。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上，所提方法在分类性能、噪声鲁棒性和计算可行性方面均优于传统经典方法和现有量子增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 该量子HDC框架为量子增强分类任务提供了实际效益和潜力，为未来量子启发的计算范式发展铺平了道路。

title: Litmus: Zero-Label, Code-Driven Metric Specification for Evaluating AI Systems
summary: As agentic LLM systems move from prototypes to deployment across increasingly diverse domains, evaluating them has become both more important and more difficult. The challenge is not only that individual metrics may be unreliable, but that evaluation goals are often left implicit. Without a clear account of what a system is expected to do, how it can fail, and which failures matter, metric choices become difficult to justify, interpret, or validate. We present Litmus, a zero-label system that designs evaluation and monitoring metrics for AI pipelines by eliciting evaluation intent from source code and targeted interrogation. Instead of assuming that the evaluation target is already known, Litmus first identifies what must be measured and why, then converts those answers into constraints for constructing a justified, per-stage metric portfolio. We evaluate Litmus on three real, code-defined AI pipelines - financial account grouping, scientific QA, and inherent risk assessment - against AutoMetrics and three DynamicRubric baselines. Litmus achieves the broadest or tied-broadest concern coverage, spans more pipeline stages, produces a near-zero-redundancy portfolio, and ranks first in validity against per-row quality labels on all three pipelines - decisively on scientific QA (Spearman $ρ=0.72$ vs. less than $0.47$ for every baseline), and within overlapping confidence intervals in relation to two components of the audit framework despite using no labels during metric design. Our results support a shift from automatic metric implementation to automatic metric specification: before asking which metric to compute, evaluation systems should ask what must be measured and why.

AI.tldr: Litmus 是一个零标签系统，通过从源代码和定向询问中获取评估意图，自动为 AI 流水线设计和生成合理的、分阶段的评估与监控指标组合。在三个真实 AI 流水线上，Litmus 相比 AutoMetrics 和 DynamicRubric 基线实现了更广的关注覆盖、更低的冗余度，并在有效性上排名第一，支持从自动指标实现向自动指标规范的范式转变。
AI.motivation: 当前基于智能体的 LLM 系统从原型走向部署，评估变得日益重要且困难。问题不仅在于单个指标可能不可靠，更在于评估目标常常是隐式的。缺乏对系统应做什么、可能如何失败以及哪些失败重要的清晰理解，导致指标选择难以证明、解释或验证。
AI.method: Litmus 是一个零标签系统，通过从源代码和定向询问中获取评估意图，首先识别需要测量什么以及为什么，然后将这些答案转化为约束条件，从而构建一个合理的、分阶段的指标组合。
AI.result: 在金融账户分组、科学问答和固有风险评估三个真实 AI 流水线上，Litmus 相比 AutoMetrics 和 DynamicRubric 基线实现了最广或并列最广的关注覆盖，覆盖更多流水线阶段，产生接近零冗余的指标组合，并在所有三个流水线上针对每行质量标签的有效性排名第一。在科学问答任务上显著领先（Spearman ρ=0.72，所有基线低于0.47）。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持从自动指标实现向自动指标规范的转变：在问"应该计算哪个指标"之前，评估系统应先问"需要测量什么以及为什么"。

title: Enhancing LLMs for Graph Tasks via Graph-aware LoRA Generation
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) tightly couple their input-output parameters to dataset-specific feature spaces and target sets, exhibiting limited transferability across different datasets. In contrast, language models (LMs) generalize flexibly via a unified input-output interface, motivating recent attempts to adapt LMs to graph tasks. However, existing methods struggle to encode whole-graph information, leading to potential information loss and suboptimal graph understanding. In this work, we propose a novel weight-level information injection paradigm for adapting LMs to graph tasks. This paradigm injects whole-graph information by generating task-specific weight updates that interact directly with hidden representations. Instantiating this paradigm following low-rank adaptation (LoRA), we introduce GaRA, a Graph-aware LoRA generation model. GaRA constructs low-rank weight updates conditioned on the original graph structures and constrains the norm of the generated updates, thus injecting whole-graph information and avoiding the optimization bias in the weight generation. Empirical studies demonstrate that GaRA consistently outperforms baselines on zero-shot graph learning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GaRA，一种图感知的LoRA生成模型，通过权重级信息注入范式将图结构信息注入到语言模型中，在零样本图学习任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: GNN的输入输出参数与数据集特定特征空间耦合，跨数据集迁移性有限；现有将LM适配到图任务的方法难以编码全图信息，导致信息丢失和次优的图理解。
AI.method: 提出权重级信息注入范式，通过生成任务特定的权重更新来注入全图信息；基于LoRA实现GaRA，构建以原始图结构为条件的低秩权重更新，并约束生成更新的范数以避免优化偏差。
AI.result: 在零样本图学习任务上，GaRA一致性地优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 权重级信息注入是一种有效的将LM适配到图任务的新范式，GaRA通过生成图感知的LoRA权重更新实现了更好的全图信息编码和迁移性能。

title: Digital Humanism and Evolutionary Design
summary: This paper examines the two concepts of digital humanism and evolutionary design. The aim is to identify and highlight potential common structures, synergies, and challenges. How should and can technical systems be designed, and what implications does this have for the design of our environment? In light of the current debate surrounding artificial intelligence, this paper aims to serve as a preliminary study to help better understand the two concepts of digital humanism and evolutionary design within the context of human-centered technological development. Following a brief introduction, the two concepts of Digital Humanism and Evolutionary Design are presented and graphically visualized. The terms of freedom and responsibility in human decision-making, conviviality, and subjectivity are discussed, along with examples illustrating the distinction between human and artificial intelligence (Turing Test and Chinese Room). The various concepts of evolutionary design (e.g., co-evolutionary or sustainable software development, clean code, or green IT) and Gilbert Simondon's concept of the "open machine" are introduced. The interdependencies between functional specialization and open technology development are highlighted. Both concepts share similar structures. In joint cooperation, they can lead to positive effects and mutual synergies. Significant differences lie in the areas of autonomy and determination in decision-making, as well as in genuine and simulated subjectivity. Open technology development is also currently suffering from the functional specialization of software and AI applications due to a purely market- and consumer-oriented approach. Even optimizations for energy efficiency in sustainable software development lead to greater specialization and thus also have a detrimental effect on open and quality-oriented technology development.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了数字人文主义与进化设计两个概念，分析其共同结构、协同效应与挑战，指出两者在决策自主性、真实/模拟主体性等方面存在显著差异，并认为当前市场导向的功能专业化对开放技术发展产生负面影响。
AI.motivation: 在人工智能广泛应用的背景下，厘清数字人文主义与进化设计的关系，探讨如何在以人为本的技术发展中协调这两个概念。
AI.method: 通过概念介绍与图形化展示，对比分析两个理论框架；讨论自由与责任、共情性、主体性等术语，引用图灵测试和中文屋论证人机智能差异；引入吉尔伯特·西蒙东的"开放机器"概念，分析功能专业化与开放技术发展的相互依赖关系。
AI.result: 两个概念存在相似结构，协同合作可产生积极效应和互惠协同。主要差异体现在决策自主性与确定性，以及真实主体性与模拟主体性方面。当前市场导向的功能专业化损害了开放的、面向质量的技术发展，即使是可持续软件开发的能效优化也加剧了这种专业化。
AI.conclusion: 数字人文主义与进化设计在联合协作中可产生正向协同，但需警惕市场导向的功能专业化对开放技术发展的制约。

title: Escaping the Variance Trap: Jacobian-Free Dynamics for Root-Finding Bilevel Optimization
summary: Many central machine learning tasks, from entropy tuning in reinforcement learning to equilibrating generative adversarial networks, are fundamentally stochastic root-finding problems rather than loss minimization. Yet, they are frequently forced into a minimization framework via squared residuals, introducing a critical flaw we identify as the Variance Trap. Standard bilevel minimization algorithms require estimating hypergradients involving implicit Jacobians; in stochastic settings, these terms act as noise amplifiers, destabilizing convergence. We formalize Root-Finding Bilevel Optimization (RF-BO) as a distinct problem class that bypasses this pathology. We propose a Jacobian-free solution using Two-Time-Scale Stochastic Approximation (TTSA) that updates directly along the root error, structurally avoiding variance amplification. We provide the first non-asymptotic convergence guarantees for TTSA in this setting under Markovian noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate the decisive advantage of this paradigm: compared to squared-residual and implicit-gradient baselines, our framework achieves a 2.6\% top-1 accuracy gain in SimCLR, 17$\times$ faster convergence in non-linear ODE control where baselines fail, significantly improved entropy stability in reinforcement learning, and an 11.1\% quality improvement in generative modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出根求解双层优化（RF-BO）框架，通过两时间尺度随机逼近（TTSA）直接沿根误差更新，避免了平方残差最小化中的“方差陷阱”问题，在多个任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 许多中心机器学习任务本质上是随机求根问题而非损失最小化，但常被强行纳入平方残差的最小化框架，引入“方差陷阱”——隐式雅可比矩阵作为噪声放大器，破坏收敛稳定性。
AI.method: 形式化定义根求解双层优化（RF-BO）作为独立问题类；提出无雅可比的两时间尺度随机逼近（TTSA）方法，直接沿根误差方向更新，结构性地避免方差放大；并在马尔可夫噪声下给出首个非渐近收敛保证。
AI.result: 相比平方残差和隐式梯度基线：SimCLR top-1准确率提升2.6%，非线性ODE控制中收敛速度提升17倍（基线失败），强化学习熵稳定性显著提升，生成建模质量提升11.1%。
AI.conclusion: RF-BO框架能有效规避方差陷阱，TTSA方法在多种随机求根任务上优于传统最小化方法，为这类问题提供了更稳健的求解范式。

title: Cross-Architectural Mixture-of-Experts with Adaptive Soft Routing for Plant Leaf Disease Classification
summary: Plant leaf disease classification is crucial for crop protection and precision agriculture but remains challenging under complex backgrounds, illumination variations, and severe class imbalance. Moreover, single-architecture models often fail to effectively capture both local and global representations. To address these challenges, this study proposes an adaptive soft Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework with cross-architectural routing that integrates EfficientNet-B0, DenseNet-121, and Swin-Tiny to exploit complementary multi-scale, local, and global features. A soft gating mechanism dynamically assigns input-dependent expert weights, while a two-stage refinement training strategy improves optimization stability and generalization. Experiments on a highly imbalanced potato leaf disease dataset achieve 91.68% recall and 92.62% F1-score, surpassing the strongest individual expert by 5.91% and 5.03%, respectively. Additional evaluations on durian and sesame leaf disease datasets yield F1-scores of 94.03% and 97.04%, demonstrating robust cross-dataset generalization and the potential of the proposed framework for reliable real-world crop health monitoring

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应软混合专家（MoE）框架，通过跨架构路由整合EfficientNet-B0、DenseNet-121和Swin-Tiny，结合软门控机制和两阶段精炼训练策略，在高度不平衡的马铃薯叶病数据集上实现了91.68%召回率和92.62% F1分数，并在榴莲和芝麻叶病数据集上展现了优异的跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 植物叶病分类在复杂背景、光照变化和严重类别不平衡下仍具挑战，且单一架构模型难以同时捕捉局部和全局表示。
AI.method: 提出自适应软MoE框架，采用跨架构路由整合EfficientNet-B0、DenseNet-121和Swin-Tiny三个专家模型，通过软门控机制动态分配输入依赖的专家权重，并设计两阶段精炼训练策略以提升优化稳定性和泛化能力。
AI.result: 在高度不平衡的马铃薯叶病数据集上召回率91.68%、F1分数92.62%，超过最优单专家模型5.91%和5.03%；在榴莲和芝麻叶病数据集上F1分数分别达94.03%和97.04%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效融合多尺度、局部和全局特征，展现出鲁棒的跨数据集泛化能力，适用于可靠的农作物健康监测。

title: Distribution-Aware Robust Bilevel Optimization: Quantile-Guided Huber Updates in Two-Timescale Stochastic Approximation
summary: Bilevel optimization (BLO) is fundamental to hierarchical decision-making but suffers from critical instability under heavy-tailed stochastic noise. Existing variance-reduction techniques typically rely on myopic magnitude checks, which fail to distinguish informative geometric signals from impulsive outliers. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{RQ-TTSA} (Robust Quantile-guided TTSA), a distribution-aware framework that leverages historical gradient buffers to estimate rolling quantiles for adaptive Huber-style clipping, effectively preserving local optimization geometry while strictly bounding effective variance. Theoretically, we provide a convergence analysis for quantile-guided TTSA under nonconvex-strongly convex assumptions with infinite-variance noise ($p \in (1,2]$), deriving a rate of $\mathcal{O}(T^{-\frac{p-1}{3p-2}})$ that recovers optimal dependence on the heavy-tailed parameter. Empirically, across six diverse tasks, spanning heterogeneous vision benchmarks, dynamic games under momentum poisoning, and offline reinforcement learning, RQ-TTSA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by eliminating divergence spikes and ensuring stable convergence. Our method demonstrates significant robustness to hyperparameter variations and incurs negligible computational overhead ($\approx 2.7\%$ increase), validating distribution-aware gradient control as a practical and necessary component for reliable bilevel learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RQ-TTSA，一种基于分位数引导的鲁棒双层优化方法，通过自适应Huber式裁剪处理重尾随机噪声，在非凸强凸假设下实现收敛率O(T^{-(p-1)/(3p-2)})，并在异构视觉、动态博弈和离线强化学习等任务中消除发散尖峰，计算开销仅增加约2.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有双层优化方法在重尾随机噪声下存在严重的不稳定性，传统的方差缩减技术依赖短视的幅度检查，无法区分信息性几何信号与脉冲性异常值，需要一种分布感知的梯度控制方法。
AI.method: 利用历史梯度缓冲区估计滚动分位数，实现自适应Huber式裁剪，在保留局部优化几何结构的同时严格限制有效方差，形成分布感知的鲁棒分位数引导TTSA框架。
AI.result: 推导了在无限方差噪声(p∈(1,2])下的收敛率O(T^{-(p-1)/(3p-2)})；在六个异构任务（视觉基准、动量投毒动态博弈、离线强化学习）上消除发散尖峰，优于SOTA基线；超参数鲁棒性强，计算开销仅约2.7%。
AI.conclusion: 分布感知的梯度控制是可靠双层学习中实用且必要的组件，RQ-TTSA为处理重尾噪声下的双层优化提供了有效方案。

title: Adaptive Recurrent Message Passing for Test Time Computing on Graphs
summary: Pre-trained foundation models have demonstrated remarkable success in many domains, enabling a unified backbone to generalize across diverse downstream tasks. However, extending this paradigm to graph learning remains challenging due to the intrinsic mismatch between graph data and fixed architectural designs. In this work, we show that this limitation can be overcome via recurrent graph models. To achieve this, we conduct a systematic theoretical analysis, rigorously deriving step dependence as a necessary and sufficient condition for an adaptively convergent recurrent process. Building on this foundation, we propose AdaR, an Adaptive Recurrent graph model, empowering flexible test-time computing on various downstream tasks without changing model parameters. To enable adaptive inference, AdaR explicitly encodes normalized step information and representation-target relations into the recurrent updates. To ensure convergence of the recurrent process, AdaR employs gradient-based supervision signals that guide representation updates throughout the recurrence. Empirical results demonstrate that AdaR consistently outperforms strong baselines in both inductive and transductive settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaR，一种自适应递归图模型，通过理论推导证明步依赖是递归过程自适应收敛的充要条件，实现了在不改变模型参数的情况下灵活进行测试时计算，在归纳和直推设置下均优于强基线。
AI.motivation: 预训练基础模型在多个领域取得了成功，但将这一范式扩展到图学习仍面临挑战，主要原因是图数据与固定架构设计之间存在内在不匹配问题。
AI.method: 通过系统理论分析推导出步依赖是自适应收敛递归过程的充要条件；提出AdaR模型，显式编码归一化步信息和表示-目标关系到递归更新中；采用梯度监督信号指导表示更新以确保收敛。
AI.result: AdaR在归纳学习和直推学习设置下均持续优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 递归图模型能够克服图数据与固定架构之间的不匹配问题，实现自适应测试时计算，为图学习中的基础模型范式提供了新思路。

title: CADRE: Stable, Parameter Efficient Adaptation of Medical Vision Language Models with Bounded Forgetting and Prior Drift
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) such as BiomedCLIP generalize broadly, but adapting them to a clinical service is as much a safety problem as an accuracy one. Updating a deployed model for a new imaging modality can fail silently in two ways that harm patients: it can forget modalities it already handled (catastrophic forgetting), and it can drift from its trustworthy pretrained prior toward modality-specific shortcuts. We study parameter-efficient continual adaptation through these two properties rather than leaderboard accuracy, presenting CADRE: a frozen-backbone framework combining low-rank adaptation (LoRA) with an online, self-scaling, similarity-aware elastic weight consolidation term that bounds retained-competence loss, and an anchor-to-prior penalty bounding embedding drift from the frozen prior. Two short guarantees, a bound on total consolidation mass and a scale-invariance property, remove the scale-related sources of vanilla EWC's order fragility. Using breast cancer across three maximally dissimilar modalities (histopathology, ultrasound, chest radiography) as a controlled cross-modality stress test, under a multi-seed, multi-order protocol with paired significance testing and training approximately 0.23% of parameters, CADRE attains the highest accuracy, SPQ, and backward transfer and the lowest forgetting among adapting methods, reducing forgetting roughly sevenfold versus the strongest regularized baseline (0.075 to 0.011; paired p=0.023) and achieving positive backward transfer where every baseline is negative. We frame these as stability properties aligned with clinical-safety desiderata, not a deployment guarantee; robustness to distribution shift and adversarial inputs is out of scope.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CADRE框架，通过冻结主干网络、结合LoRA与改进的弹性权重巩固（EWC）项和锚定先验惩罚项，实现医学视觉-语言模型在跨模态持续学习中的参数高效自适应，在乳腺癌症多模态数据上遗忘率降低约7倍并实现正向后向迁移。
AI.motivation: 医学VLM（如BiomedCLIP）在广泛泛化后部署到临床服务时，面临两个安全挑战：灾难性遗忘（遗忘已有模态）和嵌入漂移（偏离可信预训练先验转而学习模态特定捷径）。现有方法主要关注排行榜精度，忽视了这些与临床安全相关的稳定性问题。
AI.method: 提出CADRE框架：采用冻结主干网络架构，结合低秩适应（LoRA）与两项正则化项——①在线自缩放相似感知弹性权重巩固（EWC）项，用于约束保留能力损失；②锚定先验惩罚项，约束嵌入从冻结先验的漂移。同时引入两个理论保证：总巩固质量界和尺度不变性，消除了原始EWC在缩放上的顺序脆弱性。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌症三个最大异质模态（组织病理学、超声、胸部X光）的跨模态压力测试中，仅训练约0.23%参数，CADRE在准确性、SPQ、后向迁移上取得最高，遗忘率最低。相比最强正则化基线，遗忘率降低约7倍（0.075→0.011，配对p=0.023），并实现所有基线均为负时的正向后向迁移。
AI.conclusion: CADRE将持续学习中的稳定性属性与临床安全需求对齐，但在分布偏移和对抗性输入鲁棒性方面的保证超出本文范围，不构成部署保证。

title: Federated learning with heavy-tailed gradient noise and communication noise: a variance-reduction based algorithm
summary: Federated learning (FL) is an emerging distributed machine learning paradigm that enables local devices to jointly train a global model while keeping data decentralized and private. We propose a variance-reduction based algorithm, VRA-FedSGD, for FL in the presence of heavy-tailed gradient noise and communication noise, where these noises are prevalent in large-scale machine learning over wireless networks and Internet of Things deployments. VRA-FedSGD employs a momentum variance reduction technique together with a nonlinear mapping to mitigate heavy-tailed gradient noise, and uses a variance-reduced aggregation mechanism to suppress heavy-tailed communication noise. In the mean sense, VRA-FedSGD achieves a convergence rate of {\small$\mathcal{O}\left(K^{-(p-1)/(2p-1)}\right)$} for nonconvex objective functions, where $p$ is the tail index of heavy-tailed noise. In the almost sure sense, VRA-FedSGD achieves a convergence rate of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(K^{-(1-1/(p-ε))}\right)$ for strongly convex objective functions, where $ε$ is an arbitrarily small constant. Simulated experiments on a logistic regression problem with real-world data verify the effectiveness of VRA-FedSGD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VRA-FedSGD算法，通过动量方差缩减和非线性映射技术，有效应对联邦学习中的重尾梯度噪声和通信噪声，在非凸和强凸目标函数下均取得了理论收敛保证，并通过实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中存在重尾梯度噪声和通信噪声，这些噪声在大规模无线网络和物联网部署中普遍存在，严重影响模型训练的收敛性能。现有方法缺乏对这两种噪声同时处理的鲁棒机制。
AI.method: VRA-FedSGD算法结合动量方差缩减（momentum variance reduction）与非线性映射（nonlinear mapping）来缓解重尾梯度噪声，并采用方差缩减的聚合机制（variance-reduced aggregation）来抑制重尾通信噪声。
AI.result: 在均值意义上，非凸目标函数下收敛率为O(K^{-(p-1)/(2p-1)})；在几乎必然意义上，强凸目标函数下收敛率为Õ(K^{-(1-1/(p-ε))})，其中p为重尾噪声的尾指数。
AI.conclusion: VRA-FedSGD在理论和实验上均证明能有效应对联邦学习中的重尾噪声干扰，为无线网络和物联网场景下的分布式学习提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

title: POTracker: Optimizing Large Language Models for Standard-Compliant Power Outage Report Generation
summary: Recent large language models (LLMs) are good at general text generation, but it is still hard to use them for domain-specific data generation because the output must follow strict formatting and structural rules. Unlike open-ended tasks such as question answering or translation, domain-specific generation must be both semantically correct and compliant with existing guidelines and standards. In this work, we study the nationwide interoperability problem of utility power outage reports in the United States. In practice, outage reports need to be machine-readable (e.g., JSON or XML) and must strictly follow requirements from energy-sector regulatory bodies. To address this problem, we propose POTracker, an optimized LLM for power outage report generation. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct using our proposed objective. The key contribution is a new loss function, POTrackerLoss, that considers both textual similarity and structural (tag) similarity between the generated report and the ground-truth report. We evaluate POTracker on a dataset of 1,000 power outage reports and compare it with five well-known fine-tuning methods and one rule-based XML conversion method. Results show that POTracker outperforms other fine-tuning approaches, improving overall accuracy by up to 51% and reaching 86.47% structural accuracy for generated power outage reports. In addition, we conduct a human study to assess the quality of the ground-truth standard reports, where domain experts assign the generated labels an average score of 4.03 on a 0--5 scale.

AI.tldr: 针对美国电力停电报告这一领域特定的结构化数据生成问题，提出了POTracker方法，通过设计兼顾文本相似度和结构（标签）相似度的新损失函数POTrackerLoss来微调Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型，在1000份报告数据集上将结构准确率提升至86.47%，相比其他微调方法最高提升51%。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在通用文本生成上表现良好，但在领域特定数据生成中面临输出必须严格遵循格式化和结构规则的挑战。以美国电力停电报告为例，报告需满足机器可读格式（JSON/XML）及能源监管机构的严格要求，现有方法难以同时保证语义正确性和结构合规性。
AI.method: 提出POTracker方法，基于Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型进行微调，核心贡献是设计了新的损失函数POTrackerLoss，该函数综合考量生成报告与真实报告之间的文本相似度和结构（标签）相似度。在1000份电力停电报告数据集上进行了评估，与五种知名微调方法和一种基于规则的XML转换方法进行对比。
AI.result: POTracker在整体准确率上比其他微调方法最高提升51%，结构准确率达到86.47%。人类评估中，领域专家对生成的标签评分平均为4.03（0-5分制）。
AI.conclusion: POTracker通过兼顾文本和结构相似度的损失函数设计，有效解决了领域特定结构化数据生成问题，在电力停电报告生成任务上显著优于现有微调方法。

title: VeriEvol: Scaling Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning via Verifiable Evol-Instruct
summary: Scaling reinforcement learning for visual mathematical reasoning requires more than generating harder questions: as data volume grows, the reward labels themselves must remain reliable. Yet existing data pipelines scale supervision while trusting the labeller, and policy-side methods assume the underlying answers are already correct. We instead treat scaling as a verifiable data-construction problem and decouple two axes before any policy update: prompt difficulty, expanded by route-specific evolution operators, and answer reliability, enforced by offline hypothesis-test falsification. We instantiate this as VeriEvol, an iterative framework with two extensible components: a type-aware evolution module that rewrites low-difficulty image-question seeds into harder, image-grounded prompts; and HTV-Agent, a verifier that accepts an answer only after multi-source counter-evidence has failed to refute it. The resulting verified data scales in volume, extends by adding evolution routes or verifier channels, and plugs directly into existing GRPO-style RL recipes. On a five-benchmark visual-math suite, scaling evolved SFT data from 10K to 250K samples raises the mean accuracy from 35.42 to 54.73; then, with backbone, SFT initialization, and GRPO recipe held fixed, VeriEvol adds a cumulative +3.88 over an un-evolved RL baseline, of which +1.82 comes from evolved prompts and +2.06 from the HTV-Agent verifier. We release the prompts, data, models, code, and the full verifier trace of every sample, so that downstream work can scale and audit the pipeline rather than only inspect its outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeriEvol框架，将视觉数学推理的强化学习扩展解耦为两个独立维度：通过类型感知进化操作提升题目难度，以及通过离线假设检验验证（HTV-Agent）确保答案可靠性。在五基准视觉数学套件上，扩展SFT数据从10K到250K使准确率从35.42提升至54.73；在固定GRPO设置下，VeriEvol相比无进化的RL基线累计提升+3.88，其中进化提示贡献+1.82，HTV-Agent验证器贡献+2.06。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉数学推理数据流水线在扩展规模时仅信任标注者提供的标签，而策略侧方法又假设底层答案已经正确。随着数据量增长，奖励标签的可靠性无法保证，需要一种可验证的数据构造方法来解耦题目难度和答案可靠性两个维度。
AI.method: VeriEvol包含两个可扩展组件：(1) 类型感知进化模块，将低难度图像-问题种子通过路径特化的进化算子重写为更难的、基于图像的提示；(2) HTV-Agent验证器，仅在多方反证据未能反驳答案后才接受该答案，基于离线假设检验验证机制。
AI.result: 在五基准视觉数学套件上，将SFT数据从10K扩展到250K样本使平均准确率从35.42提升到54.73。在固定骨干网络、SFT初始化和GRPO配方的情况下，VeriEvol相比无进化的RL基线累计提升+3.88，其中进化提示贡献+1.82，HTV-Agent验证器贡献+2.06。
AI.conclusion: VeriEvol能够以可验证的方式扩展数据量，通过添加进化路径或验证器通道即可扩展，且可直接插入现有GRPO式强化学习流程。作者开源了提示、数据、模型、代码及每个样本的完整验证器追踪，支持下游工作的扩展与审计。

title: The Scissors Effect: When Resize-Based Input Diversity Helps or Hurts Transfer Attacks
summary: Input Diversity (DI), which applies random resizing and padding at each attack iteration, is a near-default ingredient of transfer-based adversarial attacks, widely assumed to improve transferability. We show this assumption is regime-dependent and, for robustly trained surrogates, often reversed. Varying only the surrogate, increasing the DI probability raises transfer success for standard surrogates but lowers it for robust ones: the two response curves separate like a pair of scissors, a pattern we call the Scissors Effect. The effect is strong and consistent on ImageNet, where blind DI costs the robust source 10.3% attack success on average across CNN, ViT, Swin, and ConvNeXt targets and across ten attacks spanning 2018-2024; it is smaller on CIFAR-10 unless DI is made aggressive. A controlled robustness-strength sweep that varies only the training budget shows the harm is graded rather than binary, crossing from beneficial to harmful already in the little-robustness regime. We trace it to gradient geometry: a resize/translation decomposition attributes roughly 67% of the harm to resize, and a direct source-target gradient-alignment measurement confirms the same resize operation improves alignment for standard surrogates but degrades it for robust ones. We summarize the regime with Local Gradient Consistency (LGC), a single input-space probe that separates the two surrogate types, and prove a bias-variance crossover theorem isolating where DI helps from where its resize bias dominates. A training-free rule (CG-DI) that disables diversity when LGC is high avoids the loss on robust surrogates while keeping DI's benefit on standard ones, positioning the Scissors Effect as a DI-specific manifestation of the broader robustness-transferability trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文发现输入多样性（DI）在对抗攻击中的效果依赖于代理模型的鲁棒性：对标准模型提升迁移成功率，但对鲁棒模型反而降低，形成"剪刀效应"；通过梯度几何分析归因于resize操作，并提出基于局部梯度一致性（LGC）的无训练规则CG-DI来避免该损失。
AI.motivation: 输入多样性（DI）作为迁移攻击的近乎默认的组件，被广泛认为能提升迁移性，但本文发现这一假设依赖于代理模型的鲁棒性，在鲁棒代理上效果反转，需要深入理解其作用机制和边界条件。
AI.method: 1) 系统实验：在ImageNet和CIFAR-10上，仅改变代理模型鲁棒性，测量DI概率对攻击成功率的影响；2) 梯度几何分析：通过resize/translation分解归因伤害来源，测量源-目标梯度对齐度；3) 提出局部梯度一致性（LGC）作为区分两种代理类型的单输入探针；4) 推导偏差-方差交叉定理；5) 提出CG-DI规则。
AI.result: 1) ImageNet上盲目DI使鲁棒代理平均损失10.3%攻击成功率（覆盖CNN、ViT、Swin、ConvNeXt四种架构和十种2018-2024攻击方法）；2) CIFAR-10上效果较小，除非DI设置激进；3) 鲁棒性强度扫掠显示伤害是渐进的而非二元的；4) resize操作贡献约67%的伤害；5) resize降低鲁棒代理的梯度对齐度但提升标准代理的对齐度。
AI.conclusion: 输入多样性的效果存在强"剪刀效应"：在标准代理上有利，在鲁棒代理上有害。其根源在于resize操作对梯度几何的不同影响。提出的CG-DI规则（当LGC高时禁用DI）能无训练地避免鲁棒代理上的损失，同时保留标准代理上的收益，将剪刀效应定位为更广泛的鲁棒性-迁移性权衡在DI上的特定表现。

title: The Topology of Ill-Posed Questions: Persistent Homology for Detection and Steering in LLMs
summary: Ill-posed questions, including ambiguous, underspecified, or contradictory queries, may admit no valid answer or multiple plausible answers, posing a challenge for large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches largely analyze ill-posedness through model outputs and often focus on specific subclasses. We investigate whether diverse sources of ill-posedness can be represented within a unified topology of LLM internal states and whether this structure can be used to steer response behavior. We model the contextual hidden states of prompt tokens at each transformer layer as a point cloud and characterize its geometry using finite zero-dimensional persistent homology. Each layer is summarized by three compact descriptors: mean finite lifetime, normalized lifetime entropy, and largest-lifetime concentration. Concatenating these descriptors across layers yields a topology representation of the question. We further introduce topology-conditioned activation steering, which retrieves topologically similar examples and constructs query-specific activation interventions that encourage source-aware clarification or abstention. Across three open-weight LLMs, topology features consistently outperform prompt-based and pooled-hidden-state baselines for ill-posedness classification, improving average accuracy from \(67.4\%\) to \(78.9\%\) on AmbigQA, from \(79.9\%\) to \(88.5\%\) on SituatedQA, and from \(57.6\%\) to \(69.6\%\) on CLAMBER 9-way classification. Topology-conditioned steering increases the average total acceptable response rate from \(61.4\%\) to \(70.6\%\) and grounded acceptable responses from \(11.9\%\) to \(16.4\%\). These results show that persistent homology provides both an interpretable representation of ill-posedness and an effective mechanism for targeted response steering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用持久同调（persistent homology）分析LLM内部隐状态的拓扑结构，以统一表征多种类型的病态问题（歧义、欠指定、矛盾等），并基于拓扑相似性进行激活干预，引导模型生成澄清或拒答的回应。在三个开源LLM和三个基准上，拓扑特征在分类和响应引导方面均显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要从模型输出层面分析病态问题，且多聚焦于特定子类；缺乏一个统一的框架来表征多种病态问题来源，并利用这种表征直接引导模型行为。
AI.method: 1) 将LLM各Transformer层的上下文隐状态视为点云，计算零维持久同调（finite lifetime, lifetime entropy, largest-lifetime concentration）作为每层的拓扑描述子，跨层拼接得到问题的拓扑表示。2) 提出拓扑条件激活引导（topology-conditioned activation steering），检索拓扑相似样本并构建查询特定的激活干预向量，鼓励模型输出澄清或拒答。
AI.result: 在AmbigQA、SituatedQA和CLAMBER三个基准上，拓扑特征分类准确率分别提升至78.9%、88.5%和69.6%（对应基线67.4%、79.9%、57.6%）。拓扑条件引导将平均总可接受响应率从61.4%提升至70.6%，基于原因的合理响应率从11.9%提升至16.4%。
AI.conclusion: 持久同调能为病态问题提供可解释的表征，并作为一种有效的机制实现有针对性的响应引导。

title: Generative Robust Optimisation
summary: Classical uncertainty sets for robust optimisation impose fixed geometric shapes that cannot represent the complex dependencies present in real-world data. We propose Generative Robust Optimisation (GRO), a framework in which a deep generative model defines the uncertainty set as the image of a neural network decoder over a calibrated latent set, naturally accommodating nonlinear correlations, asymmetry, and multimodality. A five-point evaluation framework (reconstruction fidelity, distribution matching, latent regularity, robust relevance, and computational tractability) provides systematic, model-agnostic criteria for assessing any neural network-based uncertainty set. We instantiate this framework with a Wasserstein Adversarial Autoencoder employing Gaussian mixture model-guided training for latent regularity and constraint-consistency regularisation for robust relevance. Restricting the decoder to ReLU activations enables exact worst-case verification through mixed-integer programming embedding. Extensive experiments on a production planning problem across six uncertainty distributions and six generative architectures, together with a multi-period facility location study, validate the framework and demonstrate that systematic attention to all five criteria yields uncertainty sets that are simultaneously expressive, well-calibrated, and optimisation-tractable.

AI.tldr: 提出生成式鲁棒优化（GRO）框架，用深度生成模型（解码器+校准潜在集）定义不确定性集，通过五项评估准则系统评价，实例化为Wasserstein对抗自编码器，在多种分布和架构下验证了表达力、校准性和可计算性的统一。
AI.motivation: 经典鲁棒优化的不确定集采用固定几何形状，无法表示真实数据中存在的非线性相关、非对称和多模态等复杂依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出GRO框架：用深度生成模型（神经网络解码器）将校准后的潜在集映射为不确定集；设计五项评估准则（重构保真度、分布匹配、潜在正则性、鲁棒相关性、计算可处理性）；实例化为Wasserstein对抗自编码器（WAAE），采用GMM引导训练和约束一致性正则化；解码器限制为ReLU激活以支持混合整数规划精确验证。
AI.result: 在生产计划问题（6种分布、6种生成架构）和多周期设施选址问题上的实验验证了框架有效性，表明系统关注全部五项准则可获得同时具有表达力、校准良好且优化可处理的不确定集。
AI.conclusion: GRO框架及其评估准则为基于神经网络的不确定集提供了系统化、模型无关的评估手段，在表达力与可计算性之间取得了有效平衡。

title: SPIRAL: Learning to Search and Aggregate
summary: Language model reasoning can be substantially improved at test time via scaffolds that scale inference compute across different primitives -- sequential reasoning within a trace, independently sampled parallel traces, and aggregation of multiple reasoning traces into a final response. During post-training, however, language models are optimized only for sequential reasoning within a single trace. We introduce Sequential-Parallel-Aggregative Reinforcement Learning (SPIRAL), a framework in which a language model is trained to use all three primitives, as part of a unified inference compute pipeline. Concretely, the language model first samples a set of independent traces in parallel, each produced through sequential chain-of-thought reasoning, and then generates a final aggregation trace conditioned on those traces; all components are optimized end-to-end against the reward of the final aggregated response. To train this system, SPIRAL uses set reinforcement learning to teach models to produce a set of traces that are collectively useful for an aggregator and standard reinforcement learning to teach models to aggregate the set into improved final responses.
