Our experiments on reasoning tasks show that SPIRAL effectively scales with inference compute, outperforming GRPO by up to 11$\times$ scaling efficiency and 15% higher performance when all three compute primitives are scaled.

AI.tldr: 提出SPIRAL框架，通过集合强化学习联合训练语言模型在推理时使用三种计算原语（顺序推理、并行采样、聚合），显著提升推理性能和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有后训练阶段语言模型仅针对单迹顺序推理进行优化，无法有效利用测试时可扩展的并行采样和聚合原语，导致推理计算扩展效率受限。
AI.method: 提出SPIRAL框架：模型先并行采样多个独立推理迹（顺序CoT），再生成聚合迹整合信息；通过集合强化学习优化迹集合的集体效用，通过标准强化学习优化聚合能力，端到端基于最终聚合响应奖励进行训练。
AI.result: 在推理任务上，SPIRAL有效扩展推理计算量，相比GRPO实现高达11倍的扩展效率提升，在所有三种计算原语同时扩展时性能提升15%。
AI.conclusion: 统一训练三种推理计算原语能显著提升测试时计算扩展效果，SPIRAL为后训练阶段利用并行和聚合能力提供了有效范式。

title: Mitigating Measurement-Induced Training Instability in Hybrid Quantum Neural Networks for Protein Classification
summary: Hybrid Quantum Neural Network (QNN) classifiers produce logits as expectation values of quantum measurement operators. For standard Pauli measurements, these outputs are intrinsically bounded to the interval [-1,1]. When such bounded logits are used directly with the cross-entropy loss applied to softmax-normalized logits for multi-class classification, the loss function operates in a regime of weak sensitivity to logit differences. As a consequence, parameter gradients are suppressed, leading to unstable optimization in variational quantum classifiers (VQCs). In this work, we identify this effect as measurement-induced logit contraction, a previously uncharacterized source of trainability degradation in hybrid QNNs. To address this limitation, we introduce a learnable scaling parameter, termed Quantum Measurement Temperature (QMT), which rescales quantum measurement outputs prior to the loss. Unlike post-hoc calibration, QMT acts during training and compensates for the physically imposed bounds on quantum measurement outputs. This rescaling increases gradient magnitude and variance, thereby improving loss sensitivity. The proposed mechanism is architecture-agnostic and does not modify the quantum ansatz, circuit depth, or measurement operators. Experiments on fluorescence microscopy images and a six-class variant of Fashion MNIST demonstrate that QMT consistently enhances logit separation, strengthens gradients, stabilizes training across random initializations, and improves classification accuracy, relative to unscaled measurement readouts. These results demonstrate that QMT enables stable and reliable training of hybrid QNNs for practical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文发现混合量子神经网络中，由于量子测量输出被限制在[-1,1]区间，直接使用这些有界logits进行softmax交叉熵损失会导致梯度抑制和训练不稳定。为此提出量子测量温度（QMT）可学习缩放参数，在训练前重缩放量子测量输出，有效增强梯度幅度和方差，提升logits分离度和分类精度。
AI.motivation: 混合量子神经网络分类器使用量子测量期望值作为logits，但标准Pauli测量输出被固有地限制在[-1,1]区间，直接应用于softmax交叉熵损失会导致损失函数对logits差异的敏感性弱，参数梯度被抑制，引起变分量子分类器优化不稳定。本文旨在解决这一此前未被表征的训练性退化问题。
AI.method: 提出量子测量温度（QMT），一个可学习的缩放参数，在损失函数计算前对量子测量输出进行重缩放。QMT在训练过程中起作用，补偿物理上施加的量子测量输出界限，增强梯度幅度和方差，提高损失敏感性。该机制与架构无关，不改变量子ansatz、电路深度或测量算子。
AI.result: 在荧光显微镜图像和六类Fashion MNIST数据集上的实验表明，QMT持续增强了logits分离度，强化了梯度，稳定了跨随机初始化的训练，并提高了分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: QMT使得混合量子神经网络能够实现稳定可靠的训练，适用于实际应用场景。

title: Against Proxy Optimization
summary: I discuss conditions under which maximizing a proxy utility function is harmful and suggest this poses problems for applying decision theory.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了最大化代理效用函数在何种条件下会造成危害，并指出这给决策理论的应用带来了问题。
AI.motivation: 研究最大化代理效用函数可能产生有害后果的条件，质疑现有决策理论框架在实践中的适用性。
AI.method: 理论分析，通过讨论代理效用函数最大化的边界条件，识别其潜在危害的产生机制。
AI.result: 识别出最大化代理效用函数可能导致危害的具体条件，并说明这些条件对决策理论的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 代理效用函数的最大化在某些条件下可能是有害的，这迫使我们需要重新审视决策理论的应用边界。

title: Concept-Constrained Prompt Learning for Few-Shot CLIP Adaptation
summary: Few-shot prompt learning is an effective strategy for adapting CLIP to downstream tasks, but class-only prompt optimization can overfit base-class supervision and weaken transfer to unseen classes. We propose Concept-Constrained Prompt Learning (CCPL), a lightweight regularization framework that anchors learnable class prompts to frozen concept-level text prototypes without updating CLIP encoders. CCPL learns a set of shared context tokens, instantiates class prompts by appending class names, and constructs frozen concept prototypes from a class-level concept bank. During training, a text-space cosine consistency objective aligns learnable class-prompt embeddings with frozen concept prototypes; concept dropout provides additional regularization against over-reliance on fixed concept lists. At inference, CCPL optionally fuses class-prompt logits with concept-prototype logits using a controllable ensemble weight alpha. Our default configuration uses text-space concept regularization lambda = 0.5, concept dropout p = 0.3 and weak concept-guided fusion (alpha = 0.1), with no KL-based prediction consistency term. Experiments under identical automatically-generated fallback splits show that CCPL improves the base-to-new harmonic mean on DTD (+0.6) and EuroSAT (+2.9) compared with CoOp, while remaining near-neutral on OxfordPets (-0.1). Ablations indicate that text-space concept regularization is consistently beneficial, while the best concept-guided inference strength is dataset- and protocol-sensitive. These results suggest concept constraints are most effective when concept prototypes align naturally with dataset semantics, and identify fine-grained categories as a current boundary condition. The code is released at: https://github.com/richael-sang/concept-constrained-prompt-learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出概念约束提示学习（CCPL），通过将可学习类提示锚定到冻结的概念原型上，在无需更新CLIP编码器的情况下缓解基类过拟合，提升基类到新类的泛化性能。实验表明CCPL在DTD和EuroSAT上优于CoOp，但在细粒度分类场景效果有限。
AI.motivation: 少样本提示学习虽然能有效适应CLIP到下游任务，但仅优化类提示会过拟合基类监督，削弱对未见类别的迁移能力。
AI.method: CCPL学习一组共享上下文标记，实例化类提示后拼接类名，并从类级概念库构建冻结概念原型。训练时通过文本空间余弦一致性目标对齐可学习类提示嵌入与冻结概念原型，并引入概念丢弃正则化。推理时可选择用可控权重融合类提示logits与概念原型logits。
AI.result: 在自动生成的划分上，CCPL相比CoOp在DTD基类到新类调和平均提升+0.6，EuroSAT提升+2.9，OxfordPets基本持平（-0.1）。
AI.conclusion: 概念约束在概念原型与数据集语义自然对齐时最有效，细粒度类别是当前方法的边界条件。

title: Causal Discovery in the Era of Agents
summary: Recent attempts to combine large language models (LLMs) with causal discovery ask models to infer pairwise directions, propose graph structures, or inject language-model outputs as priors and constraints. These approaches promise faster analysis, but they also obscure whether a causal evidence is supported by data and assumptions or by textual associations, prompt artifacts and hallucinated mechanisms. We argue for a different role for agents in causal discovery. Agents should inspect data, retrieve context, explain method assumptions and clarify graph outputs, but they should not supply edges, orientations, priors, constraints or causal conclusions. We propose the principle that agents assist the workflow, while causal claims remain grounded in data, explicit assumptions, formal algorithms, diagnostics and user or domain-expert decisions. We instantiate this principle in causal-learn+, an online platform that coordinates data analysis, preprocessing, method recommendation, expert-knowledge incorporation, formal discovery and interpretation around the algorithmic ecosystem of causal-learn. A case study on Big Five personality data illustrates agent-assisted pipeline of causal discovery without turning language-model unreliability into causal evidence. The platform is available at causallearn.com.

AI.tldr: 本文提出因果发现中LLM应仅辅助工作流程（检查数据、检索上下文、解释方法假设等），而不提供边、方向、先验或因果结论，所有因果主张必须基于数据、明确假设、形式化算法、诊断和领域专家决策。基于此原则实现causal-learn+平台，通过大五人格数据案例验证。
AI.motivation: 现有将LLM与因果发现结合的方法存在严重问题：模型推断的因果证据可能来自文本关联、提示伪影或幻觉机制，而非真实数据和假设支撑，导致因果结论不可靠。
AI.method: 提出代理辅助原则：LLM仅协助工作流（数据检查、上下文检索、方法假设解释、图形输出澄清），不提供边、方向、先验、约束或因果结论。基于此构建causal-learn+在线平台，协调数据分析、预处理、方法推荐、专家知识融入、形式化发现和解释。
AI.result: 在Big Five人格数据上的案例研究展示了代理辅助的因果发现流程，避免了语言模型不可靠性转化为因果证据的问题。平台已上线causallearn.com。
AI.conclusion: 因果发现中LLM应限定为辅助角色，因果主张必须保持对数据、正式算法和领域专家决策的依赖，不能将语言模型输出直接作为因果证据。

title: Stationary Robust Mean-Field Games under Model Mismatches
summary: Deploying multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in the real world is often limited by model mismatches between the training simulators and the true environment, which could be further amplified through strategic interactions and result in severe performance degradation upon deployment. Distributional robustness offers a principled response by optimizing policies against worst-case transition models drawn from an uncertainty set, but standard robust MARL frameworks become increasingly intractable as the number of agents grows. This paper develops an infinite-horizon, stationary mean-field game framework that incorporates distributional model uncertainty directly into the population-coupled dynamics. We establish a robust dynamic programming principle with a contractive Bellman operator and prove the existence of a stationary robust mean-field equilibrium via a fixed-point argument. We further develop the first concrete algorithm with convergence guarantees. We then connect the mean-field solution to a finite-population robust game whose ambiguity sets depend on the empirical distribution, showing that the mean-field equilibrium policy induces approximate equilibrium behavior as the population size increases. Under a contractive robust-dynamics regime, we further obtain explicit non-asymptotic error bounds. Numerical experiments further illustrate the qualitative and quantitative impact of robustness under multiple uncertainty models, validating our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多智能体强化学习在真实部署中因仿真器与真实环境模型失配导致的性能下降问题，提出了一个基于分布鲁棒优化的无限时域稳态平均场博弈框架，证明了稳态鲁棒平均场均衡的存在性，设计了首个具有收敛保证的算法，并建立了有限种群鲁棒博弈与平均场解之间的联系，通过非渐近误差界和数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习在实际部署中面临训练仿真器与真实环境之间的模型失配问题，这种失配会通过策略交互被放大，导致部署时性能严重下降。标准鲁棒MARL框架随智能体数量增长变得难以处理，亟需一个可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建了将分布鲁棒模型不确定性直接融入群体耦合动力学的无限时域稳态平均场博弈框架；建立了具有压缩Bellman算子的鲁棒动态规划原理，并通过不动点论证证明了稳态鲁棒平均场均衡的存在性；设计了首个具有收敛保证的具体算法；将平均场解与依赖经验分布的有限种群鲁棒博弈建立了联系。
AI.result: 证明了稳态鲁棒平均场均衡的存在性；开发了首个具有收敛保证的算法；建立了平均场策略对有限种群近似均衡行为的诱导关系；在压缩鲁棒动力学条件下得到了显式非渐近误差界；数值实验验证了多种不确定性模型下鲁棒性的定性和定量影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出的鲁棒平均场博弈框架有效解决了多智能体强化学习中的模型失配问题，兼具理论保证和计算可行性，为大规模多智能体系统的鲁棒部署提供了理论支撑和实用算法。

title: AI-driven Optimisation of Quality of Recovery (QoR) in Remote Patient Monitoring
summary: Remote patient monitoring depends on patient-reported data to capture the subjective dimension of recovery that devices cannot measure. The Quality of Recovery (QoR-15) survey is the gold-standard instrument for this purpose. It was designed and validated for occasional in-hospital assessment, yet remote monitoring now administers it to patients daily. In our own post-surgical deployment, only 55% of patients submitted the survey more than 14 days of 30 monitoring days. We developed QoR-compact, a five-item daily input for the RPM prediction pathway. Setting a deployment-driven target of one-third of the daily items, we exhaustively evaluated all 3,003 five-question subsets of the QoR-15 and tested whether the best of them matches the full instrument in predicting near-term postoperative recovery severity. QoR-compact achieves a mean AUC-ROC of 0.968 (95% CI 0.915-0.988), statistically comparable to the 0.964 baseline obtained with one-third of the items. Patient-level backtesting indicates that it tracks readmission events as faithfully as the full form. Its five items span the physical and psychological axes of recovery: Q3 (feeling rested), Q9 (feeling comfortable and in control), Q10 (general well-being), Q12 (severe pain), and Q14 (feeling worried or anxious). The QoR-15 remains the gold-standard measure of recovery; QoR-compact complements it as a shorter daily input designed for prediction. This parity provides the basis for a prospective study of whether a lighter daily input is, in turn, completed more consistently. External validation on larger cohorts is required before clinical use.

AI.tldr: 针对远程患者监测中每日问卷依从性低（仅55%患者完成超过14天）的问题，本文从QoR-15中筛选出5个问题组成QoR-compact，在仅用1/3题量的情况下实现了与完整量表相当的近端术后恢复严重程度预测性能（AUC-ROC 0.968 vs 0.964），并保持了相同的再入院事件追踪能力。
AI.motivation: 远程患者监测依赖患者自报数据来捕捉设备无法测量的主观恢复维度，但QoR-15设计用于偶发院内评估，在每日远程监测场景下患者依从性低（仅55%提交超过14天），亟需更轻量的日常评估工具。
AI.method: 以部署驱动的目标（每日题量缩减至1/3）为约束，穷举评估QoR-15的所有3,003个五问题子集，选出最佳子集QoR-compact（Q3、Q9、Q10、Q12、Q14），并与完整QoR-15进行预测性能比较。
AI.result: QoR-compact的平均AUC-ROC为0.968（95% CI 0.915-0.988），与完整量表0.964的基线统计相当；患者级回测表明其对再入院事件的追踪能力与完整形式一致。
AI.conclusion: QoR-compact可作为QoR-15的补充，作为更短小的日常输入用于预测；这种性能对等为前瞻性研究奠定了基础，需在更大队列上进行外部验证才能投入临床使用。

title: Training-free Task Classification for Multi-Task Model Merging
summary: Ever since the advent of foundation models and the pre-training-finetuning paradigm, there have been numerous efforts to merge multiple task-specific experts into a single multi-task model. Prior work largely focuses on finding a single merged model, but it often underperforms individual experts due to parameter interference. To resolve this, dynamic model merging employs routing to activate task-relevant parameters per input. However, existing routers typically require either additional training with abundant labeled datasets or assume the access to task IDs of each input at inference time. In this work, we aim to close the gap to expert performance without additional training or task-ID-access assumption. To this end, we formulate routing as training-free task classification for each test input. Using singular value decomposition (SVD)-based low-rank manifold approximations for each task, SiM scores tasks by the projection residual of the test input feature onto each task manifold and routes accordingly. The task manifolds are pre-computable offline from a pretrained backbone using a small per-task support set (e.g., 32 examples per task) prior to merging process, requiring no router training and no data during the merging process. Moreover, SiM integrates seamlessly with subspace-/mask-based merging that represents task-expert via lightweight compressed task vectors, avoiding the need to store full expert parameters. Experiments across computer vision and natural language processing benchmarks under task-unknown inference demonstrate that SiM substantially improves merged-model performance and consistently narrows the gap to individual task experts.

AI.tldr: 提出SiM方法，通过SVD低秩流形近似的投影残差进行无需训练的路由选择，在无任务ID假设下实现多任务模型合并，缩小与专家性能的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有动态模型合并方法的路由器需要额外训练或依赖任务ID信息，而单一合并模型因参数干扰性能下降，旨在无需训练和任务ID假设的条件下缩小与专家模型的性能差距。
AI.method: 将路由问题转化为无需训练的任务分类：对每个任务预计算SVD低秩流形近似，测试时计算输入特征在各任务流形上的投影残差作为相似度分数进行路由。仅需每任务少量支持集（如32个样本）预计算流形，无需路由训练和合并过程中的数据。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉和自然语言处理基准上，SiM在任务未知推理场景下显著提升合并模型性能，持续缩小与各任务专家模型之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: SiM通过训练自由的路由机制有效缓解参数干扰，实现了无需额外训练和任务ID的动态模型合并，且与子空间/掩码合并方法兼容。

title: AI Exposure Scores: what they measure, what they miss, and what comes next
summary: A set of exposure scores calculated in 2023 has become a central empirical input to the future of work debate. Produced by Eloundou et al. (2023) and referred to here as the GPTs are GPTs scores, they define exposure as the share of occupational tasks a large language model can assist with. This work is a genuine methodological contribution, but as the scores travel from the time and place they were produced, the limitations the authors named do not always travel with them. Two gaps have widened as a result. The first is structural, between what static exposure scores measure and what policy questions actually require. Taking the diffusion of these scores as a case study, we show how their temporal, geographic, and ontological limitations compound in policy-facing analyses, and we survey five families of research responding to these limits: dynamic and benchmark-based measures, ensemble methods, task-framework extensions, worker-centered metrics, and adoption and usage data. The second gap is the one we argue needs more attention: the coordination between researchers and policymakers. The policy-relevant work which ask who is harmed, who benefits, how, and when, continues to reference the static GPTs are GPTs scores without engagement with the methodological updates that would let these questions be answered more reliably. We then ask what additional steps towards navigating uncertainty remain: ex-post frameworks and the deliberate, political work of reimagining what futures are worthy of building towards are. Closing the research-policy gap is a shared task: policymakers must widen their evidence base, engage workers as epistemic partners, and shift from prediction to preparedness; researchers must build data infrastructure, adopt participatory methods, and write with policymakers in mind. Better measurement matters, but it will not close the second gap alone.

AI.tldr: 本文批判性地分析了Eloundou等人(2023)提出的GPTs暴露分数在政策传播中的局限性，指出该静态指标存在时间、地理和本体论上的结构性缺陷，并揭示了研究界与政策制定者之间在方法论更新上的协调不足这一更大鸿沟，最终呼吁双方共同行动以缩小研究-政策差距。
AI.motivation: GPTs暴露分数虽为方法论贡献，但其静态特性在跨时空传播中丧失了作者原始限定的边界条件，导致政策分析中产生结构性扭曲。作者旨在揭示这种测量工具与政策需求之间的错位，并呼吁学界和政策界关注协调不足这一更根本的问题。
AI.method: 以GPTs暴露分数的扩散为案例研究，系统梳理其时间、地理和本体论局限在政策分析中的累积效应，并调查五类回应性研究（动态与基准测量、集成方法、任务框架扩展、以工人为中心的指标、采纳与使用数据），进而提出需要加强研究-政策协调的论点。
AI.result: 发现两个鸿沟：一是结构性鸿沟（静态暴露分数与政策实际需求之间的错位），二是协调性鸿沟（政策研究持续引用静态GPTs分数而未纳入方法论更新）。提出后验框架和重新想象值得建设的未来等应对不确定性的步骤。
AI.conclusion: 缩小研究-政策差距需双方共同努力：政策制定者应拓宽证据基础、将工人视为认知伙伴、从预测转向 preparedness；研究者应建设数据基础设施、采用参与式方法、以政策制定者为目标受众写作。更好的测量本身不足以弥合第二个鸿沟。

title: On the Position Bias of On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves the learning efficiency of standard reinforcement learning through dense, token-level supervision from teachers. In the standard KL objective of OPD, token-level losses are uniformly averaged, implying equal weights for all tokens. However, we discover that not all tokens are created equal: as student rollouts grow longer, they deviate further from the teacher's distribution, leading to degraded supervision quality at later positions. As a result, OPD using only the first 30% of tokens can perform comparably to using all tokens, whereas OPD using only the last 30% of tokens barely learns anything. In this work, we provide a principled understanding of this issue through the lens of constrained optimization. Based on these insights, we derive Importance-Weighted On-Policy Distillation (IW-OPD), in which the weight assigned to each token depends on the accumulated discrepancy between the student's and teacher's distributions, naturally upweighting earlier tokens and downweighting later ones with larger deviations. We show that IW-OPD converges significantly faster than OPD, with better learning efficiency, and achieves better final performance than standard OPD in both same-size and cross-scale settings, improving performance up to 6.9 points on AIME-2025.

AI.tldr: 本文提出重要性加权在策略蒸馏（IW-OPD），通过根据学生与教师分布的累积偏差对每个token进行差异化加权，解决了标准在策略蒸馏（OPD）中所有token均匀加权导致的后期token监督质量下降问题，在收敛速度和最终性能上均优于标准OPD。
AI.motivation: 标准OPD对所有token进行均匀加权，但研究发现随着学生rollout变长，后期token与教师分布偏差增大，监督质量下降。仅用前30% token即可匹敌全量token，而仅用后30% token几乎无法学习，说明现有均匀加权方式存在根本性缺陷。
AI.method: 通过约束优化的视角对OPD中的token加权问题进行理论分析，推导出重要性加权策略：每个token的权重取决于学生与教师分布之间累积的KL散度差异，自然地对早期token赋予更高权重、对后期token赋予更低权重。
AI.result: IW-OPD相比标准OPD收敛速度显著更快，学习效率更高；在同规模与跨规模设置下均取得更好最终性能，在AIME-2025上提升高达6.9个点。
AI.conclusion: 基于累积分布偏差的重要性加权策略有效解决了OPD中token监督质量退化问题，为知识蒸馏中token级别的优化提供了一个理论驱动的改进方向。

title: TailorMind: Towards Preference-Aligned Multimodal Content Generation
comment: 18 pages, 13 figures, 6 tables. Code available at https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/TailorMind
summary: Personalized content systems depend on available UGC and struggle when suitable content is absent, delayed, or costly to create. Although multimodal generators can synthesize content on demand, how to translate behavioral traces into generation-ready preferences remains underexplored. We study personalized multimodal content generation: creating user-tailored multimodal content without existing item pools or waiting for matching UGC. We propose TailorMind, linking collaborative preference modeling with controllable multimodal generation. TailorMind enriches sparse user histories via hypergraph collaborative filtering and optimizes textual profiles with ranking-error feedback and textual gradient descent. Retrieval-augmented style control grounds outputs in authentic UGC patterns, while cross-modal cohesion reflection reduces semantic drift. We construct TailorBench, a benchmark from three mainstream platforms evaluated along five dimensions: coherence, novelty, aesthetic, hallucination, profiling. Experiments show that TailorMind achieves competitive or stronger coherence, improves novelty and aesthetic quality over representative generation baselines and ground-truth UGC, demonstrating advantages over retrieving available content or comparable UGC, while achieving up to 29% Recall gains in reranking. Our code is released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/TailorMind.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TailorMind框架，通过超图协同过滤丰富稀疏用户历史、基于排序误差反馈和文本梯度下降优化用户画像、结合检索增强风格控制和跨模态一致性反射，实现无需已有内容库或等待UGC的个性化多模态内容生成。在TailorBench基准上，该方法在连贯性、新颖性和美学质量上优于现有生成基线及真实UGC，召回率提升最高达29%。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化内容系统依赖用户生成内容(UGC)，当合适内容缺失、延迟或创建成本高时效果不佳。虽然多模态生成器可合成内容，但如何将用户行为痕迹转化为生成就绪的偏好仍是未探索的问题。
AI.method: 1) 超图协同过滤增强稀疏用户历史；2) 排序误差反馈与文本梯度下降优化用户文本画像；3) 检索增强风格控制确保输出符合真实UGC模式；4) 跨模态一致性反射减少语义漂移。
AI.result: 在三个主流平台构建的TailorBench基准上，TailorMind在连贯性、新颖性和美学质量上优于代表性生成基线和真实UGC，在重排序任务中召回率提升最高达29%。
AI.conclusion: TailorMind有效连接了协同偏好建模与可控多模态生成，在无需已有内容池或等待匹配UGC的情况下，实现了高质量的个性化多模态内容生成。

title: Federated Learning for Global Carbon Emission Forecasting: A Hybrid Time-Series Approach with Statistical and Neural Models
comment: Approximately 22 pages, 5 figures, 15 tables. Submitted for journal publication
summary: Climate change, primarily driven by carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions, requires accurate forecasting tools to support effective mitigation policies and sustainable development strategies. Existing forecasting approaches typically rely on centralized data collection, which is often restricted by privacy regulations and the distributed nature of emission data across countries and industrial sectors. This paper proposes a novel federated hybrid forecasting framework that integrates ARIMA-based trend modeling, GARCH-based volatility modeling, LSTM-Attention temporal representation learning, and XGBoost prediction within a privacy-preserving federated learning environment. The proposed framework enables collaborative learning among distributed clients without requiring the exchange of raw data. Experimental evaluation across 14 clients demonstrates strong forecasting performance, achieving client R2 values between 0.50 and 0.97 with an average of 0.73, RMSE values ranging from 0.06 to 2.35 with an average of 1.21, and MAPE values between 1.5% and 11.3% with an average of 6.5%. The results indicate that the proposed framework provides an accurate, scalable, and regulation-compliant solution for collaborative carbon-emission forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联邦混合预测框架，集成ARIMA、GARCH、LSTM-Attention和XGBoost，在隐私保护的联邦学习环境下实现跨客户端的碳排协作预测，在14个客户端上取得了平均R²=0.73、RMSE=1.21、MAPE=6.5%的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有碳排放预测方法依赖集中式数据收集，但排放数据受隐私法规限制且在国家和产业间呈分布式分布，导致传统方法难以在保护隐私的前提下有效利用多源数据进行协作预测。
AI.method: 提出联邦混合预测框架，集成四种模型：ARIMA用于趋势建模、GARCH用于波动性建模、LSTM-Attention用于时序表征学习、XGBoost用于最终预测，所有组件在联邦学习环境下运行，无需交换原始数据即可实现多客户端协作学习。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种准确、可扩展且符合法规要求的协作式碳排放预测解决方案。

title: Teaching LLMs String Matching, Backtracking, and Error Recovery to Deduce Bases and Truth Tables for the Combinatorially Exploding Bit Manipulation Puzzles
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. 7th Place Solution for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge (Kaggle)
summary:
This paper presents our algorithmic innovations for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge, focusing on Bit Manipulation Puzzles. In this task, the objective is to discover a hidden logical rule transforming input binary strings to outputs, then apply it to unseen inputs. Large Language Models (LLMs) notoriously struggle here; traditional methods force them to simulate complex boolean logic and arithmetic, leading to hallucinations. Furthermore, the search space of bitwise operations (combinations of shifts, rotations, and logic gates) suffers from a severe combinatorial explosion. To overcome this computational intractability, we present a novel approach that abandons arithmetic logic entirely in favor of string similarity, structured search, and autonomous error recovery.
  Our core contributions are: 1. Bases and Truth Table Formulation: We reframe logic-gate deduction into a base-selection task, leveraging string similarity (minimal bit flips) to isolate primitive transformations ("bases") and deduce truth tables without complex arithmetic. 2. Backtracking DFS and Error Recovery: We formalize a search process that tests candidate bases, detects logical collisions across examples, and backtracks upon failure to perform robust error recovery. 3. Bit Tokenization and Interactive Reasoning SFT: We force the tokenizer to encode binary strings as individual single-bit tokens. We use dynamic masking to simulate external oracle feedback, training the model to hypothesize, self-evaluate, and backtrack natively.
  Evaluated on bit manipulation puzzles, our approach achieved over 96% validation accuracy. This represents the highest performance in this category, driving our 7th Place overall finish in the contest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于字符串相似性、结构化搜索和自主错误恢复的方法来解决位操作谜题，在NVIDIA Nemotron模型推理挑战中取得了96%以上的验证准确率并获得总排名第7。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在推理位操作谜题时表现不佳，传统方法强制模型模拟复杂布尔逻辑和算术会导致幻觉，且按位操作的搜索空间存在严重的组合爆炸问题，计算上难以处理。
AI.method: 1) 基与真值表构建：将逻辑门推导重构为基选择任务，利用字符串相似性（最小位翻转）隔离原始变换并推导真值表；2) 回溯DFS与错误恢复：形式化搜索过程，测试候选基，检测逻辑冲突并在失败时回溯进行错误恢复；3) 位分词与交互推理SFT：强制分词器将二进制字符串编码为单个比特令牌，使用动态掩码模拟外部预言机反馈，训练模型进行假设、自我评估和原生回溯。
AI.result: 在位操作谜题评估中达到96%以上的验证准确率，是该类别中最高性能，在竞赛中获得总排名第7。
AI.conclusion: 放弃算术逻辑转而采用基于字符串相似性的结构化搜索方法是解决位操作推理任务的有效途径，能够克服传统方法的计算不可处理性和幻觉问题。

title: Scalable Maximum Entropy Reinforcement Learning for Diffusion Policies via Adjoint Matching
summary: Diffusion policies have recently emerged as a powerful paradigm for representing complex action distributions in reinforcement learning (RL). However, their application to online RL remains limited by the challenge of scalable training in the absence of ground-truth data, where standard optimization techniques such as score matching are not directly applicable. In this work, we introduce a highly efficient algorithm for optimizing diffusion policies by leveraging recent advances in stochastic optimal control. Our approach is based on adjoint matching, which enables simulation-free training and circumvents the need for explicit likelihood estimation or costly backpropagation through the diffusion process. Furthermore, we propose several extensions that improve the robustness and stability of the method in practical settings. Empirical results demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive performance while significantly reducing computational overhead, making diffusion policies more viable for online RL scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于伴随匹配的高效扩散策略优化算法，通过无模拟训练和避免反向传播，显著降低了计算开销，使扩散策略在在线强化学习中更具可行性。
AI.motivation: 扩散策略虽能表示复杂动作分布，但在在线RL中因缺乏真实数据而难以应用标准优化技术（如分数匹配），亟需一种高效且无需真实数据的训练方法。
AI.method: 利用随机最优控制的最新进展，提出伴随匹配（adjoint matching）方法，实现无模拟（simulation-free）训练，避免显式似然估计和通过扩散过程的昂贵反向传播。
AI.result: 在显著降低计算开销的同时实现了具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法使扩散策略在在线RL场景中更加实用，兼顾了性能与效率。

title: PsyBridge: A Hybrid Intelligent Framework for Multi-Dimensional Mental Health Assessment and Decision Support
summary: Mental health assessment commonly relies on isolated screening instruments or data-driven models that often lack interpretability and multi-dimensional integration. Existing approaches frequently focus on individual indicators such as depression or anxiety while providing limited support for comprehensive and explainable decision-making. To address this limitation, this study proposes PsyBridge, a hybrid intelligent decision-support framework designed for multi-dimensional mental health assessment through the integration of clinically validated screening tools, cognitive evaluation, and personality profiling within a unified architecture. The proposed framework incorporates PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments alongside cognitive and behavioural indicators using a modular design and a weighted aggregation mechanism to generate interpretable mental health risk classifications and recommendations. To evaluate the framework, a semi-synthetic dataset consisting of 500 patient profiles representing varying severity levels was constructed based on clinically grounded score distributions. Experimental results demonstrate that PsyBridge achieves an overall accuracy of 0.84, outperforming standalone PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments while improving precision, recall, and F1-score. Sensitivity analysis and ablation studies further indicate that integrating cognitive and personality components contributes to more stable classification performance and reduces inconsistencies in moderate-risk prediction. The findings suggest that PsyBridge provides a scalable and interpretable approach for AI-assisted mental health decision support, particularly within digital healthcare and telehealth environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PsyBridge，一种将临床筛查工具（PHQ-9、GAD-7）、认知评估和人格画像整合到统一架构中的混合智能决策支持框架，用于多维度心理健康评估。在半合成数据集上，该框架准确率达0.84，优于单一筛查工具，并通过加权聚合机制提供可解释的风险分类与建议。
AI.motivation: 现有心理健康评估方法存在两大局限：一是依赖孤立的筛查工具或缺乏可解释性的数据驱动模型，二是通常聚焦于抑郁或焦虑等单一指标，难以支持全面且可解释的决策。
AI.method: PsyBridge采用模块化设计，整合PHQ-9、GAD-7、认知与行为指标，通过加权聚合机制生成可解释的心理健康风险分类与建议。评估使用基于临床得分分布构建的500份半合成患者档案。
AI.result: 整体准确率0.84，优于单一PHQ-9和GAD-7评估；精确率、召回率和F1分数均有提升；敏感度分析与消融实验表明，整合认知与人格组件可提升分类稳定性并减少中度风险预测的不一致性。
AI.conclusion: PsyBridge为AI辅助心理健康决策支持提供了一种可扩展且可解释的方法，尤其适用于数字医疗和远程医疗环境。

title: A Markov Chain Approach to Preference Alignment
summary: We propose Markov Chain from Human Feedback (MCHF), an elementary approach for aligning generative models from pairwise human preferences. Unlike Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), which reduces comparisons to a scalar reward, and Nash Learning from Human Feedback (NLHF), which preserves pairwise utilities through a KL-regularized minimax optimization, MCHF uses pairwise preferences directly to define a transition mechanism over model outputs. Given a pairwise utility $U(x,y)$, which quantifies human preference for $y$ over $x$, and a reference probability distribution $μ_{\mathsf{ref}}$, we define a Markov kernel $\mathsf{P}(x, dy)\propto \exp(U(x,y))μ_{\mathsf{ref}}(dy)$, and take the Markov chain starting from $μ_{\mathsf{ref}}$ as an iterative alignment procedure. We show that MCHF converges geometrically fast to the stationary distribution, with a convergence rate governed by the seminorm $\|U\|_\oplus=\inf_{g,f\in L^\infty(μ_{\mathsf{ref}})}\|U-g\oplus f\|_\infty$, which quantifies the non-transitive structure of the pairwise utility. We further show that a mirror-descent algorithm for NLHF satisfies an analogous structure-adaptive convergence guarantee. Finally, through a perturbation analysis, we prove that when $\|U\|_\oplus$ is small, MCHF and NLHF agree up to first order around an RLHF solution, which yields a unified view of reward-based, game-theoretic, and Markovian approaches to alignment. In particular, for two natural algorithms that converge to the MCHF/NLHF equilibria, we show that the first step of MCHF and NLHF recovers the RLHF solution based on the column-sum reward $\hat{f}(y)=\int μ_{\mathsf{ref}}(dx) U(x, y)$, and starting from the second iteration, both algorithms incorporate the same linear functional of the residual $U-(-\hat f)\oplus \hat f$, which captures the non-transitive structure of the pairwise utility $U$.

AI.tldr: 提出MCHF方法，直接从成对人类偏好定义马尔可夫核来对齐生成模型，证明了其几何收敛速率，并与RLHF和NLHF建立了统一的理论联系。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法中，RLHF将成对偏好简化为标量奖励丢失信息，NLHF通过KL正则化minimax优化保留成对效用但计算复杂。作者希望提出一种更直接、简洁的方法，既能保留成对偏好信息，又具有理论保证。
AI.method: 给定成对效用函数U(x,y)和参考分布μ_ref，定义马尔可夫核P(x,dy)∝exp(U(x,y))μ_ref(dy)，以μ_ref为初始分布运行马尔可夫链进行迭代对齐。分析了收敛速度（由半范数||U||_⊕刻画非传递结构），并与NLHF的镜像下降算法建立联系。
AI.result: MCHF几何收敛到平稳分布，收敛率由刻画成对效用非传递结构的半范数决定。当非传递性较弱时，MCHF和NLHF在RLHF解附近一阶一致。两种算法第一步都恢复基于列和奖励的RLHF解，从第二步开始纳入相同的残差线性泛函。
AI.conclusion: MCHF提供了一种统一奖励基、博弈论和马尔可夫方法对齐视角的框架，成对偏好的非传递结构是决定不同方法行为的关键量。

title: Paraphrasing Attack Resilience of Various AI-Generated Text Detection Methods
summary: The recent large-scale emergence of LLMs has left an open space for dealing with their consequences, such as plagiarism or the spread of false information on the Internet. Coupling this with the rise of AI detector bypassing tools, reliable machine-generated text detection is in increasingly high demand. We investigate the paraphrasing attack resilience of various machine-generated text detection methods, evaluating three approaches: fine-tuned RoBERTa, Binoculars, and text feature analysis, along with their ensembles using Random Forest classifiers. We discovered that Binoculars-inclusive ensembles yield the strongest results, but they also suffer the most significant losses during attacks. In this paper, we present the dichotomy of performance versus resilience in the world of AI text detection, which complicates the current perception of reliability among state-of-the-art techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三种机器生成文本检测方法（微调RoBERTa、Binoculars和文本特征分析）及其集成模型在 paraphrasing 攻击下的韧性，发现包含 Binoculars 的集成模型性能最强但攻击下性能损失也最大，揭示了AI文本检测中性能与韧性之间的二分法。
AI.motivation: LLM的大规模涌现带来了抄袭和虚假信息传播等问题，同时AI检测器绕过工具日益增多，使得可靠的机器生成文本检测需求迫切，但现有方法在 paraphrasing 攻击下的韧性尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 评估三种检测方法：微调RoBERTa、Binoculars、文本特征分析，以及使用随机森林分类器构建的集成模型，测试它们在 paraphrasing 攻击下的表现。
AI.result: 包含Binoculars的集成模型在正常场景下性能最佳，但在 paraphrasing 攻击下性能下降最显著；揭示了性能与韧性之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 当前最先进的AI文本检测技术在性能与攻击韧性之间存在矛盾，这对现有可靠性认知提出了挑战。

title: Foundation Models for Epileptogenic Zone Identification in Drug-Resistant Epilepsy
comment: Keywords: drug-resistant epilepsy, epileptogenic zone, stereo-electroencephalography, signal foundation models, language foundation models
summary: Accurate identification of the epileptogenic zone (EZ) is essential for seizure freedom after resective surgery in drug-resistant epilepsy, yet seizure freedom rates remain below 50%. We developed EpiiSLM, a dual foundation model system for EZ identification with stereo-electroencephalography (sEEG), by training a signal foundation model on 104,990 minutes of sEEG recordings from the Montreal Neurological Institute & Hospital, while leveraging all recordings regardless of surgical outcome and anchoring EZ biomarker extraction on non-epileptic signals. A language foundation model then integrates sEEG-derived outputs with multimodal clinical information to produce interpretable predictions. Under leave-one-patient-out evaluation, EpiiSLM achieved 0.978 contact-level positive predictive value (PPV), outperforming the seizure onset zone(SOZ)-as-EZ baseline by 15.1% (p < 0.05), and 100% region-level accuracy; on an external dataset, EpiiSLM achieved 0.857 contact-level PPV. EpiiSLM requires only one night of interictal sleep data, suggesting potential to reduce invasive sEEG monitoring duration and improve surgical outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EpiiSLM，一种双基础模型系统，用于通过立体脑电图（sEEG）精准识别癫痫致痫区（EZ）。系统包含信号基础模型（在104,990分钟sEEG数据上训练）和语言基础模型，仅需一晚发作间期睡眠数据即可预测。在内部评估中，接触级阳性预测值（PPV）达0.978，区域级准确率100%，外部数据集PPV为0.857，显著优于传统发作起始区（SOZ）方法。
AI.motivation: 耐药性癫痫患者术后癫痫无发作率仍低于50%，精确识别致痫区（EZ）是手术成功的关键。现有方法依赖发作起始区（SOZ），但准确性有限，且需要长时间侵入性监测。
AI.method: 构建双基础模型系统EpiiSLM：1) 信号基础模型在104,990分钟sEEG记录上训练，利用所有记录（无论手术结果）提取基于非癫痫信号的EZ生物标志物；2) 语言基础模型整合sEEG输出与多模态临床信息，生成可解释预测。采用留一患者法评估。
AI.result: 内部评估：接触级PPV 0.978（优于SOZ基线15.1%，p<0.05），区域级准确率100%；外部数据集：接触级PPV 0.857。仅需一晚发作间期睡眠数据。
AI.conclusion: EpiiSLM展示了基础模型在EZ精准定位中的潜力，有望缩短侵入性sEEG监测时间并改善手术预后。

title: LSTM Variants for Chaotic Dynamical Systems: An Empirical Study on the Lorenz Attractor
summary: Forecasting chaotic dynamical systems such as the Lorenz attractor is notoriously difficult: small numerical errors are amplified exponentially over long autoregressive rollouts. We study seven recurrent and convolutional architectures for the AI-DEEDS 2026 Chaotic Systems Challenge: a vanilla LSTM, an LSTM with additive attention, a Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM), a BiLSTM trained with the Huber loss, a Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN), a CNN front-end followed by an LSTM, and a CNN front-end followed by a BiLSTM. All models share the same pre-processing, sequence length, and rollout procedure, isolating the contribution of each design choice. The challenge scores predictions on a 0-100 scale where higher is better. We obtain leaderboard scores between 45.72 and 58.81, with the BiLSTM trained with Huber loss being the strongest configuration. Two findings stand out: (i) adding additive attention to the unidirectional baseline degraded performance by over ten points, and (ii) prepending a CNN front-end to either an LSTM or a BiLSTM did not help and slightly hurt the score. Per-pair RMSE measurements confirm that the BiLSTM family generalizes better in the harder pairs (6-7), while the LSTM + Attention model collapses there (RMSE up to 8.94 on pair 6). We discuss why bidirectional context and a robust loss help in chaotic regimes while attention and CNN front-ends fail in this setting.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了七种递归和卷积架构在AI-DEEDS 2026混沌系统挑战赛中的表现，基于Lorenz吸引子预测任务。所有模型共享相同的数据预处理、序列长度和 rollout 流程，以隔离各设计选择的影响。BiLSTM配合Huber损失取得了最高分（58.81），而注意力机制和CNN前端均未能提升性能，甚至有所损害。
AI.motivation: 混沌动力系统（如Lorenz吸引子）由于数值误差在长程自回归 rollout 中被指数级放大，预测极其困难。作者旨在系统性地比较多种RNN和CNN架构在混沌系统预测中的表现，找出最有效的设计策略。
AI.method: 在统一的数据预处理、序列长度和 rollout 流程下，比较七种架构：vanilla LSTM、LSTM + additive attention、BiLSTM、BiLSTM + Huber损失、TCN、CNN+LSTM、CNN+BiLSTM。评估指标为挑战赛评分（0-100）和逐对RMSE。
AI.result: 所有模型得分在45.72-58.81之间。BiLSTM+Huber损失得分最高（58.81）。LSTM+Attention性能下降超10分。CNN前端+LSTM或BiLSTM均未改善性能，略有下降。BiLSTM家族在困难预测对（6-7）上泛化更好，而LSTM+Attention在该对上RMSE高达8.94。
AI.conclusion: 双向上下文和鲁棒损失函数在混沌系统预测中具有优势；注意力机制和CNN前端在该场景下失效，原因可能是混沌系统的长程依赖特性与注意力机制的匹配性差，以及CNN的空间局部性不适合捕捉混沌系统的全局动态。

title: Clipping the Price of Adaptivity at the Tail
summary: Adaptive stochastic convex optimization (SCO) methods face a fundamental ``price of adaptivity'' barrier: under the standard set of assumptions, they cannot efficiently adapt to large uncertainty in both the initial distance to optimality and the Lipschitz constant. We circumvent this barrier by requiring a small amount of additional structure common to many learning problems. Specifically, we assume that the objective decomposes into a model and a loss function, enabling us to intervene by modifying the model's output before it passes to the loss function. Under this assumption, we design a method that clips the learned model output in tail events where it deviates too much from the output of a fixed reference model. Our method matches the optimal bounds for known-parameter SCO up to logarithmic factors in the uncertainty in the distance and Lipschitz parameters, thus efficiently adapting to large uncertainty in both.

AI.tldr: 本文针对自适应随机凸优化（SCO）中存在的“适应性代价”根本性障碍，通过利用目标函数可分解为模型和损失函数的常见结构，设计了一种对模型输出进行截断的方法，实现了对初始距离和Lipschitz常数双重不确定性的高效自适应，达到已知参数SCO最优界（仅差对数因子）。
AI.motivation: 自适应SCO方法在标准假设下无法同时适应初始距离和Lipschitz常数的大范围不确定性，存在“适应性代价”障碍。本文旨在利用学习问题中常见的额外结构来规避这一障碍。
AI.method: 假设目标函数可分解为模型和损失函数两部分，在模型输出传递至损失函数之前进行干预：当模型输出偏离固定参考模型输出过多时，对模型输出进行截断（clipping）。
AI.result: 所提方法在距离和Lipschitz参数的不确定性范围内，达到了已知参数SCO的最优界（仅差对数因子），从而高效地同时适应了二者的巨大不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 利用目标函数的结构性分解，通过输出截断策略可以绕过自适应SCO的“适应性代价”障碍，实现双重不确定性的高效自适应。

title: SCRUB-FL: Sanitizing and Cleansing Representations via Unlearning of Backdoors
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data, making it a promising paradigm for privacy-sensitive applications. However, its decentralized nature makes it inherently vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where malicious clients embed hidden triggers into local training data to manipulate model predictions. Existing defenses mainly operate during before and during aggregation cannot fully eliminate backdoor behaviors that persist in the converged global model. Moreover, the effectiveness of post-training sanitization is often limited by the server's lack of knowledge of trigger patterns or poisoned clients after convergence, resulting in residual backdoor behaviors or accuracy degradation due to neuron entanglement. To address this limitation, we propose SCRUB-FL (Sanitizing and Cleansing Representations via Unlearning of Backdoors), a two-phase solution for post-training backdoor removal in FL. During training, clients identify suspicious samples using spectral analysis and activation clustering, then train lightweight Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network with Gradient Penalty (WGAN-GP) models to capture trigger-related distributions. The generator parameters are aggregated server-side to construct a global representation of suspicious patterns without exposing raw data. After convergence, the server synthesizes trigger-approximating samples and applies machine unlearning to erase the trigger-target association by redistributing predictions toward a uniform distribution. Experimental evaluations on CIFAR-10 and GTSRB across three attack types and up to 40% malicious participation demonstrate that SCRUB-FL reduces the backdoor attack success rate to as low as 3.88% while maintaining over 91% normal task accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art defenses without requiring prior trigger knowledge or a large clean proxy dataset at the server.

AI.tldr: SCRUB-FL 提出了一种两阶段后门防御框架，利用谱分析和激活聚类识别可疑样本，训练 WGAN-GP 生成触发近似样本，再通过机器遗忘清除后门关联。实验表明，在 CIFAR-10 和 GTSRB 上，面对最多 40% 恶意客户端，攻击成功率降至 3.88%，主任务准确率保持在 91% 以上。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中的后门攻击难以彻底清除，现有聚合前/中防御无法消除收敛全局模型中的后门行为，而训练后净化受限于服务器缺乏触发模式或恶意客户端知识，导致残留后门或精度下降。
AI.method: 两阶段方案：(1) 训练阶段，客户端通过谱分析和激活聚类检测可疑样本，训练轻量 WGAN-GP 捕捉触发相关分布，服务器端聚合生成器参数构建全局可疑模式表征；(2) 收敛后，服务器合成触发近似样本，利用机器遗忘将预测分布重定向至均匀分布以擦除触发-目标关联。
AI.result: 在 CIFAR-10 和 GTSRB 上，面对三种攻击类型和最多 40% 恶意客户端参与，后门攻击成功率最低降至 3.88%，主任务准确率保持在 91% 以上。
AI.conclusion: SCRUB-FL 无需先验触发知识或大型干净代理数据集，即可有效消除收敛后全局模型中的后门行为，优于现有防御方法。

title: Subspace-Constrained Federated Learning with Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Federated low-rank adaptation methods are attractive for fine-tuning large models under communication and privacy constraints, but heterogeneous client data can induce geometric misalignment between local low-rank updates. We study whether this subspace misalignment leads to destructive aggregation and slower convergence in LoRA-based federated learning. We propose a subspace-regularized federated LoRA objective that encourages local client updates to remain close to a shared global reference subspace. We present a complete empirical evaluation on two pretrained models, RoBERTa-large and SmolLM-360M, over HellaSwag in a non-IID 10-client federated setting, across 3 random seeds (42, 43, 44), yielding 24 total experimental runs (4 methods x 3 seeds x 2 models). On RoBERTa-large, Subspace-Reg achieves the strongest mean best accuracy (0.454 +/- 0.023), mean final accuracy (0.429 +/- 0.011), and lowest final loss (1.363) across all three seeds, outperforming FedAvg, SVD redistribution, and FedSVD baselines by a large margin. On SmolLM-360M, FedAvg leads on accuracy, revealing that accuracy gains are model-dependent. Crucially, Subspace-Reg achieves near-perfect basis overlap, approximately 0.9999, on both models and across all seeds, versus 0.958 to 0.991 for all baselines, providing robust support for the geometric alignment hypothesis. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/sadia-sigma-lab/Subspace-Constrained-Federated-learning-with-Lora.

AI.tldr: 本文提出子空间正则化的联邦LoRA方法（Subspace-Reg），通过约束客户端低秩更新与共享全局子空间对齐来解决异构数据下的几何失配问题。实验表明，该方法在RoBERTa-large上显著优于基线方法，并实现近乎完美的子空间对齐（~0.9999），验证了几何对齐假设。
AI.motivation: 联邦低秩适应方法在通信和隐私约束下具有吸引力，但异构客户端数据会导致局部低秩更新之间的几何失配（子空间未对齐），这可能引发破坏性聚合和收敛变慢的问题。
AI.method: 提出子空间正则化的联邦LoRA目标函数，鼓励局部客户端更新保持与共享全局参考子空间接近。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa-large上，Subspace-Reg达到最强平均最佳准确率（0.454±0.023）和最终准确率（0.429±0.011），损失最低（1.363），大幅优于FedAvg、SVD redistribution和FedSVD基线。在SmolLM-360M上，FedAvg在准确率上领先，表明收益具有模型依赖性。关键发现：Subspace-Reg在两种模型上均实现约0.9999的近乎完美基重叠率，而基线仅为0.958-0.991。
AI.conclusion: 子空间正则化策略有效促进了局部与全局子空间的几何对齐，验证了几何对齐假设，但性能提升具有模型依赖性，并非在所有架构上一致优于简单FedAvg。

title: GRADE: Graph Representation of LLM Agent Dependency and Execution
summary: Can one graph represent every kind of LLM agent's run? A trace records what each step did, never what it relied on, the state it read, and the results it reused. GRADE recovers that missing layer: it models any run as one graph over its step nodes with two edge layers, execution edges (what ran in what order) read from the trace for free, and dependency edges (what each step relied on) rarely logged, so each is graded by how it is known, observed, declared, or inferred. One representation, and each layer earns its place. Across six corpora of LLM agents spanning tool use, coding, and the web, the dependency layer can predict failure where run size is weak and, under leave-one-corpus-out transfer, stays above chance on every held-out class while run size fails. Meanwhile, the execution layer localizes the faulting step in a failed multi-agent run. This work also provides a more in-depth analysis of why generic graph neural networks may misread the dependency layer, unlike our feature-based alternative. The same graph representation opens further uses, carrying from failure diagnosis in a single run to efficiency and robustness optimization at scale.

AI.tldr: GRADE提出了一种统一的图表示方法，通过执行边（来自trace）和依赖边（通过分级推断）两层边来建模LLM智能体的运行过程。在六个语料库上，依赖层能预测run size无法识别的失败，执行层能定位故障步骤，且特征方法优于GNN。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM智能体追踪只记录每步做了什么，但缺少每步依赖了什么状态、重用了什么结果的信息，导致无法全面理解智能体的运行行为。
AI.method: 将任何LLM智能体的运行建模为一个统一图，包含步骤节点和两层边：执行边（从trace中直接读取的运行顺序）和依赖边（通过已知、观察、声明或推断四种方式分级获得的依赖关系）。
AI.result: 在六个涵盖工具使用、编码和网页交互的LLM智能体语料库上，依赖层能预测run size无法发现的失败；在留一语料库迁移测试中，依赖层在所有保留类别上表现高于随机水平而run size失效；执行层能定位多智能体运行中的故障步骤。
AI.conclusion: GRADE的统一图表示不仅适用于单次运行的故障诊断，还可扩展到大规模的效率优化和鲁棒性优化。

title: Error Highways: Scaling Predictive Coding to Very Deep Networks
summary: Predictive coding networks (PCNs) offer a biologically-plausible, local-learning alternative to back-propagation of errors (backprop). Nevertheless, they have remained largely confined to shallow architectures and evaluated on simple machine intelligence benchmarks. A central obstacle to scaling PCNs is that the learning signal decays rapidly as it propagates away from the clamped boundaries, leaving interior layers effectively unchanged. To directly counter this problem, we propose highway error propagation (HEP), a scheme that augments the free energy function underlying predictive coding (PC) by altering its neural structure with feedback matrices $V_{L\to i}$ that couple selected hidden states directly to the clamped output error. Since this coupling is linear in the hidden state, the highway pathway delivers a correction at every inference step whose magnitude is independent of depth, in contrast to vanilla PC where the output error reaches the $i$-th hidden layer with attenuation that decays exponentially in depth. This bypasses the Jacobian chain while preserving the local PC synaptic update rule. On MNIST and Fashion-MNIST, we show that HEP effectively trains MLPs of up to 128 layers with accuracy that is robust with respect to depth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出高速公路误差传播（HEP）方案，通过将隐藏状态直接与输出误差线性耦合来增强预测编码网络，解决了传统PCN中学习信号随深度指数衰减的问题，成功训练了多达128层的MLP。
AI.motivation: 预测编码网络虽然具有生物合理性，但难以扩展到深层架构，因为其学习信号在远离边界层时迅速衰减，导致内部层几乎无法更新。
AI.method: 提出高速公路误差传播（HEP），通过引入反馈矩阵V_{L→i}将选定的隐藏状态直接与输出误差线性耦合，使修正信号的幅度与深度无关，绕过雅可比链，同时保留局部PC突触更新规则。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上，HEP有效训练了多达128层的MLP，且准确率对深度具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HEP方案成功解决了PCN中深度扩展的核心障碍，即学习信号的指数衰减问题，为预测编码网络在深层架构中的应用提供了可行路径。

title: One-Step Flow Matching for Generative Modeling of Path-Dependent Physical Fields
summary: Physical simulations for intricate geometries with path-dependent constitutive models face difficulties due to the enormous computational cost they require. Recently, the emergence of generative AI models, which succeed in image and video synthesis tasks, has provided a promise to further improve simulations. Although U-Net-based denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) have been adopted for elastic stress field generation, they typically require hundreds of sampling steps, and applications of generative models to path-dependent, e.g. plastic, stress fields remain very limited. In this work, we propose a novel flow matching (FM) model based on a transformer backbone for high-resolution path-dependent stress field generation with stochastic loading-unloading paths and geometry. The proposed model operates within the latent space of a variational autoencoder (VAE) and formulates the simulation of plastic fields as a video synthesis task, directly generating the stress fields across all time steps. Meanwhile, we design a non-Gaussian source distribution for flow matching, such that crossings among conditional transport paths are reduced during training. This enables our model to generate satisfactory samples in one step without relying on distillation. In addition, we introduce token-level loading embeddings and two auxiliary networks to further enhance the model performance in path-dependent simulation. The results demonstrate that, even with a limited training dataset, our model can accurately generate high-resolution path-dependent fields. It is much more computationally efficient than finite element analysis, providing a speedup of 6 to 7 times over FEM on CPUs and approximately two orders of magnitude speedup on consumer-grade GPUs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer骨架的流匹配（Flow Matching）模型，用于高分辨率路径依赖应力场生成。该模型在变分自编码器（VAE）的潜空间中运作，将塑性场模拟视为视频合成任务，直接生成所有时间步的应力场。通过设计非高斯源分布减少训练中条件传输路径的交叉，实现了一步生成。相比有限元分析，在CPU上加速6-7倍，在消费级GPU上加速约两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 复杂几何体与路径依赖本构模型的物理模拟计算成本极高，而现有的U-Net扩散模型需要数百步采样，且对路径依赖（如塑性）应力场的生成应用非常有限。
AI.method: 1) 基于Transformer骨架的流匹配模型；2) 在VAE潜空间中运作；3) 将塑性场模拟建模为视频合成任务；4) 设计非高斯源分布减少条件传输路径交叉，实现一步生成；5) 引入令牌级加载嵌入和两个辅助网络增强路径依赖模拟性能。
AI.result: 即使训练数据集有限，模型也能准确生成高分辨率路径依赖场。在CPU上比FEM快6-7倍，在消费级GPU上快约两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 提出的流匹配模型成功克服了传统扩散模型采样步数多、对路径依赖问题适用性有限的缺点，实现了高质量、高效率的塑性应力场生成。

title: Noise is Signal: Density-Based Outliers as Leading Indicators of Occupational Emergence in Labor Market Text
summary: Standard NLP pipelines for occupational clustering discard the 10-15% of job postings that density-based methods assign to noise. We argue this is an error: in rapidly evolving domains, low posting density signals novelty, not incoherence. We formalize this as the Emergence-Density Inversion (EDI) hypothesis and test it longitudinally on 84,988 job postings across eight quarters (Q4 2022-Q3 2024). EDI is partially confirmed: high-EOS outlier groups transition to stable clusters in 1.4 +/- 0.6 quarters vs. 4.1 +/- 1.2 for low-EOS groups (p < 0.001), though the signal fails in approximately 19% of cases, which we characterize as a failure analysis. We extend the Emerging Occupation Score (EOS) with Temporal Velocity and Cross-Platform Convergence, improving 2-quarter cluster-formation prediction from F1 = 0.61 to 0.74, outperforming Isolation Forest, LOF, GLOSH, and BERTrend baselines. A retrospective study on three now-established roles (MLOps Engineer, DevOps/SRE, Data Engineer) confirms EOS signalled 2-3 quarters before cluster formation, providing held-out validation. A held-out annotator panel (kappa = 0.74) rates EOS > 0.75 as coherent emerging occupations with 77% precision. Prompt Engineer, AI Safety Researcher, Foundation Model Engineer, and Agent Systems Engineer, all absent from O*NET, are top-4 in Q3 2024 and form stable clusters by Q1 2025.

AI.tldr: 本文提出密度聚类中被归为噪声的职位信息实际上可能代表新兴职业，通过84,988条招聘数据验证了"新兴-密度反转"假说，并扩展了新兴职业评分（EOS），实现了对未来职业簇形成的有效预测。
AI.motivation: 标准NLP管道在职业聚类时丢弃了10-15%被密度方法归为噪声的职位信息，作者认为在快速演化的领域中，低发布密度并不代表无意义噪声，而是职业新颖性的信号，因此需要纠正这一系统性的信息丢弃错误。
AI.method: 提出"新兴-密度反转"(EDI)假说，对84,988条招聘信息进行8个季度(2022Q4-2024Q3)的纵向分析；扩展EOS指标，引入"时间速度"和"跨平台收敛性"两个新维度；使用F1评估聚类形成预测，对比Isolation Forest、LOF、GLOSH、BERTrend等基线方法；并通过人工标注面板(kappa=0.74)进行验证。
AI.result: EDI假说得到部分证实：高EOS离群组向稳定簇转变的时间为1.4±0.6季度，低EOS组为4.1±1.2季度(p<0.001)；约19%情况下信号失效；引入新维度后，2季度簇形成预测F1从0.61提升至0.74；回顾性验证确认EOS在簇形成前2-3季度即发出信号；高EOS>0.75的新兴职业识别精确率为77%。
AI.conclusion: 密度聚类中的噪声点不应被简单丢弃，而应作为新兴职业检测的重要信号源；扩展后的EOS指标能有效预测新兴职业簇的形成；Prompt Engineer、AI Safety Researcher等当前O*NET中缺失的职位已形成稳定簇，表明这些确实是新兴职业。

title: Statistical Matching via Schrödinger Bridge beyond Conditional Independence
summary: Statistical matching combines partially overlapping datasets that share covariates $X$ but observe the target $Y$ and auxiliary variables $Z$ separately. Classical approaches typically invoke the conditional independence assumption (CIA), which makes the problem identifiable but fundamentally implies that the imported auxiliary variable provides no additional predictive power for $Y$ once $X$ is known. To capture this latent $Y$--$Z$ dependence, we propose a novel dependency-aware Schrödinger bridge for predictive statistical matching. Our approach couples the two separated databases by tilting the conservative CIA baseline with a transportation-based compatibility cost, recovering an informative joint distribution. The resulting statistical learning framework yields full probabilistic posterior rules for bidirectional imputation. Theoretically, we establish a sufficient condition under which the learned bridge strictly improves over the CIA baseline, alongside an exact joint recovery guarantee in the Gaussian setting under an appropriate cost. Across synthetic benchmarks and real-world datasets (CelebA and Adult), we demonstrate that our dependency-aware completion consistently improves downstream predictive utility, proving especially beneficial in settings like data recoding where the underlying population exhibits strong $Y$--$Z$ dependence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种依赖感知的薛定谔桥方法用于统计匹配，通过倾斜条件独立假设基线并引入基于传输的兼容性成本，恢复联合分布中Y与Z的依赖关系，在理论上建立了严格优于CIA基线的充分条件及高斯设定下的精确恢复保证，实验验证了该方法在预测效用上的提升。
AI.motivation: 经典统计匹配方法依赖条件独立假设（CIA），该假设虽然使问题可识别，但本质上限定了辅助变量Z在已知X后对目标变量Y无额外预测能力。为捕捉实际数据中存在的Y-Z依赖关系，需要一种能突破CIA限制的新方法。
AI.method: 提出依赖感知的薛定谔桥方法：通过倾斜保守的CIA基线，引入基于传输的兼容性成本，将两个分离数据库耦合起来，恢复信息丰富的联合分布，形成支持双向插补的全概率后验规则。
AI.result: 在合成基准和真实数据集（CelebA、Adult）上，该方法一致性地提升了下游预测效用，尤其在底层总体呈现强Y-Z依赖关系的数据重编码等场景中表现突出。理论上建立了严格优于CIA基线的充分条件，并在高斯设定下给出精确联合恢复保证。
AI.conclusion: 依赖感知的薛定谔桥方法有效突破了CIA的限制，能捕捉Y与Z之间的潜在依赖关系，在统计匹配任务中提供更优的预测性能与理论保障。

title: GeoRouteNet: Geometry-Enhanced Non-Autoregressive Neural Solver for the Traveling Salesman Problem
summary: The traveling salesman problem (TSP) is a canonical NP-hard combinatorial optimization benchmark that tests the representational capacity and generalization of neural solvers. While non-autoregressive (NAR) approaches offer parallel inference, they often lack sufficient geometric inductive bias and stable training signals, leading to degraded performance under cross-scale and cross-distribution shifts. We propose GeoRouteNet, a geometry-enhanced NAR neural solver for Euclidean TSP. On the model side, GeoRouteNet incorporates centered node features, learnable radial distance basis functions, distance-aware graph attention with explicit edge messaging, LayerNorm-SwiGLU feed-forward blocks, and cross-layer attentive residual mixing. On the training side, we design multi-candidate self-comparison reinforcement learning (MCS-RL), which samples multiple candidate tours per instance, constructs adaptive baselines from greedy and peer candidates, and adds winner-candidate guidance with annealed entropy regularization. On 10,000 random TSP50 instances, GeoRouteNet achieves a 0.32% optimality gap under Beam-1000 decoding. On TSP100, the gap is 1.26%. On 27 stratified TSPLIB EUC_2D instances, the overall gap drops from 17.12% (NAR4TSP reproduction) to 3.60%, while batch inference throughput substantially exceeds that of Concorde and LKH3. Ablation studies confirm that geometric structure enhancement and multi-candidate training are complementary: structure improvements dominate cross-distribution gains, while MCS-RL further stabilizes solution quality when paired with a strong geometric encoder.

AI.tldr: GeoRouteNet是一种面向欧几里得TSP的几何增强非自回归神经求解器，通过中心化节点特征、可学习径向基函数、距离感知图注意力、LayerNorm-SwiGLU前馈模块和跨层注意力残差混合等几何归纳偏置设计，结合多候选自对比强化学习训练策略，在TSP50上达到0.32%最优性差距，TSP100上为1.26%，并在TSPLIB基准上将最优性差距从17.12%降至3.60%，同时显著超越Concorde和LKH3的批处理吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 非自回归神经求解器在并行推理方面具有优势，但缺乏足够的几何归纳偏置和稳定的训练信号，导致在跨尺度和跨分布偏移下性能退化。本文旨在设计一种几何增强的非自回归求解器来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 模型方面：中心化节点特征、可学习径向距离基函数、距离感知图注意力与显式边消息传递、LayerNorm-SwiGLU前馈块、跨层注意力残差混合。训练方面：多候选自对比强化学习，每个实例采样多个候选巡游，从贪婪和同伴候选中构建自适应基线，加入胜者候选引导和退火熵正则化。
AI.result: TSP50上0.32%最优性差距（Beam-1000解码），TSP100上1.26%差距，27个分层TSPLIB EUC_2D实例上从17.12%降至3.60%，批处理吞吐量显著超过Concorde和LKH3。
AI.conclusion: 几何结构增强和多候选训练具有互补性：结构改进主导跨分布增益，MCS-RL在强几何编码器下进一步稳定解质量。

title: Explainable AI for Mental Health Prediction in Drug-Affected Populations with Dragonfly Algorithm and GAN Oversampling
comment: Accepted for presenting at the 16th International Conference on Advanced Computer Information Technologies (ACIT 2026). To appear in IEEE conference proceedings
summary: Mental illnesses among drug users are an increasing international issue, particularly in regions where early detection cannot be easily undertaken. The current literature tends to ignore the use of AI-based mental health analysis in drug users, and low quality of the class imbalance treatment, low interpretability, and optimal hyperparameter optimization can lower predictive quality and clinical utility. This study present a detailed, explainable machine learning (ML) model of multiclass mental health prediction, using a multidimensional data set of drug-affected persons. We combine hybrid PCA-Information Gain (PCA-IG) feature selection, Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based oversampling, and Dragonfly Algorithm (DA)-optimized XGBoost to address some of the limitations of existing methods. The suggested framework is effective to work with high-dimensional categorical data, address the issue of class imbalance, and improve predictive performance due to intelligent hyperparameter tuning. The experimental findings show that the XGBoost model optimized using the DA, in combination with GAN-based oversampling, has an accuracy of 94.17% and a weighted F1-score of 93.80%, which is better than the traditional and baseline models. The behavioral, lifestyle, and health factors, particularly sleep quality, physical health, and emotional regulation, are strongly predictive of mental health, with demographic factors having little impact, as seen through feature analysis. SHAP-based explainable AI provides easy-to-understand, instance-level information, enhancing interpretability and trust in models to be used in clinical settings. The results indicate that this framework has the potential to generate valid mental health forecasting tools, which would facilitate early intervention and enhance the treatment of drug-influenced people.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合PCA-IG特征选择、GAN过采样和蜻蜓算法优化XGBoost的可解释机器学习框架，用于药物影响人群的多类精神健康预测，在准确率（94.17%）和加权F1分数（93.80%）上优于传统模型，并通过SHAP提供了实例级可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽略了AI在药物使用者心理健康分析中的应用，且存在类别不平衡处理质量低、可解释性差以及超参数优化不足等问题，导致预测质量和临床实用性下降。
AI.method: 采用混合PCA-信息增益（PCA-IG）特征选择进行降维，生成对抗网络（GAN）过采样处理类别不平衡，蜻蜓算法（DA）优化XGBoost超参数，并使用SHAP进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: DA优化的XGBoost结合GAN过采样达到94.17%准确率和93.80%加权F1分数；特征分析显示睡眠质量、身体健康和情绪调节是强预测因子，人口统计学因素影响较小；SHAP提供了易于理解的实例级解释。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有生成有效的心理健康预测工具的潜力，可促进早期干预并改善药物影响人群的治疗效果。

title: Towards Robust Personalized Federated Learning: Vulnerability Assessment and Defense Co-Design
summary: The proliferation of IoT devices has fueled distributed edge systems to collect vast amounts of sensitive data, creating fertile ground for on-device machine learning applications. While federated learning (FL) mitigates privacy concerns by exchanging model parameters instead of raw data, we identify a critical blind spot in current research. We examine the most commonly used personalized federated learning (PFL) methods, which allow clients to maintain private, personalized models to address data heterogeneity across clients. Through systematic analysis, we reveal that PFL methods exhibit heightened vulnerability to transfer-based adversarial attacks compared to centralized learning paradigms. Wherein, malicious clients can exploit local model knowledge to craft adversarial examples that can compromise peer clients' personalized models. We establish this vulnerability through both theoretical analysis and empirical evaluation across multiple benchmark datasets, demonstrating significant accuracy drops across various PFL methods. To address this challenge, we propose a defense framework combining stochastic input noise, input-scaled trace regularization, and parameter sensitivity maximization to improve FL's robustness. Our findings establish the first systematic study of adversarial threats in PFL systems, providing both diagnostic tools and practical countermeasures.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了联邦学习中的个性化联邦学习（PFL）方法在面对基于迁移的黑盒对抗攻击时的脆弱性，并提出了结合随机输入噪声、输入缩放迹正则化和参数敏感性最大化的防御框架。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习研究忽视了PFL方法相较于集中式学习在面对基于迁移的对抗攻击时存在更高的脆弱性，恶意客户端可利用本地模型知识构造对抗样本攻击其他客户端的个性化模型。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和实证评估，在多个基准数据集上验证PFL方法的脆弱性；提出包含随机输入噪声、输入缩放迹正则化和参数敏感性最大化的防御框架。
AI.result: 多种PFL方法在基于迁移的黑盒对抗攻击下准确率显著下降，防御框架有效提升了联邦学习的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次系统性地探讨了PFL系统中的对抗性威胁，提供了诊断工具和实用对策。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Learning for Enzyme-Substrate Interaction Prediction Under Low-Homology Shift
summary: Enzyme substrate interaction (ESI) prediction is a fundamental computational task for biocatalyst discovery and reaction screening in large biochemical spaces. In practical settings, ESI prediction is challenged by sparse positive supervision and low-homology distribution shift, where test enzymes share limited sequence identity with those observed during training. To address these challenges, we propose RAMMESI, a retrieval-augmented multimodal framework for robust ESI prediction. RAMMESI learns explicit pairwise enzyme-substrate representations through directional cross-modal interaction modeling and adaptive fusion. To enhance robustness, RAMMESI retrieves neighboring enzymes at inference time, recombines them with the query substrate, and aggregates the resulting pairwise predictions as contextual evidence. To improve learning under sparse positive supervision, we further adopt an imbalance-aware weighted-BCE objective. Experiments on two ESI benchmarks under sequence-identity-aware splits demonstrate that RAMMESI achieves consistently strong performance, with particular advantages in more challenging low-identity regimes. In addition, the retrieval module improves multiple ESI backbones in a plug-and-play manner, suggesting that retrieval provides a general mechanism for improving robustness under homology shift.

AI.tldr: RAMMESI是一个检索增强的多模态框架，通过方向性跨模态交互建模、自适应融合、推理时近邻酶检索和重组，以及不平衡感知加权BCE损失，实现鲁棒的酶-底物相互作用预测，在低序列同源性分布偏移和稀疏正监督条件下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 酶-底物相互作用预测面临两大挑战：稀疏的正监督信号和低同源性分布偏移（测试酶与训练酶序列一致性低），现有方法在这些实际场景下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 1) 学习显式成对酶-底物表示，通过方向性跨模态交互建模和自适应融合；2) 推理时检索邻近酶并与查询底物重组，聚合产生的成对预测作为上下文证据；3) 采用不平衡感知的加权二元交叉熵损失应对稀疏正监督。
AI.result: 在两个ESI基准数据集上，基于序列一致性感知的数据划分，RAMMESI表现持续优异，在更具挑战性的低序列一致性场景下优势尤为明显。检索模块以即插即用方式提升了多个ESI骨干网络的性能。
AI.conclusion: 检索提供了一种通用机制来提升同源性偏移下的鲁棒性，RAMMESI框架有效解决了实际ESI预测中的关键挑战。

title: Understanding Parallel Samplers in Masked Diffusion via Random Walks on Graphs
summary:
In this paper, we propose using random walks on graphs as a verifiable sandbox to study different parallel sampling strategies in masked diffusion models (MDMs). We train an MDM on random walk samples from a fixed graph. The graph or the transition kernel is never shown to the model explicitly and plays the role of latent structure in the sequences, albeit one that is controllable and can be used for quantitative evaluation. Thus, this framework enjoys a Sudoku-like validity check: verifying that an output is a valid walk and estimating the Markov kernel from the walks to measure distribution fidelity.
  Using simple graphs, we theoretically prove that parallel unmasking via widely used scores like lowest entropy is not uniformly better than a random parallel sampler; the performance critically depends on the structure of the underlying graph. We develop a new bisection sampler for random walks, which takes logarithmic steps in the sequence length and is provably exact under perfect training. Experiments on various graph walk tasks show that different parallel samplers are better for different graphs even in practice. Our initial experiments on a pretrained OpenWebText MDM show that the bisection-style samplers improve speed-quality tradeoffs even for language generation. Together, these results position graph random walks as a mechanistic benchmark for diagnosing and designing parallel samplers for masked diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出以图上的随机游走作为可验证的沙盒环境，研究掩码扩散模型中不同的并行采样策略。通过理论证明和实验验证，发现并行采样器的性能依赖于底层图结构，并开发了一种新的二分采样器，在对数步内实现精确采样，在语言生成任务上也展现出速度-质量权衡的改进。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码扩散模型的并行采样策略缺乏可控、可定量评估的理论验证环境，难以判断不同采样策略的优劣。
AI.method: 将固定图上的随机游走作为训练数据，模型未知图结构和转移核；通过理论分析证明最低熵等并行解掩码策略并非普遍优于随机采样；提出二分采样器，利用序列长度的对数步实现精确采样。
AI.result: 理论证明并行采样器性能取决于底层图结构；实验表明不同图结构下最优采样器不同；二分采样器在随机游走任务和OpenWebText语言生成任务上均改善了速度-质量权衡。
AI.conclusion: 图随机游走可作为诊断和设计掩码扩散模型并行采样器的机制化基准，二分采样器具有理论保证和实际优势。

title: BranchShine: Compact Raw-Audio-to-IPA Transcription with a RoPE E-Branchformer Encoder
summary: Speech-to-IPA transcription is useful when the desired output is pronunciation rather than orthographic text, but competitive multilingual systems are often large and evaluation is sensitive to normalization choices. This paper presents BranchShine, a 33M-parameter raw-audio CTC recognizer with a lightweight convolutional front end and a 19-block RoPE E-Branchformer encoder. We find that BranchShine provides a compact and competitive operating point for IPA transcription under matched normalization and scoring. On a 16,660-utterance multilingual test set covering 41 language labels, BranchShine obtains 9.19% whitespace-insensitive IPA character error rate, compared with 9.78% for the 575.00M-parameter PhoneticXEUS baseline. A secondary child speech reading analysis shows a complementary operating profile: BranchShine is more conservative on incorrect readings, while Whisper-Medium is stronger on exact acceptance of correct readings. Overall, the results indicate that a compact raw-audio-to-IPA model can approach much larger baselines on character-level IPA transcription.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 BranchShine，一个 33M 参数的原始音频到 IPA 转录模型，在 41 种语言的测试集上达到 9.19% 字符错误率，接近 575M 参数的 PhoneticXEUS 基线（9.78%），展示了紧凑模型在大规模 IPA 转录任务上的竞争力。
AI.motivation: 语音到 IPA 转录在需要发音而非正字法文本的场景下非常有用，但多语言系统通常体量庞大，且评估对归一化方式敏感。作者希望探索紧凑模型能否在 IPA 转录任务上接近大规模基线的表现。
AI.method: BranchShine 采用 33M 参数，包含轻量级卷积前端和 19 块 RoPE E-Branchformer 编码器，使用 CTC 损失函数进行原始音频到 IPA 的端到端转录。评估时确保归一化和评分策略一致，以进行公平比较。
AI.result: 在涵盖 41 个语言标签的 16,660 条多语言测试集上，BranchShine 实现了 9.19% 的不区分空格的 IPA 字符错误率，而 575M 参数的 PhoneticXEUS 基线为 9.78% 。在儿童语音阅读分析中，BranchShine 对错误朗读更保守，Whisper-Medium 则在正确朗读的精确接受上更强。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑的原始音频到 IPA 模型可以在字符级 IPA 转录任务上接近更大规模基线的表现，为构建轻量级多语言发音转录系统提供了可行方案。

title: Group-Graph Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Group-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) has significantly enhanced Large Language Models (LLMs) in agentic scenarios. To achieve finer-grained policy updates, recent agentic RL frameworks have shifted from trajectory-level to step-level training. However, long-horizon agentic RL suffers from severe reward sparsity and delay, as feedback is often deferred for dozens of interaction steps. While existing step-level frameworks refine training granularity, their credit assignment remains coarse-grained and still treats agent exploration as isolated, linear trajectories. This oversimplified perspective ignores the inherent graph structure of state transitions, leading to high-variance state-value estimation and myopic, localized credit assignment. To overcome these critical bottlenecks, we propose Group-Graph Policy Optimization (G2PO), a novel group-based RL algorithm tailored for multi-turn agentic tasks. G2PO explicitly transforms linear interaction trajectories into a global state-transition graph. By aggregating identical observations across different trajectories, we introduce group-aggregation state-value estimation that reduces sampling variance and trajectory-dependent bias. Furthermore, we redefine agent actions as transitions between state nodes and propose an edge-centric advantage estimation strategy. By globally standardizing Temporal Difference (TD) errors across the entire graph, G2PO explicitly identifies and prioritizes critical transitions that drive absolute task progress. Extensive experiments on representative long-horizon benchmarks-WebShop, ALFWorld, and AppWorld-demonstrate that G2PO substantially outperforms state-of-the-art prompt-based and RL baselines, achieving remarkable success rate improvements of up to 22.2% over GRPO.

AI.tldr: G2PO是一种基于组的图策略优化算法，将智能体的线性交互轨迹转化为全局状态转移图，通过组聚合状态值估计和边中心化优势估计，解决长程智能体强化学习中的奖励稀疏、延迟和信用分配粗粒度问题，在WebShop、ALFWorld和AppWorld上相比GRPO提升高达22.2%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体强化学习从轨迹级转向步级训练，但长程任务中奖励稀疏且延迟严重；现有步级框架的信用分配仍较粗粒度，将探索视为孤立线性轨迹，忽略状态转移的图结构，导致状态值估计方差高且信用分配短视局部化。
AI.method: 提出G2PO算法：1) 将线性轨迹显式转化为全局状态转移图；2) 跨轨迹聚合相同观测，引入组聚合状态值估计降低采样方差和轨迹依赖偏差；3) 将动作定义为状态节点间的边，提出边中心化优势估计策略，在整个图上全局标准化时序差分误差，识别并优先优化推动任务绝对进展的关键转移。
AI.result: 在WebShop、ALFWorld和AppWorld三个长程基准上，G2PO显著优于当前最优的基于提示和基于RL的基线方法，相比GRPO成功率提升最高达22.2%。
AI.conclusion: G2PO通过图结构化的信用分配机制有效缓解了长程智能体RL中的奖励稀疏和延迟问题，为多轮智能体任务提供了一种更高效的组级强化学习范式。

title: CLIP-guided Diffusion Model for Backdoor Generation in Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Sensors are critical components of modern intelligent devices. The proliferation of the Internet of Things (IoT) and wearable mobile devices has enabled the integration of such sensors to monitor the environment and enable users to take predictive actions. Human activity recognition (HAR) is a popular application in which Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU)-based sensors, such as accelerometers and gyroscopes, are used to provide insights into health, training, and medical diagnosis. However, the accuracy of such a model is hindered by the lack of data. The diffusion model-based technique has proven successful in generating synthetic data for training HAR models. In this paper, we propose a backdoor training technique, IMU-DM-CLIP, that leverages a diffusion model to enable trigger-based attacks on HAR models. Our empirical analysis shows that the attack is successful even with a very small backdoor injection rate of 10\% and 10\% of the data guided for the diffusion model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMU-DM-CLIP，一种基于扩散模型的后门攻击技术，利用极少数据（10%注入率+10%引导数据）即可成功攻击人类活动识别模型。
AI.motivation: HAR模型因数据匮乏导致准确率受限，扩散模型虽能生成合成数据提升性能，但尚未被充分研究其安全风险。作者旨在揭示扩散模型在HAR系统中可能被恶意利用进行后门攻击的漏洞。
AI.method: 提出IMU-DM-CLIP框架，结合扩散模型与CLIP架构，在IMU传感器数据中植入触发器，仅需10%的后门注入率和10%的扩散模型引导数据即可实施攻击。
AI.result: 实验证明该攻击在极低的后门注入率（10%）和扩散模型引导数据比例（10%）下仍能成功实施，表明攻击具有高效性和隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型在HAR数据增强场景下存在安全脆弱性，IMU-DM-CLIP成功展示了低数据依赖的后门攻击可行性，警示相关系统需加强防御机制。

title: RLM-Cascade: Response-Level Speculative Decoding for Cost-Efficient LLM API Serving
summary: We present RLM-Cascade, a proxy-layer system that applies speculative decoding at the response level to reduce LLM API costs without requiring model architecture access or a shared vocabulary. A fast, inexpensive draft model generates a candidate response; a capable verify model accepts, enhances, or is bypassed entirely depending on a lightweight complexity router. On a real-world agentic coding workload (Claude Code), RLM-Cascade achieves a draft-use rate of 88.8% across 125 production requests, reducing API cost by 45.8% relative to a direct Opus baseline. Counter-intuitively, the proxy also reduces end-to-end latency: median response time is 2,026 ms versus 3,698 ms for Native Opus -- a 1.83X speedup at p50 -- because the SKIPPED path (DeepSeek only, no Opus call) dominates the workload distribution. Quality matches or exceeds the Opus baseline: 100% pass rate on a 20-task Code/Math/Instruct benchmark versus 95% for Native Opus. We further describe a rule-based complexity router that selects the SKIPPED path for simple agentic turns and a hybrid tool-call strategy that bypasses the speculative pipeline for schema-critical tool-selection turns. RLM-Cascade is deployed in production as an enterprise AI infrastructure component and published as open source with a live metrics dashboard and Prometheus endpoint.

AI.tldr: RLM-Cascade 是一个位于代理层的投机解码系统，通过在响应级别进行推测解码，在无需修改模型架构或共享词表的情况下，将 LLM API 成本降低 45.8%，同时将中位延迟从 3,698ms 降至 2,026ms（1.83 倍加速），并在基准测试中达到 100% 通过率，优于原生 Opus 的 95%。系统已在生产环境中部署并开源。
AI.motivation: 降低 LLM API 调用成本，同时避免对模型架构的侵入性修改需求（无需访问模型架构或共享词表），并解决推测解码在响应级别的应用问题。
AI.method: 提出 RLM-Cascade 代理层系统，包含三个核心组件：(1) 快速廉价草稿模型（DeepSeek）生成候选响应；(2) 轻量级复杂度路由器，根据任务复杂度决定是否跳过验证模型（Opus），分为 SKIPPED（仅草稿模型）、ACCEPTED（验证模型接受草稿）、ENHANCED（验证模型增强草稿）三条路径；(3) 验证模型（Opus）对候选响应进行接受或增强。此外还设计了混合工具调用策略，对模式关键的 tool-selection 回合绕过推测流水线。
AI.result: 在 Claude Code 真实生产环境的 125 个请求中，草稿使用率达到 88.8%，API 成本降低 45.8%。中位延迟从 3,698ms 降至 2,026ms（1.83 倍加速），其中 SKIPPED 路径（仅 DeepSeek，无 Opus 调用）主导了工作负载分布。在 20 个 Code/Math/Instruct 基准任务上，通过率 100%，优于原生 Opus 的 95%。
AI.conclusion: RLM-Cascade 证明了一种无需修改模型架构或共享词表的代理层推测解码方案能够同时实现成本降低、延迟加速和质量提升，且已成功部署于生产环境并开源，为 LLM 推理优化提供了新的实用范式。

title: Self-Evolution for Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Agents via Divergence-Point Preference Learning
summary: Multi-turn tool-using agents must coordinate long-horizon tool sequences while tracking dialogue state and policy constraints. Existing approaches often separate inference-time orchestration from parameter-level learning, leaving tool selection weakly structured and preference updates vulnerable to train--deployment prompt mismatch. For within-benchmark self-improvement, ToolGraph combines schema-derived topology, transition weights estimated from successful rollouts, and history-aware controls for write prerequisites and repeated-search loops. We then construct 161 preference pairs by locating divergence points via state-based matching and prefix-based alignment, filtered through action-correctness annotations, and train DPO under the same ToolGraph context used at inference. Across 375 tau2-bench tasks, ToolGraph raises the weighted average reward from 0.304 to 0.338 (+11.2% relative), while ToolGraph+DPO reaches 0.355 (+16.8% over the baseline), with the DPO gain concentrated in airline and retail. Fine-grained diagnostics further show that roughly half of telecom trajectories exhaust the step budget before action execution and that chosen reward positivity is the most useful checkpoint signal across our 16 evaluated DPO configurations.

AI.tldr: ToolGraph结合了基于模式拓扑、过渡权重和历史感知控制的结构化工具编排，并通过DPO进行偏好优化，在375个tau2-bench任务中将加权平均奖励从0.304提升至0.355（+16.8%）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将推理时编排与参数级学习分离，导致工具选择结构松散，偏好更新易受训练-部署提示不匹配的影响。
AI.method: 提出ToolGraph方法：1) 利用模式导出的拓扑结构、成功轨迹估计的过渡权重和历史感知控制（写前置条件和重复搜索循环）；2) 通过状态匹配和前缀对齐定位分歧点，构建161个偏好对，在相同ToolGraph上下文中进行DPO训练。
AI.result: 在375个tau2-bench任务中，ToolGraph将加权平均奖励从0.304提升至0.338（+11.2%），ToolGraph+DPO达到0.355（+16.8%），DPO增益主要集中在航空和零售领域。
AI.conclusion: 结构化工具图谱能有效提升多轮工具使用代理的性能，DPO可在相同推理上下文中进一步带来增量收益；约半数电信轨迹在动作执行前耗尽步骤预算，选择奖励正向性是DPO配置中最有用的检查点信号。

title: The Unseen Hand: Manipulating Model Fairness and SHAP with Targeted Identity Re-Association Attacks
summary: As machine learning models grow more influential and opaque, algorithmic fairness and explainability are critical for ensuring accountability. However, we demonstrate that these auditing mechanisms are themselves vulnerable to subtle manipulation, camouflaging the influence of protected features. While prior work on data-agnostic attacks has exposed this vulnerability, they leave behind detectable artifacts that compromise their stealth. We introduce Targeted Identity Re-Association (TIRA) attacks, a novel family of attacks that iteratively and probabilistically manipulate a model's outputs without requiring access to the model's internals or feature representations. We formalize two algorithms: Probabilistic Micro-Shuffling (PMiS), which applies localized adjacent swaps, and Probabilistic Rank-Shift Micro-Perturbation (PRSMP), which introduces small, randomized rank shifts. We empirically demonstrate that TIRA attacks are highly effective at pushing fairness metrics towards ideal values. Crucially, TIRA attacks successfully confound SHAP-based explanations, leaving effectively zero residual attribution for protected features, a major improvement over prior work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIRA攻击家族（包括PMiS和PRSMP两种算法），能够在无需访问模型内部结构的情况下，通过迭代概率性操纵模型输出，隐蔽地掩盖受保护特征的公平性与可解释性审计，相比先前方法显著减少检测痕迹。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型日益不透明，公平性与可解释性审计机制至关重要，但这些审计机制本身易受微妙操纵。现有数据无关攻击虽已暴露此漏洞，但留下可检测伪影，影响隐蔽性。本文旨在开发更隐蔽的攻击方法以规避审计。
AI.method: 提出Targeted Identity Re-Association (TIRA)攻击家族，包含两种算法：Probabilistic Micro-Shuffling (PMiS)通过局部相邻交换实现概率性微扰；Probabilistic Rank-Shift Micro-Perturbation (PRSMP)引入小规模随机排名偏移。两种方法均无需访问模型内部结构或特征表示。
AI.result: TIRA攻击能有效将公平性指标推向理想值，并能成功混淆基于SHAP的解释，使受保护特征的残差归因几乎为零，显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: TIRA攻击揭示了公平性与可解释性审计机制在面对隐蔽操纵时的脆弱性，强调了需要更鲁棒的审计方法。

title: When AUC 0.998 Is Not Enough: A Candidate Evaluation Protocol for Hidden-State Probes of Indirect Prompt Injection in Multimodal Computer-Use Agents
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures. Camera-ready version for EvalMG '26, The 2nd Workshop on Evaluation for Multimodal Generation, co-located with SIGIR 2026
summary: Hidden-state probing -- a linear classifier on a frozen vision-language model's internal activations -- has emerged as an attractive evaluation tool for flagging indirect prompt injection (IPI) in multimodal computer-use agents before the agent emits a corrupted action. We argue, on a single-backbone cautionary case study (Qwen2.5-VL-7B on Mind2Web, teacher-forced replay), that a high probing AUC on a clean-vs-attack split is not, on its own, evidence of malicious-content detection. Two post-hoc diagnostics -- a paired-construction scalar baseline on text-side injections, and same-step nuisance-matched visual controls on the overlay surface -- do not license an unqualified malicious-content interpretation of the headline while leaving room for partly-semantic readings. We package the diagnostics as a candidate control set with reporting heuristics for what a high clean-vs-attack AUC does and does not license. Labels are injection-surface-present, not attack success; generalisation beyond this backbone and benchmark is a conjecture.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一个单骨干案例研究（Qwen2.5-VL-7B在Mind2Web上的教师强制回放），论证了隐状态探针在干净vs攻击分割上的高AUC并不能单独作为恶意内容检测的证据。提出了两种事后诊断方法，并将其打包为候选控制集及报告启发式方法，以明确高AUC所能和不能证明的结论。
AI.motivation: 隐状态探针已被广泛用作多模态计算机使用代理中检测间接提示注入（IPI）的评估工具，但其高AUC是否真正意味着检测到了恶意内容尚不明确，需要对其有效性进行严格审视。
AI.method: 采用单骨干案例研究（Qwen2.5-VL-7B，Mind2Web数据集，教师强制回放），通过两种事后诊断方法进行分析：(1) 文本侧注入的配对构建标量基线；(2) 覆盖面上同步骤 nuisance 匹配的视觉控制。
AI.result: 高探测AUC本身不能作为恶意内容检测的充分证据；标签反映的是注入表面的存在，而非攻击是否成功；超出该骨干网络和基准的泛化能力仍属推断。
AI.conclusion: 研究者应将所提出的诊断方法作为候选控制集，并遵循报告启发式方法，以正确解释高AUC的含义，避免对其赋予未经证实的恶意内容检测解读。

title: Discovering Crystal Structure Prediction Algorithms with an AI Co-Scientist
summary: We introduce Human-AI Co-discovery system (HACO) for scientific algorithm discovery through cross-domain search and sparse human steering. Starting from the goal of generating crystal structures from chemical compositions, HACO searched across generative modeling methodologies from multiple fields and identified MaskGIT, a masked generative model from vision, as a promising framework for crystal structure prediction (CSP). HACO instantiated this masked formulation as a discrete token model of crystal structure; guided by sparse high-level human objectives, it then added crystallographic symmetry tokens, space group stratified sampling for polymorph coverage, and sub-bin coordinate refinement, yielding the Masked Generative Crystal Transformer (MaskGXT). On the MP-20 polymorph split, MaskGXT reaches 79.06% match-everyone-to-reference (METRe) accuracy, compared with 70.87% for the strongest evaluated baseline. MaskGXT also attains the best match rate on standard MP-20 and MPTS-52 CSP benchmarks. These results provide evidence that, in domains offering cheap, fast, and well-aligned validation, transfer-guided interactive AI co-scientists can contribute to scientific algorithm discovery by identifying transferable modeling principles and combining them with targeted human domain guidance.
